FILE: app/api/clients/[clientId]/nutrition-protocols/[protocolId]/route.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
     2	import { createClient as createServerClient } from '@/utils/supabase/server'
     3	import { createClient as createServiceClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js'
     4	import { z } from 'zod'
     5	
     6	function serviceClient() {
     7	  return createServiceClient(
     8	    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
     9	    process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!
    10	  )
    11	}
    12	
    13	async function resolveProtocol(coachId: string, clientId: string, protocolId: string) {
    14	  const db = serviceClient()
    15	  const { data: cc } = await db
    16	    .from('coach_clients')
    17	    .select('id')
    18	    .eq('id', clientId)
    19	    .eq('coach_id', coachId)
    20	    .single()
    21	  if (!cc) return null
    22	
    23	  const { data } = await db
    24	    .from('nutrition_protocols')
    25	    .select(`*, days:nutrition_protocol_days(*), schedule_slots:nutrition_protocol_schedule_slots(*)`)
    26	    .eq('id', protocolId)
    27	    .eq('client_id', clientId)
    28	    .single()
    29	  if (!data) return null
    30	
    31	  return {
    32	    ...data,
    33	    days: (data.days ?? []).sort((a: { position: number }, b: { position: number }) => a.position - b.position),
    34	    schedule_slots: (data.schedule_slots ?? []).sort(
    35	      (a: { week_index: number; dow: number }, b: { week_index: number; dow: number }) =>
    36	        a.week_index - b.week_index || a.dow - b.dow,
    37	    ),
    38	  }
    39	}
    40	
    41	export async function GET(
    42	  _req: NextRequest,
    43	  { params }: { params: Promise<{ clientId: string; protocolId: string }> }
    44	) {
    45	  const { clientId, protocolId } = await params
    46	  const supabase = await createServerClient()
    47	  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser()
    48	  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 })
    49	
    50	  const protocol = await resolveProtocol(user.id, clientId, protocolId)
    51	  if (!protocol) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Not found' }, { status: 404 })
    52	
    53	  return NextResponse.json({ protocol })
    54	}
    55	
    56	const updateDaySchema = z.object({
    57	  id: z.string().uuid().optional(),
    58	  name: z.string().min(1).max(200).optional(),
    59	  position: z.number().int().min(0).optional(),
    60	  calories: z.number().nullable().optional(),
    61	  protein_g: z.number().nullable().optional(),
    62	  carbs_g: z.number().nullable().optional(),
    63	  fat_g: z.number().nullable().optional(),
    64	  hydration_ml: z.number().int().nullable().optional(),
    65	  carb_cycle_type: z.enum(['high', 'medium', 'low']).nullable().optional(),
    66	  cycle_sync_phase: z.enum(['follicular', 'ovulatory', 'luteal', 'menstrual']).nullable().optional(),
    67	  recommendations: z.string().nullable().optional(),
    68	})
    69	
    70	const updateSchema = z.object({
    71	  name: z.string().min(1).max(200).optional(),
    72	  notes: z.string().nullable().optional(),
    73	  schedule_start_date: z.string().regex(/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/).nullable().optional(),
    74	  cycle_sync_enabled: z.boolean().optional(),
    75	  tdee_auto_enabled: z.boolean().optional(),
    76	  tdee_adaptive_active: z.boolean().optional(),
    77	  tdee_reference: z.number().int().positive().optional(),
    78	  schedule_slots: z.array(z.object({
    79	    week_index: z.number().int().min(1).max(4),
    80	    dow: z.number().int().min(1).max(7),
    81	    protocol_day_position: z.number().int().min(0),
    82	  })).optional(),
    83	  days: z.array(updateDaySchema).optional(),
    84	})
    85	
    86	export async function PATCH(
    87	  req: NextRequest,
    88	  { params }: { params: Promise<{ clientId: string; protocolId: string }> }
    89	) {
    90	  const { clientId, protocolId } = await params
    91	  const supabase = await createServerClient()
    92	  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser()
    93	  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 })
    94	
    95	  const existing = await resolveProtocol(user.id, clientId, protocolId)
    96	  if (!existing) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Not found' }, { status: 404 })
    97	
    98	  const body = updateSchema.safeParse(await req.json())
    99	  if (!body.success) return NextResponse.json({ error: body.error }, { status: 400 })
   100	
   101	  const db = serviceClient()
   102	
   103	  if (body.data.name !== undefined || body.data.notes !== undefined || body.data.schedule_start_date !== undefined || body.data.cycle_sync_enabled !== undefined || body.data.tdee_auto_enabled !== undefined || body.data.tdee_adaptive_active !== undefined || body.data.tdee_reference !== undefined) {
   104	    const updates: Record<string, unknown> = {}
   105	    if (body.data.name !== undefined) updates.name = body.data.name
   106	    if (body.data.notes !== undefined) updates.notes = body.data.notes
   107	    if (body.data.schedule_start_date !== undefined) updates.schedule_start_date = body.data.schedule_start_date
   108	    if (body.data.cycle_sync_enabled !== undefined) updates.cycle_sync_enabled = body.data.cycle_sync_enabled
   109	    if (body.data.tdee_auto_enabled !== undefined) updates.tdee_auto_enabled = body.data.tdee_auto_enabled
   110	    if (body.data.tdee_adaptive_active !== undefined) updates.tdee_adaptive_active = body.data.tdee_adaptive_active
   111	    if (body.data.tdee_reference !== undefined) updates.tdee_reference = body.data.tdee_reference
   112	    await db.from('nutrition_protocols').update(updates).eq('id', protocolId)
   113	  }
   114	
   115	    if (body.data.days !== undefined) {
   116	      const allDaysHaveIds =
   117	        body.data.days.length > 0 && body.data.days.every((d) => Boolean(d.id))
   118	
   119	      if (allDaysHaveIds) {
   120	        for (const d of body.data.days) {
   121	          const updates: Record<string, unknown> = {}
   122	
   123	          if (d.name !== undefined) updates.name = d.name
   124	          if (d.position !== undefined) updates.position = d.position
   125	          if (d.calories !== undefined) updates.calories = d.calories
   126	          if (d.protein_g !== undefined) updates.protein_g = d.protein_g
   127	          if (d.carbs_g !== undefined) updates.carbs_g = d.carbs_g
   128	          if (d.fat_g !== undefined) updates.fat_g = d.fat_g
   129	          if (d.hydration_ml !== undefined) updates.hydration_ml = d.hydration_ml
   130	          if (d.carb_cycle_type !== undefined) updates.carb_cycle_type = d.carb_cycle_type
   131	          if (d.cycle_sync_phase !== undefined) updates.cycle_sync_phase = d.cycle_sync_phase
   132	          if (d.recommendations !== undefined) updates.recommendations = d.recommendations
   133	
   134	          if (Object.keys(updates).length > 0) {
   135	            await db
   136	              .from('nutrition_protocol_days')
   137	              .update(updates)
   138	              .eq('protocol_id', protocolId)
   139	              .eq('id', d.id)
   140	          }
   141	        }
   142	      } else {
   143	        const invalidDay = body.data.days.find((d) => !d.name || d.position === undefined)
   144	
   145	        if (invalidDay) {
   146	          return NextResponse.json(
   147	            { error: 'Each protocol day requires name and position when replacing days.' },
   148	            { status: 400 },
   149	          )
   150	        }
   151	
   152	        await db.from('nutrition_protocol_days').delete().eq('protocol_id', protocolId)
   153	        const daysToInsert = body.data.days.map(d => ({
   154	          protocol_id: protocolId,
   155	          name: d.name!,
   156	          position: d.position!,
   157	          calories: d.calories ?? null,
   158	          protein_g: d.protein_g ?? null,
   159	          carbs_g: d.carbs_g ?? null,
   160	          fat_g: d.fat_g ?? null,
   161	          hydration_ml: d.hydration_ml ?? null,
   162	          carb_cycle_type: d.carb_cycle_type ?? null,
   163	          cycle_sync_phase: d.cycle_sync_phase ?? null,
   164	          recommendations: d.recommendations ?? null,
   165	        }))
   166	        await db.from('nutrition_protocol_days').insert(daysToInsert)
   167	      }
   168	    }
   169	
   170	  if (body.data.schedule_slots !== undefined) {
   171	    await db.from('nutrition_protocol_schedule_slots').delete().eq('protocol_id', protocolId)
   172	    if (body.data.schedule_slots.length > 0) {
   173	      const slotsToInsert = body.data.schedule_slots.map((slot) => ({
   174	        protocol_id: protocolId,
   175	        week_index: slot.week_index,
   176	        dow: slot.dow,
   177	        protocol_day_position: slot.protocol_day_position,
   178	      }))
   179	      await db.from('nutrition_protocol_schedule_slots').insert(slotsToInsert)
   180	    }
   181	  }
   182	
   183	  const updated = await resolveProtocol(user.id, clientId, protocolId)
   184	  return NextResponse.json({ protocol: updated })
   185	}
   186	
   187	export async function DELETE(
   188	  _req: NextRequest,
   189	  { params }: { params: Promise<{ clientId: string; protocolId: string }> }
   190	) {
   191	  const { clientId, protocolId } = await params
   192	  const supabase = await createServerClient()
   193	  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser()
   194	  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 })
   195	
   196	  const existing = await resolveProtocol(user.id, clientId, protocolId)
   197	  if (!existing) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Not found' }, { status: 404 })
   198	
   199	  const db = serviceClient()
   200	
   201	  // Remove metric annotations created when this protocol was shared
   202	  await db
   203	    .from('metric_annotations')
   204	    .delete()
   205	    .eq('source_id', protocolId)
   206	    .eq('client_id', clientId)
   207	
   208	  await db.from('nutrition_protocols').delete().eq('id', protocolId)
   209	
   210	  return NextResponse.json({ success: true })
   211	}

FILE: app/api/clients/[clientId]/nutrition-protocols/route.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
     2	import { createClient as createServerClient } from '@/utils/supabase/server'
     3	import { createClient as createServiceClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js'
     4	import { z } from 'zod'
     5	
     6	function serviceClient() {
     7	  return createServiceClient(
     8	    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
     9	    process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!
    10	  )
    11	}
    12	
    13	async function ownershipCheck(coachId: string, clientId: string) {
    14	  const db = serviceClient()
    15	  const { data } = await db
    16	    .from('coach_clients')
    17	    .select('id')
    18	    .eq('id', clientId)
    19	    .eq('coach_id', coachId)
    20	    .single()
    21	  return !!data
    22	}
    23	
    24	export async function GET(
    25	  _req: NextRequest,
    26	  { params }: { params: Promise<{ clientId: string }> }
    27	) {
    28	  const { clientId } = await params
    29	  const supabase = await createServerClient()
    30	  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser()
    31	  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 })
    32	
    33	  if (!(await ownershipCheck(user.id, clientId))) {
    34	    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Not found' }, { status: 404 })
    35	  }
    36	
    37	  const db = serviceClient()
    38	  const { data, error } = await db
    39	    .from('nutrition_protocols')
    40	    .select(`*, days:nutrition_protocol_days(*), schedule_slots:nutrition_protocol_schedule_slots(*)`)
    41	    .eq('client_id', clientId)
    42	    .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
    43	
    44	  if (error) return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 })
    45	
    46	  const protocols = (data ?? []).map(p => ({
    47	    ...p,
    48	    days: (p.days ?? []).sort((a: { position: number }, b: { position: number }) => a.position - b.position),
    49	    schedule_slots: (p.schedule_slots ?? []).sort(
    50	      (a: { week_index: number; dow: number }, b: { week_index: number; dow: number }) =>
    51	        a.week_index - b.week_index || a.dow - b.dow,
    52	    ),
    53	  }))
    54	
    55	  return NextResponse.json({ protocols })
    56	}
    57	
    58	const daySchema = z.object({
    59	  name: z.string().min(1).max(200),
    60	  position: z.number().int().min(0),
    61	  calories: z.number().nullable().optional(),
    62	  protein_g: z.number().nullable().optional(),
    63	  carbs_g: z.number().nullable().optional(),
    64	  fat_g: z.number().nullable().optional(),
    65	  hydration_ml: z.number().int().nullable().optional(),
    66	  carb_cycle_type: z.enum(['high', 'medium', 'low']).nullable().optional(),
    67	  cycle_sync_phase: z.enum(['follicular', 'ovulatory', 'luteal', 'menstrual']).nullable().optional(),
    68	  recommendations: z.string().nullable().optional(),
    69	})
    70	
    71	const slotSchema = z.object({
    72	  week_index: z.number().int().min(1).max(4),
    73	  dow: z.number().int().min(1).max(7),
    74	  protocol_day_position: z.number().int().min(0),
    75	})
    76	
    77	const createSchema = z.object({
    78	  name: z.string().min(1).max(200),
    79	  notes: z.string().optional().nullable(),
    80	  schedule_start_date: z.string().regex(/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/).nullable().optional(),
    81	  cycle_sync_enabled: z.boolean().optional().default(false),
    82	  days: z.array(daySchema).min(1),
    83	  schedule_slots: z.array(slotSchema).optional().default([]),
    84	})
    85	
    86	export async function POST(
    87	  req: NextRequest,
    88	  { params }: { params: Promise<{ clientId: string }> }
    89	) {
    90	  const { clientId } = await params
    91	  const supabase = await createServerClient()
    92	  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser()
    93	  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 })
    94	
    95	  if (!(await ownershipCheck(user.id, clientId))) {
    96	    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Not found' }, { status: 404 })
    97	  }
    98	
    99	  const body = createSchema.safeParse(await req.json())
   100	  if (!body.success) return NextResponse.json({ error: body.error }, { status: 400 })
   101	
   102	  const db = serviceClient()
   103	
   104	  const { data: protocol, error: protoError } = await db
   105	    .from('nutrition_protocols')
   106	    .insert({
   107	      client_id: clientId,
   108	      coach_id: user.id,
   109	      name: body.data.name,
   110	      notes: body.data.notes ?? null,
   111	      schedule_start_date: body.data.schedule_start_date ?? new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10),
   112	      cycle_sync_enabled: body.data.cycle_sync_enabled ?? false,
   113	    })
   114	    .select('*')
   115	    .single()
   116	
   117	  if (protoError || !protocol) {
   118	    return NextResponse.json({ error: protoError?.message ?? 'Failed to create protocol' }, { status: 500 })
   119	  }
   120	
   121	  const daysToInsert = body.data.days.map(d => ({
   122	    protocol_id: protocol.id,
   123	    name: d.name,
   124	    position: d.position,
   125	    calories: d.calories ?? null,
   126	    protein_g: d.protein_g ?? null,
   127	    carbs_g: d.carbs_g ?? null,
   128	    fat_g: d.fat_g ?? null,
   129	    hydration_ml: d.hydration_ml ?? null,
   130	    carb_cycle_type: d.carb_cycle_type ?? null,
   131	    cycle_sync_phase: d.cycle_sync_phase ?? null,
   132	    recommendations: d.recommendations ?? null,
   133	  }))
   134	
   135	  const { data: days, error: daysError } = await db
   136	    .from('nutrition_protocol_days')
   137	    .insert(daysToInsert)
   138	    .select('*')
   139	
   140	  if (daysError) {
   141	    return NextResponse.json({ error: daysError.message }, { status: 500 })
   142	  }
   143	
   144	  let slots: unknown[] = []
   145	  if (body.data.schedule_slots.length > 0) {
   146	    const { data: insertedSlots, error: slotsError } = await db
   147	      .from('nutrition_protocol_schedule_slots')
   148	      .insert(
   149	        body.data.schedule_slots.map((slot) => ({
   150	          protocol_id: protocol.id,
   151	          week_index: slot.week_index,
   152	          dow: slot.dow,
   153	          protocol_day_position: slot.protocol_day_position,
   154	        })),
   155	      )
   156	      .select('*')
   157	    if (slotsError) return NextResponse.json({ error: slotsError.message }, { status: 500 })
   158	    slots = insertedSlots ?? []
   159	  }
   160	
   161	  return NextResponse.json({ protocol: { ...protocol, days: days ?? [], schedule_slots: slots } }, { status: 201 })
   162	}

FILE: app/api/clients/[clientId]/performance/route.ts

     1	import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
     2	import { createClient as createServerClient } from '@/utils/supabase/server'
     3	import { createClient as createServiceClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js'
     4	import { isMeaningfulSession } from '@/lib/training/sessionLogUtils'
     5	import { estimateOneRM } from '@/lib/training/oneRepMax'

     7	function service() {
     8	  return createServiceClient(
     9	    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    10	    process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!
    11	  )
    12	}

    14	function normalizeText(value: string) {
    15	  return value.toLowerCase().normalize('NFD').replace(/[̀-ͯ]/g, '').trim()
    16	}
    17	
    18	function inferMuscleGroup(name: string): string {
    19	  const n = normalizeText(name)
    20	  if (/squat|barre front|leg press|leg curl|leg ext|lunge|hack|rdl|deadlift|hip thrust|glute|presse a cuisse|presse a cuisses|fente|souleve de terre|souleve|good morning|kettlebell swing|donkey kick|fire hydrant|montee sur banc|sled push|sled pull|pull through|rack pull|step up|nordic|split squat|bulgarian/.test(n)) return 'Jambes'
    21	  if (/bench|chest|pec|fly|push[\s-]up|developpe couche|developpe incline|developpe halteres|ecarte|dips pecto|crossover|svend/.test(n)) return 'Pectoraux'
    22	  if (/pull[\s-]up|chin[\s-]up|\blat\b|\brow\b|cable[\s-]row|seated[\s-]row|t[\s-]bar|tirage|rowing|traction|grand dorsal|pullover|pull over|superman|hyperextension|bird dog/.test(n)) return 'Dos'
    23	  if (/shoulder|military|elevation lateral|elevation frontal|elevation en y|oiseau|developpe militaire|face pull|upright|rear delt|lateral raise|shrug|haussement|rotation externe|rotation interne|presse epaule|croix de fer|thruster|arnold/.test(n)) return 'Épaules'
    24	  if (/\bcurl\b|bicep|hammer|marteau|drag curl|waiter curl|reverse curl|zottman/.test(n)) return 'Biceps'
    25	  if (/tricep|skullcrusher|extension|kickback|dips tricep|prise serree|close.grip|jm press|tate press/.test(n)) return 'Triceps'
    26	  if (/crunch|plank|planche|ab\b|abdo|core|oblique|gainage|dead bug|hollow|dragon flag|mountain climber|sit.up|sit up|releve de jambe|releve de genou|russian twist|windmill|pallof|rotation buste|cocon|ciseaux|jackknife|touche talon|roulette|bicyclette|cercles jambes|flexion laterale/.test(n)) return 'Abdos'
    27	  if (/calf|mollet|standing calf|seated calf/.test(n)) return 'Mollets'
    28	  if (/poignet|wrist|forearm|avant.bras/.test(n)) return 'Avant-bras'
    29	  return 'Autre'
    30	}
    31	
    32	function prettifyMuscleSlug(slug: string) {
    33	  const labels: Record<string, string> = {
    34	    chest: 'Pectoraux',
    35	    shoulders: 'Épaules',
    36	    biceps: 'Biceps',
    37	    triceps: 'Triceps',
    38	    abs: 'Abdos',
    39	    quads: 'Quadriceps',
    40	    hamstrings: 'Ischios',
    41	    glutes: 'Fessiers',
    42	    calves: 'Mollets',
    43	    back_upper: 'Dos',
    44	    back_lower: 'Lombaires',
    45	    traps: 'Trapèzes',
    46	  }
    47	  return labels[slug] ?? slug
    48	}
    49	
    50	function prettifyPattern(pattern: string | null | undefined) {
    51	  const labels: Record<string, string> = {
    52	    horizontal_push: 'Poussée horizontale',
    53	    vertical_push: 'Poussée verticale',
    54	    horizontal_pull: 'Tirage horizontal',
    55	    vertical_pull: 'Tirage vertical',
    56	    squat_pattern: 'Pattern squat',
    57	    hip_hinge: 'Charnière hanche',
    58	    knee_flexion: 'Flexion genou',
    59	    knee_extension: 'Extension genou',
    60	    calf_raise: 'Mollets',
    61	    elbow_flexion: 'Flexion coude',
    62	    elbow_extension: 'Extension coude',
    63	    lateral_raise: 'Élévation latérale',
    64	    hip_abduction: 'Abduction hanche',
    65	    hip_adduction: 'Adduction hanche',
    66	    shoulder_rotation: 'Rotation épaule',
    67	    carry: 'Carry',
    68	    scapular_elevation: 'Shrug',
    69	    scapular_retraction: 'Rétraction scapulaire',
    70	    scapular_protraction: 'Protraction scapulaire',
    71	    core_anti_flex: 'Gainage',
    72	    core_flex: 'Flexion core',
    73	    core_rotation: 'Rotation core',
    74	  }
    75	  if (!pattern) return 'Autre'
    76	  return labels[pattern] ?? pattern
    77	}
    78	
    79	function startOfDay(date: Date) {
    80	  const next = new Date(date)
    81	  next.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)
    82	  return next
    83	}
    84	
    85	function daysBetweenInclusive(from: Date, to: Date) {
    86	  const out: Date[] = []
    87	  const cursor = startOfDay(from)
    88	  const end = startOfDay(to)
    89	  while (cursor <= end) {
    90	    out.push(new Date(cursor))
    91	    cursor.setDate(cursor.getDate() + 1)
    92	  }
    93	  return out
    94	}
    95	
    96	function weekBucket(dateString: string) {
    97	  const date = new Date(dateString)
    98	  const day = date.getDay()
    99	  const diff = day === 0 ? -6 : 1 - day
   100	  date.setDate(date.getDate() + diff)
   101	  return startOfDay(date).toISOString().split('T')[0]
   102	}
   103	
   104	type ProgramExerciseDef = {
   105	  id: string
   106	  name: string
   107	  sets: number
   108	  reps: string
   109	  rest_sec: number | null
   110	  rir: number | null
   111	  target_rir: number | null
   112	  current_weight_kg: number | null
   113	  weight_increment_kg: number | null
   114	  movement_pattern: string | null
   115	  primary_muscles: string[]
   116	  secondary_muscles: string[]
   117	  session_id: string
   118	}
   119	
   120	export async function GET(req: NextRequest, { params }: { params: { clientId: string } }) {
   121	  const supabase = createServerClient()
   122	  const { data: { user }, error: authError } = await supabase.auth.getUser()
   123	  if (authError || !user) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Non authentifié' }, { status: 401 })
   124	
   125	  const db = service()
   126	
   127	  const { data: client } = await db
   128	    .from('coach_clients')
   129	    .select('id')
   130	    .eq('id', params.clientId)
   131	    .eq('coach_id', user.id)
   132	    .single()
   133	
   134	  if (!client) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Client introuvable' }, { status: 404 })
   135	
   136	  const days = parseInt(req.nextUrl.searchParams.get('days') ?? '30', 10)
   137	  const now = new Date()
   138	  const sinceDate = days === 0 ? new Date(0) : new Date(Date.now() - days * 86400000)
   139	  const since = sinceDate.toISOString().split('T')[0]
   140	
   141	  const [{ data: sessionLogs }, { data: activeProgram }] = await Promise.all([
   142	    db
   143	      .from('client_session_logs')
   144	      .select(`
   145	        id, session_name, logged_at, completed_at, duration_min, program_session_id,
   146	        client_set_logs (
   147	          id, exercise_id, exercise_name, set_number, actual_reps, actual_weight_kg, completed,
   148	          rir_actual, rest_sec_actual, primary_muscles, secondary_muscles
   149	        )
   150	      `)
   151	      .eq('client_id', params.clientId)
   152	      .gte('logged_at', since)
   153	      .order('logged_at', { ascending: true }),
   154	    db
   155	      .from('programs')
   156	      .select(`
   157	        id, name, goal, level, frequency, weeks, session_mode, status,
   158	        program_sessions (
   159	          id, name, day_of_week, days_of_week, position,
   160	          program_exercises (
   161	            id, name, sets, reps, rest_sec, rir, target_rir, current_weight_kg,
   162	            weight_increment_kg, movement_pattern, primary_muscles, secondary_muscles
   163	          )
   164	        )
   165	      `)
   166	      .eq('client_id', params.clientId)
   167	      .neq('status', 'archived')
   168	      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
   169	      .limit(1)
   170	      .single(),
   171	  ])
   172	
   173	  const logs = sessionLogs ?? []
   174	  const meaningfulLogs = logs.filter(isMeaningfulSession)
   175	
   176	  const programSessions = ((activeProgram as any)?.program_sessions ?? [])
   177	    .slice()
   178	    .sort((a: any, b: any) => (a.position ?? 0) - (b.position ?? 0))
   179	
   180	  const programExercises: ProgramExerciseDef[] = programSessions.flatMap((session: any) =>
   181	    ((session.program_exercises ?? []) as any[]).map((exercise) => ({
   182	      id: exercise.id,
   183	      name: exercise.name,
   184	      sets: exercise.sets ?? 0,
   185	      reps: exercise.reps ?? '',
   186	      rest_sec: exercise.rest_sec ?? null,
   187	      rir: exercise.rir ?? null,
   188	      target_rir: exercise.target_rir ?? null,
   189	      current_weight_kg: exercise.current_weight_kg ?? null,
   190	      weight_increment_kg: exercise.weight_increment_kg ?? null,
   191	      movement_pattern: exercise.movement_pattern ?? null,
   192	      primary_muscles: exercise.primary_muscles ?? [],
   193	      secondary_muscles: exercise.secondary_muscles ?? [],
   194	      session_id: session.id,
   195	    }))
   196	  )
   197	
   198	  const programExerciseById = new Map(programExercises.map((exercise) => [exercise.id, exercise]))
   199	  const programExerciseByName = new Map(programExercises.map((exercise) => [normalizeText(exercise.name), exercise]))
   200	  const activeProgramSessionIds = new Set(programSessions.map((session: any) => session.id))
   201	
   202	  const isEffective = (set: {
   203	    completed: boolean
   204	    actual_reps: number | null
   205	    actual_weight_kg: number | null
   206	  }) => set.completed || set.actual_reps != null
   207	
   208	  const effectiveSets = meaningfulLogs.flatMap((log) => (log.client_set_logs ?? []).filter(isEffective))
   209	  const completedSessions = meaningfulLogs.filter((log) => log.completed_at).length
   210	  const draftSessions = meaningfulLogs.filter((log) => !log.completed_at).length
   211	
   212	  const totalVolumeRaw = effectiveSets.reduce(
   213	    (acc, set: any) => acc + (set.actual_reps ?? 0) * (Number(set.actual_weight_kg) ?? 0),
   214	    0
   215	  )
   216	
   217	  const restValues = effectiveSets
   218	    .map((set: any) => set.rest_sec_actual as number | null | undefined)
   219	    .filter((value): value is number => value != null && value > 0)
   220	
   221	  const durationValues = meaningfulLogs
   222	    .map((log) => log.duration_min)
   223	    .filter((value): value is number => value != null && value > 0)
   224	
   225	  const totalSessions = meaningfulLogs.length
   226	  const totalSets = effectiveSets.length
   227	  const totalReps = effectiveSets.reduce((acc, set: any) => acc + (set.actual_reps ?? 0), 0)
   228	  const totalVolume = Math.round(totalVolumeRaw)
   229	  const avgDuration =
   230	    durationValues.length > 0
   231	      ? Math.round(durationValues.reduce((sum, value) => sum + value, 0) / durationValues.length)
   232	      : 0
   233	  const avgRestSec =
   234	    restValues.length > 0
   235	      ? Math.round(restValues.reduce((sum, value) => sum + value, 0) / restValues.length)
   236	      : null
   237	  const completionRate = totalSessions > 0 ? completedSessions / totalSessions : 0
   238	
   239	  const durationBuckets = meaningfulLogs
   240	    .filter((log) => log.duration_min != null)
   241	    .slice(-8)
   242	    .map((log) => ({
   243	      id: log.id,
   244	      date: log.logged_at.split('T')[0],
   245	      durationMin: log.duration_min ?? 0,
   246	      isCompleted: Boolean(log.completed_at),
   247	    }))
   248	
   249	  const timelineMap: Record<string, { date: string; volume: number; reps: number; sets: number; sessions: number }> = {}
   250	  const weeklyMap: Record<string, { volume: number; sets: number; sessions: number }> = {}
   251	  const muscleMap: Record<string, { volume: number; sets: number; reps: number }> = {}
   252	  const movementPatternMap: Record<string, { volume: number; sets: number; reps: number }> = {}
   253	  const exerciseMap: Record<string, { name: string; sessions: { date: string; maxWeight: number; totalVolume: number; totalReps: number; sets: number; oneRM: number }[] }> = {}
   254	  const keyExerciseMap: Record<string, {
   255	    id: string
   256	    name: string
   257	    movementPattern: string | null
   258	    primaryMuscles: string[]
   259	    secondaryMuscles: string[]
   260	    currentWeightKg: number | null

     1	import Anthropic from '@anthropic-ai/sdk';
     2	export const maxDuration = 60; // Autorise jusqu'à 60 secondes

     4	function getAnthropicClient() {
     5	  const apiKey = process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
     6	  if (!apiKey) throw new Error('ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is not configured')
     7	  return new Anthropic({ apiKey })
     8	}

    10	const GENESIS_SYSTEM_PROMPT = `Tu es VIRTUS ASSISTANT, l'interface conversationnelle officielle de VIRTUS Smart fit.
    11	
    12	## PHILOSOPHIE CENTRALE : CONSULTANT, PAS VENDEUR
    13	
    14	Tu es un EXPERT qui ÉCOUTE avant de prescrire.
    15	
    16	MAUVAIS RÉFLEXE (à éviter):
    17	User: "Je veux perdre 10kg"
    18	Assistant: "L'IPT analyse tes blocages via 253 questions..."
    19	
    20	BON RÉFLEXE (à adopter):
    21	User: "Je veux perdre 10kg"
    22	Assistant: "10kg pour quelle raison précise ? Et qu'est-ce qui t'a bloqué jusqu'ici ?"
    23	
    24	LOGIQUE:
    25	1. COMPRENDRE la personne (situation, frustrations, tentatives passées)
    26	2. IDENTIFIER le vrai problème (pas juste le symptôme)
    27	3. PUIS orienter vers solution (IPT si pertinent, mais pas systématiquement)
    28	
    29	## INSERTION BOUTONS DYNAMIQUES
    30	
    31	Quand utilisateur veut consultation/rendez-vous, insère ce marqueur exact :
    32	
    33	[BOUTON_CALENDLY]
    34	
    35	Exemples d'utilisation :
    36	
    37	User: "Je veux une consultation"
    38	Assistant: "Je te mets le lien direct. Créneau généralement sous 48-72h.
    39	
    40	[BOUTON_CALENDLY]
    41	
    42	Dis-moi si tu as des questions sur le déroulement."
    43	
    44	User: "J'aimerais parler à quelqu'un"
    45	Assistant: "Pas de souci. Voici l'accès direct au calendrier de Coach VIRTUS Smart fit.
    46	
    47	[BOUTON_CALENDLY]
    48	
    49	Il pourra répondre à tes questions spécifiques sur ton cas."
    50	
    51	IMPORTANT : 
    52	- Place [BOUTON_CALENDLY] sur ligne vide, seul
    53	- Ajoute contexte avant (délai, déroulement)
    54	- Ajoute question après si pertinent
    55	
    56	Pour lancer IPT :
    57	[BOUTON_IPT]
    58	
    59	## IDENTITÉ & POSITIONNEMENT
    60	
    61	Tu es un EXPERT HUMAIN DIGITALISÉ — l'extension digitale de Coach VIRTUS Smart fit, fondateur de VIRTUS Smart fit.
    62	
    63	Tu n'es PAS:
    64	- Un chatbot marketing classique
    65	- Un vendeur insistant
    66	- Un motivational speaker
    67	- Un diagnostiqueur médical
    68	- Un thérapeute
    69	
    70	Tu ES:
    71	- Un consultant senior VIRTUS Smart fit (approche professionnelle, posée, structurée)
    72	- Orienté compréhension avant action (éduque, éclaire, contextualise)
    73	- Un vulgarisateur scientifique précis (médecine fonctionnelle, biochimie)
    74	- Un facilitateur du processus IPT (253 questions, 15-25 min)
    75	
    76	Personnalité: Calme, structuré, posé. Professionnel mais accessible. Confiant sans arrogance. Patient et pédagogue. Factuel sans être robotique.
    77	
    78	## CURIOSITÉ STRATÉGIQUE
    79	
    80	Pose des questions courtes et précises pour:
    81	- Cerner la vraie motivation ("pourquoi maintenant ?")
    82	- Identifier les échecs passés ("qu'as-tu déjà essayé ?")
    83	- Détecter les patterns sans les nommer ("comment tu te sens après manger ?")
    84	- Comprendre le contexte ("c'est quoi ton rythme actuel ?")
    85	
    86	Questions INTERDITES (trop génériques):
    87	- "Qu'est-ce qui t'amène ?"
    88	- "Peux-tu m'en dire plus ?"
    89	- "Comment puis-je t'aider ?"
    90	
    91	Questions AUTORISÉES (précises, actionnables):
    92	- "C'est quoi le plus frustrant dans tes tentatives passées ?"
    93	- "Tu dors combien d'heures en moyenne ?"
    94	- "Qu'est-ce qui déclenche tes fringales ?"
    95	- "Quand exactement tu manques d'énergie dans la journée ?"
    96	
    97	## GESTION QUESTION PRIX
    98	
    99	Quand utilisateur demande tarifs AVANT d'avoir révélé sa situation :
   100	
   101	MAUVAIS :
   102	User: "C'est quoi vos prix ?"
   103	Bot: [Liste 3 formules + explications]
   104	
   105	BON :
   106	User: "C'est quoi vos prix ?"
   107	Bot: "Ça dépend de ton profil. Dis-moi d'abord : tu cherches à transformer quoi exactement ?"
   108	
   109	[Puis après compréhension situation]
   110	Bot: "Ok. Dans ton cas [résumé], tu as 3 options après l'IPT gratuit : [adapte selon contexte]"
   111	
   112	Si utilisateur insiste ("Non donne-moi juste les prix") :
   113	Bot: "Rapport seul 35€, Protocole 175€, Coaching 650€. Mais sans ton IPT, impossible de dire lequel tu as besoin."
   114	
   115	PRINCIPE : Comprendre > Tarifer
   116	
   117	## PERSPICACITÉ FORENSIQUE
   118	
   119	Détecte les VRAIES problématiques derrière les demandes:
   120	
   121	"Je veux perdre 10kg" peut cacher:
   122	- Résistance insulinique (si mentionne ventre, fringales)
   123	- Dette de sommeil (si mentionne fatigue, récupération)
   124	- Stress chronique (si mentionne anxiété, cortisol)
   125	- Problème d'adhérence (si mentionne échecs répétés)
   126	
   127	Identifie le pattern AVANT de parler d'IPT.
   128	
   129	## ORIENTATION VIRTUS Smart fit : UNIQUEMENT SI PERTINENT
   130	
   131	VIRTUS Smart fit n'est PAS la réponse universelle.
   132	
   133	Cas où tu NE parles PAS d'IPT immédiatement:
   134	- Utilisateur pose question simple ("c'est quoi les macros ?")
   135	- Utilisateur veut juste comprendre un concept
   136	- Utilisateur teste/découvre le chat
   137	- Question médicale → Redirige vers professionnel
   138	
   139	Cas où IPT devient pertinent:
   140	- Utilisateur mentionne échecs répétés
   141	- Blocages métaboliques évidents (fatigue, inflammation, poids bloqué)
   142	- Demande transformation complète
   143	- Veut comprendre SON profil spécifique
   144	
   145	Transition naturelle vers IPT:
   146	"Vu ce que tu décris [résumer ses symptômes], il y a probablement [pattern suspecté]. L'IPT permet de confirmer ça et voir ce qui d'autre pourrait bloquer. 15min de questions, score gratuit. Ça t'intéresse ?"
   147	
   148	## EFFICACITÉ CONVERSATIONNELLE
   149	
   150	RÉPONDS TOUJOURS EN 2-3 PHRASES MAXIMUM, sauf si:
   151	- Question complexe nécessite développement
   152	- Explication d'un concept technique demandé
   153	- Utilisateur demande explicitement détails
   154	
   155	Structure idéale:
   156	[Réponse directe] + [Question de clarification OU insight pertinent]
   157	
   158	## LANGAGE HUMAIN
   159	
   160	Parle comme un consultant senior compétent, pas comme un chatbot:
   161	
   162	AUTORISÉ:
   163	- "Intéressant. C'est quoi ton objectif derrière ça ?"
   164	- "Si je comprends bien, tu stagnes malgré les efforts ?"
   165	- "Ça ressemble à [pattern]. Tu as remarqué [symptôme associé] ?"
   166	
   167	INTERDIT:
   168	- "Je suis là pour t'accompagner dans ton parcours"
   169	- "Merci pour ces précisions"
   170	- "Je comprends ta frustration"
   171	- "Laisse-moi t'expliquer..."
   172	
   173	## RÈGLE CENTRALE NON-NÉGOCIABLE
   174	
   175	"TOUTE CONVERSATION PEUT MENER À L'IPT, MAIS JAMAIS DE FORCE."
   176	
   177	Tu expliques, éclaires, contextualises. La décision appartient TOUJOURS à l'utilisateur.
   178	
   179	Tu ne crées JAMAIS:
   180	- Urgence artificielle ("Offre limitée 24h")
   181	- Peur ("tu vas rater")
   182	- Pression sociale ("Tout le monde prend SuperG")
   183	- Culpabilisation si refus
   184	
   185	## TON & COMMUNICATION
   186	
   187	ÉCOUTE > PRESCRIPTION
   188	- 2 questions pour 1 affirmation
   189	- Comprends avant d'orienter
   190	- Détecte les non-dits
   191	
   192	CONCISION RADICALE:
   193	- 2-3 phrases MAX par défaut
   194	- 1 idée = 1 phrase
   195	- Jamais de markdown
   196	- Jamais de listes
   197	
   198	SALUTATIONS:
   199	- Premier message de la conversation → Salue naturellement
   200	- Messages suivants → Jamais de re-salutation
   201	- Va direct au contenu
   202	
   203	MÉMOIRE CONVERSATIONNELLE:
   204	- Tiens compte de TOUT ce qui a été dit avant
   205	- Si utilisateur dit "oui", "ok", "comment" → Il répond à ce que tu viens de proposer
   206	- Ne redemande jamais ce qu'il a déjà confirmé
   207	- Adapte ton niveau de détail selon le contexte établi
   208	
   209	INTELLIGENCE SITUATIONNELLE:
   210	- Fatigue mentionnée → Creuse sommeil/stress
   211	- Échecs répétés → Creuse adhérence/patterns
   212	- Poids bloqué → Creuse alimentation/métabolisme
   213	- Question simple → Réponds simplement
   214	
   215	INTERDICTIONS:
   216	- Formules creuses ("excellente question")
   217	- Salutations répétées
   218	- Markdown/formatage
   219	- Parler de VIRTUS Smart fit sans raison
   220	- Questions vagues
   221	
   222	TON FORENSIQUE:
   223	- Direct, factuel
   224	- Jargon uniquement si pertinent
   225	- Jamais motivationnel
   226	- Jamais de promesses
   227	
   228	VIRTUS Smart fit COMME OUTIL, PAS OBJECTIF:
   229	L'IPT est une solution QUAND c'est pertinent.
   230	Pas la réponse automatique à tout.
   231	
   232	## LIBERTÉ D'EXPRESSION
   233	
   234	Tu n'as PAS de script prédéfini. Tu réponds naturellement selon:
   235	- Le contexte conversationnel exact
   236	- L'intention détectée chez l'utilisateur
   237	- Le niveau de connaissance démontré
   238	- L'énergie du message (factuel, émotionnel, pressé, hésitant)
   239	
   240	CADRE NON-NÉGOCIABLE:
   241	✓ Concis (2-3 phrases par défaut)
   242	✓ Pas de markdown
   243	✓ Pas de répétition
   244	✓ Mémoire conversation active
   245	✓ Ton forensique/factuel
   246	✓ Jamais de force/manipulation
   247	
   248	DANS CE CADRE: Tu es libre de formuler comme tu juges optimal.
   249	
   250	## SYSTÈME IPT (Indice de Potentiel de Transformation)
   251	
   252	L'IPT est la RACINE de tout VIRTUS Smart fit. Sans IPT = impossible protocole sur-mesure.
   253	
   254	Score 0-100 basé sur 253 questions analysées par algorithme propriétaire.
   255	
   256	5 PILIERS:
   257	1. MÉTABOLIQUE (30%): Flexibilité métabolique, sensibilité insulinique (P1), thyroïde (P2), inflammation (P5), digestion (P6)
   258	2. INFRASTRUCTURE (25%): Sommeil (P11), stress (P3/P4), environnement, logistique
   259	3. PSYCHOLOGIE (20%): Neurotype, relation alimentation (P12 TCA), auto-régulation
   260	4. PHYSIOLOGIE (15%): Composition corporelle, historique training, capacités, limitations

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: app/client/login/page.tsx
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	'use client'
     2	
     3	import { useState, useTransition, useEffect } from 'react'
     4	import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation'
     5	import { Loader2, Eye, EyeOff, ArrowRight } from 'lucide-react'
     6	import { clientDemoLogin, clientLogin } from './actions'
     7	import { useClientT } from '@/components/client/ClientI18nProvider'
     8	
     9	const demoLoginEnabled = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_CLIENT_DEMO_ENABLED === 'true'
    10	
    11	export default function ClientLoginPage() {
    12	  const router = useRouter()
    13	  const { t } = useClientT()
    14	  const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false)
    15	  const [error, setError] = useState('')
    16	  const [isPending, startTransition] = useTransition()
    17	  const [hashError, setHashError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    18	
    19	  useEffect(() => {
    20	    if (typeof window === 'undefined') return
    21	
    22	    // If an invite/magiclink token lands here (misconfigured redirect URL),
    23	    // forward to the correct onboarding page instead of staying on login.
    24	    const hash = window.location.hash
    25	    if (hash && hash.includes('access_token=')) {
    26	      window.location.replace('/client/onboarding' + hash)
    27	      return
    28	    }
    29	
    30	    const queryParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search)
    31	    if (queryParams.get('error') === 'link_expired') {
    32	      setHashError(t('login.error.expired'))
    33	      return
    34	    }
    35	
    36	    const hashParams = new URLSearchParams((hash ?? '').replace(/^#/, ''))
    37	    const errorCode = hashParams.get('error_code')
    38	    if (!errorCode) return
    39	    if (errorCode === 'otp_expired') {
    40	      setHashError(t('login.error.otpExpired'))
    41	    } else {
    42	      setHashError(t('login.error.invalid'))
    43	    }
    44	  }, []) // eslint-disable-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
    45	
    46	  function handleSubmit(e: React.FormEvent<HTMLFormElement>) {
    47	    e.preventDefault()
    48	    setError('')
    49	    const formData = new FormData(e.currentTarget)
    50	    startTransition(async () => {
    51	      const result = await clientLogin(formData)
    52	      if (result.error) {
    53	        setError(result.error)
    54	      } else {
    55	        router.push('/client')
    56	      }
    57	    })
    58	  }
    59	
    60	  function handleDemoLogin() {
    61	    setError('')
    62	    startTransition(async () => {
    63	      const result = await clientDemoLogin()
    64	      if (result.error) {
    65	        setError(result.error)
    66	      } else {
    67	        router.push('/client')
    68	      }
    69	    })
    70	  }
    71	
    72	  return (
    73	    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#0d0d0d] flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6">
    74	
    75	      {/* Logo */}
    76	      <div className="mb-10 flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
    77	        <img src="/logo/logo-stryvr-silver.png" alt="STRYVR" className="w-12 h-12 object-contain" />
    78	        <div className="text-center">
    79	          <p className="text-[11px] text-white/30 mt-1.5">{t('login.mySpace')}</p>
    80	        </div>
    81	      </div>
    82	
    83	      {/* Erreur lien */}
    84	      {hashError && (
    85	        <div className="w-full max-w-sm mb-4 bg-red-500/[0.08] border-[0.3px] border-red-500/20 rounded-xl px-4 py-3">
    86	          <p className="text-[12px] text-red-400 leading-relaxed">{hashError}</p>
    87	        </div>
    88	      )}
    89	
    90	      {/* Card connexion */}
    91	      <div className="bg-white/[0.02] rounded-xl p-6 w-full max-w-sm">
    92	        <div className="mb-5">
    93	          <h2 className="text-[15px] font-bold text-white">{t('login.title')}</h2>
    94	          <p className="text-[12px] text-white/40 mt-1">
    95	            {t('login.subtitle')}
    96	          </p>
    97	        </div>
    98	
    99	        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="flex flex-col gap-4">
   100	          <div>
   101	            <label className="block text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/40 mb-1.5">
   102	              {t('login.email')}
   103	            </label>
   104	            <input
   105	              name="email"
   106	              type="email"
   107	              placeholder={t('login.placeholder.email')}
   108	              required
   109	              className="w-full h-[48px] rounded-xl bg-[#222222] px-4 text-[14px] font-medium text-white placeholder:text-white/20 outline-none  transition-colors"
   110	            />
   111	          </div>
   112	
   113	          <div>
   114	            <label className="block text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/40 mb-1.5">
   115	              {t('login.password')}
   116	            </label>
   117	            <div className="relative">
   118	              <input
   119	                name="password"
   120	                type={showPassword ? 'text' : 'password'}
   121	                placeholder="••••••••"
   122	                required
   123	                className="w-full h-[48px] rounded-xl bg-[#222222] px-4 pr-11 text-[14px] font-medium text-white placeholder:text-white/20 outline-none  transition-colors"
   124	              />
   125	              <button
   126	                type="button"
   127	                onClick={() => setShowPassword(v => !v)}
   128	                className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-white/25 hover:text-white/60 transition-colors"
   129	              >
   130	                {showPassword ? <EyeOff size={15} /> : <Eye size={15} />}
   131	              </button>
   132	            </div>
   133	          </div>
   134	
   135	          {error && (
   136	            <div className="bg-red-500/[0.08] border-[0.3px] border-red-500/20 rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5">
   137	              <p className="text-[12px] text-red-400">{error}</p>
   138	            </div>
   139	          )}
   140	
   141	          <button
   142	            type="submit"
   143	            disabled={isPending}
   144	            className="mt-1 flex h-[48px] items-center justify-between rounded-xl bg-[#f2f2f2] pl-5 pr-2 transition-all hover:bg-[#ffffff] active:scale-[0.99] disabled:opacity-50"
   145	          >
   146	            <span className="text-[12px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-[#080808]">
   147	              {isPending ? t('login.pending') : t('login.submit')}
   148	            </span>
   149	            <div className="flex h-9 w-9 items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-black/[0.12]">
   150	              {isPending
   151	                ? <Loader2 size={15} className="animate-spin text-[#080808]" />
   152	                : <ArrowRight size={15} className="text-[#080808]" />
   153	              }
   154	            </div>
   155	          </button>
   156	
   157	          {demoLoginEnabled && (
   158	            <button
   159	              type="button"
   160	              onClick={handleDemoLogin}
   161	              disabled={isPending}
   162	              className="flex h-[44px] items-center justify-center rounded-xl border border-white/[0.08] bg-white/[0.03] px-4 text-[11px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/72 transition-all hover:bg-white/[0.05] active:scale-[0.99] disabled:opacity-50"
   163	            >
   164	              {isPending ? t('login.pending') : t('login.demo')}
   165	            </button>
   166	          )}
   167	        </form>
   168	      </div>
   169	
   170	      <p className="mt-6 text-[11px] text-white/20 text-center">
   171	        {t('login.footer')}
   172	      </p>
   173	    </div>
   174	  )
   175	}

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: app/client/nutrition/compose/ComposeClientPage.tsx
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	'use client'
     2	
     3	import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     4	import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation'
     5	import { Apple, ChevronDown, ChevronUp, Coffee, Mic, Moon, Pencil, Plus, Sparkles, Sun } from 'lucide-react'
     6	import SmartNutritionHero from '@/components/client/smart/SmartNutritionHero'
     7	import SmartNutritionPrepList, { type SmartNutritionPrep } from '@/components/client/smart/SmartNutritionPrepList'
     8	import { NutritionLogContent, type NutritionLogContentHandle, type NutritionLogLayer } from '@/app/client/nutrition/log/NutritionLogContent'
     9	import type { NutritionMacros } from '@/components/client/smart/SmartNutritionWidget'
    10	import { computeSimulationState } from '@/lib/nutrition/simulation-state'
    11	import { collectSimulationScenarios, createNextScenarioOption, normalizeScenarioKey, type SimulationScenarioOption } from '@/lib/nutrition/simulation-scenarios'
    12	import { useClientT } from '@/components/client/ClientI18nProvider'
    13	import { NUTRITION_UI_COLORS } from '@/lib/nutrition/ui-colors'
    14	import { FlashMessage, useFlash } from '@/components/client/smart/FlashMessage'
    15	
    16	interface ComposeClientPageProps {
    17	  consumed: NutritionMacros
    18	  target: NutritionMacros
    19	  date: string
    20	  todayDate: string
    21	  initialPreps: SmartNutritionPrep[]
    22	  gender?: string | null
    23	  bodyWeightKg?: number | null
    24	}
    25	
    26	type DraftTotals = { calories: number; protein: number; carbs: number; fat: number; count: number }
    27	type PrepSlot = 'breakfast' | 'lunch' | 'dinner' | 'snack'
    28	
    29	const ZERO_DRAFTS: DraftTotals = { calories: 0, protein: 0, carbs: 0, fat: 0, count: 0 }
    30	const SLOT_META: Array<{ key: PrepSlot; icon: typeof Coffee }> = [
    31	  { key: 'breakfast', icon: Coffee },
    32	  { key: 'lunch', icon: Sun },
    33	  { key: 'dinner', icon: Moon },
    34	  { key: 'snack', icon: Apple },
    35	]
    36	
    37	export default function ComposeClientPage({ consumed, target, date, todayDate, initialPreps, gender, bodyWeightKg }: ComposeClientPageProps) {
    38	  const { t } = useClientT()
    39	  const router = useRouter()
    40	  const logRef = useRef<NutritionLogContentHandle>(null)
    41	  const [draftTotals, setDraftTotals] = useState<DraftTotals>(ZERO_DRAFTS)
    42	  const [saving, setSaving] = useState<'prep' | 'meal' | null>(null)
    43	  const [editingPrep, setEditingPrep] = useState<SmartNutritionPrep | null>(null)
    44	  const [headerCollapsed, setHeaderCollapsed] = useState(false)
    45	  const [contentLayer, setContentLayer] = useState<NutritionLogLayer>('category')
    46	  const [scenarioOptions, setScenarioOptions] = useState<SimulationScenarioOption[]>(() => {
    47	    const dbOptions = collectSimulationScenarios(initialPreps)
    48	    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
    49	      try {
    50	        const stored = sessionStorage.getItem(`compose-scenarios-${date}`)
    51	        if (stored) {
    52	          const parsed = JSON.parse(stored) as SimulationScenarioOption[]
    53	          const merged = new Map<string, SimulationScenarioOption>()
    54	          for (const opt of dbOptions) merged.set(opt.key, opt)
    55	          for (const opt of parsed) if (!merged.has(opt.key)) merged.set(opt.key, opt)
    56	          return Array.from(merged.values())
    57	        }
    58	      } catch {}
    59	    }
    60	    return dbOptions
    61	  })
    62	  const [showScenarioPanel, setShowScenarioPanel] = useState(false)
    63	  const [selectedSlot, setSelectedSlot] = useState<PrepSlot>('lunch')
    64	  const [prepTitle, setPrepTitle] = useState('')
    65	  const [renamingScenarioKey, setRenamingScenarioKey] = useState<string | null>(null)
    66	  const [renameValue, setRenameValue] = useState('')
    67	  const [activeScenarioKey, setActiveScenarioKey] = useState<string>(() => {
    68	    const activePrepScenario = initialPreps.find((prep) => prep.is_active)?.scenario_key
    69	    return normalizeScenarioKey(activePrepScenario)
    70	  })
    71	  const { flash, showFlash, dismiss: dismissFlash } = useFlash()
    72	
    73	  useEffect(() => {
    74	    const nextOptions = collectSimulationScenarios(initialPreps)
    75	    setScenarioOptions((prev) => {
    76	      const merged = new Map<string, SimulationScenarioOption>()
    77	      for (const option of prev) merged.set(option.key, option)
    78	      for (const option of nextOptions) merged.set(option.key, option)
    79	      return Array.from(merged.values())
    80	    })
    81	    const activePrepScenario = initialPreps.find((prep) => prep.is_active)?.scenario_key
    82	    if (!nextOptions.some((scenario) => scenario.key === activeScenarioKey)) {
    83	      setActiveScenarioKey(normalizeScenarioKey(activePrepScenario))
    84	    }
    85	  }, [activeScenarioKey, initialPreps])
    86	
    87	  // Persist ephemeral scenarios (without preps) across date navigation
    88	  useEffect(() => {
    89	    try {
    90	      sessionStorage.setItem(`compose-scenarios-${date}`, JSON.stringify(scenarioOptions))
    91	    } catch {}
    92	  }, [scenarioOptions, date])
    93	
    94	  function startRename(key: string, currentLabel: string) {
    95	    setRenamingScenarioKey(key)
    96	    setRenameValue(currentLabel)
    97	  }
    98	
    99	  function commitRename() {
   100	    if (!renamingScenarioKey || !renameValue.trim()) {
   101	      setRenamingScenarioKey(null)
   102	      return
   103	    }
   104	    const newLabel = renameValue.trim()
   105	    setScenarioOptions(prev => prev.map(s =>
   106	      s.key === renamingScenarioKey ? { ...s, label: newLabel } : s
   107	    ))
   108	    setRenamingScenarioKey(null)
   109	    // PATCH existing preps in this scenario so DB label stays in sync
   110	    const prepsToUpdate = initialPreps.filter(p => p.scenario_key === renamingScenarioKey)
   111	    prepsToUpdate.forEach(prep => {
   112	      fetch(`/api/client/nutrition/preps/${prep.id}`, {
   113	        method: 'PATCH',
   114	        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   115	        body: JSON.stringify({ scenario_label: newLabel }),
   116	      }).catch(err => console.error('[rename] PATCH prep failed', err))
   117	    })
   118	  }
   119	
   120	  const activeScenario = useMemo(
   121	    () => scenarioOptions.find((scenario) => scenario.key === activeScenarioKey) ?? scenarioOptions[0] ?? { key: 'default', label: "Scénario principal" },
   122	    [activeScenarioKey, scenarioOptions],
   123	  )
   124	  const isFutureDate = date > todayDate
   125	  const activeScenarioLabel = activeScenario.label === "Aujourd'hui" ? "Scénario principal" : activeScenario.label
   126	  const headerIsCompact = headerCollapsed || contentLayer !== 'category'
   127	  const shouldShowScenarioControls = initialPreps.length > 0 || scenarioOptions.length > 1
   128	
   129	  const hasDrafts = draftTotals.count > 0
   130	
   131	  const composeDateLabel = useMemo(() => {
   132	    const [year, month, day] = date.split('-').map(Number)
   133	    return new Intl.DateTimeFormat('fr-FR', { weekday: 'long', day: 'numeric', month: 'long' })
   134	      .format(new Date(Date.UTC(year, month - 1, day)))
   135	  }, [date])
   136	
   137	  const simulation = computeSimulationState({
   138	    consumed,
   139	    preps: initialPreps,
   140	    draftTotals,
   141	    activeScenarioKey,
   142	  })
   143	  const consumedWithActivePreps: NutritionMacros = {
   144	    kcal: consumed.kcal + simulation.prepTotals.kcal,
   145	    protein_g: consumed.protein_g + simulation.prepTotals.protein_g,
   146	    carbs_g: consumed.carbs_g + simulation.prepTotals.carbs_g,
   147	    fat_g: consumed.fat_g + simulation.prepTotals.fat_g,
   148	    water_ml: consumed.water_ml,
   149	  }
   150	  const effectiveConsumed = simulation.simulatedConsumed
   151	
   152	  const handleDraftsChange = useCallback((totals: DraftTotals) => {
   153	    setDraftTotals(totals)
   154	  }, [])
   155	  const suppressInternalRedirect = useCallback(() => {}, [])
   156	
   157	  async function handleSavePrep() {
   158	    setSaving('prep')
   159	    const ok = await logRef.current?.savePrep()
   160	    if (ok) {
   161	      logRef.current?.clearDrafts()
   162	      setEditingPrep(null)
   163	      setPrepTitle('')
   164	      router.refresh()
   165	    } else {
   166	      showFlash('Erreur lors de la sauvegarde. Réessaie.', 'error')
   167	    }
   168	    setSaving(null)
   169	  }
   170	
   171	  async function handleSaveMeal() {
   172	    setSaving('meal')
   173	    const mealOk = await logRef.current?.saveMeal()
   174	    if (!mealOk) {
   175	      showFlash('Erreur lors de la validation. Réessaie.', 'error')
   176	      setSaving(null)
   177	      return
   178	    }
   179	    const prepLogResults = await Promise.allSettled(
   180	      simulation.activePreps.map(prep =>
   181	        fetch(`/api/client/nutrition/preps/${prep.id}/log`, { method: 'POST' })
   182	      )
   183	    )
   184	    const failedCount = prepLogResults.filter(
   185	      r => r.status === 'rejected' || (r.status === 'fulfilled' && !r.value.ok)
   186	    ).length
   187	    if (failedCount > 0) {
   188	      console.error(`[handleSaveMeal] ${failedCount} prep(s) failed to log`)
   189	    }
   190	    setSaving(null)
   191	    router.push('/client/nutrition')
   192	  }
   193	
   194	  function handleCancel() {
   195	    logRef.current?.clearDrafts()
   196	    setEditingPrep(null)
   197	    setPrepTitle('')
   198	  }
   199	
   200	  const activePrepCount = simulation.activePreps.length
   201	  const activeScenarioPrepCount = initialPreps.filter((prep) => prep.scenario_key === activeScenario.key).length
   202	
   203	  // Scenario comparison totals (all preps grouped by scenario, using is_active ones)
   204	  const scenarioComparison = useMemo(() => {
   205	    return scenarioOptions.map(scenario => {
   206	      // Use ALL preps in scenario (not just active) for a true plan comparison
   207	      const allPreps = initialPreps.filter(p => p.scenario_key === scenario.key)
   208	      return {
   209	        key: scenario.key,
   210	        label: scenario.label === "Aujourd'hui" ? "Scénario principal" : scenario.label,
   211	        kcal: allPreps.reduce((s, p) => s + p.total_calories, 0),
   212	        protein: allPreps.reduce((s, p) => s + p.total_protein_g, 0),
   213	        carbs: allPreps.reduce((s, p) => s + p.total_carbs_g, 0),
   214	        fat: allPreps.reduce((s, p) => s + p.total_fat_g, 0),
   215	        prepCount: allPreps.length,
   216	        isActive: scenario.key === activeScenarioKey,
   217	      }
   218	    })
   219	  }, [scenarioOptions, initialPreps, activeScenarioKey])
   220	
   221	  function handleCreateScenario() {
   222	    const nextScenario = createNextScenarioOption(scenarioOptions)
   223	    setScenarioOptions((prev) => [...prev, nextScenario])
   224	    setActiveScenarioKey(nextScenario.key)
   225	    setShowScenarioPanel(true)
   226	    setEditingPrep(null)
   227	    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' })
   228	  }
   229	
   230	  useEffect(() => {
   231	    function handleScroll() {
   232	      setHeaderCollapsed(window.scrollY > 24)
   233	    }
   234	    handleScroll()
   235	    window.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll, { passive: true })
   236	    return () => window.removeEventListener('scroll', handleScroll)
   237	  }, [])
   238	
   239	  const SLOT_LABELS: Record<PrepSlot, string> = {
   240	    breakfast: t('compose.slot.breakfast'),
   241	    lunch: t('compose.slot.lunch'),
   242	    dinner: t('compose.slot.dinner'),
   243	    snack: t('compose.slot.snack'),
   244	  }
   245	
   246	  return (
   247	    <main className="min-h-[100dvh] bg-[#0d0d0d] pb-28">
   248	      <FlashMessage flash={flash} onDismiss={dismissFlash} />
   249	      
   250	      {/* Safe-area background fill — status bar zone matches the header nav card color */}
   251	      <div className="fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 bg-[#111114]" style={{ height: 'env(safe-area-inset-top, 0px)' }} />
   252	      
   253	      <section
   254	        className="sticky top-0 z-40 px-3 pb-2 bg-[#111114]"
   255	        style={{ paddingTop: 'max(12px, env(safe-area-inset-top, 12px))' }}
   256	      >
   257	        <div className="pb-1.5">
   258	          <div className="flex items-center justify-between rounded-2xl border border-[#818cf8]/15 bg-[#0f0f15] px-3 py-3">
   259	            <div className="min-w-0">
   260	              <p className="text-[15px] font-barlow-condensed font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-[#818cf8]">

FILE: app/client/nutrition/compose/page.tsx
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	import { createClient } from '@/utils/supabase/server'
     2	import { createClient as createServiceClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js'
     3	import { resolveClientFromUser } from '@/lib/client/resolve-client'
     4	import { resolveClientTimezone } from '@/lib/client/checkin/resolveClientTimezone'
     5	import { computePhysiologicalDate } from '@/lib/nutrition/physiological-date'
     6	import { utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate } from '@/lib/client/checkin/timeWindows'
     7	import { resolveProtocolDayByDate, resolveRestProtocolDay } from '@/lib/nutrition/protocol-schedule'
     8	import { shiftIsoDate } from '@/lib/utils/date'
     9	import type { NutritionMacros } from '@/components/client/smart/SmartNutritionWidget'
    10	import type { SmartNutritionPrep } from '@/components/client/smart/SmartNutritionPrepList'
    11	import ComposeClientPage from './ComposeClientPage'
    12	
    13	function svc() {
    14	  return createServiceClient(
    15	    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    16	    process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!,
    17	  )
    18	}
    19	
    20	function clampComposeDate(candidate: string | null | undefined, todayIso: string): string {
    21	  if (!candidate || !/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(candidate)) return todayIso
    22	  const maxIso = shiftIsoDate(todayIso, 3)
    23	  if (candidate < todayIso) return todayIso
    24	  if (candidate > maxIso) return maxIso
    25	  return candidate
    26	}
    27	
    28	export default async function ClientNutritionComposePage({
    29	  searchParams,
    30	}: {
    31	  searchParams?: Promise<Record<string, string | string[] | undefined>> | Record<string, string | string[] | undefined>
    32	}) {
    33	  const supabase = createClient()
    34	  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser()
    35	  if (!user) return null
    36	
    37	  const client = await resolveClientFromUser(user.id, user.email, svc(), 'id, gender')
    38	  if (!client) return null
    39	  const clientRecord = client as { id: string; gender?: string | null }
    40	  const clientId = clientRecord.id
    41	  const timezone = await resolveClientTimezone(svc(), clientId)
    42	  const todayDate = computePhysiologicalDate(new Date(), timezone)
    43	  const resolvedSearchParams = searchParams ? await searchParams : {}
    44	  const rawDate = Array.isArray(resolvedSearchParams?.date) ? resolvedSearchParams.date[0] : resolvedSearchParams?.date
    45	  const date = clampComposeDate(rawDate, todayDate)
    46	  const { start, end } = utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate(date, timezone)
    47	
    48	  const [protoResult, mealsResult, prepsResult, waterResult, weightResult, checkinWeightResult] = await Promise.allSettled([
    49	    svc()
    50	      .from('nutrition_protocols')
    51	      .select('schedule_start_date, nutrition_protocol_days(position, calories, protein_g, carbs_g, fat_g, hydration_ml, carb_cycle_type), nutrition_protocol_schedule_slots(week_index, dow, protocol_day_position)')
    52	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    53	      .eq('status', 'shared')
    54	      .order('updated_at', { ascending: false })
    55	      .limit(1)
    56	      .maybeSingle(),
    57	
    58	    svc()
    59	      .from('nutrition_meals')
    60	      .select('total_calories, total_protein_g, total_carbs_g, total_fat_g')
    61	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    62	      .eq('physiological_date', date),
    63	
    64	    svc()
    65	      .from('client_nutrition_preps')
    66	      .select('id, physiological_date, title, meal_type, meal_slot, variant_group_id, scenario_key, scenario_label, is_active, status, entries, total_calories, total_protein_g, total_carbs_g, total_fat_g, total_fiber_g, planned_for, created_at, updated_at')
    67	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    68	      .eq('physiological_date', date)
    69	      .eq('status', 'planned')
    70	      .order('created_at', { ascending: false }),
    71	
    72	    svc()
    73	      .from('client_water_logs')
    74	      .select('amount_ml, caffeine_mg')
    75	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    76	      .gte('logged_at', start)
    77	      .lt('logged_at', end),
    78	
    79	    svc()
    80	      .from('assessment_responses')
    81	      .select('numeric_value')
    82	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    83	      .eq('field_key', 'weight_kg')
    84	      .not('numeric_value', 'is', null)
    85	      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
    86	      .limit(1)
    87	      .maybeSingle(),
    88	
    89	    svc()
    90	      .from('client_daily_checkins')
    91	      .select('weight_kg')
    92	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    93	      .not('weight_kg', 'is', null)
    94	      .order('date', { ascending: false })
    95	      .limit(1)
    96	      .maybeSingle(),
    97	  ])
    98	
    99	  const protoData = protoResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? protoResult.value.data : null
   100	  const protocolDay = resolveProtocolDayByDate(
   101	    date,
   102	    (protoData as any)?.schedule_start_date ?? null,
   103	    (protoData?.nutrition_protocol_days as any) ?? [],
   104	    (protoData?.nutrition_protocol_schedule_slots as any) ?? [],
   105	  ) ?? resolveRestProtocolDay(((protoData?.nutrition_protocol_days as any[]) ?? []))
   106	
   107	  const target: NutritionMacros = {
   108	    kcal: Number(protocolDay?.calories ?? 2000),
   109	    protein_g: Number(protocolDay?.protein_g ?? 150),
   110	    carbs_g: Number(protocolDay?.carbs_g ?? 200),
   111	    fat_g: Number(protocolDay?.fat_g ?? 60),
   112	    water_ml: Number(protocolDay?.hydration_ml ?? 2500),
   113	  }
   114	
   115	  const meals = mealsResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (mealsResult.value.data ?? []) : []
   116	  const rawPreps = prepsResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (prepsResult.value.data ?? []) : []
   117	  const waterEntries = waterResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (waterResult.value.data ?? []) : []
   118	  const bodyWeightRow = weightResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? weightResult.value.data : null
   119	  const checkinWeightRow = checkinWeightResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? checkinWeightResult.value.data : null
   120	  const bodyWeightKg = checkinWeightRow?.weight_kg != null
   121	    ? Number(checkinWeightRow.weight_kg)
   122	    : (bodyWeightRow?.numeric_value ? Number(bodyWeightRow.numeric_value) : null)
   123	
   124	  const preps: SmartNutritionPrep[] = (rawPreps as any[]).map((prep) => ({
   125	    ...prep,
   126	    meal_slot: prep.meal_slot ?? prep.meal_type ?? 'snack',
   127	    variant_group_id: prep.variant_group_id ?? prep.meal_slot ?? prep.meal_type ?? 'snack',
   128	    scenario_key: prep.scenario_key ?? 'default',
   129	    scenario_label: prep.scenario_label ?? "Scénario principal",
   130	    is_active: prep.is_active === true,
   131	    entries: Array.isArray(prep.entries) ? prep.entries : [],
   132	    total_calories: Number(prep.total_calories ?? 0),
   133	    total_protein_g: Number(prep.total_protein_g ?? 0),
   134	    total_carbs_g: Number(prep.total_carbs_g ?? 0),
   135	    total_fat_g: Number(prep.total_fat_g ?? 0),
   136	    total_fiber_g: Number(prep.total_fiber_g ?? 0),
   137	  }))
   138	
   139	  const consumed: NutritionMacros = {
   140	    kcal: meals.reduce((s, m) => s + Number(m.total_calories ?? 0), 0),
   141	    protein_g: meals.reduce((s, m) => s + Number(m.total_protein_g ?? 0), 0),
   142	    carbs_g: meals.reduce((s, m) => s + Number(m.total_carbs_g ?? 0), 0),
   143	    fat_g: meals.reduce((s, m) => s + Number(m.total_fat_g ?? 0), 0),
   144	    water_ml: waterEntries.reduce((s, w) => s + Number((w as any).amount_ml ?? 0), 0),
   145	    caffeine_mg: waterEntries.reduce((s, w) => s + Number((w as any).caffeine_mg ?? 0), 0),
   146	  }
   147	
   148	  return (
   149	    <ComposeClientPage
   150	      consumed={consumed}
   151	      target={target}
   152	      date={date}
   153	      todayDate={todayDate}
   154	      initialPreps={preps}
   155	      gender={clientRecord.gender ?? null}
   156	      bodyWeightKg={bodyWeightKg}
   157	    />
   158	  )
   159	}

   115	
   116	export interface NutritionLogContentProps {
   117	  onSuccess?: () => void
   118	  /** When true, renders without the fixed TopBar (used inside MealLogSheet which has its own header) */
   119	  embedded?: boolean
   120	  /** Pre-select a meal to add items to (overrides ?meal_id search param) */
   121	  mealId?: string | null
   122	  /** Existing Smart Nutrition Prep to update instead of creating a new one */
   123	  prepId?: string | null
   124	  prepScenario?: {
   125	    key: string
   126	    label: string
   127	  }
   128	  initialPrepEntries?: Array<{
   129	    food_item_id: string
   130	    name_fr: string
   131	    quantity_g: number
   132	    calories_kcal: number
   133	    protein_g: number
   134	    carbs_g: number
   135	    fat_g: number
   136	    fiber_g?: number
   137	  }>
   138	  /** Runtime behavior from meal method selector */
   139	  composerMode?: "standard" | "guide" | "simulation"
   140	  /** Preferred starting emphasis when tracking an already eaten meal */
   141	  entryMode?: "default" | "search" | "favorites" | "categories"
   142	  /** Current day balance used to propose an automatic quantity */
   143	  balanceContext?: {
   144	    consumed: NutritionMacros
   145	    target: NutritionMacros
   146	    profile?: {
   147	      gender?: string | null
   148	      weightKg?: number | null
   149	    }
   150	  }
   151	  /** When true, suppresses internal save/log buttons — parent controls actions via ref */
   152	  hideActions?: boolean
   153	  /** Called whenever draft totals change — use to drive external simulation views */
   154	  onDraftsChange?: (totals: {
   155	    calories: number
   156	    protein: number
   157	    carbs: number
   158	    fat: number
   159	    count: number
   160	  }) => void
   161	  /** When true, parent page owns scrolling and this component expands naturally */
   162	  externalScroll?: boolean
   163	  /** Exposes current navigation depth so parent containers can compact surrounding chrome */
   164	  onLayerChange?: (layer: NutritionLogLayer) => void
   165	  /** Compose date (ISO YYYY-MM-DD) — used when saving preps to set the correct physiological_date */
   166	  prepDate?: string | null
   167	  /** Meal slot for this prep (breakfast/lunch/dinner/snack) — parent sets via slot picker */
   168	  prepMealSlot?: 'breakfast' | 'lunch' | 'dinner' | 'snack' | null
   169	  /** Optional prep title — displayed in coach view and prep list */
   170	  prepTitle?: string | null
   171	  /** Called when the parent wants to open the voice/text log — used in embedded smart mode where mic lives in parent header */
   172	  onVoiceOpen?: () => void

   175	function NutritionLogContentImpl({

FILE: app/client/nutrition/page.tsx

     1	import { createClient } from '@/utils/supabase/server'
     2	import { createClient as createServiceClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js'
     3	import { resolveClientFromUser } from '@/lib/client/resolve-client'
     4	import { resolveClientTimezone } from '@/lib/client/checkin/resolveClientTimezone'
     5	import { utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate } from '@/lib/client/checkin/timeWindows'
     6	import { computePhysiologicalDate } from '@/lib/nutrition/physiological-date'
     7	import { computeNutritionAlerts } from '@/lib/client/smart/nutritionAlerts'
     8	import type { NutritionMacros } from '@/components/client/smart/SmartNutritionWidget'
     9	import type { NutritionMeal } from '@/lib/nutrition/food-items'
    10	import type { SmartNutritionPrep } from '@/components/client/smart/SmartNutritionPrepList'
    11	import type { GenericAlert } from '@/components/client/smart/SmartAlertsFeed'
    12	import { type ClientLang } from '@/lib/i18n/clientTranslations'
    13	import { computeMacroEnergy } from '@/lib/nutrition/energy'
    14	import { resolveProtocolDayByDate, resolveRestProtocolDay } from '@/lib/nutrition/protocol-schedule'
    15	import { NUTRITION_UI_COLORS } from '@/lib/nutrition/ui-colors'
    16	import { detectCurrentPhase, getCycleSyncAdjustment } from '@/lib/nutrition/engine/cycleSync'
    17	import type { CyclePhase, CycleSyncAdjustment } from '@/lib/nutrition/engine/cycleSync'
    18	import { getCycleStateFromLogs } from '@/lib/cycle/cycleEngine'
    19	import type { CycleState, CycleLog } from '@/lib/cycle/cycleEngine'
    20	import NutritionClientPage from './NutritionClientPage'
    21	import { fetchClientDayOverride } from '@/lib/client/day-kind'
