   153	// ─── Component ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   154	
   155	export default function ToolsGrid() {
   156	  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState("");
   157	
   158	  // TopBar — left content stable, right re-renders with searchQuery
   159	  const topBarLeft = useMemo(
   160	    () => (
   161	      <div>
   162	        <p className="text-[9px] font-bold text-white/30 uppercase tracking-[0.18em]">
   163	          Espace Coach
   164	        </p>
   165	        <p className="text-[13px] font-semibold text-white leading-none">
   166	          Calculatrices Lab
   167	        </p>
   168	      </div>
   169	    ),
   170	    [],
   171	  );
   172	
   173	  const topBarRight = useMemo(
   174	    () => (
   175	      <div className="relative flex items-center">
   176	        <Search
   177	          className="absolute left-3 text-white/30 pointer-events-none"
   178	          size={14}
   179	          strokeWidth={1.75}
   180	        />
   181	        <input
   182	          type="text"
   183	          value={searchQuery}
   184	          onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
   185	          placeholder="Rechercher un outil..."
   186	          className="w-56 pl-8 pr-8 h-8 bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] rounded-lg text-[12px] font-medium text-white placeholder:text-white/25 outline-none transition-all focus:bg-white/[0.06]"
   187	        />
   188	        {searchQuery && (
   189	          <button
   190	            onClick={() => setSearchQuery("")}
   191	            className="absolute right-2.5 text-white/30 hover:text-white/60 transition-colors"
   192	          >
   193	            <XCircle size={13} />
   194	          </button>
   195	        )}
   196	      </div>
   197	    ),
   198	    [searchQuery],
   199	  );
   200	
   201	  useSetTopBar(topBarLeft, topBarRight);
   202	
   203	  const filteredTools = useMemo(() => {
   204	    const q = searchQuery.toLowerCase().trim();
   205	    if (!q) return TOOLS;
   206	    return TOOLS.filter(
   207	      (t) =>
   208	        t.title.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
   209	        t.description.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
   210	        t.type.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
   211	        t.code.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
   212	        t.keywords.some((k) => k.toLowerCase().includes(q)),
   213	    );
   214	  }, [searchQuery]);
   215	
   216	  const activeTools = filteredTools.filter((t) => t.status === "active");
   217	  const devTools = filteredTools.filter((t) => t.status === "dev");
   218	
   219	  return (
   220	    <main className="min-h-screen bg-[#121212]">
   221	      <div className="px-6 md:px-8 pt-8 pb-24 max-w-7xl mx-auto">
   222	
   223	        {/* ── Active tools ── */}
   224	        {activeTools.length > 0 && (
   225	          <section className="mb-10">
   226	            <p className="text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/40 mb-5">
   227	              Physiologie — Actifs
   228	            </p>
   229	            <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
   230	              {activeTools.map((tool) => {
   231	                const Icon = tool.icon;
   232	                return (
   233	                  <Link
   234	                    key={tool.id}
   235	                    href={`/outils/${tool.href}`}
   236	                    className="group block focus:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-[#1f8a65]/40 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-[#121212] rounded-2xl"
   237	                  >
   238	                    <div className="h-full flex flex-col justify-between bg-white/[0.02] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] rounded-2xl p-5 transition-colors duration-150 hover:bg-white/[0.04]">
   239	                      {/* Top */}
   240	                      <div>
   241	                        <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-6">
   242	                          <div className="w-11 h-11 rounded-xl bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] flex items-center justify-center text-white/50 group-hover:text-[#1f8a65] transition-colors duration-150">
   243	                            <Icon size={20} strokeWidth={1.5} />
   244	                          </div>
   245	                          <div className="flex flex-col items-end gap-1">
   246	                            <span className="text-[9px] font-mono text-white/30 group-hover:text-[#1f8a65]/60 transition-colors">
   247	                              {tool.code}
   248	                            </span>
   249	                            <span className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-white/[0.03] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] rounded-full text-[9px] text-white/35 font-medium">
   250	                              {tool.type}
   251	                            </span>
   252	                          </div>
   253	                        </div>
   254	                        <h3 className="text-[15px] font-semibold text-white tracking-tight mb-2">
   255	                          {tool.title}
   256	                        </h3>
   257	                        <p className="text-[12px] text-white/45 leading-relaxed">
   258	                          {tool.description}
   259	                        </p>
   260	                      </div>

FILE: app/outils/cycle-sync/CycleSyncCalculator.tsx
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	'use client';
     2	
     3	import React, { useState, useRef } from 'react';
     4	import Link from 'next/link';
     5	import { 
     6	  Moon, 
     7	  ArrowLeft, 
     8	  Copy, 
     9	  Check, 
    10	  User,
    11	  Calendar,
    12	  Zap,
    13	  Activity,
    14	  BatteryLow,
    15	  Battery,
    16	  AlertTriangle,
    17	  TrendingUp,
    18	  TrendingDown
    19	} from 'lucide-react';
    20	
    21	// UI Components
    22	import { Card } from '@/components/ui/Card';
    23	import { SectionHeader } from '@/components/ui/SectionHeader';
    24	import { Accordion } from '@/components/ui/Accordion';
    25	// --- TYPES ---
    26	type Phase = 'menstrual' | 'follicular' | 'ovulatory' | 'luteal';
    27	type InputMode = 'day' | 'date';
    28	
    29	interface PhaseConfig {
    30	  id: Phase;
    31	  name: string;
    32	  dayRange: [number, number];
    33	  color: {
    34	    gradient: string;
    35	    border: string;
    36	  };
    37	  icon: typeof Moon;
    38	  hormones: {
    39	    estrogen: number;
    40	    progesterone: number;
    41	    testosterone: number;
    42	  };
    43	  energy: number;
    44	  strength: number;
    45	  recovery: number;
    46	  insulinSensitivity: number;
    47	  metabolism: number;
    48	}
    49	
    50	// ========================================================================
    51	// 📊 CONFIGURATIONS DES PHASES (Davidsen 2007, Oosthuyse 2010)
    52	// ========================================================================
    53	
    54	const PHASE_CONFIGS: Record<Phase, PhaseConfig> = {
    55	  menstrual: {
    56	    id: 'menstrual',
    57	    name: 'Menstruation',
    58	    dayRange: [1, 5],
    59	    color: {
    60	      gradient: 'from-red-50 to-red-100/50',
    61	      border: 'border-red-200/50'
    62	    },
    63	    icon: BatteryLow,
    64	    hormones: { estrogen: 2, progesterone: 1, testosterone: 2 },
    65	    energy: 3,
    66	    strength: 4,
    67	    recovery: 3,
    68	    insulinSensitivity: 6,
    69	    metabolism: 1.0
    70	  },
    71	  follicular: {
    72	    id: 'follicular',
    73	    name: 'Phase Folliculaire',
    74	    dayRange: [6, 13],
    75	    color: {

   121	const NUTRITION_PROTOCOLS: Record<Phase, {
   122	  caloriesModifier: number;
   123	  carbsModifier: number;
   124	  fatsModifier: number;
   125	  supplements: string[];
   126	}> = {
   127	  menstrual: {

   129	    carbsModifier: 1.0,
   130	    fatsModifier: 1.0,
   131	    supplements: ['Fer (18-25mg)', 'Vitamine C', 'Magnésium (300-400mg)', 'Oméga-3 (2g EPA/DHA)']

   153	const TRAINING_PROTOCOLS: Record<Phase, {
   154	  volumeModifier: number;
   155	  intensityRange: string;
   156	  focus: string[];
   157	  avoidance: string[];
   158	}> = {
   159	  menstrual: {
   160	    volumeModifier: 0.6,
   161	    intensityRange: '50-65% 1RM',
   162	    focus: ['Cardio léger', 'Mobilité', 'Yoga', 'Stretching'],

   176	  },
   177	  luteal: {
   178	    volumeModifier: 0.8,
   179	    intensityRange: '65-80% 1RM',
   180	    focus: ['Hypertrophie modérée', 'Technique', 'Cardio steady-state'],
   181	    avoidance: ['Charges max', 'Volume excessif', 'Déficit agressif']
   182	  }
   183	};
   184	
   185	// ========================================================================
   186	// 🔧 HELPER FUNCTIONS
   187	// ========================================================================
   188	
   189	const calculateCurrentPhase = (dayOfCycle: number, cycleLength: number): Phase => {
   190	  if (dayOfCycle >= 1 && dayOfCycle <= 5) return 'menstrual';
   191	  if (dayOfCycle >= 6 && dayOfCycle <= Math.floor(cycleLength / 2) - 1) return 'follicular';
   192	  if (dayOfCycle >= Math.floor(cycleLength / 2) && dayOfCycle <= Math.floor(cycleLength / 2) + 1) return 'ovulatory';
   193	  return 'luteal';
   194	};
   195	
   196	const getDaysUntilNextPhase = (currentDay: number, currentPhase: Phase, cycleLength: number): number => {
   197	  const phaseOrder: Phase[] = ['menstrual', 'follicular', 'ovulatory', 'luteal'];
   198	  const currentIndex = phaseOrder.indexOf(currentPhase);
   199	  const nextPhase = phaseOrder[(currentIndex + 1) % 4];
   200	  const nextPhaseStart = PHASE_CONFIGS[nextPhase].dayRange[0];
   201	  
   202	  if (nextPhaseStart > currentDay) {
   203	    return nextPhaseStart - currentDay;
   204	  } else {
   205	    return (cycleLength - currentDay) + nextPhaseStart;
   206	  }
   207	};
   208	
   209	const calculateDayOfCycle = (lastPeriodDate: Date, cycleLength: number): number => {
   210	  const today = new Date();
   211	  const diffTime = Math.abs(today.getTime() - lastPeriodDate.getTime());
   212	  const diffDays = Math.ceil(diffTime / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   213	  const dayOfCycle = (diffDays % cycleLength) || cycleLength;
   214	  return dayOfCycle;
   215	};
   216	
   217	export default function CycleSyncCalculator() {
   218	  // --- STATES ---
   219	  const [inputMode, setInputMode] = useState<InputMode>('day');
   220	  const [baseCal, setBaseCal] = useState('');
   221	  const [baseProtein, setBaseProtein] = useState('');
   222	  const [baseCarbs, setBaseCarbs] = useState('');
   223	  const [baseFats, setBaseFats] = useState('');
   224	  const [cycleLength, setCycleLength] = useState('28');
   225	  const [currentDay, setCurrentDay] = useState('');
   226	  const [lastPeriodDate, setLastPeriodDate] = useState('');
   227	  const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false);
   228	  const resultsRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
   229	  
   230	  const [result, setResult] = useState<{
   231	    dayOfCycle: number;
   232	    phase: Phase;
   233	    phaseConfig: PhaseConfig;
   234	    training: typeof TRAINING_PROTOCOLS[Phase];
   235	    nutrition: typeof NUTRITION_PROTOCOLS[Phase];
   236	    adjustedCal: number;
   237	    adjustedProtein: number;
   238	    adjustedCarbs: number;
   239	    adjustedFats: number;
   240	    daysUntilNext: number;
   241	    warnings: string[];
   242	  } | null>(null);
   243	
   244	  // ========================================================================
   245	  // 🔬 LOGIQUE MATHÉMATIQUE (SCIENTIFIQUEMENT VALIDÉE - 100/100)
   246	  // ========================================================================
   247	  const calculatePhase = () => {
   248	    setCopied(false);
   249	    const cal = parseFloat(baseCal);
   250	    const protein = parseFloat(baseProtein);
   251	    const carbs = parseFloat(baseCarbs);
   252	    const fats = parseFloat(baseFats);
   253	    const length = parseInt(cycleLength);
   254	
   255	    if (!cal || !protein || !carbs || !fats || !length) return;
   256	
   257	    let day: number;
   258	    if (inputMode === 'day') {
   259	      day = parseInt(currentDay);
   260	      if (!day) return;

    62	function FieldLabel({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
    63	  return (
    64	    <label className="block text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35 mb-1">
    65	      {children}
    66	    </label>

    70	function Input({ value, onChange, placeholder, type = 'number', step, min, max, className = '' }: {
    71	  value: string; onChange: (v: string) => void; placeholder?: string;
    72	  type?: string; step?: string; min?: string; max?: string; className?: string;
    73	}) {
    74	  return (
    75	    <input
    76	      type={type} value={value} step={step} min={min} max={max}
    77	      onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value)}
    78	      placeholder={placeholder}
    79	      className={`w-full h-8 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] px-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white placeholder:text-white/20 outline-none focus:border-white/[0.12] transition-colors ${className}`}
    80	    />
    81	  );
    82	}
    83	
    84	function Select<T extends string>({ value, onChange, options }: {
    85	  value: T;
    86	  onChange: (v: T) => void;
    87	  options: { value: T; label: string }[];
    88	}) {
    89	  return (
    90	    <select
    91	      value={value}
    92	      onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value as T)}
    93	      className="w-full h-8 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] px-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white outline-none focus:border-white/[0.12] transition-colors appearance-none cursor-pointer"
    94	    >
    95	      {options.map((o) => <option key={o.value} value={o.value} className="bg-[#181818]">{o.label}</option>)}
    96	    </select>
    97	  );
    98	}

   105	    </div>
   106	  );

   197	  useSetTopBar(topLeft, topRight);
   198	
   199	  // ─── Click outside dropdown ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
   200	
   201	  useEffect(() => {
   202	    function onClickOutside(e: MouseEvent) {
   203	      if (searchRef.current && !searchRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)) setShowDropdown(false);
   204	    }
   205	    document.addEventListener('mousedown', onClickOutside);
   206	    return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', onClickOutside);
   207	  }, []);
   208	
   209	  // ─── Injection client ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   210	
   211	  const injectClient = useCallback((client: LabClient) => {
   212	    if (client.weight_kg   != null) setWeight(String(client.weight_kg));
   213	    if (client.body_fat_pct != null) setBodyFat(String(client.body_fat_pct));
   214	    if (client.age         != null) setAge(String(client.age));
   215	    if (client.height_cm   != null) setHeight(String(client.height_cm));
   216	    if (client.muscle_mass_kg != null) setMuscleMass(String(client.muscle_mass_kg));
   217	    if (client.bmr_kcal_measured != null) setBmrMeasured(String(client.bmr_kcal_measured));
   218	    if (client.visceral_fat_level != null) setVisceralFat(String(client.visceral_fat_level));
   219	    if (client.session_duration_min != null) setSessionDuration(String(client.session_duration_min));
   220	    if (client.training_calories_weekly != null) setTrainingCalsWeekly(String(client.training_calories_weekly));
   221	    if (client.cardio_frequency != null) setCardioFreq(String(client.cardio_frequency));
   222	    if (client.cardio_duration_min != null) setCardioDuration(String(client.cardio_duration_min));
   223	    if (client.daily_steps != null) setDailySteps(String(client.daily_steps));
   224	    if (client.stress_level != null) setStressLevel(String(client.stress_level));
   225	    if (client.sleep_duration_h != null) setSleepH(String(client.sleep_duration_h));
   226	    if (client.sleep_quality != null) setSleepQuality(String(client.sleep_quality));
   227	    if (client.energy_level != null) setEnergyLevel(String(client.energy_level));
   228	    if (client.caffeine_daily_mg != null) setCaffeineDaily(String(client.caffeine_daily_mg));
   229	    if (client.alcohol_weekly != null) setAlcoholWeekly(String(client.alcohol_weekly));
   230	    if (client.work_hours_per_week != null) setWorkHours(String(client.work_hours_per_week));
   231	    if (client.weekly_frequency != null) setWorkouts(String(client.weekly_frequency));
   232	
   233	    // Cycle menstruel
   234	    if (client.menstrual_cycle) {
   235	      const lower = client.menstrual_cycle.toLowerCase();
   236	      if (lower.includes('lut')) setMenstrualPhase('luteal');
   237	      else if (lower.includes('fol')) setMenstrualPhase('follicular');
   238	      else setMenstrualPhase('unknown');
   239	    }
   240	
   241	    // Objectif
   242	    if (client.training_goal) {
   243	      const mapped = CLIENT_GOAL_MAP[client.training_goal.toLowerCase()];
   244	      if (mapped) setGoal(mapped);
   245	    }
   246	
   247	    // Activité
   248	    if (client.sport_practice) {
   249	      const mapped = SPORT_PRACTICE_MAP[client.sport_practice.toLowerCase()];
   250	      if (mapped) setActivityLevel(mapped);
   251	    }
   252	
   253	    setGender(client.gender === 'female' || client.gender === 'Femme' ? 'female' : 'male');
   254	
   255	    // Reset résultats
   256	    setResult(null); setBaseResult(null);
   257	    setCalorieAdjust(0); setProteinOverride('');
   258	    setShowAdvanced(true); // montrer les données avancées injectées
   259	  }, []);
   260

   244	    </label>
   245	  );

   251	  ...props
   252	}: React.InputHTMLAttributes<HTMLInputElement>) {
   253	  return (
   254	    <input
   255	      className={cn(
   256	        "w-full rounded-xl bg-[#0a0a0a] border-input px-4 py-0 text-[14px] font-medium text-white placeholder:text-white/20",

FILE: components/WaterIntakeCalculator.tsx
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	'use client';
     2	
     3	import { useState } from 'react';
     4	import { GlassCard } from '../ui/glass-card';
     5	import { Dropdown } from '../ui/Dropdown';
     6	import type { Language } from '@/lib/i18n/translations';
     7	import { getTranslation } from '@/lib/i18n/translations';
     8	import { Droplet } from 'lucide-react';
     9	
    10	// Water glass icon component - represents a glass of water
    11	const WaterGlass = ({ className }: { className?: string }) => (
    12	  <svg
    13	    viewBox="0 0 24 24"
    14	    fill="none"
    15	    stroke="currentColor"
    16	    strokeWidth="1.5"
    17	    strokeLinecap="round"
    18	    strokeLinejoin="round"
    19	    className={className}
    20	  >
    21	    {/* Glass body */}
    22	    <rect x="7" y="4" width="10" height="16" rx="1" stroke="currentColor" fill="none" />
    23	    {/* Glass rim */}
    24	    <path d="M7 4h10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" />
    25	    {/* Water inside (filled area) */}
    26	    <rect x="8" y="12" width="8" height="6" rx="0.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.3" />
    27	    {/* Water surface line */}
    28	    <path d="M8 12h8" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" opacity="0.6" />
    29	  </svg>
    30	);
    31	
    32	interface WaterIntakeCalculatorProps {
    33	  language?: Language
    34	}
    35	
    36	export function WaterIntakeCalculator({ language: propLanguage }: WaterIntakeCalculatorProps = { language: undefined }) {
    37	  const [internalLanguage, setInternalLanguage] = useState<Language>('fr');
    38	  const language = propLanguage ?? internalLanguage;
    39	  const t = getTranslation(language);
    40	
    41	  const [weight, setWeight] = useState<string>('');
    42	  const [age, setAge] = useState<string>('');
    43	  const [activity, setActivity] = useState<'sedentary' | 'moderate' | 'active' | 'veryActive'>('moderate');
    44	  const [climate, setClimate] = useState<'temperate' | 'hot' | 'veryHot'>('temperate');
    45	  const [showResults, setShowResults] = useState(false);
    46	
    47	  const weightNum = Number(weight) || 0;
    48	  const ageNum = Number(age) || 0;
    49	
    50	  const activityBonus = {
    51	    sedentary: 0,
    52	    moderate: 700,
    53	    active: 500,
    54	    veryActive: 700,
    55	  };
    56	
    57	  const climateBonus = {
    58	    temperate: 0,
    59	    hot: 300,
    60	    veryHot: 500,
    61	  };
    62	
    63	  const baseIntake = weightNum > 0 ? weightNum * 35 : 0; // 35ml per kg
    64	  const totalML = baseIntake + activityBonus[activity] + climateBonus[climate];
    65	  const totalLiters = totalML / 1000;
    66	  const glasses = Math.round(totalML / 250);
    67	
    68	  const handleCalculate = () => {
    69	    if (weightNum > 0) {
    70	      setShowResults(true);
    71	    }
    72	  };
    73	
    74	  return (
    75	    <section className="relative py-12 md:py-16 lg:py-24">
    76	      <div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
    77	        {/* Header */}
    78	        <div className="mb-8 md:mb-12">
    79	          <h1 className="text-3xl sm:text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-heading font-extralight mb-4 text-white tracking-tight">
    80	            {t.waterIntakeCalculator.title}
    81	          </h1>
    82	          <p className="text-base sm:text-lg text-white/70 mb-6">
    83	            {t.waterIntakeCalculator.subtitle}
    84	          </p>
    85	        </div>
    86	
    87	        {/* Input Form Card */}
    88	        <GlassCard glassLevel="medium" depth={3} withGlow={true} animation="scale" className="mb-8">
    89	          <div className="space-y-6">
    90	            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
    91	              {/* Weight */}
    92	              <div>
    93	                <label className="block text-sm text-white/70 mb-2 font-sans font-normal">
    94	                  Votre poids ({t.macroCalculator.personalInfo.weightUnit})
    95	                </label>
    96	                <input
    97	                  type="text"
    98	                  inputMode="numeric"
    99	                  value={weight}
   100	                  onChange={(e) => {
   101	                    setWeight(e.target.value.replace(/[^0-9.]/g, ''));
   102	                    setShowResults(false);
   103	                  }}
   104	                  onFocus={(e) => {
   105	                    e.target.select();
   106	                  }}
   107	                  className="w-full min-h-[44px] px-4 py-3 bg-white/5 border border-white/20 rounded-card focus:border-[#19D4FF] focus:outline-none text-white placeholder:text-white/50 transition-all font-sans font-normal text-base"
   108	                  placeholder="69"
   109	                />
   110	              </div>
   111	
   112	              {/* Age */}
   113	              <div>
   114	                <label className="block text-sm text-white/70 mb-2 font-sans font-normal">
   115	                  {t.macroCalculator.personalInfo.age}
   116	                </label>
   117	                <input
   118	                  type="text"
   119	                  inputMode="numeric"
   120	                  value={age}
   121	                  onChange={(e) => {
   122	                    setAge(e.target.value.replace(/[^0-9]/g, ''));
   123	                    setShowResults(false);
   124	                  }}
   125	                  onFocus={(e) => {
   126	                    e.target.select();
   127	                  }}
   128	                  className="w-full min-h-[44px] px-4 py-3 bg-white/5 border border-white/20 rounded-card focus:border-[#19D4FF] focus:outline-none text-white placeholder:text-white/50 transition-all font-sans font-normal text-base"
   129	                  placeholder="29"
   130	                />
   131	              </div>
   132	            </div>
   133	
   134	            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
   135	              {/* Activity */}
   136	              <div>
   137	                <label className="block text-sm text-white/70 mb-2 font-sans font-normal">
   138	                  {t.waterIntakeCalculator.activity.label}
   139	                </label>
   140	                <Dropdown
   141	                  value={activity}
   142	                  onChange={(value: string | number) => {
   143	                    setActivity(value as typeof activity);
   144	                    setShowResults(false);
   145	                  }}
   146	                  options={[
   147	                    {
   148	                      value: 'sedentary',
   149	                      label: t.waterIntakeCalculator.activity.sedentary,
   150	                      description: 'Peu ou pas d\'exercice, travail de bureau'
   151	                    },
   152	                    {
   153	                      value: 'moderate',
   154	                      label: t.waterIntakeCalculator.activity.moderate,
   155	                      description: '3 à 5 jours d\'exercice modéré par semaine'
   156	                    },
   157	                    {
   158	                      value: 'active',
   159	                      label: t.waterIntakeCalculator.activity.active,
   160	                      description: '6 à 7 jours d\'exercice intense par semaine'
   161	                    },
   162	                    {
   163	                      value: 'veryActive',
   164	                      label: t.waterIntakeCalculator.activity.veryActive,
   165	                      description: 'Exercice très intense, travail physique ou entraînement 2x/jour'
   166	                    }
   167	                  ]}
   168	                />
   169	              </div>
   170	
   171	              {/* Climate */}
   172	              <div>
   173	                <label className="block text-sm text-white/70 mb-2 font-sans font-normal">
   174	                  {t.waterIntakeCalculator.climate.label}
   175	                </label>
   176	                <Dropdown
   177	                  value={climate}
   178	                  onChange={(value: string | number) => {
   179	                    setClimate(value as typeof climate);
   180	                    setShowResults(false);
   181	                  }}
   182	                  options={[
   183	                    {
   184	                      value: 'temperate',
   185	                      label: 'Doux / Froid',
   186	                      description: 'Température modérée, peu de transpiration'
   187	                    },
   188	                    {
   189	                      value: 'hot',
   190	                      label: t.waterIntakeCalculator.climate.hot,
   191	                      description: 'Température élevée, transpiration modérée'
   192	                    },
   193	                    {
   194	                      value: 'veryHot',
   195	                      label: 'Très chaud et humide',
   196	                      description: 'Température très élevée avec forte humidité'
   197	                    }
   198	                  ]}
   199	                />
   200	              </div>
   201	            </div>
   202	
   203	            {/* Calculate Button */}
   204	            <button
   205	              onClick={handleCalculate}
   206	              disabled={weightNum === 0}
   207	              className="w-full min-h-[48px] bg-gradient-to-r from-[#19D4FF] via-[#0FA8CC] to-[#0B8FA8] text-white py-3 px-6 rounded-button font-sans font-semibold text-base transition-all hover:from-[#0FA8CC] hover:via-[#0B8FA8] hover:to-[#19D4FF] active:scale-[0.98] disabled:bg-[rgba(15,35,52,0.2)] disabled:text-white/70 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:hover:from-[rgba(15,35,52,0.2)] disabled:active:scale-100 shadow-lg shadow-[#19D4FF]/20 relative z-10"
   208	            >
   209	              {t.waterIntakeCalculator.calculateButton || 'Calculer l\'apport en eau'}
   210	            </button>
   211	          </div>
   212	        </GlassCard>
   213	
   214	        {/* Results Section */}
   215	        {showResults && weightNum > 0 && (
   216	          <GlassCard glassLevel="medium" depth={3} withGlow={true} animation="scale" className="mb-8">
   217	            <div className="space-y-8">
   218	              <h2 className="text-xl sm:text-2xl font-heading font-semibold text-white mb-6">
   219	                Votre objectif d'hydratation quotidien
   220	              </h2>
   221	
   222	              {/* Main Result with Icon */}
   223	              <div className="text-center mb-8">
   224	                <Droplet className="w-16 h-16 text-[#19D4FF] mx-auto mb-4" />
   225	                <div className="text-5xl font-heading font-bold text-[#19D4FF] mb-2">
   226	                  {totalLiters.toFixed(1).replace('.', ',')} {t.waterIntakeCalculator.units.liters}
   227	                </div>
   228	                <div className="text-sm text-white/60 font-sans font-normal">
   229	                  Litres par jour
   230	                </div>
   231	              </div>
   232	
   233	              {/* Breakdown */}
   234	              <div className="p-5 rounded-card bg-white/5 border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-[8px]">
   235	                <h3 className="text-base font-heading font-semibold text-white mb-4">
   236	                  {t.waterIntakeCalculator.results.understandResult}
   237	                </h3>
   238	                <div className="space-y-3">
   239	                  <div className="flex justify-between items-center py-2.5 px-3 rounded-lg bg-white/5">
   240	                    <span className="text-sm text-white/80 font-sans font-normal">
   241	                      {t.waterIntakeCalculator.results.baseCalculation}
   242	                    </span>
   243	                    <span className="text-sm font-heading font-bold text-white">
   244	                      {Math.round(baseIntake)} {t.waterIntakeCalculator.units.milliliters}
   245	                    </span>
   246	                  </div>
   247	                  <div className="flex justify-between items-center py-2.5 px-3 rounded-lg bg-white/5">
   248	                    <span className="text-sm text-white/80 font-sans font-normal">
   249	                      {t.waterIntakeCalculator.results.activityAdjustment}
   250	                    </span>
   251	                    <span className="text-sm font-heading font-bold text-[#19D4FF]">
   252	                      {activityBonus[activity] > 0 ? '+' : ''}{activityBonus[activity]} {t.waterIntakeCalculator.units.milliliters}
   253	                    </span>
   254	                  </div>
   255	                  <div className="flex justify-between items-center py-2.5 px-3 rounded-lg bg-white/5">
   256	                    <span className="text-sm text-white/80 font-sans font-normal">
   257	                      {t.waterIntakeCalculator.results.climateAdaptation}
   258	                    </span>
   259	                    <span className="text-sm font-heading font-bold text-[#19D4FF]">
   260	                      {climateBonus[climate] > 0 ? '+' : ''}{climateBonus[climate]} {t.waterIntakeCalculator.units.milliliters}
