    67	// Extends VoiceItem with per-gram nutritional bases for correct quantity recalculation
    68	type DisplayItem = VoiceItem & {
    69	  _kcal_per_g: number;
    70	  _protein_per_g: number;
    71	  _carbs_per_g: number;
    72	  _fat_per_g: number;
    73	  _fiber_per_g: number;
    74	};
    75	
    76	function withBases(item: VoiceItem): DisplayItem {
    77	  const q = item.quantity_g > 0 ? item.quantity_g : 1;
    78	  const guessedCategory =
    79	    item.category_l1 && item.category_l2
    80	      ? { category_l1: item.category_l1, category_l2: item.category_l2 }
    81	      : guessVoiceFoodCategory(item.name);
    82	  return {
    83	    ...item,
    84	    _kcal_per_g: item.kcal / q,
    85	    _protein_per_g: item.protein_g / q,
    86	    _carbs_per_g: item.carbs_g / q,
    87	    _fat_per_g: item.fat_g / q,
    88	    _fiber_per_g: item.fiber_g / q,
    89	    category_l1: item.category_l1 ?? guessedCategory?.category_l1,
    90	    category_l2: item.category_l2 ?? guessedCategory?.category_l2,
    91	  };
    92	}

   168	  const [inputMode, setInputMode] = useState<EntryInputMode>("voice");

   183	  const audioCtxRef = useRef<AudioContext | null>(null);
   184	  const streamRef = useRef<MediaStream | null>(null);
   185	  const timerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null>(null);
   186	  const maxTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null);

   223	  useEffect(() => {
   224	    function onHide() {
   225	      if (modeRef.current === "recording") stopRecording();
   226	    }
   227	    document.addEventListener("visibilitychange", onHide);
   228	    return () => document.removeEventListener("visibilitychange", onHide);
   229	  }, []);
   230	
   231	  // ── Stop everything ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   232	  function stopAll() {
   233	    if (timerRef.current) {
   234	      clearInterval(timerRef.current);
   235	      timerRef.current = null;
   236	    }
   237	    if (maxTimerRef.current) {
   238	      clearTimeout(maxTimerRef.current);
   239	      maxTimerRef.current = null;
   240	    }
   241	    if (waveFrameRef.current) {
   242	      cancelAnimationFrame(waveFrameRef.current);
   243	      waveFrameRef.current = null;
   244	    }
   245	    if (recorderRef.current) {
   246	      try {
   247	        recorderRef.current.stop();
   248	      } catch {}
   249	      recorderRef.current = null;
   250	    }
   251	    if (streamRef.current) {
   252	      streamRef.current.getTracks().forEach((t) => t.stop());
   253	      streamRef.current = null;
   254	    }
   255	    if (audioCtxRef.current) {
   256	      audioCtxRef.current.close().catch(() => {});
   257	      audioCtxRef.current = null;
   258	    }
   259	    analyserRef.current = null;
   260	    chunksRef.current = [];

FILE: components/clients/CsvImportButton.tsx
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	'use client'
     2	
     3	import { useRef, useState } from 'react'
     4	import { Upload, ChevronRight, ChevronLeft, CheckCircle2, AlertCircle, Loader2, X, FileText, ArrowRight } from 'lucide-react'
     5	import { TARGET_FIELDS, ColMapping, PreviewRow } from '@/lib/csv-import/detect'
     6	
     7	interface Props {
     8	  clientId: string
     9	  onImported?: () => void
    10	  /** When true, renders a small icon button instead of the full banner */
    11	  compact?: boolean
    12	}
    13	
    14	type Step = 'idle' | 'mapping' | 'importing' | 'done'
    15	
    16	interface ParseResult {
    17	  columns: string[]
    18	  mappings: ColMapping[]
    19	  preview: PreviewRow[]
    20	  totalRows: number
    21	  dateColumnIndex: number | null
    22	}
    23	
    24	interface ImportResult {
    25	  inserted: number
    26	  skipped: number
    27	  total: number
    28	  message: string
    29	}
    30	
    31	const FIELD_LABEL: Record<string, string> = Object.fromEntries(
    32	  TARGET_FIELDS.map(f => [f.key, `${f.label}${f.unit ? ` (${f.unit})` : ''}`])
    33	)
    34	
    35	export default function CsvImportButton({ clientId, onImported, compact = false }: Props) {
    36	  const fileRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null)
    37	  const [step, setStep] = useState<Step>('idle')
    38	  const [file, setFile] = useState<File | null>(null)
    39	  const [parseResult, setParseResult] = useState<ParseResult | null>(null)
    40	  const [mappings, setMappings] = useState<ColMapping[]>([])
    41	  const [importResult, setImportResult] = useState<ImportResult | null>(null)
    42	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    43	  const [parsing, setParsing] = useState(false)
    44	
    45	  function reset() {
    46	    setStep('idle')
    47	    setFile(null)
    48	    setParseResult(null)
    49	    setMappings([])
    50	    setImportResult(null)
    51	    setError(null)
    52	    if (fileRef.current) fileRef.current.value = ''
    53	  }
    54	
    55	  async function handleFile(e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) {
    56	    const f = e.target.files?.[0]
    57	    if (!f) return
    58	    setFile(f)
    59	    setError(null)
    60	    setParsing(true)
    61	
    62	    const formData = new FormData()
    63	    formData.append('file', f)
    64	
    65	    try {
    66	      const res = await fetch(`/api/clients/${clientId}/parse-csv`, {
    67	        method: 'POST',
    68	        body: formData,
    69	      })
    70	      const d = await res.json()
    71	      if (!res.ok) {
    72	        setError(d.error ?? 'Erreur de lecture du fichier')
    73	        setParsing(false)
    74	        return
    75	      }
    76	      setParseResult(d)
    77	      setMappings(d.mappings)
    78	      setStep('mapping')
    79	    } catch {
    80	      setError('Erreur réseau')
    81	    } finally {
    82	      setParsing(false)
    83	    }
    84	  }
    85	
    86	  function updateMapping(csvColumn: string, fieldKey: string | null) {
    87	    setMappings(prev =>
    88	      prev.map(m => m.csvColumn === csvColumn ? { ...m, fieldKey } : m)
    89	    )
    90	  }
    91	
    92	  async function handleImport() {
    93	    if (!file || !parseResult) return
    94	    setStep('importing')
    95	    setError(null)
    96	
    97	    const formData = new FormData()
    98	    formData.append('file', file)
    99	    formData.append('mappings', JSON.stringify(mappings))
   100	
   101	    try {
   102	      const res = await fetch(`/api/clients/${clientId}/import-csv`, {
   103	        method: 'POST',
   104	        body: formData,
   105	      })
   106	      const d = await res.json()
   107	      if (!res.ok) {
   108	        setError(d.error ?? 'Erreur lors de l\'import')
   109	        setStep('mapping')
   110	      } else {
   111	        setImportResult(d)
   112	        setStep('done')
   113	        onImported?.()
   114	      }
   115	    } catch {
   116	      setError('Erreur réseau')
   117	      setStep('mapping')
   118	    }
   119	  }
   120	
   121	  const activeMappings = mappings.filter(m => m.fieldKey !== null)
   122	  const usedFieldKeys = new Set(activeMappings.map(m => m.fieldKey))
   123	
   124	  // ── IDLE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   125	  if (step === 'idle') {
   126	    if (compact) {
   127	      return (
   128	        <>
   129	          <input ref={fileRef} type="file" accept=".csv" className="hidden" onChange={handleFile} />
   130	          <button
   131	            onClick={() => fileRef.current?.click()}
   132	            disabled={parsing}
   133	            className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-2 rounded-btn bg-surface text-xs font-bold text-secondary hover:text-primary disabled:opacity-50 transition-colors"
   134	          >
   135	            {parsing ? <><Loader2 size={12} className="animate-spin" />Lecture…</> : <><Upload size={12} />Import CSV</>}
   136	          </button>
   137	        </>
   138	      )
   139	    }
   140	    return (
   141	      <div className="bg-surface rounded-card p-4 flex items-center justify-between gap-4 flex-wrap">
   142	        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   143	          <div className="w-9 h-9 rounded-widget bg-surface-light flex items-center justify-center shrink-0">
   144	            <Upload size={15} className="text-secondary" />
   145	          </div>
   146	          <div>
   147	            <p className="text-sm font-bold text-primary">Import CSV — Mesures corporelles</p>
   148	            <p className="text-xs text-secondary">Importez vos données depuis n'importe quel tableur ou logiciel de composition corporelle</p>
   149	          </div>
   150	        </div>
   151	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   152	          {error && (
   153	            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-red-500 font-medium">
   154	              <AlertCircle size={13} />{error}
   155	            </div>
   156	          )}
   157	          <input ref={fileRef} type="file" accept=".csv" className="hidden" onChange={handleFile} />
   158	          <button
   159	            onClick={() => fileRef.current?.click()}
   160	            disabled={parsing}
   161	            className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-btn bg-accent text-white text-xs font-bold hover:opacity-90 disabled:opacity-50 transition-opacity shadow"
   162	          >
   163	            {parsing
   164	              ? <><Loader2 size={13} className="animate-spin" />Lecture…</>
   165	              : <><Upload size={13} />Importer un CSV</>
   166	            }
   167	          </button>
   168	        </div>
   169	      </div>
   170	    )
   171	  }
   172	
   173	  // ── MAPPING ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   174	  if (step === 'mapping' && parseResult) {
   175	    return (
   176	      <div className="bg-surface rounded-card overflow-hidden">
   177	        {/* Header */}
   178	        <div className="px-5 py-4 border-b border-white/40 flex items-center justify-between">
   179	          <div className="flex items-center gap-2.5">
   180	            <FileText size={15} className="text-accent" />
   181	            <div>
   182	              <p className="text-sm font-bold text-primary">Mapping des colonnes</p>
   183	              <p className="text-[11px] text-secondary mt-0.5">
   184	                Fichier : <span className="font-medium">{file?.name}</span> · {parseResult.totalRows} ligne{parseResult.totalRows !== 1 ? 's' : ''} détectée{parseResult.totalRows !== 1 ? 's' : ''}
   185	              </p>
   186	            </div>
   187	          </div>
   188	          <button onClick={reset} className="text-secondary hover:text-primary transition-colors">
   189	            <X size={16} />
   190	          </button>
   191	        </div>
   192	
   193	        {/* Mapping table */}
   194	        <div className="px-5 py-4">
   195	          <p className="text-[11px] text-secondary mb-3">
   196	            Associez chaque colonne de votre fichier à un champ STRYVR. Les colonnes non mappées seront ignorées.
   197	          </p>
   198	          {parseResult.dateColumnIndex === null && (
   199	            <div className="flex items-start gap-2 mb-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-btn bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200">
   200	              <AlertCircle size={13} className="text-amber-500 mt-0.5 shrink-0" />
   201	              <p className="text-[11px] text-amber-700">
   202	                Aucune colonne de date détectée — les mesures seront importées avec la date du jour.
   203	              </p>
   204	            </div>
   205	          )}
   206	          <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
   207	            {mappings.map(m => (
   208	              <div key={m.csvColumn} className="flex items-center gap-3">
   209	                {/* CSV column name */}
   210	                <div className="w-40 shrink-0">
   211	                  <p className="text-xs font-mono font-bold text-primary truncate" title={m.csvColumn}>
   212	                    {m.csvColumn}
   213	                  </p>
   214	                  {m.confidence >= 70 && m.fieldKey && (
   215	                    <p className="text-[9px] text-green-600 font-medium">Détecté auto</p>
   216	                  )}
   217	                  {m.confidence >= 20 && m.confidence < 70 && m.fieldKey && (
   218	                    <p className="text-[9px] text-amber-500 font-medium">Suggestion</p>
   219	                  )}
   220	                </div>
   221	                <ArrowRight size={12} className="text-secondary/40 shrink-0" />
   222	                {/* Target field select */}
   223	                <select
   224	                  value={m.fieldKey ?? ''}
   225	                  onChange={e => updateMapping(m.csvColumn, e.target.value || null)}
   226	                  className="flex-1 px-3 py-1.5 bg-surface-light rounded-btn text-xs text-primary outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent/40"
   227	                >
   228	                  <option value="">— Ignorer cette colonne —</option>
   229	                  {TARGET_FIELDS.map(f => (
   230	                    <option
   231	                      key={f.key}
   232	                      value={f.key}
   233	                      disabled={usedFieldKeys.has(f.key) && m.fieldKey !== f.key}
   234	                    >
   235	                      {f.label}{f.unit ? ` (${f.unit})` : ''}
   236	                    </option>
   237	                  ))}
   238	                </select>
   239	              </div>
   240	            ))}
   241	          </div>
   242	        </div>
   243	
   244	        {/* Preview */}
   245	        {parseResult.preview.length > 0 && (
   246	          <div className="px-5 pb-4">
   247	            <p className="text-[11px] font-bold text-secondary uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">
   248	              Aperçu — {Math.min(5, parseResult.preview.length)} premières lignes
   249	            </p>
   250	            <div className="overflow-x-auto rounded-btn border border-white/40">
   251	              <table className="text-[10px] w-full">
   252	                <thead>
   253	                  <tr className="bg-surface-light border-b border-white/40">
   254	                    <th className="px-3 py-2 text-left font-bold text-secondary">Date</th>
   255	                    {activeMappings.map(m => (
   256	                      <th key={m.csvColumn} className="px-3 py-2 text-left font-bold text-secondary whitespace-nowrap">
   257	                        {FIELD_LABEL[m.fieldKey!] ?? m.fieldKey}
   258	                      </th>
   259	                    ))}
   260	                  </tr>

    67	// ─── Chart config for shadcn charts ───────────────────────────────────────────
    68	function createChartConfig(selectedMetrics: string[]): ChartConfig {
    69	  const config: ChartConfig = {};
    70	  selectedMetrics.forEach((key) => {
    71	    const field = FIELD_MAP[key];
    72	    if (field) {
    73	      const color = getMetricColor(key);
    74	      config[key] = { label: field.label, color };
    75	      config[`__pct_${key}`] = { label: `${field.label} (%)`, color };
    76	    }
    77	  });
    78	  return config;
    79	}

FILE: components/clients/SessionHistory.tsx
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	"use client";
     2	
     3	import { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useMemo } from "react";
     4	import {
     5	  Dumbbell,
     6	  ChevronDown,
     7	  ChevronUp,
     8	  CheckCircle2,
     9	  Clock,
    10	  Trash2,
    11	  CheckSquare,
    12	  Square,
    13	  AlertTriangle,
    14	  Filter,
    15	} from "lucide-react";
    16	import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton";
    17	import {
    18	  filterSessionsByStatus,
    19	  isCompletedSession,
    20	  type SessionStatusFilter,
    21	} from "@/lib/training/sessionLogUtils";
    22	
    23	interface SessionLog {
    24	  id: string;
    25	  session_name: string;
    26	  logged_at: string;
    27	  completed_at: string | null;
    28	  duration_min: number | null;
    29	  notes: string | null;
    30	  client_set_logs: {
    31	    id: string;
    32	    exercise_name: string;
    33	    set_number: number;
    34	    actual_reps: number | null;
    35	    actual_weight_kg: number | null;
    36	    completed: boolean;
    37	    rpe: number | null;
    38	    notes: string | null;
    39	  }[];
    40	}
    41	
    42	interface Props {
    43	  clientId: string;
    44	  focusedSessionDate?: string | null;
    45	  focusVersion?: number;
    46	  onSessionsChanged?: () => void;
    47	}
    48	
    49	const STATUS_LABELS: Record<SessionStatusFilter, string> = {
    50	  all: "Toutes",
    51	  completed: "Complétées",
    52	  incomplete: "Brouillons",
    53	};
    54	
    55	export default function SessionHistory({
    56	  clientId,
    57	  focusedSessionDate,
    58	  focusVersion = 0,
    59	  onSessionsChanged,
    60	}: Props) {
    61	  const [logs, setLogs] = useState<SessionLog[]>([]);
    62	  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    63	  const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState<string | null>(null);
    64	  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState<SessionStatusFilter>("all");
    65	  const [selectMode, setSelectMode] = useState(false);
    66	  const [selectedIds, setSelectedIds] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());
    67	  const [deleting, setDeleting] = useState(false);
    68	  const [confirmDelete, setConfirmDelete] = useState<{
    69	    ids: string[];
    70	    label: string;
    71	  } | null>(null);
    72	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
    73	
    74	  const loadLogs = useCallback(async () => {
    75	    setLoading(true);
    76	    setError(null);
    77	    try {
    78	      const res = await fetch(
    79	        `/api/session-logs?client_id=${clientId}&scope=manage&status=all`,
    80	      );
    81	      const d = await res.json();
    82	      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(d.error ?? "Erreur de chargement");
    83	      setLogs(d.logs ?? []);
    84	    } catch (e) {
    85	      setError(e instanceof Error ? e.message : "Erreur de chargement");
    86	      setLogs([]);
    87	    } finally {
    88	      setLoading(false);
    89	    }
    90	  }, [clientId]);
    91	
    92	  useEffect(() => {
    93	    loadLogs();
    94	  }, [loadLogs]);
    95	
    96	  useEffect(() => {
    97	    if (!focusedSessionDate || logs.length === 0) return;
    98	    const target = logs.find((log) => log.logged_at.startsWith(focusedSessionDate));
    99	    if (!target) return;
   100	
   101	    setStatusFilter("all");
   102	    setExpanded(target.id);
   103	
   104	    window.setTimeout(() => {
   105	      document
   106	        .getElementById(`session-log-${target.id}`)
   107	        ?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "center" });
   108	    }, 120);
   109	  }, [focusedSessionDate, focusVersion, logs]);
   110	
   111	  const filteredLogs = useMemo(
   112	    () => filterSessionsByStatus(logs, statusFilter),
   113	    [logs, statusFilter],
   114	  );
   115	
   116	  const filteredIds = useMemo(
   117	    () => filteredLogs.map((l) => l.id),
   118	    [filteredLogs],
   119	  );
   120	
   121	  const selectedInView = filteredIds.filter((id) => selectedIds.has(id));
   122	
   123	  const exitSelectMode = () => {
   124	    setSelectMode(false);
   125	    setSelectedIds(new Set());
   126	  };
   127	
   128	  const toggleSelect = (id: string) => {
   129	    setSelectedIds((prev) => {
   130	      const next = new Set(prev);
   131	      if (next.has(id)) next.delete(id);
   132	      else next.add(id);
   133	      return next;
   134	    });
   135	  };
   136	
   137	  const selectAllFiltered = () => {
   138	    setSelectedIds(new Set(filteredIds));
   139	  };
   140	
   141	  const runDelete = async (ids: string[]) => {
   142	    if (ids.length === 0) return;
   143	    setDeleting(true);
   144	    setError(null);
   145	    try {
   146	      const res = await fetch("/api/session-logs", {
   147	        method: "DELETE",
   148	        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
   149	        body: JSON.stringify({ client_id: clientId, session_log_ids: ids }),
   150	      });
   151	      const body = await res.json();
   152	      if (!res.ok) {
   153	        throw new Error(
   154	          typeof body.error === "string" ? body.error : "Suppression impossible",
   155	        );
   156	      }
   157	      setConfirmDelete(null);
   158	      exitSelectMode();
   159	      await loadLogs();
   160	      onSessionsChanged?.();
   161	    } catch (e) {
   162	      setError(e instanceof Error ? e.message : "Suppression impossible");
   163	    } finally {
   164	      setDeleting(false);
   165	    }
   166	  };
   167	
   168	  const requestDeleteSelection = () => {
   169	    if (selectedInView.length === 0) return;
   170	    const hasCompleted = filteredLogs.some(
   171	      (l) => selectedIds.has(l.id) && isCompletedSession(l),
   172	    );
   173	    setConfirmDelete({
   174	      ids: selectedInView,
   175	      label: hasCompleted
   176	        ? `${selectedInView.length} séance(s), dont des séances complétées, seront supprimées définitivement.`
   177	        : `${selectedInView.length} séance(s) seront supprimées définitivement.`,
   178	    });
   179	  };
   180	
   181	  const deleteAllFiltered = () => {
   182	    if (statusFilter !== "incomplete" || filteredIds.length === 0) return;
   183	    void runDelete(filteredIds);
   184	  };
   185	
   186	  if (loading) {
   187	    return (
   188	      <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">
   189	        <Skeleton className="h-10 w-full rounded-lg" />
   190	        {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => (
   191	          <div
   192	            key={i}
   193	            className="bg-[#181818] rounded-xl p-4 flex items-center justify-between gap-4"
   194	          >
   195	            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   196	              <Skeleton className="w-9 h-9 rounded-lg shrink-0" />
   197	              <div className="space-y-1.5">
   198	                <Skeleton className="h-4 w-32" />
   199	                <Skeleton className="h-3 w-20" />
   200	              </div>
   201	            </div>
   202	            <Skeleton className="h-5 w-16 rounded-full" />
   203	          </div>
   204	        ))}
   205	      </div>
   206	    );
   207	  }
   208	
   209	  return (
   210	    <div className="flex flex-col gap-4">
   211	      <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">
   212	        <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3 flex-wrap">
   213	          <h2 className="text-sm font-bold text-white flex items-center gap-2">
   214	            <Filter size={14} className="text-white/45" />
   215	            Historique des séances
   216	          </h2>
   217	          <span className="text-xs text-white/45">
   218	            {filteredLogs.length} affichée{filteredLogs.length > 1 ? "s" : ""}
   219	            {statusFilter !== "all" ? ` · ${logs.length} au total` : ""}
   220	          </span>
   221	        </div>
   222	
   223	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
   224	          <div className="flex items-center bg-white/[0.04] rounded-lg p-1 gap-1">
   225	            {(["all", "completed", "incomplete"] as SessionStatusFilter[]).map(
   226	              (s) => (
   227	                <button
   228	                  key={s}
   229	                  type="button"
   230	                  onClick={() => {
   231	                    setStatusFilter(s);
   232	                    setSelectedIds(new Set());
   233	                  }}
   234	                  className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded text-xs font-bold transition-all ${
   235	                    statusFilter === s
   236	                      ? "bg-accent text-white shadow"
   237	                      : "text-white/45 hover:text-white"
   238	                  }`}
   239	                >
   240	                  {STATUS_LABELS[s]}
   241	                </button>
   242	              ),
   243	            )}
   244	          </div>
   245	
   246	          {!selectMode ? (
   247	            <button
   248	              type="button"
   249	              onClick={() => setSelectMode(true)}
   250	              className="px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold bg-white/[0.06] text-white/70 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/[0.1] transition-colors flex items-center gap-1.5"
   251	            >
   252	              <CheckSquare size={14} />
   253	              Sélectionner
   254	            </button>
   255	          ) : (
   256	            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
   257	              <button
   258	                type="button"
   259	                onClick={selectAllFiltered}
   260	                disabled={filteredIds.length === 0}

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: components/lab/SharedProfilePanel.tsx

     1	'use client';
     2	
     3	/**
     4	 * SharedProfilePanel — Le Cockpit du Performance Lab
     5	 *
     6	 * Dark island (#343434) floating at the top of every tool page.
     7	 * Any edit here triggers recalculateAll() in <100ms — all open calculators
     8	 * update their displayed results without requiring a manual "Calculate" click.
     9	 *
    10	 * Design: STRYVR v2.1 — Card Dark, accent #D1FE02, Font-Mono values, ghost inputs.
    11	 */
    12	
    13	import React, { useState } from 'react';
    14	import { User, Weight, Ruler, Zap, Target, AlertTriangle, ChevronDown, ChevronUp, Check } from 'lucide-react';
    15	import { useClientStore } from '@/lib/stores/useClientStore';
    16	import { useAlertCounts } from '@/lib/hooks/useSmartAlerts';
    17	import type { MacroGoal, MacroGender } from '@/lib/formulas';
    18	import type { HydrationActivity, HydrationClimate } from '@/lib/formulas';
    19	
    20	// ─── Inline ghost input ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    21	
    22	function GhostInput({
    23	  label,
    24	  value,
    25	  onChange,
    26	  placeholder,
    27	  unit,
    28	  type = 'number',
    29	}: {
    30	  label: string;
    31	  value: string;
    32	  onChange: (v: string) => void;
    33	  placeholder: string;
    34	  unit?: string;
    35	  type?: string;
    36	}) {
    37	  return (
    38	    <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
    39	      <span className="text-[9px] font-bold tracking-widest text-[#888] uppercase">{label}</span>
    40	      <div className="flex items-baseline gap-1">
    41	        <input
    42	          type={type}
    43	          value={value}
    44	          onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value)}
    45	          placeholder={placeholder}
    46	          className="w-full bg-transparent border-b border-[#444] focus:border-[#D1FE02] outline-none text-[#D1FE02] font-mono text-base font-bold placeholder:text-[#555] transition-colors pb-0.5"
    47	        />
    48	        {unit && <span className="text-[10px] text-[#888] shrink-0">{unit}</span>}
    49	      </div>
    50	    </div>
    51	  );
    52	}
    53	
    54	// ─── Segmented toggle ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    55	
    56	function DarkToggle<T extends string>({
    57	  options,
    58	  value,
    59	  onChange,
    60	}: {
    61	  options: { value: T; label: string }[];
    62	  value: T;
    63	  onChange: (v: T) => void;
    64	}) {
    65	  return (
    66	    <div className="flex gap-0.5 bg-[#2a2a2a] rounded-lg p-0.5">
    67	      {options.map((opt) => (
    68	        <button
    69	          key={opt.value}
    70	          onClick={() => onChange(opt.value)}
    71	          className={`flex-1 py-1 px-2 rounded-md text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wide transition-all ${
    72	            value === opt.value
    73	              ? 'bg-[#D1FE02] text-[#1a1a1a]'
    74	              : 'text-[#888] hover:text-[#ccc]'
    75	          }`}
    76	        >
    77	          {opt.label}
    78	        </button>
    79	      ))}
    80	    </div>
    81	  );
    82	}
    83	
    84	// ─── Alert badge ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    85	
    86	function AlertBadge() {
    87	  const counts = useAlertCounts();
    88	  if (counts.total === 0) return null;
    89	  const color = counts.danger > 0 ? 'bg-red-500' : counts.warning > 0 ? 'bg-yellow-400' : 'bg-blue-400';
    90	  return (
    91	    <span className={`${color} text-white text-[9px] font-bold px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full ml-1`}>
    92	      {counts.total}
    93	    </span>
    94	  );
    95	}
    96	
    97	// ─── Main component ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    98	
    99	export default function SharedProfilePanel() {
   100	  const { profile, setProfile, results } = useClientStore();
   101	  const alerts = useClientStore((s) => s.alerts);
   102	
   103	  const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState(false);
   104	  const [saved, setSaved] = useState(false);
   105	
   106	  // Local controlled state — flush to store on blur for performance
   107	  const [localWeight, setLocalWeight] = useState(profile.weight?.toString() ?? '');
   108	  const [localHeight, setLocalHeight] = useState(profile.height?.toString() ?? '');
   109	  const [localAge, setLocalAge] = useState(profile.age?.toString() ?? '');
   110	  const [localBF, setLocalBF] = useState(profile.bodyFat?.toString() ?? '');
   111	
   112	  const flush = () => {
   113	    setProfile({
   114	      weight: localWeight ? parseFloat(localWeight) : null,
   115	      height: localHeight ? parseFloat(localHeight) : null,
   116	      age: localAge ? parseFloat(localAge) : null,
   117	      bodyFat: localBF ? parseFloat(localBF) : null,
   118	    });
   119	    setSaved(true);
   120	    setTimeout(() => setSaved(false), 1200);
   121	  };
   122	
   123	  const macros = results.macros;
   124	  const hydration = results.hydration;
   125	
   126	  return (
   127	    <div className="w-full bg-[#2b2b2b] border border-[#3a3a3a] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-2xl mb-8">
   128	
   129	      {/* ── Collapsed header ──────────────────────────────────────────── */}
   130	      <button
   131	        onClick={() => setExpanded((v) => !v)}
   132	        className="w-full flex items-center justify-between px-5 py-3 hover:bg-[#313131] transition-colors"
   133	      >
   134	        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   135	          <div className="w-7 h-7 rounded-lg bg-[#D1FE02]/10 flex items-center justify-center">
   136	            <User size={13} className="text-[#D1FE02]" />
   137	          </div>
   138	          <span className="text-[11px] font-bold tracking-widest text-[#aaa] uppercase">Profil Client</span>
   139	          <AlertBadge />
   140	        </div>
   141	
   142	        {/* Quick readout when collapsed */}
   143	        <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
   144	          {profile.weight && (
   145	            <span className="hidden sm:flex items-baseline gap-1">
   146	              <span className="font-mono text-sm font-bold text-[#D1FE02]">{profile.weight}</span>
   147	              <span className="text-[9px] text-[#666]">kg</span>
   148	            </span>
   149	          )}
   150	          {macros && (
   151	            <span className="hidden md:flex items-baseline gap-1">
   152	              <span className="font-mono text-sm font-bold text-[#D1FE02]">{macros.calories}</span>
   153	              <span className="text-[9px] text-[#666]">kcal</span>
   154	            </span>
   155	          )}
   156	          {hydration && (
   157	            <span className="hidden md:flex items-baseline gap-1">
   158	              <span className="font-mono text-sm font-bold text-[#D1FE02]">{hydration.liters}</span>
   159	              <span className="text-[9px] text-[#666]">L</span>
   160	            </span>
   161	          )}
   162	          {profile.gender === 'female' && profile.cyclePhase && (
   163	            <span className="text-[9px] bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full font-medium capitalize">
   164	              {profile.cyclePhase}

   169	          </div>
   170	        </div>
   171	      </button>
   172	
   173	      {/* ── Expanded body ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */}
   174	      {expanded && (
   175	        <div className="border-t border-[#3a3a3a] px-5 py-5 space-y-5">
   176	
   177	          {/* Row 1: Biometrics */}
   178	          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
   179	            <GhostInput
   180	              label="Poids"
   181	              value={localWeight}
   182	              onChange={setLocalWeight}
   183	              placeholder="75"
   184	              unit="kg"
   185	              type="number"
   186	            />
   187	            <GhostInput
   188	              label="Taille"

   190	              onChange={setLocalHeight}
   191	              placeholder="175"
   192	              unit="cm"
   193	              type="number"

   198	              onChange={setLocalAge}

   200	              unit="ans"
   201	              type="number"
   202	            />

   204	              label="BF%"

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	"use client";
     2	
     3	import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from "react";
     4	import { Bell, CheckCheck, X } from "lucide-react";
     5	
     6	import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
     7	
     8	interface Notification {
     9	  id: string;
    10	  type: string;
    11	  message: string;
    12	  read: boolean;
    13	  created_at: string;
    14	  client_id: string | null;
    15	  submission_id?: string | null;
    16	}
    17	
    18	const TYPE_ICONS: Record<string, string> = {
    19	  assessment_completed: "📋",
    20	  assessment_sent: "📤",
    21	  program_updated: "💪",
    22	  program_assigned: "💪",
    23	  session_reminder: "🏋️",
    24	  bilan_received: "📋",
    25	};
    26	
    27	function timeAgo(iso: string) {
    28	  const diff = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(iso).getTime()) / 1000);
    29	  if (diff < 60) return "À l'instant";
    30	  if (diff < 3600) return `${Math.floor(diff / 60)}min`;
    31	  if (diff < 86400) return `${Math.floor(diff / 3600)}h`;
    32	  return `${Math.floor(diff / 86400)}j`;
    33	}
    34	
    35	export default function NotificationBell(_props: { topBarMode?: boolean } = {}) {
    36	  const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState<Notification[]>([]);
    37	  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
    38	  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    39	  const isFetchingRef = useRef(false);
    40	  const router = useRouter();
    41	
    42	  const unread = notifications.filter((n) => !n.read);
    43	
    44	  async function fetchNotifications() {
    45	    // Debounce: skip if already fetching
    46	    if (isFetchingRef.current) return;
    47	
    48	    isFetchingRef.current = true;
    49	    try {
    50	      const res = await fetch("/api/assessments/notify");
    51	      if (res.ok) {
    52	        const data = await res.json();
    53	        // On mappe pour inclure submission_id si présent
    54	        setNotifications(
    55	          (data.notifications ?? []).map((n: any) => ({
    56	            ...n,
    57	            submission_id: n.submission_id ?? null,
    58	          })),
    59	        );
    60	      }
    61	    } finally {
    62	      isFetchingRef.current = false;
    63	    }
    64	  }
    65	
    66	  useEffect(() => {
    67	    fetchNotifications();
    68	
    69	    // Polling interval: 60 seconds instead of 30
    70	    const iv = setInterval(fetchNotifications, 60_000);
    71	
    72	    // Stop polling when tab is hidden
    73	    const handleVisibilityChange = () => {
    74	      if (document.hidden) {
    75	        clearInterval(iv);
    76	      } else {
    77	        fetchNotifications();
    78	        // Resume polling when tab becomes visible
    79	      }
    80	    };
    81	
    82	    document.addEventListener("visibilitychange", handleVisibilityChange);
    83	
    84	    return () => {
    85	      clearInterval(iv);
    86	      document.removeEventListener("visibilitychange", handleVisibilityChange);
    87	    };
    88	  }, []);
    89	
    90	  // Fermer au clic extérieur
    91	  useEffect(() => {
    92	    function handleClick(e: MouseEvent) {
    93	      if (
    94	        containerRef.current &&
    95	        !containerRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)
    96	      ) {
    97	        setOpen(false);
    98	      }
    99	    }
   100	    if (open) document.addEventListener("mousedown", handleClick);
   101	    return () => document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handleClick);
   102	  }, [open]);
   103	
   104	  async function markAllRead() {
   105	    const ids = unread.map((n) => n.id);
   106	    if (!ids.length) return;
   107	    setNotifications((prev) => prev.map((n) => ({ ...n, read: true })));
   108	    await fetch("/api/assessments/notify", {
   109	      method: "PATCH",
   110	      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
   111	      body: JSON.stringify({ ids }),
   112	    });
   113	  }
   114	
   115	  async function markRead(id: string) {
   116	    setNotifications((prev) =>
   117	      prev.map((n) => (n.id === id ? { ...n, read: true } : n)),
   118	    );
   119	    await fetch("/api/assessments/notify", {
   120	      method: "PATCH",
   121	      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
   122	      body: JSON.stringify({ ids: [id] }),
   123	    });
   124	  }
   125	
   126	  return (
   127	    <div className="relative" ref={containerRef}>
   128	      {/* Bouton cloche */}
   129	      <button
   130	        onClick={() => setOpen((o) => !o)}
   131	        className={`relative flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-lg transition-all ${
   132	          open
   133	            ? "bg-white/[0.08] text-white/80"
   134	            : "text-white/35 hover:bg-white/[0.06] hover:text-white/70"
   135	        }`}
   136	        title="Notifications"
   137	      >
   138	        <Bell size={15} strokeWidth={1.75} />
   139	        {unread.length > 0 && (
   140	          <span className="absolute -top-0.5 -right-0.5 min-w-[14px] h-[14px] bg-red-500 text-white text-[8px] font-bold rounded-full flex items-center justify-center px-0.5 leading-none">
   141	            {unread.length > 9 ? "9+" : unread.length}
   142	          </span>
   143	        )}
   144	      </button>
   145	
   146	      {/* Dropdown */}
   147	      {open && (
   148	        <div className="absolute right-0 top-full mt-2 w-80 bg-[#181818] border-subtle rounded-2xl z-50 overflow-hidden">
   149	          {/* Header */}
   150	          <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3">
   151	            <span className="text-[12px] font-bold text-white">
   152	              Notifications
   153	              {unread.length > 0 && (
   154	                <span className="ml-2 px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-red-500 text-white text-[9px] font-bold rounded-full">
   155	                  {unread.length}
   156	                </span>
   157	              )}
   158	            </span>
   159	            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   160	              {unread.length > 0 && (
   161	                <button
   162	                  onClick={markAllRead}
   163	                  className="flex items-center gap-1 text-[11px] text-[#1f8a65] font-medium hover:text-white transition-colors"
   164	                >
   165	                  <CheckCheck size={11} />
   166	                  Tout lire
   167	                </button>
   168	              )}
   169	              <button
   170	                onClick={() => setOpen(false)}
   171	                className="flex h-6 w-6 items-center justify-center rounded-lg text-white/30 hover:bg-white/[0.06] hover:text-white/70 transition-all"
   172	              >
   173	                <X size={13} />
   174	              </button>
   175	            </div>
   176	          </div>
   177	
   178	          <div className="h-px bg-white/[0.07]" />
   179	
   180	          {/* Liste */}
   181	          <div className="max-h-80 overflow-y-auto">
   182	            {notifications.length === 0 ? (
   183	              <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-10 gap-2">
   184	                <Bell size={18} className="text-white/20" />
   185	                <p className="text-[12px] text-white/30">Aucune notification</p>
   186	              </div>
   187	            ) : (
   188	              notifications.map((n, i) => (
   189	                <button
   190	                  key={n.id}
   191	                  onClick={() => {
   192	                    if (!n.read) markRead(n.id);
   193	                    // Redirection selon le type et l’id de ressource
   194	                    if (n.type === "session_reminder" && n.client_id) {
   195	                      router.push(`/coach/clients/${n.client_id}/data/performances`);
   196	                    } else if (n.submission_id) {
   197	                      if (n.type === "assessment_completed") {
   198	                        if (n.client_id) {
   199	                          router.push(`/coach/clients/${n.client_id}/bilans/${n.submission_id}`);
   200	                        } else {
   201	                          router.push(`/coach/clients`);
   202	                        }
   203	                      } else if (n.type === "payment_received") {
   204	                        router.push(`/coach/paiements/${n.submission_id}`);
   205	                      } else if (n.type === "program_assigned") {
   206	                        router.push(`/coach/programmes/${n.submission_id}`);
   207	                      }
   208	                    }
   209	                  }}
   210	                  className={`w-full text-left px-4 py-3 flex items-start gap-3 transition-colors ${
   211	                    i < notifications.length - 1
   212	                      ? "border-b border-white/[0.05]"
   213	                      : ""
   214	                  } ${n.read ? "opacity-40" : "hover:bg-white/[0.04]"}`}
   215	                >
   216	                  <span className="text-base shrink-0 mt-0.5 leading-none">
   217	                    {TYPE_ICONS[n.type] ?? "🔔"}
   218	                  </span>
   219	                  <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   220	                    <p
   221	                      className={`text-[12px] leading-snug ${n.read ? "text-white/50" : "text-white/90 font-medium"}`}
   222	                    >
   223	                      {n.message}
   224	                    </p>
   225	                    <p className="text-[10px] text-white/30 mt-0.5">
   226	                      {timeAgo(n.created_at)}
   227	                    </p>
   228	                  </div>
   229	                  {!n.read && (
   230	                    <span className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-[#1f8a65] shrink-0 mt-1.5" />
   231	                  )}
   232	                </button>
   233	              ))
   234	            )}
   235	          </div>
   236	        </div>
   237	      )}
   238	    </div>
   239	  );
   240	}

     1	'use client'

     4	
     5	const PHASES = [
     6	  {
     7	    value: 'follicular',

    13	    border: 'border-pink-500/20',
    14	  },
    15	  {
    16	    value: 'ovulatory',
    17	    label: 'Ovulatoire',
    18	    days: 'J14–J16',

    20	    color: 'text-violet-400',

    29	    color: 'text-amber-400',

    34	    value: 'menstrual',
    35	    label: 'Menstruelle',

    38	    color: 'text-red-400',
    39	    bg: 'bg-red-500/10',
    40	    border: 'border-red-500/20',
    41	  },
    42	] as const
    43	
    44	interface Props {
    45	  day: DayDraft
    46	  onDayChange: (updates: Partial<DayDraft>) => void
    47	}
    48	
    49	export default function NutritionCycleSyncSection({ day, onDayChange }: Props) {
    50	  return (
    51	    <div>
    52	      <p className="text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35 mb-3">Phase du cycle menstruel</p>
    53	      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
    54	        {PHASES.map(p => (
    55	          <button
    56	            key={p.value}
    57	            onClick={() => onDayChange({ cycle_sync_phase: day.cycle_sync_phase === p.value ? '' : p.value as DayDraft['cycle_sync_phase'] })}
    58	            className={`flex flex-col items-start gap-1 p-3 rounded-xl border-[0.3px] text-left transition-all ${
    59	              day.cycle_sync_phase === p.value
    60	                ? `${p.bg} ${p.border} ${p.color}`
    61	                : 'bg-white/[0.02] border-white/[0.06] text-white/40 hover:bg-white/[0.04]'
    62	            }`}
    63	          >
    64	            <div className="flex items-center justify-between w-full">
    65	              <span className="text-[12px] font-bold">{p.label}</span>
    66	              <span className="text-[9px] opacity-60">{p.days}</span>
    67	            </div>
    68	            <span className="text-[9px] leading-snug opacity-70">{p.desc}</span>
    69	          </button>
    70	        ))}
    71	      </div>
    72	    </div>
    73	  )
    74	}

FILE: components/nutrition/NutritionProtocolTool.tsx

     1	'use client'
     2	
     3	import React, { useState, useRef, useEffect, useCallback, useMemo } from 'react'
     4	import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation'
     5	import {
     6	  Save, Share2, ChevronDown, ChevronUp, FlaskConical, Activity,
     7	  UserCheck, X, Zap, AlertTriangle, Info, CheckCircle2,
     8	  Check, Send, Moon, Droplets, RefreshCw, ArrowRight, Sparkles,
     9	} from 'lucide-react'
    10	import { useClientTopBar } from '@/components/clients/useClientTopBar'
    11	import NutritionProtocolDayTabs from './NutritionProtocolDayTabs'
    12	import {
    13	  type DayDraft, type NutritionProtocol, type NutritionClientData,
    14	  emptyDayDraft, dayDraftFromDb,
    15	} from '@/lib/nutrition/types'
    16	import {
    17	  calculateMacros,
    18	  type MacroGoal, type MacroGender, type MacroResult,
    19	  type SmartProtocolSuggestion,
    20	} from '@/lib/formulas/macros'
    21	import {
    22	  calculateCarbCycling,
    23	  type CarbCyclingResult, type CarbCycleProtocol, type CarbCycleGoal,
    24	  type CarbCycleIntensity, type CarbCyclePhase, type CarbCycleInsulin,
    25	  type CarbCycleOccupation,
    26	} from '@/lib/formulas/carbCycling'
    27	import { calculateHydration, type HydrationActivity, type HydrationClimate } from '@/lib/formulas/hydration'
    28	import { useLabClientSearch, type LabClient } from '@/lib/lab/useLabClientSearch'
    29	import { NUTRITION_UI_COLORS } from '@/lib/nutrition/ui-colors'
    30	
    31	// ─── Types locaux ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    32	
    33	type ActivityLevel = 'sedentary' | 'light' | 'moderate' | 'active' | 'veryActive'
    34	type CyclePhase = 'menstrual' | 'follicular' | 'ovulatory' | 'luteal'
    35	type CycleInputMode = 'day' | 'date'
    36	
    37	// ─── Constantes ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    38	
    39	const ACTIVITY_LABELS: Record<ActivityLevel, string> = {
    40	  sedentary: 'Sédentaire', light: 'Légèrement actif', moderate: 'Modérément actif',
    41	  active: 'Actif', veryActive: 'Très actif',
    42	}
    43	const ACTIVITY_STEPS: Record<ActivityLevel, number> = {
    44	  sedentary: 2000, light: 4000, moderate: 7000, active: 11000, veryActive: 15000,
    45	}
    46	const GOAL_LABELS: Record<MacroGoal, string> = {
    47	  deficit: 'Déficit — Perte de gras', maintenance: 'Maintenance', surplus: 'Surplus — Prise de muscle',
    48	}
    49	const CLIENT_GOAL_MAP: Record<string, MacroGoal> = {
    50	  fat_loss: 'deficit', weight_loss: 'deficit', sèche: 'deficit', cut: 'deficit',
    51	  muscle_gain: 'surplus', hypertrophy: 'surplus', prise_de_masse: 'surplus', bulk: 'surplus',
    52	  maintenance: 'maintenance', recomposition: 'maintenance',
    53	}

    55	  sedentary: 'sedentary', light: 'light', moderate: 'moderate', active: 'active', athlete: 'veryActive',
    56	}
    57	const PRIORITY_CONFIG = {
    58	  critical: { color: 'text-red-400',   bg: 'bg-red-500/10',   border: 'border-red-500/20',   dot: 'bg-red-400'   },
    59	  high:     { color: 'text-amber-400', bg: 'bg-amber-500/10', border: 'border-amber-500/20', dot: 'bg-amber-400' },

    81	}

    90	}
    91	const PHASE_COLORS: Record<CyclePhase, { border: string; bg: string; text: string }> = {
    92	  menstrual:  { border: 'border-red-500/30',    bg: 'bg-red-500/[0.08]',    text: 'text-red-400'    },
    93	  follicular: { border: 'border-emerald-500/30', bg: 'bg-emerald-500/[0.08]', text: 'text-emerald-400' },
    94	  ovulatory:  { border: 'border-yellow-500/30', bg: 'bg-yellow-500/[0.08]', text: 'text-yellow-400' },
    95	  luteal:     { border: 'border-orange-500/30', bg: 'bg-orange-500/[0.08]', text: 'text-orange-400'  },
    96	}
    97	
    98	function calculateCyclePhase(dayOfCycle: number, cycleLength: number): CyclePhase {
    99	  if (dayOfCycle >= 1 && dayOfCycle <= 5) return 'menstrual'
   100	  if (dayOfCycle >= 6 && dayOfCycle <= Math.floor(cycleLength / 2) - 1) return 'follicular'
   101	  if (dayOfCycle >= Math.floor(cycleLength / 2) && dayOfCycle <= Math.floor(cycleLength / 2) + 1) return 'ovulatory'
   102	  return 'luteal'
   103	}

   109	}

   111	function NumInput({ value, onChange, placeholder, step, min, max, className = '' }: {
   112	  value: string; onChange: (v: string) => void; placeholder?: string
   113	  step?: string; min?: string; max?: string; className?: string
   114	}) {
   115	  return (
   116	    <input
   117	      type="number" value={value} step={step} min={min} max={max}
   118	      onChange={e => onChange(e.target.value)} placeholder={placeholder}
   119	      className={`w-full h-8 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] px-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white placeholder:text-white/20 outline-none focus:border-white/[0.12] transition-colors ${className}`}
   120	    />
   121	  )
   122	}

   124	function DSSelect<T extends string>({ value, onChange, options }: {
   125	  value: T; onChange: (v: T) => void; options: { value: T; label: string }[]
   126	}) {
   127	  return (
   128	    <select value={value} onChange={e => onChange(e.target.value as T)}
   129	      className="w-full h-8 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] px-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white outline-none focus:border-white/[0.12] transition-colors appearance-none cursor-pointer"
   130	    >
   131	      {options.map(o => <option key={o.value} value={o.value} className="bg-[#181818]">{o.label}</option>)}
   132	    </select>
   133	  )
   134	}
   135	
   136	function SectionHeader({ children, icon: Icon }: { children: React.ReactNode; icon?: React.ElementType }) {
   137	  return (
   138	    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
   139	      {Icon && <Icon size={11} className="text-white/30" strokeWidth={1.75} />}
   140	      <p className="text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/30">{children}</p>
   141	    </div>
   142	  )
   143	}
   144	
   145	function ModuleBlock({
   146	  title, icon: Icon, badge, defaultOpen = false, accent, children,
   147	}: {
   148	  title: string; icon?: React.ElementType; badge?: string; defaultOpen?: boolean
   149	  accent?: string; children: React.ReactNode
   150	}) {
   151	  const [open, setOpen] = useState(defaultOpen)
   152	  return (
   153	    <div className="bg-white/[0.02] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden">
   154	      <button
   155	        onClick={() => setOpen(o => !o)}
   156	        className="w-full flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 hover:bg-white/[0.02] transition-colors"
   157	      >
   158	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2.5">
   159	          {Icon && <Icon size={13} className={accent ?? 'text-white/30'} strokeWidth={1.75} />}
   160	          <span className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-white/70">{title}</span>
   161	          {badge && (
   162	            <span className="px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[9px] font-bold bg-white/[0.06] text-white/30">
   163	              {badge}
   164	            </span>
   165	          )}
   166	        </div>
   167	        {open ? <ChevronUp size={13} className="text-white/30" /> : <ChevronDown size={13} className="text-white/30" />}
   168	      </button>
   169	      {open && <div className="px-4 pb-4 border-t-[0.3px] border-white/[0.04] pt-3">{children}</div>}
   170	    </div>
   171	  )
   172	}

    80	function parseNumber(value: string) {
    81	  if (value.trim() === '') return null;
    82	  const parsed = Number(value);
    83	  return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : null;
    84	}
    85	
    86	function toStringValue(value: number | null | undefined) {
    87	  return value == null ? '' : String(value);
    88	}
    89	
    90	function useCopyState() {
    91	  const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false);
    92	
    93	  async function copy(text: string) {
    94	    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
    95	    setCopied(true);
    96	    window.setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 1500);
    97	  }
    98	
    99	  return { copied, copy };
   100	}

   104	}

   112	  max,

   118	  type?: string;
   119	  min?: string;
   120	  max?: string;
   121	  step?: string;

   133	    />
   134	  );
   135	}

   137	function SelectField<T extends string>({
   138	  value,
   139	  onChange,
   140	  options,
   141	}: {
   142	  value: T;
   143	  onChange: (value: T) => void;
   144	  options: Array<{ value: T; label: string }>;
   145	}) {
   146	  return (
   147	    <select
   148	      value={value}
   149	      onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value as T)}
   150	      className="h-9 w-full cursor-pointer appearance-none rounded-lg border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.04] px-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white outline-none transition-colors focus:border-white/[0.12]"
   151	    >
   152	      {options.map((option) => (
   153	        <option key={option.value} value={option.value} className="bg-[#181818]">
   154	          {option.label}
   155	        </option>
   156	      ))}
   157	    </select>
   158	  );
   159	}

   161	function MetricCard({
   162	  label,
   163	  value,
   164	  suffix,
   165	  tone = 'white',
   166	}: {
   167	  label: string;
   168	  value: string | number;
   169	  suffix?: string;
   170	  tone?: 'white' | 'green' | 'amber';
   171	}) {
   172	  const toneCls =
   173	    tone === 'green' ? 'text-[#1f8a65]' : tone === 'amber' ? 'text-amber-400' : 'text-white';
   174	
   175	  return (
   176	    <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] p-3">
   177	      <p className="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35">{label}</p>
   178	      <div className="mt-2 flex items-end gap-1">
   179	        <span className={`text-[22px] font-semibold leading-none ${toneCls}`}>{value}</span>
   180	        {suffix && <span className="pb-0.5 text-[10px] text-white/35">{suffix}</span>}
   181	      </div>
   182	    </div>
   183	  );
   184	}

   186	function Disclosure({
   187	  title,
   188	  children,
   189	  defaultOpen = false,
   190	  icon: Icon,
   191	}: {
   192	  title: string;
   193	  children: React.ReactNode;
   194	  defaultOpen?: boolean;
   195	  icon?: React.ElementType;
   196	}) {
   197	  const [open, setOpen] = useState(defaultOpen);
   198	
   199	  return (
   200	    <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.02]">
   201	      <button
   202	        type="button"
   203	        onClick={() => setOpen((value) => !value)}
   204	        className="flex w-full items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 text-left"
   205	      >
   206	        <span className="flex items-center gap-2 text-[11px] font-semibold text-white/70">
   207	          {Icon && <Icon size={13} className="text-white/35" />}
   208	          {title}
   209	        </span>
   210	        {open ? (
   211	          <ChevronUp size={13} className="text-white/30" />
   212	        ) : (
   213	          <ChevronDown size={13} className="text-white/30" />
   214	        )}
   215	      </button>
   216	      {open && <div className="border-t border-white/[0.05] px-4 py-3">{children}</div>}
   217	    </div>
   218	  );
   219	}
   220	
   221	function parsePlanFromSearch(searchParams: ReturnType<typeof useSearchParams>) {
   222	  const gender = searchParams.get('gender');
   223	  const goal = searchParams.get('goal');
   224	  const age = parseNumber(searchParams.get('age') ?? '');
   225	  const height = parseNumber(searchParams.get('height') ?? '');
   226	  const weight = parseNumber(searchParams.get('weight') ?? '');
   227	
   228	  if (gender !== 'male' && gender !== 'female') return null;
   229	  if (goal !== 'deficit' && goal !== 'maintenance' && goal !== 'surplus') return null;
   230	  if (age == null || height == null || weight == null) return null;
   231	
   232	  const occupation = parseNumber(searchParams.get('occupation') ?? '');
   233	  const phase = searchParams.get('cycle');
   234	
   235	  return {
   236	    gender,
   237	    goal,
   238	    age,
   239	    height,
   240	    weight,
   241	    steps: parseNumber(searchParams.get('steps') ?? ''),
   242	    occupation,
   243	    workouts: parseNumber(searchParams.get('workouts') ?? ''),
   244	    duration: parseNumber(searchParams.get('duration') ?? ''),
   245	    cardio: parseNumber(searchParams.get('cardio') ?? ''),
   246	    cardioDuration: parseNumber(searchParams.get('cardioDuration') ?? ''),
   247	    bodyFat: parseNumber(searchParams.get('bodyFat') ?? ''),
   248	    bmr: parseNumber(searchParams.get('bmr') ?? ''),
   249	    sleep: parseNumber(searchParams.get('sleep') ?? ''),
   250	    stress: parseNumber(searchParams.get('stress') ?? ''),
   251	    caffeine: parseNumber(searchParams.get('caffeine') ?? ''),
   252	    alcohol: parseNumber(searchParams.get('alcohol') ?? ''),
   253	    phase: phase === 'follicular' || phase === 'luteal' ? phase : 'unknown',
   254	  };
   255	}
   256	
   257	export default function PublicTdeeWizard() {
   258	  const router = useRouter();
   259	  const searchParams = useSearchParams();
   260	  const hydratedFromQuery = useRef(false);

FILE: components/nutrition/studio/CycleSyncPhaseGrid.tsx

     1	"use client"
     2	
     3	import { Moon } from "lucide-react"
     4	import {
     5	  getCycleSyncAdjustment,
     6	  detectCurrentPhase,
     7	} from "@/lib/nutrition/engine/cycleSync"
     8	import type { CyclePhase } from "@/lib/nutrition/engine/cycleSync"
     9	import type { NutritionMacros } from "@/components/client/smart/SmartNutritionWidget"
    10	
    11	const PHASES: CyclePhase[] = ["follicular", "ovulatory", "luteal", "menstrual"]
    12	
    13	const PHASE_LABELS: Record<CyclePhase, string> = {
    14	  follicular: "Phase folliculaire",
    15	  ovulatory:  "Phase ovulatoire",
    16	  luteal:     "Phase lutéale",
    17	  menstrual:  "Menstruation",
    18	}
    19	
    20	const PHASE_DAYS: Record<CyclePhase, string> = {
    21	  follicular: "J6–J13",
    22	  ovulatory:  "J14–J16",
    23	  luteal:     "J17–J28",
    24	  menstrual:  "J1–J5",
    25	}
    26	
    27	const PHASE_COLORS: Record<CyclePhase, { bg: string; border: string; dot: string; tag: string }> = {
    28	  follicular: { bg: "rgba(34,197,94,0.06)",   border: "rgba(34,197,94,0.18)",   dot: "#22c55e", tag: "bg-green-500/10 text-green-400" },
    29	  ovulatory:  { bg: "rgba(251,191,36,0.06)",  border: "rgba(251,191,36,0.18)",  dot: "#fbbf24", tag: "bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-400" },
    30	  luteal:     { bg: "rgba(168,85,247,0.06)",  border: "rgba(168,85,247,0.18)",  dot: "#a855f7", tag: "bg-purple-500/10 text-purple-400" },
    31	  menstrual:  { bg: "rgba(239,68,68,0.06)",   border: "rgba(239,68,68,0.18)",   dot: "#ef4444", tag: "bg-red-500/10 text-red-400"    },
    32	}
    33	
    34	function ResultRow({
    35	  label,
    36	  base,
    37	  delta,
    38	  unit,
    39	}: {
    40	  label: string
    41	  base: number
    42	  delta: number
    43	  unit: string
    44	}) {
    45	  if (delta === 0) return null
    46	  const result = Math.round(base + delta)
    47	  return (
    48	    <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-1">
    49	      <span className="text-[9px] text-white/35 uppercase tracking-[0.12em] shrink-0">{label}</span>
    50	      <span className="text-[9px] font-mono text-right">
    51	        <span className="text-white/30">{Math.round(base)}</span>
    52	        <span className="text-white/45"> {delta > 0 ? "+" : ""}{delta}{unit}</span>
    53	        <span className="text-white/75 font-semibold"> = {result}{unit}</span>
    54	      </span>
    55	    </div>
    56	  )
    57	}
    58	
    59	function DeltaOnly({ value, unit, label }: { value: number; unit: string; label: string }) {
    60	  if (value === 0) return null
    61	  return (
    62	    <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
    63	      <span className="text-[9px] text-white/35 uppercase tracking-[0.12em]">{label}</span>
    64	      <span className={`text-[10px] font-semibold ${value > 0 ? "text-white/70" : "text-white/50"}`}>
    65	        {value > 0 ? "+" : ""}{value}{unit}
    66	      </span>
    67	    </div>
    68	  )
    69	}
    70	
    71	interface Props {
    72	  baseMacros?: NutritionMacros | null
    73	  currentCycleDay?: number | null
    74	}
    75	
    76	export default function CycleSyncPhaseGrid({ baseMacros, currentCycleDay }: Props) {
    77	  const currentPhase = currentCycleDay != null ? detectCurrentPhase(currentCycleDay) : null
    78	
    79	  return (
    80	    <div className="space-y-3">
    81	      <p className="text-[10px] text-white/40 leading-relaxed">
    82	        Ajustements macros automatiques selon la phase du cycle menstruel (Davidsen 2007, Oosthuyse &amp; Bosch 2010).
    83	        Les valeurs ci-dessous sont additives — elles s&apos;appliquent sur la base calculée.
    84	      </p>
    85	
    86	      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
    87	        {PHASES.map((phase) => {
    88	          const adj = getCycleSyncAdjustment(phase)
    89	          const colors = PHASE_COLORS[phase]
    90	          const isCurrent = phase === currentPhase
    91	          const isDimmed = currentPhase !== null && !isCurrent
    92	          const hasDeltas = adj.caloriesDelta !== 0 || adj.proteinDelta !== 0 || adj.carbsDelta !== 0 || adj.fatDelta !== 0
    93	
    94	          return (
    95	            <div
    96	              key={phase}
    97	              className={`rounded-xl p-3 space-y-2.5 transition-opacity ${isDimmed ? "opacity-35" : "opacity-100"}`}
    98	              style={{
    99	                background: isDimmed ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)" : colors.bg,
   100	                border: `0.3px solid ${isCurrent ? colors.dot : isDimmed ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" : colors.border}`,
   101	                boxShadow: isCurrent ? `0 0 0 1px ${colors.dot}33` : undefined,
   102	              }}
   103	            >
   104	              {/* Header */}
   105	              <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-1">
   106	                <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   107	                  <div
   108	                    className="w-4 h-4 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shrink-0"
   109	                    style={{ background: colors.border }}
   110	                  >
   111	                    <Moon size={8} style={{ color: colors.dot }} />
   112	                  </div>
   113	                  <div>
   114	                    <p className="text-[10px] font-semibold text-white/80 leading-tight">
   115	                      {PHASE_LABELS[phase]}
   116	                    </p>
   117	                    <p className="text-[8px] text-white/30">{PHASE_DAYS[phase]}</p>
   118	                  </div>
   119	                </div>
   120	                {isCurrent && (
   121	                  <span className={`text-[7px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wide px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full ${colors.tag}`}>
   122	                    Actuelle
   123	                  </span>
   124	                )}
   125	              </div>
   126	
   127	              {/* Macros: base + delta = result, or delta-only if no base */}
   128	              <div className="space-y-1">
   129	                {!hasDeltas ? (
   130	                  <p className="text-[9px] text-white/30 italic">Aucun ajustement</p>
   131	                ) : baseMacros ? (
   132	                  <>
   133	                    <ResultRow label="Calories"  base={baseMacros.kcal}      delta={adj.caloriesDelta}    unit=" kcal" />
   134	                    <ResultRow label="Protéines" base={baseMacros.protein_g} delta={adj.proteinDelta}     unit="g" />
   135	                    <ResultRow label="Glucides"  base={baseMacros.carbs_g}   delta={adj.carbsDelta}       unit="g" />
   136	                    <ResultRow label="Lipides"   base={baseMacros.fat_g}     delta={adj.fatDelta}         unit="g" />
   137	                    <DeltaOnly value={adj.hydrationDeltaMl} unit=" ml" label="Hydratation" />
   138	                  </>
   139	                ) : (
   140	                  <>
   141	                    <DeltaOnly value={adj.caloriesDelta}    unit=" kcal" label="Calories" />
   142	                    <DeltaOnly value={adj.proteinDelta}     unit="g"     label="Protéines" />
   143	                    <DeltaOnly value={adj.carbsDelta}       unit="g"     label="Glucides" />
   144	                    <DeltaOnly value={adj.fatDelta}         unit="g"     label="Lipides" />
   145	                    <DeltaOnly value={adj.hydrationDeltaMl} unit=" ml"  label="Hydratation" />
   146	                  </>
   147	                )}
   148	              </div>
   149	
   150	              {/* Optimal deficit badge */}
   151	              {adj.optimalForDeficit && (
   152	                <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
   153	                  <div className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-green-500/70" />
   154	                  <p className="text-[8px] text-white/35">Phase optimale déficit</p>
   155	                </div>
   156	              )}
   157	
   158	              {/* First note */}
   159	              <p className="text-[9px] text-white/30 leading-relaxed line-clamp-2">
   160	                {adj.notes[0]}
   161	              </p>
   162	            </div>
   163	          )
   164	        })}
   165	      </div>
   166	    </div>
   167	  )
   168	}

     1	"use client";

     3	import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "framer-motion";
     4	import { ChevronLeft, X, Calculator, Check, AlertTriangle } from "lucide-react";
     5	import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from "react";
     6	import type { NutritionClientData } from "@/lib/nutrition/types";

    39	function NumberInput({
    40	  label,
    41	  value,
    42	  onChange,
    43	  unit,
    44	  onBlur,
    45	}: {
    46	  label: string;
    47	  value: string | number | null;

    51	}) {

    55	      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
    56	        <input
    57	          type="number"
    58	          value={value ?? ""}
    59	          onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value)}
    60	          onBlur={onBlur}
    61	          placeholder="—"
    62	          className="w-20 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] px-2 py-1 text-[11px] text-white text-right outline-none placeholder:text-white/20 focus:border-[#1f8a65]/40"
    63	        />
    64	        {unit && <span className="text-[9px] text-white/35 w-6">{unit}</span>}
    65	      </div>

    67	  );
    68	}

    88	  };

    90	    <span
    91	      className={`inline-block px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-md text-[8px] font-semibold ${colors[source]}`}

    98	export default function ParameterAdjustmentPanel({
    99	  isOpen,
   100	  onClose,
   101	  clientData,
   102	  onUpdateTraining,
   103	  onUpdateLifestyle,
   104	  onUpdateBiometrics,
   105	  trainingConfig,
   106	  lifestyleConfig,
   107	  biometricsConfig,
   108	}: Props) {
   109	  const [showBMRCalculator, setShowBMRCalculator] = useState(false);
   110	  const [bmrFormula, setBMRFormula] = useState<
   111	    "katch-mcardle" | "mifflin-st-jeor"
   112	  >("katch-mcardle");
   113	  const [bmrResult, setBMRResult] = useState<number | null>(null);
   114	  const [saved, setSaved] = useState(false);
   115	  const [heightInput, setHeightInput] = useState<string>(
   116	    biometricsConfig.height_cm?.toString() ?? ""
   117	  );
   118	  const saveTimeoutRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null);
   119	
   120	  // Auto-save debounce 500ms
   121	  const triggerAutoSave = () => {
   122	    setSaved(false);
   123	    if (saveTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimeoutRef.current);
   124	    saveTimeoutRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
   125	      setSaved(true);
   126	      setTimeout(() => setSaved(false), 2000);
   127	    }, 500);
   128	  };
   129	
   130	  // Cleanup timeout on unmount
   131	  useEffect(() => {
   132	    return () => {
   133	      if (saveTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimeoutRef.current);
   134	    };
   135	  }, []);
   136	
   137	  // Update height input when biometricsConfig changes
   138	  useEffect(() => {
   139	    setHeightInput(biometricsConfig.height_cm?.toString() ?? "");
   140	  }, [biometricsConfig.height_cm]);
   141	
   142	  const handleCalculateBMR = () => {
   143	    let result: number | null = null;
   144	
   145	    if (
   146	      bmrFormula === "katch-mcardle" &&
   147	      biometricsConfig.weight_kg &&
   148	      biometricsConfig.body_fat_pct !== null
   149	    ) {
   150	      result = calculateBMRKatchMcArdle(
   151	        biometricsConfig.weight_kg,
   152	        biometricsConfig.body_fat_pct,
   153	      );
   154	    } else if (
   155	      bmrFormula === "mifflin-st-jeor" &&
   156	      biometricsConfig.weight_kg &&
   157	      biometricsConfig.height_cm &&
   158	      clientData?.age
   159	    ) {
   160	      result = calculateBMRMifflin(
   161	        biometricsConfig.weight_kg,
   162	        biometricsConfig.height_cm,
   163	        clientData.age,
   164	        clientData.gender === "female"
   165	          ? "F"
   166	          : clientData.gender === "male"
   167	            ? "M"
   168	            : null,
   169	      );
   170	    }
   171	
   172	    if (result) {
   173	      setBMRResult(result);
   174	    }
   175	  };
   176	
   177	  const handleApplyBMR = () => {
   178	    if (bmrResult) {
   179	      onUpdateBiometrics("bmr_kcal_measured", bmrResult.toString());
   180	      onUpdateBiometrics("bmr_source", "calculated");
   181	      setShowBMRCalculator(false);
   182	      setBMRResult(null);
   183	    }
   184	  };
   185	
   186	  return (
   187	    <AnimatePresence>
   188	      {isOpen && (
   189	        <>
   190	          {/* Backdrop */}
   191	          <motion.div
   192	            initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
   193	            animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
   194	            exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
   195	            onClick={onClose}
   196	            className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 z-40"
   197	          />
   198	
   199	          {/* Panel */}
   200	          <motion.div
   201	            initial={{ x: 400, opacity: 0 }}
   202	            animate={{ x: 0, opacity: 1 }}
   203	            exit={{ x: 400, opacity: 0 }}
   204	            transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30 }}
   205	            className="fixed right-0 top-0 bottom-0 w-[400px] bg-[#181818] z-50 flex flex-col border-l border-white/[0.06]"
   206	          >
   207	            {/* Header */}
   208	            <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-white/[0.06]">
   209	              <h3 className="text-[13px] font-semibold text-white">
   210	                Ajuster les paramètres
   211	              </h3>
   212	              <button
   213	                onClick={onClose}
   214	                className="text-white/40 hover:text-white/70 transition-colors"
   215	              >
   216	                <X size={16} />
   217	              </button>
   218	            </div>
   219	
   220	            {/* Scrollable content */}
   221	            <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto scrollbar-hide p-4 space-y-0">
   222	              {/* Height quick-add if missing */}
   223	              {!biometricsConfig.height_cm && (
   224	                <div className="bg-amber-500/15 border-[0.3px] border-amber-500/30 rounded-lg p-3 mb-4">
   225	                  <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
   226	                    <AlertTriangle size={14} className="text-amber-400 mt-0.5 shrink-0" />
   227	                    <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   228	                      <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-amber-300 mb-2">
   229	                        Taille manquante
   230	                      </p>
   231	                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   232	                        <input
   233	                          type="number"
   234	                          value={heightInput}
   235	                          onChange={(e) => setHeightInput(e.target.value)}
   236	                          placeholder="170"
   237	                          className="flex-1 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-amber-500/40 px-2 py-1 text-[10px] text-white outline-none placeholder:text-white/20 focus:border-amber-500/60"
   238	                        />
   239	                        <span className="text-[9px] text-white/35">cm</span>
   240	                        <button
   241	                          onClick={() => {
   242	                            if (heightInput) {
   243	                              onUpdateBiometrics("height_cm", heightInput);
   244	                              triggerAutoSave();
   245	                            }
   246	                          }}
   247	                          className="rounded-lg bg-amber-500/30 border-[0.3px] border-amber-500/50 px-2 py-1 text-[9px] font-medium text-amber-300 hover:bg-amber-500/40 transition-all"
   248	                        >
   249	                          ✓
   250	                        </button>
   251	                      </div>
   252	                    </div>
   253	                  </div>
   254	                </div>
   255	              )}
   256	
   257	              {/* Training Section */}
   258	              <SectionLabel>Entraînement</SectionLabel>
   259	              <NumberInput
   260	                label="Fréquence hebdomadaire"

    93	const ACTIVITY_STEPS: Record<ActivityLevel, number> = {

    95	  light: 4000,
    96	  moderate: 7000,
    97	  active: 11000,
    98	  veryActive: 15000,
    99	};
   100	
   101	const HYDRATION_ACTIVITY_MAP: Record<
   102	  ActivityLevel,
   103	  "sedentary" | "light" | "moderate" | "intense" | "athlete"
   104	> = {
   105	  sedentary: "sedentary",
   106	  light: "light",
   107	  moderate: "moderate",
   108	  active: "intense",
   109	  veryActive: "athlete",
   110	};
   111	
   112	function resolveStudioPhase(client: Pick<NutritionClientData, "transformation_phase" | "training_goal">) {
   113	  return resolveTransformationPhase({
   114	    transformationPhase: client.transformation_phase,
   115	    trainingGoal: client.training_goal,
   116	  });
   117	}
   118	
   119	function getActivityLevel(clientData: NutritionClientData): ActivityLevel {
   120	  const freq = clientData.weekly_frequency ?? 0;
   121	  if (freq === 0) return "sedentary";
   122	  if (freq <= 2) return "light";
   123	  if (freq <= 3) return "moderate";
   124	  if (freq <= 5) return "active";
   125	  return "veryActive";
   126	}

   135	  calories_source: 'logs' | 'protocol'
   136	  avg_intake_kcal: number
   137	  weight_delta_kg: number
   138	  protocol_updated: boolean
   139	  confidence?: 'high' | 'medium' | 'low'
   140	  confidence_score?: number
   141	  confidence_reasons?: string[]
   142	}

   173	export function useNutritionStudio(
   174	  clientId: string,
   175	  existingProtocol?: NutritionProtocol,
   176	) {
   177	  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null);
   178	
   179	  const [clientData, setClientData] = useState<NutritionClientData | null>(
   180	    null,
   181	  );
   182	  const [clientLoading, setClientLoading] = useState(true);
   183	  const [protocolName, setProtocolName] = useState(
   184	    existingProtocol?.name ?? "Nouveau protocole",
   185	  );
   186	  const [goal, setGoal] = useState<MacroGoal>("surplus");
   187	  const [transformationPhase, setTransformationPhase] = useState<TransformationPhase>(
   188	    inferTransformationPhaseFromTrainingGoal("hypertrophy"),
   189	  );
   190	  const [calorieAdjustPct, setCalorieAdjustPct] = useState(0);
   191	
   192	  const [proteinOverride, setProteinOverride] = useState<number | null>(null);
   193	  const [trainingConfig, setTrainingConfig] = useState<TrainingConfig>({
   194	    weeklyFrequency: 3,
   195	    sessionDurationMin: 60,
   196	    cardioFrequency: 0,
   197	    cardioDurationMin: 0,
   198	    dailySteps: 0,

   200	  });

   202	    stressLevel: null,
   203	    sleepDurationH: null,

   218	  });

   222	      setGoal(newGoal);
   223	      const bf =
   224	        biometricsConfig.body_fat_pct ?? clientData?.body_fat_pct ?? null;
   225	      setCalorieAdjustPct(
   226	        computeSmartPreset(newGoal, bf, trainingConfig.weeklyFrequency),
   227	      );
   228	    },
   229	    [
   230	      biometricsConfig.body_fat_pct,
   231	      clientData?.body_fat_pct,
   232	      trainingConfig.weeklyFrequency,
   233	    ],
   234	  );
   235	
   236	  const setTransformationPhaseWithPreset = useCallback(
   237	    (newPhase: TransformationPhase) => {
   238	      setTransformationPhase(newPhase);
   239	      const bf = biometricsConfig.body_fat_pct ?? clientData?.body_fat_pct ?? null;
   240	      const weeklyFrequency = trainingConfig.weeklyFrequency;
   241	      const mappedGoal = transformationPhaseToMacroGoal(newPhase);
   242	      setGoal(mappedGoal);
   243	      setCalorieAdjustPct(
   244	        computePhaseDrivenCalorieAdjustPct({
   245	          phase: newPhase,
   246	          bodyFat: bf,
   247	          weeklyFrequency,
   248	          basePreset: computeSmartPreset,
   249	        }),
   250	      );
   251	    },
   252	    [
   253	      biometricsConfig.body_fat_pct,
   254	      clientData?.body_fat_pct,
   255	      trainingConfig.weeklyFrequency,
   256	    ],
   257	  );
   258	
   259	  const [macroOverrides, setMacroOverrides] = useState<MacroOverrides>({
   260	    protein_g: null,

   152	function makeExId(si: number, ei: number) { return `ex-${si}-${ei}` }
   153	function parseExId(id: string): { si: number; ei: number } {
   154	  const parts = id.split('-')
   155	  return { si: Number(parts[1]), ei: Number(parts[2]) }
   156	}
