   158	interface Exercise {
   159	  name: string;
   160	  sets: number;
   161	  reps: string;
   162	  rest_sec: number | null;
   163	  rir: number | null;
   164	  weight_increment_kg: number | null;
   165	  notes: string;
   166	  image_url: string | null;
   167	  movement_pattern: string | null;
   168	  equipment_required: string[];
   169	  primary_muscles: string[];
   170	  secondary_muscles: string[];
   171	  is_compound: boolean | undefined;
   172	  is_unilateral: boolean;
   173	  tempo: string | null;
   174	  set_prescriptions?: SetPrescription[];
   175	  group_id?: string;
   176	  dbId?: string;
   177	  // Biomech fields (auto-populated from catalog on picker selection)
   178	  plane?: string | null;
   179	  mechanic?: string | null;
   180	  unilateral?: boolean;
   181	  primaryMuscle?: string | null;
   182	  primaryActivation?: number | null;
   183	  secondaryMusclesDetail?: string[];
   184	  secondaryActivations?: number[];
   185	  stabilizers?: string[];
   186	  jointStressSpine?: number | null;
   187	  jointStressKnee?: number | null;
   188	  jointStressShoulder?: number | null;
   189	  globalInstability?: number | null;
   190	  coordinationDemand?: number | null;
   191	  constraintProfile?: string | null;
   192	}
   193	interface Session {
   194	  name: string;
   195	  day_of_week: number | null;
   196	  days_of_week: number[];
   197	  notes: string;
   198	  exercises: Exercise[];
   199	  open: boolean;
   200	}
   201	interface TemplateMeta {
   202	  name: string;
   203	  description: string;
   204	  goal: string;
   205	  level: string;
   206	  frequency: number;
   207	  weeks: number;
   208	  muscle_tags: string[];
   209	  notes: string;
   210	  equipment_archetype: string;
   211	  session_mode: 'day' | 'cycle';
   212	}
   213	
   214	function emptyExercise(): Exercise {
   215	  return {
   216	    name: "",
   217	    sets: 3,
   218	    reps: "8-12",
   219	    rest_sec: 90,
   220	    rir: 2,
   221	    weight_increment_kg: null,
   222	    notes: "",
   223	    image_url: null,
   224	    movement_pattern: null,
   225	    equipment_required: [],
   226	    primary_muscles: [],
   227	    secondary_muscles: [],
   228	    is_compound: undefined,
   229	    is_unilateral: false,
   230	    tempo: null,
   231	    set_prescriptions: [],
   232	    group_id: undefined,
   233	    dbId: undefined,
   234	    plane: null, mechanic: null, unilateral: false,
   235	    primaryMuscle: null, primaryActivation: null,
   236	    secondaryMusclesDetail: [], secondaryActivations: [],
   237	    stabilizers: [], jointStressSpine: null, jointStressKnee: null,
   238	    jointStressShoulder: null, globalInstability: null,
   239	    coordinationDemand: null, constraintProfile: null,
   240	  };
   241	}
   242	function emptySession(): Session {
   243	  return {
   244	    name: "",
   245	    day_of_week: null,
   246	    days_of_week: [],
   247	    notes: "",
   248	    exercises: [emptyExercise()],
   249	    open: true,
   250	  };
   251	}
   252	
   253	function derivePrimaryMusclesFromStoredExercise(exercise: any): string[] {
   254	  const catalog = getCatalogEntryByName(exercise.name)
   255	  const precisePrimary = exercise.primary_muscle ?? catalog?.primaryMuscle ?? null
   256	  if (precisePrimary) return [precisePrimary]
   257	  if ((exercise.primary_muscles ?? []).length > 0) return exercise.primary_muscles
   258	  return getMusclesFromCatalog(exercise.name)
   259	}

    96	                      </span>
    97	                    )}
    98	                  </div>
    99	                ))}
   100	              </div>
   101	
   102	              {/* Diagnosis */}
   103	              <div className="mb-6 p-4 bg-blue-50 border-l-4 border-blue-600 rounded-r-xl">
   104	                <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-blue-900 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Diagnostic :</p>
   105	                <p className="text-base text-blue-800 leading-relaxed">{caseStudy.diagnosis}</p>
   106	              </div>
   107	
   108	              {/* Strategy */}
   109	              <div className="p-4 bg-gray-900 rounded-xl">
   110	                <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-white uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Stratégie Genesis :</p>
   111	                <p className="text-base text-gray-100 leading-relaxed">{caseStudy.strategy}</p>
   112	              </div>
   113	            </motion.div>
   114	          ))}
   115	        </div>
   116	      </div>
   117	    </motion.section>
   118	  );
   119	}
   120

FILE: components/sections/MetabolicFAQ.tsx

     1	'use client';
     2	import { useState } from 'react';
     3	import { Plus, Minus } from 'lucide-react';
     4	
     5	const faqs = [
     6	  {
     7	    question: "Je suis un 'Hard Gainer', je ne prends pas de masse. Pourquoi ?",
     8	    answer: "Manger plus ne suffit pas si vous n'absorbez pas. Votre métabolisme est probablement hyper-adaptatif (NEAT élevé) ou votre capacité digestive est saturée. L'IPT analyse votre efficacité d'absorption pour enfin débloquer l'anabolisme musculaire."
     9	  },
    10	  {
    11	    question: "Pourquoi ai-je envie de dormir 1h après chaque repas ?",
    12	    answer: "C'est un signe clinique d'instabilité glycémique. Votre corps produit une réponse insulinique excessive (hypoglycémie réactionnelle). L'analyse IPT détecte cette incapacité à gérer les glucides pour adapter votre nutrition."
    13	  },
    14	  {
    15	    question: "Le stress peut-il détruire mes gains musculaires ?",
    16	    answer: "Oui. Le cortisol (hormone du stress) est 'catabolique' : il dégrade le muscle pour fournir de l'énergie rapide. Si votre charge allostatique est trop élevée, vous combattez votre propre corps. Nous devons réduire l'inflammation pour permettre la croissance."
    17	  },
    18	  {
    19	    question: "Je mange peu et je fais du sport, mais je ne perds pas de poids.",
    20	    answer: "Vous êtes probablement en 'Dette Métabolique'. Un stress chronique couplé à un déficit calorique bloque la lipolyse (brûlage de graisses) et favorise le stockage abdominal. Notre diagnostic vérifie l'état de votre axe HPA avant tout régime."
    21	  },
    22	  {
    23	    question: "Mes performances stagnent malgré un entraînement intense.",
    24	    answer: "Le plateau est souvent un signal d'alarme du Système Nerveux Central. S'entraîner plus fort sur un organisme épuisé est contre-productif. Nous analysons votre récupération pour optimiser votre périodisation."
    25	  },
    26	  {
    27	    question: "Qu'est-ce que l'Indice de Potentiel de Transformation (IPT) ?",
    28	    answer: "L'IPT est un algorithme propriétaire STRYV lab qui croise 273 points de données biologiques. Il calcule votre score de 'capacité à changer'. Si votre score est bas (<50), nous devons réparer votre métabolisme avant d'intensifier l'entraînement."
    29	  }
    30	];
    31	
    32	export default function MetabolicFAQ() {
    33	  const [openIndex, setOpenIndex] = useState<number | null>(null);
    34	
    35	  return (
    36	    // FOND #303030 (S'intègre parfaitement à la page principale)
    37	    <section className="bg-[#303030] px-6 sm:px-10 md:px-16 lg:px-24 py-24 border-t border-white/5 font-outfit">
    38	      <div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto">
    39	        
    40	        <div className="mb-12">
    41	          <div className="text-[#DAFA72] text-xs font-bold tracking-widest uppercase mb-4">
    42	            Diagnostic Clinique
    43	          </div>
    44	          <h2 className="text-white text-3xl md:text-4xl font-medium">
    45	            Vos Symptômes Décryptés
    46	          </h2>
    47	        </div>
    48	
    49	        <div className="space-y-3">
    50	          {faqs.map((faq, index) => (
    51	            <div 
    52	              key={index} 
    53	              // CARTE : Fond #252525 (Input style) + Bordure fine
    54	              className={`bg-[#252525] border border-white/5 rounded-xl overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 ${openIndex === index ? 'border-white/20' : 'hover:border-white/10'}`}
    55	            >
    56	              <button
    57	                onClick={() => setOpenIndex(openIndex === index ? null : index)}
    58	                className="w-full flex items-center justify-between p-5 text-left focus:outline-none"
    59	              >
    60	                <span className={`text-sm md:text-base font-medium transition-colors duration-300 pr-8 ${openIndex === index ? 'text-white' : 'text-white/80'}`}>
    61	                  {faq.question}
    62	                </span>
    63	                <span className="flex-shrink-0 text-[#DAFA72]">
    64	                  {openIndex === index ? <Minus size={18} /> : <Plus size={18} />}
    65	                </span>
    66	              </button>
    67	              
    68	              <div 
    69	                className={`overflow-hidden transition-all duration-500 ease-in-out ${openIndex === index ? 'max-h-48 opacity-100' : 'max-h-0 opacity-0'}`}
    70	              >
    71	                {/* RÉPONSE : text-white/60 (Gris doux) */}
    72	                <p className="px-5 pb-5 text-white/60 text-xs md:text-sm leading-relaxed border-t border-white/5 pt-4">
    73	                  {faq.answer}
    74	                </p>
    75	              </div>
    76	            </div>
    77	          ))}
    78	        </div>
    79	      </div>
    80	    </section>
    81	  );
    82	}

     4	export default function FaqMetabolicSchema() {

     6	    "@context": "https://schema.org",
     7	    "@type": "FAQPage",
     8	    "mainEntity": [
     9	      {
    10	        "@type": "Question",
    11	        "name": "Pourquoi ai-je envie de dormir 1h après chaque repas ?",
    12	        "acceptedAnswer": {

    16	      },

    23	        }

    28	        "acceptedAnswer": {

    30	          "text": "Absolument. Le stress chronique élève le cortisol, une hormone 'catabolique' qui détruit le tissu musculaire pour produire de l'énergie. C'est l'ennemi n°1 de la testostérone. Nous mesurons votre charge de stress pour protéger vos gains."

    39	        }

    46	          "text": "Le plateau est souvent un problème nerveux, pas musculaire. Si votre Variabilité Cardiaque (VFC) est basse, s'entraîner plus vous rendra moins performant. L'IPT permet de calibrer l'intensité pour relancer la progression."

     1	export default function FaqOmniSchema() {
     2	    return (
     3	      <script
     4	        type="application/ld+json"
     5	        dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{
     6	          __html: JSON.stringify({
     7	            "@context": "https://schema.org",
     8	            "@type": "FAQPage",
     9	            "mainEntity": [
    10	              {
    11	                "@type": "Question",
    12	                "name": "Qu’est-ce que le protocole OMNI ?",
    13	                "acceptedAnswer": {

    15	                  "text": "OMNI est un programme d’optimisation continue destiné aux profils avancés. Il ne s’agit pas d’un simple coaching, mais d’un cadre stratégique évolutif basé sur l’analyse du potentiel de transformation (IPT™) et son élévation progressive dans le temps."
    16	                }
    17	              },
    18	              {
    19	                "@type": "Question",
    20	                "name": "OMNI est-il accessible à tout le monde ?",
    21	                "acceptedAnswer": {

    24	                }
    25	              },
    26	              {
    27	                "@type": "Question",
    28	                "name": "Pourquoi une analyse IPT™ est-elle obligatoire avant OMNI ?",
    29	                "acceptedAnswer": {
    30	                  "@type": "Answer",
    31	                  "text": "Parce qu’optimiser un système sans connaître son potentiel réel conduit à des erreurs stratégiques. L’IPT™ permet d’identifier les leviers prioritaires, les freins dominants et le niveau de réceptivité du système avant toute intervention avancée."
    32	                }
    33	              },
    34	              {

    36	                "name": "OMNI est-il un programme médical ou thérapeutique ?",

    40	                }
    41	              },

    48	                }
    49	              },
    50	              {

    53	                "acceptedAnswer": {
    54	                  "@type": "Answer",
    55	                  "text": "Non. Aucun résultat n’est garanti. OMNI vise à augmenter le potentiel de transformation et à améliorer les conditions d’adhérence et d’efficacité. La transformation dépend toujours de multiples facteurs biologiques, comportementaux et contextuels."
    56	                }
    57	              },
    58	              {
    59	                "@type": "Question",
    60	                "name": "Pourquoi un entretien stratégique est-il requis après le paiement ?",
    61	                "acceptedAnswer": {
    62	                  "@type": "Answer",
    63	                  "text": "L’entretien stratégique permet de valider l’alignement entre le protocole OMNI et votre situation réelle. Il sert à cadrer les attentes, confirmer l’éligibilité et structurer l’ingénierie du dossier avant toute mise en œuvre."
    64	                }
    65	              },
    66	              {
    67	                "@type": "Question",
    68	                "name": "Que se passe-t-il après l’entretien stratégique OMNI ?",
    69	                "acceptedAnswer": {
    70	                  "@type": "Answer",
    71	                  "text": "Après validation, vous accédez à la phase de pré-analyse IPT™, puis à l’analyse adaptative complète. Le protocole est ensuite construit et ajusté en fonction de l’évolution de votre potentiel et des contraintes observées."
    72	                }
    73	              },
    74	              {
    75	                "@type": "Question",
    76	                "name": "OMNI est-il limité dans le temps ?",
    77	                "acceptedAnswer": {
    78	                  "@type": "Answer",
    79	                  "text": "OMNI est structuré sur une période initiale de 12 semaines, mais repose sur une logique évolutive. L’objectif n’est pas une transformation rapide, mais une optimisation progressive et durable du système."
    80	                }
    81	              }
    82	            ]
    83	          })
    84	        }}
    85	      />
    86	    );
    87	  }

FILE: lib/calculators/WaterIntakeCalculator.tsx
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	'use client';
     2	
     3	import { useState } from 'react';
     4	import { GlassCard } from '../../components/ui/glass-card';
     5	import { Dropdown } from '../../components/ui/Dropdown';
     6	import type { Language } from '@/lib/i18n/translations';
     7	import { getTranslation } from '@/lib/i18n/translations';
     8	import { Droplet } from 'lucide-react';
     9	
    10	// Water glass icon component - represents a glass of water
    11	const WaterGlass = ({ className }: { className?: string }) => (
    12	  <svg
    13	    viewBox="0 0 24 24"
    14	    fill="none"
    15	    stroke="currentColor"
    16	    strokeWidth="1.5"
    17	    strokeLinecap="round"
    18	    strokeLinejoin="round"
    19	    className={className}
    20	  >
    21	    {/* Glass body */}
    22	    <rect x="7" y="4" width="10" height="16" rx="1" stroke="currentColor" fill="none" />
    23	    {/* Glass rim */}
    24	    <path d="M7 4h10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" />
    25	    {/* Water inside (filled area) */}
    26	    <rect x="8" y="12" width="8" height="6" rx="0.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.3" />
    27	    {/* Water surface line */}
    28	    <path d="M8 12h8" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" opacity="0.6" />
    29	  </svg>
    30	);
    31	
    32	interface WaterIntakeCalculatorProps {
    33	  language?: Language
    34	}
    35	
    36	export function WaterIntakeCalculator({ language: propLanguage }: WaterIntakeCalculatorProps = { language: undefined }) {
    37	  const [internalLanguage, setInternalLanguage] = useState<Language>('fr');
    38	  const language = propLanguage ?? internalLanguage;
    39	  const t = getTranslation(language);
    40	
    41	  const [weight, setWeight] = useState<string>('');
    42	  const [age, setAge] = useState<string>('');
    43	  const [activity, setActivity] = useState<'sedentary' | 'moderate' | 'active' | 'veryActive'>('moderate');
    44	  const [climate, setClimate] = useState<'temperate' | 'hot' | 'veryHot'>('temperate');
    45	  const [showResults, setShowResults] = useState(false);
    46	
    47	  const weightNum = Number(weight) || 0;
    48	  const ageNum = Number(age) || 0;
    49	
    50	  const activityBonus = {
    51	    sedentary: 0,
    52	    moderate: 700,
    53	    active: 500,
    54	    veryActive: 700,
    55	  };
    56	
    57	  const climateBonus = {
    58	    temperate: 0,
    59	    hot: 300,
    60	    veryHot: 500,
    61	  };
    62	
    63	  const baseIntake = weightNum > 0 ? weightNum * 35 : 0; // 35ml per kg
    64	  const totalML = baseIntake + activityBonus[activity] + climateBonus[climate];
    65	  const totalLiters = totalML / 1000;
    66	  const glasses = Math.round(totalML / 250);
    67	
    68	  const handleCalculate = () => {
    69	    if (weightNum > 0) {
    70	      setShowResults(true);
    71	    }
    72	  };
    73	
    74	  return (
    75	    <section className="relative py-12 md:py-16 lg:py-24">
    76	      <div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
    77	        {/* Header */}
    78	        <div className="mb-8 md:mb-12">
    79	          <h1 className="text-3xl sm:text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-heading font-extralight mb-4 text-white tracking-tight">
    80	            {t.waterIntakeCalculator.title}
    81	          </h1>
    82	          <p className="text-base sm:text-lg text-white/70 mb-6">
    83	            {t.waterIntakeCalculator.subtitle}
    84	          </p>
    85	        </div>
    86	
    87	        {/* Input Form Card */}
    88	        <GlassCard glassLevel="medium" depth={3} withGlow={true} animation="scale" className="mb-8">
    89	          <div className="space-y-6">
    90	            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
    91	              {/* Weight */}
    92	              <div>
    93	                <label className="block text-sm text-white/70 mb-2 font-sans font-normal">
    94	                  Votre poids ({t.macroCalculator.personalInfo.weightUnit})
    95	                </label>
    96	                <input
    97	                  type="text"
    98	                  inputMode="numeric"
    99	                  value={weight}
   100	                  onChange={(e) => {
   101	                    setWeight(e.target.value.replace(/[^0-9.]/g, ''));
   102	                    setShowResults(false);
   103	                  }}
   104	                  onFocus={(e) => {
   105	                    e.target.select();
   106	                  }}
   107	                  className="w-full min-h-[44px] px-4 py-3 bg-white/5 border border-white/20 rounded-card focus:border-[#19D4FF] focus:outline-none text-white placeholder:text-white/50 transition-all font-sans font-normal text-base"
   108	                  placeholder="69"
   109	                />
   110	              </div>
   111	
   112	              {/* Age */}
   113	              <div>
   114	                <label className="block text-sm text-white/70 mb-2 font-sans font-normal">
   115	                  {t.macroCalculator.personalInfo.age}
   116	                </label>
   117	                <input
   118	                  type="text"
   119	                  inputMode="numeric"
   120	                  value={age}
   121	                  onChange={(e) => {
   122	                    setAge(e.target.value.replace(/[^0-9]/g, ''));
   123	                    setShowResults(false);
   124	                  }}
   125	                  onFocus={(e) => {
   126	                    e.target.select();
   127	                  }}
   128	                  className="w-full min-h-[44px] px-4 py-3 bg-white/5 border border-white/20 rounded-card focus:border-[#19D4FF] focus:outline-none text-white placeholder:text-white/50 transition-all font-sans font-normal text-base"
   129	                  placeholder="29"
   130	                />
   131	              </div>
   132	            </div>
   133	
   134	            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
   135	              {/* Activity */}
   136	              <div>
   137	                <label className="block text-sm text-white/70 mb-2 font-sans font-normal">
   138	                  {t.waterIntakeCalculator.activity.label}
   139	                </label>
   140	                <Dropdown
   141	                  value={activity}
   142	                  onChange={(value) => {
   143	                    setActivity(value as typeof activity);
   144	                    setShowResults(false);
   145	                  }}
   146	                  options={[
   147	                    { 
   148	                      value: 'sedentary', 
   149	                      label: t.waterIntakeCalculator.activity.sedentary,
   150	                      description: 'Peu ou pas d\'exercice, travail de bureau'
   151	                    },
   152	                    { 
   153	                      value: 'moderate', 
   154	                      label: t.waterIntakeCalculator.activity.moderate,
   155	                      description: '3 à 5 jours d\'exercice modéré par semaine'
   156	                    },
   157	                    { 
   158	                      value: 'active', 
   159	                      label: t.waterIntakeCalculator.activity.active,
   160	                      description: '6 à 7 jours d\'exercice intense par semaine'
   161	                    },
   162	                    { 
   163	                      value: 'veryActive', 
   164	                      label: t.waterIntakeCalculator.activity.veryActive,
   165	                      description: 'Exercice très intense, travail physique ou entraînement 2x/jour'
   166	                    }
   167	                  ]}
   168	                />
   169	              </div>
   170	
   171	              {/* Climate */}
   172	              <div>
   173	                <label className="block text-sm text-white/70 mb-2 font-sans font-normal">
   174	                  {t.waterIntakeCalculator.climate.label}
   175	                </label>
   176	                <Dropdown
   177	                  value={climate}
   178	                  onChange={(value) => {
   179	                    setClimate(value as typeof climate);
   180	                    setShowResults(false);
   181	                  }}
   182	                  options={[
   183	                    { 
   184	                      value: 'temperate', 
   185	                      label: 'Doux / Froid',
   186	                      description: 'Température modérée, peu de transpiration'
   187	                    },
   188	                    { 
   189	                      value: 'hot', 
   190	                      label: t.waterIntakeCalculator.climate.hot,
   191	                      description: 'Température élevée, transpiration modérée'
   192	                    },
   193	                    { 
   194	                      value: 'veryHot', 
   195	                      label: 'Très chaud et humide',
   196	                      description: 'Température très élevée avec forte humidité'
   197	                    }
   198	                  ]}
   199	                />
   200	              </div>
   201	            </div>
   202	
   203	            {/* Calculate Button */}
   204	            <button
   205	              onClick={handleCalculate}
   206	              disabled={weightNum === 0}
   207	              className="w-full min-h-[48px] bg-gradient-to-r from-[#19D4FF] via-[#0FA8CC] to-[#0B8FA8] text-white py-3 px-6 rounded-button font-sans font-semibold text-base transition-all hover:from-[#0FA8CC] hover:via-[#0B8FA8] hover:to-[#19D4FF] active:scale-[0.98] disabled:bg-[rgba(15,35,52,0.2)] disabled:text-white/70 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:hover:from-[rgba(15,35,52,0.2)] disabled:active:scale-100 shadow-lg shadow-[#19D4FF]/20 relative z-10"
   208	            >
   209	              {t.waterIntakeCalculator.calculateButton || 'Calculer l\'apport en eau'}
   210	            </button>
   211	          </div>
   212	        </GlassCard>
   213	
   214	        {/* Results Section */}
   215	        {showResults && weightNum > 0 && (
   216	          <GlassCard glassLevel="medium" depth={3} withGlow={true} animation="scale" className="mb-8">
   217	            <div className="space-y-8">
   218	              <h2 className="text-xl sm:text-2xl font-heading font-semibold text-white mb-6">
   219	                Votre objectif d'hydratation quotidien
   220	              </h2>
   221	
   222	              {/* Main Result with Icon */}
   223	              <div className="text-center mb-8">
   224	                <Droplet className="w-16 h-16 text-[#19D4FF] mx-auto mb-4" />
   225	                <div className="text-5xl font-heading font-bold text-[#19D4FF] mb-2">
   226	                  {totalLiters.toFixed(1).replace('.', ',')} {t.waterIntakeCalculator.units.liters}
   227	                </div>
   228	                <div className="text-sm text-white/60 font-sans font-normal">
   229	                  Litres par jour
   230	                </div>
   231	              </div>
   232	
   233	              {/* Breakdown */}
   234	              <div className="p-5 rounded-card bg-white/5 border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-[8px]">
   235	                <h3 className="text-base font-heading font-semibold text-white mb-4">
   236	                  {t.waterIntakeCalculator.results.understandResult}
   237	                </h3>
   238	                <div className="space-y-3">
   239	                  <div className="flex justify-between items-center py-2.5 px-3 rounded-lg bg-white/5">
   240	                    <span className="text-sm text-white/80 font-sans font-normal">
   241	                      {t.waterIntakeCalculator.results.baseCalculation}
   242	                    </span>
   243	                    <span className="text-sm font-heading font-bold text-white">
   244	                      {Math.round(baseIntake)} {t.waterIntakeCalculator.units.milliliters}
   245	                    </span>
   246	                  </div>
   247	                  <div className="flex justify-between items-center py-2.5 px-3 rounded-lg bg-white/5">
   248	                    <span className="text-sm text-white/80 font-sans font-normal">
   249	                      {t.waterIntakeCalculator.results.activityAdjustment}
   250	                    </span>
   251	                    <span className="text-sm font-heading font-bold text-[#19D4FF]">
   252	                      {activityBonus[activity] > 0 ? '+' : ''}{activityBonus[activity]} {t.waterIntakeCalculator.units.milliliters}
   253	                    </span>
   254	                  </div>
   255	                  <div className="flex justify-between items-center py-2.5 px-3 rounded-lg bg-white/5">
   256	                    <span className="text-sm text-white/80 font-sans font-normal">
   257	                      {t.waterIntakeCalculator.results.climateAdaptation}
   258	                    </span>
   259	                    <span className="text-sm font-heading font-bold text-[#19D4FF]">
   260	                      {climateBonus[climate] > 0 ? '+' : ''}{climateBonus[climate]} {t.waterIntakeCalculator.units.milliliters}

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: lib/client/ai-coach/buildSystemPrompt.ts

     1	import { createClient as createServiceClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js'
     2	import { computePhysiologicalDate } from '@/lib/nutrition/physiological-date'
     3	import { resolveClientTimezone } from '@/lib/client/checkin/resolveClientTimezone'
     4	import { utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate } from '@/lib/client/checkin/timeWindows'
     5	import { computeDailySignals } from '@/lib/client/ai-coach/chatSignals'
     6	import { resolveTone } from '@/lib/client/ai-coach/resolveTone'
     7	
     8	function svc() {
     9	  return createServiceClient(
    10	    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    11	    process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!
    12	  )
    13	}
    14	
    15	function pct(val: number, total: number): string {
    16	  if (!total) return '0%'
    17	  return `${Math.round((val / total) * 100)}%`
    18	}
    19	
    20	function fmtDate(date: string): string {
    21	  const [, m, d] = date.split('-')
    22	  const months = ['jan', 'fév', 'mar', 'avr', 'mai', 'jun', 'jul', 'aoû', 'sep', 'oct', 'nov', 'déc']
    23	  return `${parseInt(d)} ${months[parseInt(m) - 1]}`
    24	}
    25	
    26	export async function buildSystemPrompt(clientId: string): Promise<string> {
    27	  const db = svc()
    28	  const timezone = await resolveClientTimezone(db, clientId)
    29	  const today = computePhysiologicalDate(new Date(), timezone)
    30	  const { start: physiologicalStart, end: physiologicalEnd } = utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate(today, timezone)
    31	  const dayStart = physiologicalStart.toISOString()
    32	  const dayEnd   = physiologicalEnd.toISOString()
    33	  const nowTime  = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('fr-FR', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })
    34	  const nextPhysioStart = new Date(physiologicalEnd.getTime() + 1).toISOString()
    35	
    36	  const threeDaysAgo = (() => {
    37	    const d = new Date(`${today}T00:00:00`)
    38	    d.setDate(d.getDate() - 3)
    39	    return d.toISOString().split('T')[0]
    40	  })()
    41	
    42	  // Sequential first: need coach_id before running parallel queries
    43	  const { data: profileData } = await db
    44	    .from('coach_clients')
    45	    .select('first_name, goal, tdee, fitness_level, coach_id, display_lang')
    46	    .eq('id', clientId)
    47	    .single()
    48	
    49	  const firstName    = profileData?.first_name   ?? 'le client'
    50	  const goal         = profileData?.goal          ?? 'non renseigné'
    51	  const tdee         = profileData?.tdee          ?? 0
    52	  const fitnessLevel = profileData?.fitness_level ?? 'intermédiaire'
    53	  const coachId      = profileData?.coach_id      ?? null
    54	  const clientDisplayLang = (profileData?.display_lang ?? 'fr') as 'fr' | 'es' | 'en'
    55	
    56	  const [
    57	    coachProfileResult,
    58	    nutritionProtocol,
    59	    mealsResult,
    60	    legacyMealsResult,
    61	    waterResult,
    62	    sessionResult,
    63	    activitiesResult,
    64	    restrictionsResult,
    65	    bodyCompResult,
    66	    nutritionTrendsResult,
    67	    checkinsResult,
    68	    activeProgramResult,
    69	    perClientToneResult,
    70	    globalToneResult,
    71	    plannedPrepsResult,
    72	  ] = await Promise.allSettled([
    73	    coachId
    74	      ? db.from('user_profiles').select('first_name, last_name').eq('id', coachId).single()
    75	      : Promise.resolve({ data: null }),
    76	    db.from('nutrition_protocols')
    77	      .select('name, nutrition_protocol_days(calories, protein_g, fat_g, carbs_g, hydration_ml)')
    78	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    79	      .eq('status', 'shared')
    80	      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
    81	      .limit(1)
    82	      .maybeSingle(),
    83	    // Nutrition Composer meals (correct columns)
    84	    db.from('nutrition_meals')
    85	      .select('total_calories, total_protein_g, total_fat_g, total_carbs_g, meal_type, title, logged_at')
    86	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    87	      .eq('physiological_date', today)
    88	      .order('logged_at', { ascending: true }),
    89	    // Legacy meal_logs
    90	    db.from('meal_logs')
    91	      .select('estimated_macros, logged_at, meal_name')
    92	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    93	      .gte('logged_at', physiologicalStart.toISOString())
    94	      .lt('logged_at', nextPhysioStart)
    95	      .eq('ai_status', 'done'),
    96	    db.from('client_water_logs')
    97	      .select('amount_ml, caffeine_mg')
    98	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    99	      .gte('logged_at', dayStart)
   100	      .lte('logged_at', dayEnd),
   101	    db.from('client_session_logs')
   102	      .select('id, completed_at')
   103	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
   104	      .not('completed_at', 'is', null)
   105	      .gte('completed_at', dayStart)
   106	      .lte('completed_at', dayEnd)
   107	      .order('completed_at', { ascending: false })
   108	      .limit(1)
   109	      .maybeSingle(),
   110	    db.from('client_activity_logs')
   111	      .select('activity_type, custom_label, duration_min')
   112	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
   113	      .gte('started_at', dayStart)
   114	      .lte('started_at', dayEnd),
   115	    db.from('metric_annotations')
   116	      .select('label, body_part, severity')
   117	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
   118	      .eq('event_type', 'injury')
   119	      .not('body_part', 'is', null),
   120	    // Full bilan history — ascending (oldest first) for correct progression delta
   121	    db.from('assessment_submissions')
   122	      .select('bilan_date, assessment_responses(field_key, value_number)')
   123	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
   124	      .eq('status', 'completed')
   125	      .order('bilan_date', { ascending: true })
   126	      .limit(10),
   127	    // 3-day nutrition trends
   128	    db.from('nutrition_meals')
   129	      .select('physiological_date, total_calories, total_protein_g')
   130	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
   131	      .gte('physiological_date', threeDaysAgo)
   132	      .lt('physiological_date', today)
   133	      .order('physiological_date', { ascending: false }),
   134	    // Check-ins of the past 3 days
   135	    db.from('client_daily_checkins')
   136	      .select('date, flow_type, sleep_hours, sleep_quality, energy_level, stress_level, weight_kg, hunger_level, muscle_soreness')
   137	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
   138	      .gte('date', threeDaysAgo)
   139	      .lte('date', today),
   140	    // Active program with sessions
   141	    db.from('programs')
   142	      .select('name, weeks, frequency, program_sessions(id, name, day_of_week, days_of_week)')
   143	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
   144	      .eq('status', 'active')
   145	      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
   146	      .limit(1)
   147	      .maybeSingle(),
   148	    // Tone — per-client override + coach global
   149	    db.from('coach_ai_settings_per_client').select('ai_tone, ai_chat_lang').eq('client_id', clientId).maybeSingle(),
   150	    coachId
   151	      ? db.from('coach_profiles').select('ai_tone').eq('coach_id', coachId).maybeSingle()
   152	      : Promise.resolve({ data: null }),
   153	    // Planned preps for today
   154	    db.from('client_nutrition_preps')
   155	      .select('meal_slot, total_calories, total_protein_g, scenario_label, title')
   156	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
   157	      .eq('physiological_date', today)
   158	      .eq('status', 'planned'),
   159	  ])
   160	
   161	  // ── Tone (D5) ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   162	  const perClientTone = perClientToneResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (perClientToneResult.value as any)?.data?.ai_tone ?? null : null
   163	  const globalTone = globalToneResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (globalToneResult.value as any)?.data?.ai_tone ?? null : null
   164	  const tone = resolveTone(perClientTone, globalTone)
   165	  const TONE_DIRECTIVE: Record<typeof tone, string> = {
   166	    strict: 'Ton strict, direct, sans complaisance. Pas de flatterie.',
   167	    bienveillant: 'Ton bienveillant et direct. Encourageant sans flatterie.',
   168	    motivant: 'Ton motivant et énergique. Pas de flatterie creuse.',
   169	    neutre: 'Ton neutre et factuel. Sobre.',
   170	  }
   171	
   172	  // ── Chat language ─────────────────────────────────────
   173	  const perClientSettings = perClientToneResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (perClientToneResult.value as any)?.data : null
   174	  const coachLangOverride = perClientSettings?.ai_chat_lang as 'fr' | 'es' | 'en' | null ?? null
   175	  const chatLang: 'fr' | 'es' | 'en' = coachLangOverride ?? clientDisplayLang
   176	
   177	  const LANG_DIRECTIVE: Record<'fr' | 'es' | 'en', string> = {
   178	    fr: "Tu réponds TOUJOURS en français, quelle que soit la langue utilisée par le client.",
   179	    es: "Respondes SIEMPRE en español, sin importar el idioma que use el cliente.",
   180	    en: "You ALWAYS reply in English, regardless of the language used by the client.",
   181	  }
   182	
   183	  // ── Coach identity ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   184	  const coachProfile = coachProfileResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (coachProfileResult.value as any)?.data : null
   185	  const coachFirstName = coachProfile?.first_name ?? null
   186	  const coachLastName  = coachProfile?.last_name  ?? null
   187	  const coachName = coachFirstName
   188	    ? [coachFirstName, coachLastName].filter(Boolean).join(' ')
   189	    : 'ton coach'
   190	
   191	  // ── Macros targets ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   192	  const protocol = nutritionProtocol.status === 'fulfilled' ? nutritionProtocol.value.data : null
   193	  const protocolDay = (protocol as any)?.nutrition_protocol_days?.[0]
   194	  const targetKcal: number     = protocolDay?.calories     ?? tdee
   195	  const targetProtein: number  = protocolDay?.protein_g    ?? 0
   196	  const targetFat: number      = protocolDay?.fat_g        ?? 0
   197	  const targetCarbs: number    = protocolDay?.carbs_g      ?? 0
   198	  const targetWaterMl: number  = protocolDay?.hydration_ml ?? 2500
   199	
   200	  // ── Today nutrition (both sources) ────────────────────────────────────────
   201	  const composerMeals    = mealsResult.status       === 'fulfilled' ? (mealsResult.value.data       ?? []) : []
   202	  const legacyMealsData  = legacyMealsResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (legacyMealsResult.value.data ?? []) : []
   203	
   204	  const totalKcal =
   205	    composerMeals.reduce((s, m) => s + Number((m as any).total_calories ?? 0), 0) +
   206	    legacyMealsData.reduce((s: number, m: any) => s + Number(m.estimated_macros?.calories_kcal ?? 0), 0)
   207	
   208	  const totalProtein =
   209	    composerMeals.reduce((s, m) => s + Number((m as any).total_protein_g ?? 0), 0) +
   210	    legacyMealsData.reduce((s: number, m: any) => s + Number(m.estimated_macros?.protein_g ?? 0), 0)
   211	
   212	  const totalFat =
   213	    composerMeals.reduce((s, m) => s + Number((m as any).total_fat_g ?? 0), 0) +
   214	    legacyMealsData.reduce((s: number, m: any) => s + Number(m.estimated_macros?.fat_g ?? 0), 0)
   215	
   216	  const totalCarbs =
   217	    composerMeals.reduce((s, m) => s + Number((m as any).total_carbs_g ?? 0), 0) +
   218	    legacyMealsData.reduce((s: number, m: any) => s + Number(m.estimated_macros?.carbs_g ?? 0), 0)
   219	
   220	  const MEAL_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
   221	    breakfast: 'Petit-déjeuner', lunch: 'Déjeuner',
   222	    dinner: 'Dîner', snack: 'Collation',
   223	  }
   224	
   225	  const mealsLines = composerMeals.length > 0 || legacyMealsData.length > 0
   226	    ? [
   227	        ...composerMeals.map((m: any) => {
   228	          const time  = new Date(m.logged_at).toLocaleTimeString('fr-FR', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })
   229	          const label = m.title ?? MEAL_LABELS[m.meal_type as string] ?? 'Repas'
   230	          return `  - ${time} ${label}: ${Math.round(Number(m.total_calories ?? 0))} kcal`
   231	        }),
   232	        ...legacyMealsData.map((m: any) => {
   233	          const time = new Date(m.logged_at).toLocaleTimeString('fr-FR', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })
   234	          return `  - ${time} ${m.meal_name ?? 'Repas'}: ${Math.round(Number(m.estimated_macros?.calories_kcal ?? 0))} kcal`
   235	        }),
   236	      ].join('\n')
   237	    : '  - Aucun repas loggé'
   238	
   239	  // ── Water ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   240	  const water        = waterResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (waterResult.value.data ?? []) : []
   241	  const totalWaterMl = water.reduce((s, w) => s + Number(w.amount_ml ?? 0), 0)
   242	  const totalCaffeineMg = water.reduce((s, w) => s + Number(w.caffeine_mg ?? 0), 0)
   243	
   244	  // ── Session (completed today) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
   245	  const session     = sessionResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? sessionResult.value.data : null
   246	  const sessionLine = session
   247	    ? `Séance complétée à ${new Date(session.completed_at as string).toLocaleTimeString('fr-FR', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })}`
   248	    : "Aucune séance complétée aujourd'hui"
   249	
   250	  // ── Activities ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   251	  const activities      = activitiesResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (activitiesResult.value.data ?? []) : []
   252	  const activitiesLine  = activities.length > 0
   253	    ? activities.map(a => `  - ${a.custom_label ?? a.activity_type} ${a.duration_min}min`).join('\n')
   254	    : '  Aucune'
   255	
   256	  // ── Restrictions ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   257	  const restrictions     = restrictionsResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (restrictionsResult.value.data ?? []) : []
   258	  const restrictionsLine = restrictions.length > 0
   259	    ? restrictions.map(r => `${r.label ?? r.body_part} (${r.severity})`).join(', ')
   260	    : 'aucune'

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: lib/client/ai-coach/loadDailyFacts.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	import type { SupabaseClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js'
     2	import { computeDailyFacts, computeDayKind, type DailyFacts, type CheckinSignals } from '@/lib/client/ai-coach/dailyFacts'
     3	import { resolveTone, type Tone } from '@/lib/client/ai-coach/resolveTone'
     4	import type { Freedom, AdviceTrend } from '@/lib/client/ai-coach/adviceRules'
     5	import { resolveProtocolDayByDate, resolveRestProtocolDay } from '@/lib/nutrition/protocol-schedule'
     6	import { fetchClientDayOverride } from '@/lib/client/day-kind'
     7	import { utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate, addDaysToDateKey, getLocalWeekday } from '@/lib/client/checkin/timeWindows'
     8	import { filterSessionsForJsWeekday } from '@/lib/client/plannedSessions'
     9	
    10	const OVER_KCAL = 200
    11	const PROTEIN_SHORT_RATIO = 0.8
    12	
    13	export type DailyCoachContext = {
    14	  facts: DailyFacts
    15	  trend: AdviceTrend
    16	  tone: Tone
    17	  freedom: Freedom
    18	  enabledMorningFields: string[]
    19	  coachId: string | null
    20	}
    21	
    22	/**
    23	 * Single loader: assembles the deterministic DailyFacts + trend + tone + freedom for a client/day.
    24	 * Pure cores (computeDailyFacts/computeDayKind) do the logic; this only fetches.
    25	 */
    26	export async function loadDailyCoachContext(
    27	  db: SupabaseClient,
    28	  clientId: string,
    29	  date: string,
    30	  timezone: string,
    31	  submittedCheckin?: CheckinSignals,
    32	  steps?: number | null,
    33	): Promise<DailyCoachContext> {
    34	  const { start, end } = utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate(date, timezone)
    35	  const dayDate = new Date(`${date}T12:00:00.000Z`)
    36	  const weekday = getLocalWeekday(dayDate, timezone)
    37	  const threeDaysAgo = addDaysToDateKey(date, -3)
    38	  const yesterday = addDaysToDateKey(date, -1)
    39	
    40	  const [
    41	    { data: composerMeals },
    42	    { data: legacyMeals },
    43	    { data: waterRows },
    44	    { data: protocol },
    45	    { data: plannedSessions },
    46	    { data: completedSessions },
    47	    { data: skips },
    48	    { data: trendMeals },
    49	    { data: perClientAi },
    50	    { data: cfgRow },
    51	  ] = await Promise.all([
    52	    db.from('nutrition_meals').select('total_calories, total_protein_g').eq('client_id', clientId).eq('physiological_date', date),
    53	    db.from('meal_logs').select('estimated_macros').eq('client_id', clientId).gte('logged_at', start.toISOString()).lt('logged_at', new Date(end.getTime() + 1).toISOString()).eq('ai_status', 'done'),
    54	    db.from('client_water_logs').select('amount_ml, caffeine_mg').eq('client_id', clientId).gte('logged_at', start.toISOString()).lte('logged_at', end.toISOString()),
    55	    db.from('nutrition_protocols').select('schedule_start_date, nutrition_protocol_days(position, calories, protein_g, hydration_ml, name, carb_cycle_type), nutrition_protocol_schedule_slots(week_index, dow, protocol_day_position)').eq('client_id', clientId).eq('status', 'shared').order('updated_at', { ascending: false }).limit(1).maybeSingle(),
    56	    db.from('program_sessions').select('id, name, day_of_week, days_of_week, programs!inner(status, client_id)').eq('programs.client_id', clientId).eq('programs.status', 'active'),
    57	    db.from('client_session_logs').select('id').eq('client_id', clientId).not('completed_at', 'is', null).gte('completed_at', start.toISOString()).lte('completed_at', end.toISOString()).limit(1),
    58	    db.from('client_workout_skips').select('program_session_id').eq('client_id', clientId).eq('scheduled_date', date),
    59	    db.from('nutrition_meals').select('physiological_date, total_calories, total_protein_g').eq('client_id', clientId).gte('physiological_date', threeDaysAgo).lte('physiological_date', yesterday),
    60	    db.from('coach_ai_settings_per_client').select('ai_tone, coach_id, coaching_freedom').eq('client_id', clientId).maybeSingle(),
    61	    db.from('daily_checkin_configs').select('moments').eq('client_id', clientId).maybeSingle(),
    62	  ])
    63	
    64	  // Global tone needs coach_id (from per-client settings row)
    65	  const coachId = (perClientAi as { coach_id?: string } | null)?.coach_id ?? null
    66	  const { data: coachProfile } = coachId
    67	    ? await db.from('coach_profiles').select('ai_tone').eq('coach_id', coachId).maybeSingle()
    68	    : { data: null }
    69	
    70	  // ── Nutrition ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    71	  const kcalLogged =
    72	    (composerMeals ?? []).reduce((s: number, m: any) => s + Number(m.total_calories ?? 0), 0) +
    73	    (legacyMeals ?? []).reduce((s: number, m: any) => s + Number((m.estimated_macros as any)?.calories_kcal ?? 0), 0)
    74	  const proteinLogged =
    75	    (composerMeals ?? []).reduce((s: number, m: any) => s + Number(m.total_protein_g ?? 0), 0) +
    76	    (legacyMeals ?? []).reduce((s: number, m: any) => s + Number((m.estimated_macros as any)?.protein_g ?? 0), 0)
    77	  const hydrationMl = (waterRows ?? []).reduce((s: number, w: any) => s + Number(w.amount_ml ?? 0), 0)
    78	  const caffeineMg = (waterRows ?? []).reduce((s: number, w: any) => s + Number(w.caffeine_mg ?? 0), 0)
    79	
    80	  // ── Day kind / session ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    81	  const dayOverride = await fetchClientDayOverride(db, clientId, date)
    82	  const protocolDays = (protocol as any)?.nutrition_protocol_days ?? []
    83	  const rawProtocolDay = resolveProtocolDayByDate(
    84	    date,
    85	    (protocol as any)?.schedule_start_date ?? null,
    86	    protocolDays,
    87	    (protocol as any)?.nutrition_protocol_schedule_slots ?? [],
    88	  ) as any
    89	  const isOff = dayOverride?.kind === 'off'
    90	  const protocolDay = isOff ? (resolveRestProtocolDay(protocolDays) ?? rawProtocolDay) : rawProtocolDay
    91	
    92	  const kcalTarget = Number(protocolDay?.calories ?? 0)
    93	  const proteinTarget = Number(protocolDay?.protein_g ?? 0)
    94	  const hydrationTargetMl = Number(protocolDay?.hydration_ml ?? 2500)
    95	
    96	  const plannedList = filterSessionsForJsWeekday(
    97	    (plannedSessions ?? []) as Array<{ id: string; name?: string | null; day_of_week?: number | null; days_of_week?: number[] | null }>,
    98	    weekday,
    99	  )
   100	  const plannedSessionName = plannedList[0]?.name ?? null
   101	  const completed = ((completedSessions ?? []) as any[]).length > 0
   102	  const skipped = ((skips ?? []) as any[]).length > 0
   103	  const { dayKind, sessionStatus } = computeDayKind({
   104	    plannedSessionName,
   105	    completed,
   106	    skipped,
   107	    overrideOff: isOff,
   108	  })
   109	
   110	  // ── Trend (3 days) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   111	  const byDay = new Map<string, { kcal: number; protein: number }>()
   112	  for (const m of (trendMeals ?? []) as any[]) {
   113	    const d = m.physiological_date as string
   114	    const cur = byDay.get(d) ?? { kcal: 0, protein: 0 }
   115	    cur.kcal += Number(m.total_calories ?? 0)
   116	    cur.protein += Number(m.total_protein_g ?? 0)
   117	    byDay.set(d, cur)
   118	  }
   119	  let kcalOverDays = 0
   120	  let proteinShortDays = 0
   121	  for (const { kcal, protein } of Array.from(byDay.values())) {
   122	    if (kcalTarget > 0 && kcal - kcalTarget > OVER_KCAL) kcalOverDays++
   123	    if (proteinTarget > 0 && protein < proteinTarget * PROTEIN_SHORT_RATIO) proteinShortDays++
   124	  }
   125	
   126	  // ── Tone / fields ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   127	  const tone = resolveTone(
   128	    (perClientAi as { ai_tone?: string | null } | null)?.ai_tone ?? null,
   129	    (coachProfile as { ai_tone?: string | null } | null)?.ai_tone ?? null,
   130	  )
   131	  const cfgMoments = ((cfgRow as { moments?: Array<{ moment?: string; fields?: string[] }> } | null)?.moments) ?? []
   132	  const enabledMorningFields = cfgMoments.find((m) => m.moment === 'morning')?.fields ?? []
   133	
   134	  const rawFreedom = (perClientAi as { coaching_freedom?: string | null } | null)?.coaching_freedom ?? 'safe'
   135	  const freedom: Freedom = rawFreedom === 'none' || rawFreedom === 'extended' ? rawFreedom : 'safe'
   136	
   137	  const facts = computeDailyFacts({
   138	    dayKind,
   139	    sessionStatus,
   140	    plannedSessionName,
   141	    kcalLogged,
   142	    kcalTarget,
   143	    proteinLogged,
   144	    proteinTarget,
   145	    hydrationMl,
   146	    hydrationTargetMl,
   147	    caffeineMg,
   148	    steps: steps ?? null,
   149	    checkin: submittedCheckin ?? {},
   150	  })
   151	
   152	  return {
   153	    facts,
   154	    trend: { kcalOverDays, proteinShortDays },
   155	    tone,
   156	    freedom,
   157	    enabledMorningFields,
   158	    coachId,
   159	  }
   160	}

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: lib/client/ai-coach/patternDetector.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	import { SupabaseClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js'
     2	import { computePhysiologicalDate } from '@/lib/nutrition/physiological-date'
     3	import { resolveClientTimezone } from '@/lib/client/checkin/resolveClientTimezone'
     4	import { utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate } from '@/lib/client/checkin/timeWindows'
     5	import { resolveProtocolDayByDate } from '@/lib/nutrition/protocol-schedule'
     6	
     7	export interface PatternResult {
     8	  code: string
     9	  statement: string
    10	  question: string
    11	  options: { label: string; value: number }[]
    12	}
    13	
    14	/**
    15	 * Returns a date string YYYY-MM-DD offset by X days
    16	 */
    17	function getOffsetDateStr(dateStr: string, offsetDays: number): string {
    18	  const d = new Date(dateStr)
    19	  d.setDate(d.getDate() + offsetDays)
    20	  return d.toISOString().split('T')[0]
    21	}
    22	
    23	export async function evaluateClientPatterns(clientId: string, db: SupabaseClient): Promise<PatternResult | null> {
    24	  const timezone = await resolveClientTimezone(db as any, clientId)
    25	  const today = computePhysiologicalDate(new Date(), timezone)
    26	  const todayDateObj = new Date(today)
    27	  const sevenDaysAgoObj = new Date(today)
    28	  sevenDaysAgoObj.setDate(sevenDaysAgoObj.getDate() - 7)
    29	  const sevenDaysAgo = sevenDaysAgoObj.toISOString().split('T')[0]
    30	  const { start: sevenDaysAgoStart } = utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate(sevenDaysAgo, timezone)
    31	  const { start: todayStart } = utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate(today, timezone)
    32	
    33	  // 1. Fetch data
    34	  const [
    35	    { data: protocol },
    36	    { data: meals },
    37	    { data: legacyMeals },
    38	    { data: checkins },
    39	    { data: waterLogs },
    40	    { data: activeProgram },
    41	    { data: sessionLogs },
    42	  ] = await Promise.all([
    43	    db.from('nutrition_protocols')
    44	      .select('schedule_start_date, nutrition_protocol_days(position, calories, protein_g, carbs_g, fat_g, hydration_ml), nutrition_protocol_schedule_slots(week_index, dow, protocol_day_position)')
    45	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    46	      .eq('status', 'shared')
    47	      .order('updated_at', { ascending: false })
    48	      .limit(1)
    49	      .maybeSingle(),
    50	    db.from('nutrition_meals')
    51	      .select('physiological_date, total_calories, total_protein_g, total_carbs_g, total_fat_g')
    52	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    53	      .gte('physiological_date', sevenDaysAgo)
    54	      .lt('physiological_date', today),
    55	    db.from('meal_logs')
    56	      .select('logged_at, estimated_macros')
    57	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    58	      .gte('logged_at', sevenDaysAgoStart.toISOString())
    59	      .lt('logged_at', todayStart.toISOString())
    60	      .eq('ai_status', 'done'),
    61	    db.from('client_daily_checkins')
    62	      .select('date, flow_type, sleep_hours, energy_level, stress_level')
    63	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    64	      .gte('date', sevenDaysAgo)
    65	      .lte('date', today), // we include today for check-ins (e.g., morning checkin already done)
    66	    db.from('client_water_logs')
    67	      .select('logged_at, amount_ml')
    68	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    69	      .gte('logged_at', `${sevenDaysAgo}T00:00:00.000Z`),
    70	    db.from('programs')
    71	      .select('id, name, weeks, frequency, program_sessions(id, name, day_of_week, days_of_week)')
    72	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    73	      .eq('status', 'active')
    74	      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
    75	      .limit(1)
    76	      .maybeSingle(),
    77	    db.from('client_session_logs')
    78	      .select('completed_at')
    79	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    80	      .not('completed_at', 'is', null)
    81	      .gte('completed_at', `${sevenDaysAgo}T00:00:00.000Z`)
    82	      .order('completed_at', { ascending: false }),
    83	  ])
    84	
    85	  // 2. Aggregate Data per day
    86	  const dailyStats: Record<string, any> = {}
    87	  for (let i = 1; i <= 7; i++) {
    88	    const d = getOffsetDateStr(today, -i)
    89	    dailyStats[d] = {
    90	      target: null, consumedKcal: 0, consumedProt: 0, consumedCarbs: 0, consumedFat: 0, consumedWater: 0,
    91	      sleep: null, energy: null, stress: null,
    92	    }
    93	  }
    94	
    95	  // Assign targets
    96	  const pDays = (protocol as any)?.nutrition_protocol_days ?? []
    97	  const pSlots = (protocol as any)?.nutrition_protocol_schedule_slots ?? []
    98	  const startDate = (protocol as any)?.schedule_start_date ?? null
    99	
   100	  for (const d of Object.keys(dailyStats)) {
   101	    const dayProtocol = resolveProtocolDayByDate(d, startDate, pDays, pSlots) as any
   102	    if (dayProtocol) {
   103	      dailyStats[d].target = {
   104	        kcal: Number(dayProtocol.calories ?? 0),
   105	        prot: Number(dayProtocol.protein_g ?? 0),
   106	        carbs: Number(dayProtocol.carbs_g ?? 0),
   107	        fat: Number(dayProtocol.fat_g ?? 0),
   108	        water: Number(dayProtocol.hydration_ml ?? 2500)
   109	      }
   110	    }
   111	  }
   112	
   113	  // Aggregate macros
   114	  for (const m of (meals ?? [])) {
   115	    const d = m.physiological_date
   116	    if (dailyStats[d]) {
   117	      dailyStats[d].consumedKcal += Number(m.total_calories ?? 0)
   118	      dailyStats[d].consumedProt += Number(m.total_protein_g ?? 0)
   119	      dailyStats[d].consumedCarbs += Number(m.total_carbs_g ?? 0)
   120	      dailyStats[d].consumedFat += Number(m.total_fat_g ?? 0)
   121	    }
   122	  }
   123	  for (const m of (legacyMeals ?? [])) {
   124	    const d = computePhysiologicalDate(new Date(m.logged_at), timezone)
   125	    if (dailyStats[d]) {
   126	      const em = (m.estimated_macros ?? {}) as any
   127	      dailyStats[d].consumedKcal += Number(em.calories ?? 0)
   128	      dailyStats[d].consumedProt += Number(em.protein_g ?? 0)
   129	      dailyStats[d].consumedCarbs += Number(em.carbs_g ?? 0)
   130	      dailyStats[d].consumedFat += Number(em.fats_g ?? em.fat_g ?? 0)
   131	    }
   132	  }
   133	  for (const w of (waterLogs ?? [])) {
   134	    const d = computePhysiologicalDate(new Date(w.logged_at))
   135	    if (dailyStats[d]) {
   136	      dailyStats[d].consumedWater += Number(w.amount_ml ?? 0)
   137	    }
   138	  }
   139	  for (const c of (checkins ?? [])) {
   140	    const d = c.date
   141	    if (dailyStats[d] || d === today) {
   142	      const target = dailyStats[d] || {}
   143	      if (c.flow_type === 'morning') {
   144	        if (c.sleep_hours != null) target.sleep = c.sleep_hours
   145	        if (c.energy_level != null) target.energy = c.energy_level
   146	      } else if (c.flow_type === 'evening') {
   147	        if (c.stress_level != null) target.stress = c.stress_level
   148	      }
   149	    }
   150	  }
   151	
   152	  // 3. Evaluate Patterns
   153	  const daysDesc = Array.from({ length: 7 }, (_, i) => getOffsetDateStr(today, -(i + 1)))
   154	
   155	  const checkSequence = (count: number, condition: (stats: any) => boolean) => {
   156	    for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   157	      const d = daysDesc[i]
   158	      const st = dailyStats[d]
   159	      if (!st || !st.target) return false // Missing data prevents triggering
   160	      if (!condition(st)) return false
   161	    }
   162	    return true
   163	  }
   164	
   165	  const checkCheckinsSequence = (count: number, flow: 'morning'|'evening', condition: (c: any) => boolean) => {
   166	    // Collect the last `count` days where checkin was supposed to happen, we look at the last `count` days chronologically ending today or yesterday.
   167	    const relevantDates = [today, ...daysDesc].slice(0, count + 1)
   168	    let validDays = 0
   169	    let matchDays = 0
   170	    for (const d of relevantDates) {
   171	      const st = dailyStats[d] || {}
   172	      const c = checkins?.find(x => x.date === d && x.flow_type === flow)
   173	      if (c) {
   174	        validDays++
   175	        if (condition(c)) matchDays++
   176	      }
   177	    }
   178	    return validDays >= count && matchDays >= count
   179	  }
   180	
   181	  // 1. Calories dépassées > 110% (3j)
   182	  if (checkSequence(3, s => s.consumedKcal > s.target.kcal * 1.1)) {
   183	    return {
   184	      code: 'calories_high', statement: "J'ai vu que tes calories dépassaient ta cible ces 3 derniers jours.",
   185	      question: "Qu'est-ce qui se passe en ce moment ?",
   186	      options: [
   187	        { label: "Beaucoup de restos/sorties", value: 1 },
   188	        { label: "J'ai souvent faim", value: 2 },
   189	        { label: "Du mal à peser/logger", value: 3 },
   190	        { label: "Autre (écrire)", value: 99 }
   191	      ]
   192	    }
   193	  }
   194	
   195	  // 2. Calories en deçà < 80% (3j)
   196	  if (checkSequence(3, s => s.target.kcal > 0 && s.consumedKcal > 0 && s.consumedKcal < s.target.kcal * 0.8)) {
   197	    return {
   198	      code: 'calories_low', statement: "J'ai vu que tu étais bien en dessous de tes calories cibles ces 3 derniers jours.",
   199	      question: "Quelle en est la raison principale ?",
   200	      options: [
   201	        { label: "Pas très faim", value: 1 },
   202	        { label: "Pas le temps de manger", value: 2 },
   203	        { label: "J'oublie de logger", value: 3 },
   204	        { label: "Autre (écrire)", value: 99 }
   205	      ]
   206	    }
   207	  }
   208	
   209	  // 3. Protéines en deçà < 85% (5j)
   210	  if (checkSequence(5, s => s.target.prot > 0 && s.consumedProt > 0 && s.consumedProt < s.target.prot * 0.85)) {
   211	    return {
   212	      code: 'protein_low', statement: "Tes protéines sont en dessous de la cible depuis 5 jours.",
   213	      question: "Est-ce qu'on peut t'aider là-dessus ?",
   214	      options: [
   215	        { label: "Manque d'inspiration repas", value: 1 },
   216	        { label: "Trop compliqué à cuisiner", value: 2 },
   217	        { label: "Budget serré en ce moment", value: 3 },
   218	        { label: "Autre (écrire)", value: 99 }
   219	      ]
   220	    }
   221	  }
   222	
   223	  // 4. Glucides dépassés > 115% (3j)
   224	  if (checkSequence(3, s => s.target.carbs > 0 && s.consumedCarbs > s.target.carbs * 1.15)) {
   225	    return {
   226	      code: 'carbs_high', statement: "Tu as consommé pas mal de glucides au-dessus de la cible ces 3 derniers jours.",
   227	      question: "Une idée de ce qui bloque ?",
   228	      options: [
   229	        { label: "Envies de sucre fréquentes", value: 1 },
   230	        { label: "Repas imprévus", value: 2 },
   231	        { label: "Autre (écrire)", value: 99 }
   232	      ]
   233	    }
   234	  }
   235	
   236	  // 6. Lipides dépassés > 115% (3j)
   237	  if (checkSequence(3, s => s.target.fat > 0 && s.consumedFat > s.target.fat * 1.15)) {
   238	    return {
   239	      code: 'fat_high', statement: "J'ai vu que tes lipides étaient au-dessus de la cible ces 3 derniers jours.",
   240	      question: "Qu'est-ce qui explique cela ?",
   241	      options: [
   242	        { label: "Je mange souvent dehors", value: 1 },
   243	        { label: "Des craquages récents", value: 2 },
   244	        { label: "Repas habituels trop riches", value: 3 },
   245	        { label: "Autre (écrire)", value: 99 }
   246	      ]
   247	    }
   248	  }
   249	
   250	  // 7. Hydratation < 70% (5j)
   251	  if (checkSequence(5, s => s.target.water > 0 && s.consumedWater > 0 && s.consumedWater < s.target.water * 0.7)) {
   252	    return {
   253	      code: 'hydration_low', statement: "Tu n'as pas atteint tes objectifs d'hydratation ces 5 derniers jours.",
   254	      question: "Qu'est-ce qui t'empêche de boire plus ?",
   255	      options: [
   256	        { label: "J'y pense pas", value: 1 },
   257	        { label: "Pas de gourde sous la main", value: 2 },
   258	        { label: "J'oublie de logger", value: 3 },
   259	        { label: "Autre (écrire)", value: 99 }
   260	      ]

------------------------------------------------------------

FILE: lib/client/nutrition/drinks.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	export type DrinkType = "water" | "espresso" | "coffee" | "lungo" | "tea"
     2	export type DrinkLogKind = "all" | "water" | "caffeine"
     3	
     4	export type DrinkPreset = {
     5	  drinkType: DrinkType
     6	  label: string
     7	  shortLabel: string
     8	  baseAmountMl: number
     9	  baseCaffeineMg: number
    10	  accent: string
    11	  cupCount: 1 | 2 | 3
    12	  strengthLabel: string
    13	}
    14	
    15	export const DRINK_PRESETS: Record<DrinkType, DrinkPreset> = {
    16	  water: {
    17	    drinkType: "water",
    18	    label: "Eau",
    19	    shortLabel: "Eau",
    20	    baseAmountMl: 250,
    21	    baseCaffeineMg: 0,
    22	    accent: "#60a5fa",
    23	    cupCount: 1,
    24	    strengthLabel: "hydratation",
    25	  },
    26	  espresso: {
    27	    drinkType: "espresso",
    28	    label: "Espresso",
    29	    shortLabel: "Espresso",
    30	    baseAmountMl: 40,
    31	    baseCaffeineMg: 80,
    32	    accent: "#c08457",
    33	    cupCount: 1,
    34	    strengthLabel: "concentré",
    35	  },
    36	  coffee: {
    37	    drinkType: "coffee",
    38	    label: "Café",
    39	    shortLabel: "Café",
    40	    baseAmountMl: 180,
    41	    baseCaffeineMg: 95,
    42	    accent: "#c08457",
    43	    cupCount: 2,
    44	    strengthLabel: "classique",
    45	  },
    46	  lungo: {
    47	    drinkType: "lungo",
    48	    label: "Lungo",
    49	    shortLabel: "Lungo",
    50	    baseAmountMl: 120,
    51	    baseCaffeineMg: 110,
    52	    accent: "#c08457",
    53	    cupCount: 3,
    54	    strengthLabel: "allongé",
    55	  },
    56	  tea: {
    57	    drinkType: "tea",
    58	    label: "Thé",
    59	    shortLabel: "Thé",
    60	    baseAmountMl: 250,
    61	    baseCaffeineMg: 35,
    62	    accent: "#34d399",
    63	    cupCount: 1,
    64	    strengthLabel: "infusé",
    65	  },
    66	}
    67	
    68	const CAFFEINATED_TYPES: Exclude<DrinkType, "water">[] = ["espresso", "coffee", "lungo", "tea"]
    69	
    70	export function isCaffeinatedDrinkType(type: DrinkType): type is Exclude<DrinkType, "water"> {
    71	  return CAFFEINATED_TYPES.includes(type as Exclude<DrinkType, "water">)
    72	}
    73	
    74	export function getDrinkPreset(drinkType: DrinkType): DrinkPreset {
    75	  return DRINK_PRESETS[drinkType]
    76	}
    77	
    78	export function estimateCaffeineMg(drinkType: DrinkType, amountMl: number): number {
    79	  if (drinkType === "water") return 0
    80	  const preset = DRINK_PRESETS[drinkType]
    81	  const safeAmount = Math.max(1, amountMl)
    82	  return Math.max(0, Math.round(preset.baseCaffeineMg * (safeAmount / preset.baseAmountMl)))
    83	}
    84	
    85	export function inferDrinkTypeFromFoodItem(input: { name_fr: string; category_l1: string; category_l2: string | null }): DrinkType {
    86	  const name = input.name_fr.toLowerCase()
    87	  const category = `${input.category_l1 ?? ""} ${input.category_l2 ?? ""}`.toLowerCase()
    88	
    89	  if (input.category_l1 !== "drinks") return "water"
    90	  if (/espresso|expresso/.test(name)) return "espresso"
    91	  if (/lungo/.test(name)) return "lungo"
    92	  if (/(th[eé]|tisane|infusion|rooibos|camomille)/.test(name) || /(th[eé]|tisane|infusion|rooibos|camomille)/.test(category)) return "tea"
    93	  if (/cafe|coffee|cappuccino|latte|macchiato|ristretto/.test(name)) return "coffee"
    94	  if (/chauds?/.test(category)) return "coffee"
    95	  return "water"
    96	}

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: lib/client/smart/adherenceScore.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	export type AdherenceInput = {
     2	  sessionDates: string[]
     3	  plannedDaysOfWeek: number[]
     4	  mealDates: string[]
     5	  waterByDate: Record<string, number>
     6	  waterTargetMl: number
     7	  checkinDates: string[]
     8	  referenceDate: string
     9	}
    10	
    11	export type AdherenceResult = {
    12	  score: number
    13	  scoreDelta: number
    14	  dimensions: {
    15	    sport: number
    16	    nutrition: number
    17	    hydration: number
    18	    checkins: number
    19	  }
    20	}
    21	
    22	function getWindow(referenceDate: string, daysBack: number): string[] {
    23	  const dates: string[] = []
    24	  const ref = new Date(referenceDate)
    25	  for (let i = daysBack - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    26	    const d = new Date(ref)
    27	    d.setDate(ref.getDate() - i)
    28	    dates.push(d.toISOString().split('T')[0])
    29	  }
    30	  return dates
    31	}
    32	
    33	function getDayOfWeek(dateStr: string): number {
    34	  const jsDay = new Date(dateStr).getDay()
    35	  return jsDay === 0 ? 7 : jsDay
    36	}
    37	
    38	function computeDimensions(
    39	  window: string[],
    40	  sessionDates: string[],
    41	  plannedDaysOfWeek: number[],
    42	  mealDates: string[],
    43	  waterByDate: Record<string, number>,
    44	  waterTargetMl: number,
    45	  checkinDates: string[],
    46	): AdherenceResult['dimensions'] {
    47	  const sessionSet = new Set(sessionDates)
    48	  const mealSet = new Set(mealDates)
    49	  const checkinSet = new Set(checkinDates)
    50	
    51	  const plannedInWindow = window.filter(d => plannedDaysOfWeek.includes(getDayOfWeek(d)))
    52	  const sportDone = plannedInWindow.filter(d => sessionSet.has(d)).length
    53	  const sport = plannedInWindow.length > 0
    54	    ? Math.round((sportDone / plannedInWindow.length) * 25)
    55	    : 25
    56	
    57	  const nutritionDone = window.filter(d => mealSet.has(d)).length
    58	  const nutrition = Math.round((nutritionDone / window.length) * 25)
    59	
    60	  const hydrationDone = window.filter(d => (waterByDate[d] ?? 0) >= waterTargetMl * 0.8).length
    61	  const hydration = waterTargetMl > 0
    62	    ? Math.round((hydrationDone / window.length) * 25)
    63	    : 25
    64	
    65	  const checkinDone = window.filter(d => checkinSet.has(d)).length
    66	  const checkins = Math.round((checkinDone / window.length) * 25)
    67	
    68	  return { sport, nutrition, hydration, checkins }
    69	}
    70	
    71	export function computeAdherenceScore(input: AdherenceInput): AdherenceResult {
    72	  const { sessionDates, plannedDaysOfWeek, mealDates, waterByDate, waterTargetMl, checkinDates, referenceDate } = input
    73	
    74	  const todayWindow = getWindow(referenceDate, 7)
    75	  const dims = computeDimensions(todayWindow, sessionDates, plannedDaysOfWeek, mealDates, waterByDate, waterTargetMl, checkinDates)
    76	  const score = dims.sport + dims.nutrition + dims.hydration + dims.checkins
    77	
    78	  const ref = new Date(referenceDate)
    79	  ref.setDate(ref.getDate() - 1)
    80	  const yesterdayRef = ref.toISOString().split('T')[0]
    81	  const yesterdayWindow = getWindow(yesterdayRef, 7)
    82	  const yd = computeDimensions(yesterdayWindow, sessionDates, plannedDaysOfWeek, mealDates, waterByDate, waterTargetMl, checkinDates)
    83	  const yesterdayScore = yd.sport + yd.nutrition + yd.hydration + yd.checkins
    84	
    85	  return { score, scoreDelta: score - yesterdayScore, dimensions: dims }
    86	}

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: lib/client/smart/nutritionAlerts.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	export type NutritionAlertCode =
     2	  | 'protein_low'
     3	  | 'carbs_limit'
     4	  | 'hydration_low'
     5	  | 'lunch_missing'
     6	
     7	export type NutritionAlertSeverity = 'info' | 'warning' | 'critical'
     8	
     9	export type NutritionAlert = {
    10	  code: NutritionAlertCode
    11	  severity: NutritionAlertSeverity
    12	  title: string
    13	  body?: string
    14	  delta?: number
    15	}
    16	
    17	export type NutritionConsumed = {
    18	  kcal: number
    19	  protein_g: number
    20	  carbs_g: number
    21	  fat_g: number
    22	  water_ml: number
    23	  caffeine_mg?: number
    24	}
    25	
    26	export type NutritionInput = {
    27	  consumed: NutritionConsumed
    28	  target: NutritionConsumed
    29	  currentHour: number
    30	  hasLunchLog: boolean
    31	}
    32	
    33	export function computeNutritionAlerts(input: NutritionInput): NutritionAlert[] {
    34	  const alerts: NutritionAlert[] = []
    35	  const { consumed, target, currentHour, hasLunchLog } = input
    36	
    37	  // Rule 1: protein_low (warning) — after 14h, behind schedule
    38	  if (currentHour >= 14) {
    39	    const expected = target.protein_g * (currentHour / 22)
    40	    const threshold = expected * 0.8
    41	    if (consumed.protein_g < threshold) {
    42	      const delta = Math.round(target.protein_g - consumed.protein_g)
    43	      alerts.push({
    44	        code: 'protein_low',
    45	        severity: 'warning',
    46	        title: 'PROTÉINES EN RETARD',
    47	        body: `il te reste ${delta}g pour atteindre ${target.protein_g}g`,
    48	        delta,
    49	      })
    50	    }
    51	  }
    52	
    53	  // Rule 2: carbs_limit (critical) — over target
    54	  if (consumed.carbs_g > target.carbs_g) {
    55	    const delta = Math.round(consumed.carbs_g - target.carbs_g)
    56	    alerts.push({
    57	      code: 'carbs_limit',
    58	      severity: 'critical',
    59	      title: 'LIMITE GLUCIDES ATTEINTE',
    60	      body: `-${delta}g sur ta cible`,
    61	      delta,
    62	    })
    63	  }
    64	
    65	  // Rule 3: hydration_low (warning) — after 14h, <50% of target
    66	  if (currentHour >= 14) {
    67	    const ratio = target.water_ml > 0 ? consumed.water_ml / target.water_ml : 1
    68	    if (ratio < 0.5) {
    69	      const deltaMl = target.water_ml - consumed.water_ml
    70	      const deltaL = (deltaMl / 1000).toFixed(1)
    71	      alerts.push({
    72	        code: 'hydration_low',
    73	        severity: 'warning',
    74	        title: 'HYDRATATION FAIBLE',
    75	        body: `il manque ${deltaL}L`,
    76	        delta: deltaMl,
    77	      })
    78	    }
    79	  }
    80	
    81	  // Rule 4: lunch_missing (info) — between 13-14h, no lunch log
    82	  if (currentHour >= 13 && currentHour < 15 && !hasLunchLog) {
    83	    alerts.push({
    84	      code: 'lunch_missing',
    85	      severity: 'info',
    86	      title: 'PAS DE DÉJEUNER LOGUÉ',
    87	    })
    88	  }
    89	
    90	  return alerts
    91	}
