     1	import { groupWaterByTimeOfDay, type WaterLog } from './waterAggregation'
     2	
     3	export type TimelineKind = 'meal' | 'water' | 'workout' | 'activity' | 'checkin'
     4	
     5	export type TimelineEntry = {
     6	  id: string
     7	  kind: TimelineKind
     8	  start_iso: string
     9	  title: string
    10	  subtitle: string
    11	  href?: string
    12	  meta?: Record<string, unknown>
    13	}
    14	
    15	export type MealRow = {
    16	  id: string
    17	  logged_at: string
    18	  title: string
    19	  meal_type: 'breakfast' | 'lunch' | 'dinner' | 'snack'
    20	  kcal: number
    21	  protein_g: number
    22	  carbs_g: number
    23	  fat_g: number
    24	}
    25	
    26	export type SessionSummary = {
    27	  id: string
    28	  completed_at: string
    29	  title: string
    30	  duration_min: number
    31	  exercises_count: number
    32	}
    33	
    34	export type ActivityRow = {
    35	  id: string
    36	  started_at: string
    37	  activity_type: 'running' | 'cycling' | 'swimming' | 'walking' | 'team_sport' | 'other'
    38	  custom_label?: string | null
    39	  duration_min: number
    40	  intensity: number
    41	}
    42	
    43	export type CheckinRow = {
    44	  id: string
    45	  logged_at: string
    46	  sleep_h?: number | null
    47	  energy?: number | null
    48	  stress?: number | null
    49	}
    50	
    51	export type TimelineSource = {
    52	  meals: MealRow[]
    53	  waterLogs: WaterLog[]
    54	  session: SessionSummary | null
    55	  activities: ActivityRow[]
    56	  checkins: CheckinRow[]
    57	}
    58	
    59	const ACTIVITY_LABEL: Record<ActivityRow['activity_type'], string> = {
    60	  running: 'Course',
    61	  cycling: 'Vélo',
    62	  swimming: 'Natation',
    63	  walking: 'Marche',
    64	  team_sport: 'Sport collectif',
    65	  other: 'Activité',
    66	}
    67	
    68	const SLOT_REPRESENTATIVE_SUFFIX: Record<'morning' | 'midday' | 'afternoon' | 'evening', string> = {
    69	  morning: 'T08:00:00Z',
    70	  midday: 'T13:00:00Z',
    71	  afternoon: 'T16:00:00Z',
    72	  evening: 'T20:00:00Z',
    73	}
    74	
    75	const SLOT_LABEL: Record<'morning' | 'midday' | 'afternoon' | 'evening', string> = {
    76	  morning: 'Hydratation matin',
    77	  midday: 'Hydratation midi',
    78	  afternoon: 'Hydratation après-midi',
    79	  evening: 'Hydratation soir',
    80	}
    81	
    82	export function buildTimeline(src: TimelineSource, tz: string = 'Europe/Paris'): TimelineEntry[] {
    83	  const entries: TimelineEntry[] = []
    84	
    85	  // Meals
    86	  for (const m of src.meals) {
    87	    entries.push({
    88	      id: m.id,
    89	      kind: 'meal',
    90	      start_iso: m.logged_at,
    91	      title: m.title,
    92	      subtitle: `${m.kcal} kcal · ${m.protein_g}P ${m.carbs_g}G ${m.fat_g}L`,
    93	      href: `/client/nutrition/journal#${m.id}`,
    94	    })
    95	  }
    96	
    97	  // Water aggregated by time of day
    98	  if (src.waterLogs.length > 0) {
    99	    const grouped = groupWaterByTimeOfDay(src.waterLogs, tz)
   100	    const dateRef = src.waterLogs[0].logged_at.slice(0, 10)
   101	    for (const slot of ['morning', 'midday', 'afternoon', 'evening'] as const) {
   102	      const ml = grouped[slot]
   103	      if (ml > 0) {
   104	        entries.push({
   105	          id: `water-${slot}`,
   106	          kind: 'water',
   107	          start_iso: `${dateRef}${SLOT_REPRESENTATIVE_SUFFIX[slot]}`,
   108	          title: SLOT_LABEL[slot],
   109	          subtitle: `${ml} ml`,
   110	        })
   111	      }
   112	    }
   113	  }
   114	
   115	  // Session
   116	  if (src.session) {
   117	    entries.push({
   118	      id: src.session.id,
   119	      kind: 'workout',
   120	      start_iso: src.session.completed_at,
   121	      title: src.session.title,
   122	      subtitle: `${src.session.exercises_count} exercices · ${src.session.duration_min} min`,
   123	      href: `/client/programme/recap/${src.session.id}`,
   124	    })
   125	  }
   126	
   127	  // Activities
   128	  for (const a of src.activities) {
   129	    entries.push({
   130	      id: a.id,
   131	      kind: 'activity',
   132	      start_iso: a.started_at,
   133	      title: a.custom_label?.trim() || ACTIVITY_LABEL[a.activity_type],
   134	      subtitle: `${a.duration_min} min · intensité ${a.intensity}/10`,
   135	    })
   136	  }
   137	
   138	  // Checkins
   139	  for (const c of src.checkins) {
   140	    const parts: string[] = []
   141	    if (c.sleep_h != null) parts.push(`${c.sleep_h}h sommeil`)
   142	    if (c.energy != null) parts.push(`énergie ${c.energy}/10`)
   143	    if (c.stress != null) parts.push(`stress ${c.stress}/10`)
   144	    entries.push({
   145	      id: c.id,
   146	      kind: 'checkin',
   147	      start_iso: c.logged_at,
   148	      title: 'Check-in',
   149	      subtitle: parts.join(' · '),
   150	    })
   151	  }
   152	
   153	  return entries.sort((a, b) => a.start_iso.localeCompare(b.start_iso))
   154	}

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: lib/client/smart/waterAggregation.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	export type WaterLog = {
     2	  logged_at: string
     3	  amount_ml: number
     4	}
     5	
     6	export type WaterByTimeOfDay = {
     7	  morning: number
     8	  midday: number
     9	  afternoon: number
    10	  evening: number
    11	}
    12	
    13	function getHourInTz(iso: string, tz = 'Europe/Paris'): number {
    14	  const d = new Date(iso)
    15	  const fmt = new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-US', {
    16	    timeZone: tz,
    17	    hour: 'numeric',
    18	    hour12: false,
    19	  })
    20	  const parts = fmt.formatToParts(d)
    21	  const h = parts.find(p => p.type === 'hour')?.value ?? '0'
    22	  return parseInt(h, 10)
    23	}
    24	
    25	export function groupWaterByTimeOfDay(
    26	  logs: WaterLog[],
    27	  tz: string = 'Europe/Paris'
    28	): WaterByTimeOfDay {
    29	  const out: WaterByTimeOfDay = { morning: 0, midday: 0, afternoon: 0, evening: 0 }
    30	  for (const log of logs) {
    31	    const hour = getHourInTz(log.logged_at, tz)
    32	    if (hour >= 5 && hour < 12) out.morning += log.amount_ml
    33	    else if (hour >= 12 && hour < 15) out.midday += log.amount_ml
    34	    else if (hour >= 15 && hour < 19) out.afternoon += log.amount_ml
    35	    else if (hour >= 19 && hour < 24) out.evening += log.amount_ml
    36	  }
    37	  return out
    38	}

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: lib/coach/phaseEngine/coachDecision.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	import type {
     2	  DerivedSignals,
     3	  PhaseCoachDecision,
     4	  PhaseMatrixConditionCode,
     5	  PhaseOptimizationResult,
     6	  RawSignalInput,
     7	} from './types'
     8	import type { PhaseHistoryPoint } from './history'
     9	import { getPhaseEngineCopy, type PhaseEngineLocale } from './localeCopy'
    10	import { buildPhaseConfidenceModel } from './confidenceModel'
    11	
    12	function clamp(v: number, min = 0, max = 1): number {
    13	  return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, v))
    14	}
    15	
    16	function pct(v: number): number {
    17	  return Math.round(clamp(v) * 100)
    18	}
    19	
    20	function signedPct(v: number | null | undefined): string {
    21	  if (v == null) return '—'
    22	  return `${v > 0 ? '+' : ''}${Math.round(v * 10) / 10}%`
    23	}
    24	
    25	function round1(v: number): number {
    26	  return Math.round(v * 10) / 10
    27	}
    28	
    29	function average(values: number[]): number | null {
    30	  if (values.length === 0) return null
    31	  return round1(values.reduce((sum, v) => sum + v, 0) / values.length)
    32	}
    33	
    34	function daysBetween(from: string, to: string): number | null {
    35	  const fromTime = new Date(`${from}T00:00:00.000Z`).getTime()
    36	  const toTime = new Date(`${to}T00:00:00.000Z`).getTime()
    37	  if (Number.isNaN(fromTime) || Number.isNaN(toTime)) return null
    38	  return Math.max(0, Math.round((toTime - fromTime) / 86400000))
    39	}
    40	
    41	function rhrWindowAverage(
    42	  series: RawSignalInput['rhrSeries'],
    43	  anchorDate: string,
    44	  days: number,
    45	): number | null {
    46	  const anchorTime = new Date(`${anchorDate}T23:59:59.999Z`).getTime()
    47	  if (Number.isNaN(anchorTime)) return null
    48	  const startTime = anchorTime - days * 86400000
    49	  return average(
    50	    series
    51	      .filter((point) => {
    52	        const pointTime = new Date(`${point.date}T12:00:00.000Z`).getTime()
    53	        return (
    54	          !Number.isNaN(pointTime) &&
    55	          pointTime >= startTime &&
    56	          pointTime <= anchorTime &&
    57	          point.value > 0
    58	        )
    59	      })
    60	      .map((point) => point.value),
    61	  )
    62	}
    63	
    64	function buildRhrDriver(signals: DerivedSignals, locale: PhaseEngineLocale): string | null {
    65	  const delta = signals.rhrDelta
    66	  if (!delta?.currentRhr) return null
    67	  if (delta.baselineRhr == null || delta.deviationPercentage == null) {
    68	    return locale === 'en'
    69	      ? `RHR ${delta.currentRhr} bpm, baseline still building`
    70	      : `RHR ${delta.currentRhr} bpm, baseline en construction`
    71	  }
    72	  return locale === 'en'
    73	    ? `RHR ${delta.currentRhr} bpm vs ${delta.baselineRhr} baseline (${signedPct(delta.deviationPercentage)})`
    74	    : `RHR ${delta.currentRhr} bpm vs baseline ${delta.baselineRhr} (${signedPct(delta.deviationPercentage)})`
    75	}
    76	
    77	function directionVerb(result: PhaseOptimizationResult, locale: PhaseEngineLocale): string {
    78	  const copy = getPhaseEngineCopy(locale)
    79	  const direction = copy.directionLabels[result.recommendedAdjustment.direction].toLowerCase()
    80	  const state = copy.adaptiveStateLabels[result.recommendedAdjustment.adaptiveState].toLowerCase()
    81	  return locale === 'en'
    82	    ? `Hold ${direction} with adaptive state ${state}.`
    83	    : `Maintenir ${direction}, état adaptatif ${state}.`
    84	}
    85	
    86	function buildCoachRecommendation(
    87	  result: PhaseOptimizationResult,
    88	  matrix: PhaseCoachDecision['matrix'],
    89	  locale: PhaseEngineLocale,
    90	): string {
    91	  if (locale === 'en') {
    92	    if (matrix.status === 'not_adapted') {
    93	      if (matrix.rule === 'recovery_overload' || matrix.rule === 'acute_under_recovery') {
    94	        return 'Reduce phase pressure now and prioritize recovery before pushing again.'
    95	      }
    96	      if (matrix.rule === 'adherence_mismatch') {
    97	        return 'Simplify the protocol and restore adherence before extending the phase.'
    98	      }
    99	      if (matrix.rule === 'body_response_mismatch' || matrix.rule === 'fat_gain_mismatch') {
   100	        return 'Tighten the current phase before continuing on the same trajectory.'
   101	      }
   102	      return 'Adjust the current phase before maintaining the current lane.'
   103	    }
   104	
   105	    if (matrix.status === 'partially_adapted') {
   106	      return 'Keep the current lane short term, but monitor closely and be ready to adjust.'
   107	    }
   108	
   109	    return directionVerb(result, locale)
   110	  }
   111	
   112	  if (matrix.status === 'not_adapted') {
   113	    if (matrix.rule === 'recovery_overload' || matrix.rule === 'acute_under_recovery') {
   114	      return 'Alléger la phase maintenant et prioriser la récupération avant de relancer.'
   115	    }
   116	    if (matrix.rule === 'adherence_mismatch') {
   117	      return 'Simplifier le protocole et rétablir l’adhérence avant de prolonger la phase.'
   118	    }
   119	    if (matrix.rule === 'body_response_mismatch' || matrix.rule === 'fat_gain_mismatch') {
   120	      return 'Resserrer la phase actuelle avant de poursuivre sur la même trajectoire.'
   121	    }
   122	    return 'Ajuster la phase actuelle avant de conserver la trajectoire en place.'
   123	  }
   124	
   125	  if (matrix.status === 'partially_adapted') {
   126	    return 'Conserver la trajectoire à court terme, mais avec surveillance rapprochée et ajustement prêt.'
   127	  }
   128	
   129	  return directionVerb(result, locale)
   130	}
   131	
   132	function buildTemporalReading({
   133	  result,
   134	  raw,
   135	  history,
   136	  locale,
   137	}: {
   138	  result: PhaseOptimizationResult
   139	  raw: Pick<RawSignalInput, 'rhrSeries' | 'anchorDate'>
   140	  history: PhaseHistoryPoint[]
   141	  locale: PhaseEngineLocale
   142	}): PhaseCoachDecision['temporal'] {
   143	  const anchorDate =
   144	    raw.anchorDate ?? result.engineMetadata.evaluatedAt.slice(0, 10)
   145	  const previous = history.at(-1) ?? null
   146	  const directionDelta =
   147	    previous != null ? round1(result.currentState.directionScore - previous.directionScore) : null
   148	  const adaptiveDelta =
   149	    previous != null ? round1(result.currentState.adaptiveScore - previous.adaptiveScore) : null
   150	  const sevenDayAvg = rhrWindowAverage(raw.rhrSeries, anchorDate, 7)
   151	  const thirtyDayAvg = rhrWindowAverage(raw.rhrSeries, anchorDate, 30)
   152	  const rhrDelta =
   153	    sevenDayAvg != null && thirtyDayAvg != null
   154	      ? round1(sevenDayAvg - thirtyDayAvg)
   155	      : null
   156	
   157	  const changes = [
   158	    directionDelta != null && Math.abs(directionDelta) >= 0.1
   159	      ? locale === 'en'
   160	        ? `Energetic direction moved ${directionDelta > 0 ? 'up' : 'down'} by ${Math.abs(directionDelta)}`
   161	        : `Direction énergétique ${directionDelta > 0 ? 'en hausse' : 'en baisse'} de ${Math.abs(directionDelta)}`
   162	      : null,
   163	    adaptiveDelta != null && Math.abs(adaptiveDelta) >= 0.1
   164	      ? locale === 'en'
   165	        ? `Adaptive state moved ${adaptiveDelta > 0 ? 'up' : 'down'} by ${Math.abs(adaptiveDelta)}`
   166	        : `État adaptatif ${adaptiveDelta > 0 ? 'en amélioration' : 'en baisse'} de ${Math.abs(adaptiveDelta)}`
   167	      : null,
   168	    rhrDelta != null && Math.abs(rhrDelta) >= 1
   169	      ? locale === 'en'
   170	        ? `7-day RHR is ${rhrDelta > 0 ? '+' : ''}${rhrDelta} bpm vs 30-day average`
   171	        : `RHR 7j ${rhrDelta > 0 ? '+' : ''}${rhrDelta} bpm vs moyenne 30j`
   172	      : null,
   173	  ].filter((v): v is string => Boolean(v)).slice(0, 3)
   174	
   175	  const gapDays = previous ? daysBetween(previous.recordedOn, anchorDate) : null
   176	  const summary =
   177	    previous == null
   178	      ? locale === 'en'
   179	        ? 'No previous phase snapshot yet; this reading becomes the comparison baseline.'
   180	        : 'Pas encore de snapshot précédent; cette lecture devient le point de comparaison.'
   181	      : changes.length === 0
   182	        ? locale === 'en'
   183	          ? `Reading remains stable since the previous snapshot${gapDays != null ? ` (${gapDays}d)` : ''}.`
   184	          : `Lecture stable depuis le dernier point${gapDays != null ? ` (${gapDays}j)` : ''}.`
   185	        : locale === 'en'
   186	          ? `${changes[0]}.`
   187	          : `${changes[0]}.`
   188	
   189	  return {
   190	    summary,
   191	    changes,
   192	    previousPoint: previous
   193	      ? {
   194	          recordedOn: previous.recordedOn,
   195	          directionScore: round1(previous.directionScore),
   196	          adaptiveScore: round1(previous.adaptiveScore),
   197	        }
   198	      : null,
   199	    deltas: {
   200	      directionScore: directionDelta,
   201	      adaptiveScore: adaptiveDelta,
   202	    },
   203	    rhr: {
   204	      sevenDayAvg,
   205	      thirtyDayAvg,
   206	      deltaBpm: rhrDelta,
   207	    },
   208	  }
   209	}
   210	
   211	function buildSevenDayTrajectory(
   212	  result: PhaseOptimizationResult,
   213	  signals: DerivedSignals,
   214	  locale: PhaseEngineLocale,
   215	): PhaseCoachDecision['sevenDayTrajectory'] {
   216	  const recoveryPct = pct(signals.recoveryCapacity.value)
   217	  const rhrDeviation = signals.rhrDelta?.deviationPercentage ?? null
   218	  const highStress =
   219	    Boolean(signals.cnsOverload) ||
   220	    result.recommendedAdjustment.urgency === 'high' ||
   221	    recoveryPct < 40
   222	
   223	  const readyToReload =
   224	    !highStress &&
   225	    recoveryPct >= 55 &&
   226	    result.currentState.adaptiveState === 'recovered'
   227	
   228	  const strategy: PhaseCoachDecision['sevenDayTrajectory']['strategy'] =
   229	    highStress ? 'deload' : readyToReload ? 'progressive_reload' : 'maintain'
   230	
   231	  const exitCriteria = [
   232	    locale === 'en'
   233	      ? 'Morning RHR back within +5% of baseline'
   234	      : 'RHR matin revenue à moins de +5% de la baseline',
   235	    locale === 'en'
   236	      ? 'Recovery capacity above 60%'
   237	      : 'Capacité de récupération au-dessus de 60%',
   238	  ]
   239	
   240	  if (strategy === 'deload') {
   241	    return {
   242	      strategy,
   243	      title: locale === 'en' ? '7-day deload' : 'Décharge 7 jours',
   244	      summary: locale === 'en'
   245	        ? 'Keep the next week protective: reduce training stress until RHR and recovery normalize.'
   246	        : 'Semaine protectrice: réduire le stress d’entraînement jusqu’à normalisation RHR/récupération.',
   247	      days: Array.from({ length: 7 }, (_, i) => ({
   248	        day: i + 1,
   249	        focus: i < 3
   250	          ? (locale === 'en' ? 'Recovery priority' : 'Priorité récupération')
   251	          : (locale === 'en' ? 'Controlled reactivation' : 'Réactivation contrôlée'),
   252	        intensityPct: i < 3 ? 45 : i < 5 ? 55 : 60,
   253	        nutrition: locale === 'en' ? 'Maintenance calories, no aggressive deficit' : 'Maintenance, pas de déficit agressif',
   254	        exitCriteria,
   255	      })),
   256	    }
   257	  }
   258	
   259	  if (strategy === 'progressive_reload') {
   260	    return {

FILE: lib/coach/phaseEngine/rhr.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	// lib/coach/phaseEngine/rhr.ts
     2	/**
     3	 * Calculate RHR delta statistics based on check‑in data.
     4	 * Uses a strict 3‑day acute window (the three most recent valid rhr_morning values)
     5	 * and a 21‑day baseline (the 21 days preceding the acute window).
     6	 * Returns the current RHR, baseline RHR, deviation percentage and overload flag (>8% elevation).
     7	 */
     8	export function calculateRhrDelta(
     9	  checkins: { date: string; rhr_morning?: number | null }[],
    10	  anchorDate?: string,
    11	): {
    12	  currentRhr: number | null;
    13	  baselineRhr: number | null;
    14	  deviationPercentage: number | null;
    15	  isCnsOverloaded: boolean;
    16	} {
    17	  const OVERLOAD_THRESHOLD = 8; // percent
    18	  const targetDate = anchorDate ? anchorDate : new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
    19	
    20	  // Filter valid RHR entries up to the anchor date
    21	  const valid = checkins
    22	    .filter(c => c.rhr_morning != null && c.rhr_morning > 0 && c.date <= targetDate)
    23	    .sort((a, b) => b.date.localeCompare(a.date)); // newest first
    24	
    25	  if (valid.length < 3) {
    26	    return { currentRhr: null, baselineRhr: null, deviationPercentage: null, isCnsOverloaded: false };
    27	  }
    28	
    29	  // Acute window: 3 most recent entries
    30	  const acute = valid.slice(0, 3);
    31	  const acuteAvg = acute.reduce((sum, r) => sum + (r.rhr_morning as number), 0) / acute.length;
    32	
    33	  // Baseline: 21 entries preceding the acute window
    34	  const baselineCandidates = valid.slice(3, 24); // up to 21 entries
    35	  if (baselineCandidates.length === 0) {
    36	    return { currentRhr: acuteAvg, baselineRhr: null, deviationPercentage: null, isCnsOverloaded: false };
    37	  }
    38	  const baselineAvg = baselineCandidates.reduce((sum, r) => sum + (r.rhr_morning as number), 0) / baselineCandidates.length;
    39	
    40	  const deviation = baselineAvg === 0 ? null : ((acuteAvg - baselineAvg) / baselineAvg) * 100;
    41	  const overloaded = deviation != null && deviation > OVERLOAD_THRESHOLD;
    42	
    43	  return {
    44	    currentRhr: Math.round(acuteAvg * 10) / 10,
    45	    baselineRhr: Math.round(baselineAvg * 10) / 10,
    46	    deviationPercentage: deviation != null ? Math.round(deviation * 10) / 10 : null,
    47	    isCnsOverloaded: overloaded,
    48	  };
    49	}

FILE: lib/coach/transformationScore.ts

     1	// ─── Types ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     2	
     3	export type TrainingGoal =
     4	  | 'fat_loss' | 'hypertrophy' | 'strength' | 'recomp'
     5	  | 'maintenance' | 'endurance' | 'athletic'
     6	
     7	export interface DimensionWeights {
     8	  adherence: number
     9	  recovery: number
    10	  bodyProgress: number
    11	  performance: number
    12	}
    13	
    14	export interface DimensionResult {
    15	  score: number       // 0–100
    16	  weight: number      // effective weight after redistribution
    17	  dataPoints: number
    18	}
    19	
    20	export interface BodyProgressResult extends DimensionResult {
    21	  confidence: 'high' | 'low' | 'none'
    22	}
    23	
    24	export interface TransformationAlert {
    25	  dimension: 'adherence' | 'recovery' | 'bodyProgress' | 'performance'
    26	  message: string
    27	  severity: 'low' | 'medium' | 'high'
    28	}
    29	
    30	export interface TransformationScoreResult {
    31	  score: number
    32	  label: string
    33	  window: 7 | 30
    34	  dimensions: {
    35	    adherence: DimensionResult
    36	    recovery: DimensionResult
    37	    bodyProgress: BodyProgressResult
    38	    performance: DimensionResult
    39	  }
    40	  alerts: TransformationAlert[]
    41	  weightsSource: 'default' | 'coach_override'
    42	  insufficientData: boolean
    43	}
    44	
    45	export interface CheckinSummaryInput {
    46	  field_averages: {
    47	    energy?: number | null
    48	    sleep_duration?: number | null
    49	    sleep_quality?: number | null
    50	    stress?: number | null
    51	    muscle_soreness?: number | null
    52	  }
    53	  response_rate: number | null  // 0–100
    54	  configured_days_count: number
    55	}
    56	
    57	export interface PerformanceSummaryInput {
    58	  analysis: {
    59	    exercises: {
    60	      completion_rate: number
    61	      avg_rir: number | null
    62	      overloads_last_4_weeks: number
    63	      stagnation: boolean
    64	      overreaching: boolean
    65	    }[]
    66	    global_overreaching: boolean
    67	  }
    68	  sessionsCount: number
    69	  weeklyFrequency: number
    70	}
    71	
    72	export interface BodyDataInput {
    73	  weightSeries: { date: string; value: number }[]
    74	  bodyFatSeries: { date: string; value: number }[]
    75	  leanMassSeries: { date: string; value: number }[]
    76	  trainingGoal: TrainingGoal
    77	}
    78	
    79	export interface ComputeScoreInput {
    80	  trainingGoal: TrainingGoal
    81	  window: 7 | 30
    82	  checkin: CheckinSummaryInput
    83	  performance: PerformanceSummaryInput
    84	  bodyData: BodyDataInput
    85	  weightsOverride: DimensionWeights | null
    86	  gender: 'male' | 'female' | string | null
    87	  latestBodyFat: number | null
    88	}
    89	
    90	// ─── Constants ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    91	
    92	export const DEFAULT_WEIGHTS: Record<TrainingGoal, DimensionWeights> = {
    93	  fat_loss:    { adherence: 0.30, recovery: 0.25, bodyProgress: 0.30, performance: 0.15 },
    94	  hypertrophy: { adherence: 0.25, recovery: 0.30, bodyProgress: 0.20, performance: 0.25 },
    95	  strength:    { adherence: 0.25, recovery: 0.25, bodyProgress: 0.15, performance: 0.35 },
    96	  recomp:      { adherence: 0.30, recovery: 0.25, bodyProgress: 0.25, performance: 0.20 },
    97	  maintenance: { adherence: 0.35, recovery: 0.30, bodyProgress: 0.20, performance: 0.15 },
    98	  endurance:   { adherence: 0.25, recovery: 0.35, bodyProgress: 0.10, performance: 0.30 },
    99	  athletic:    { adherence: 0.25, recovery: 0.30, bodyProgress: 0.15, performance: 0.30 },
   100	}
   101	
   102	// ─── Label ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   103	
   104	export function getScoreLabel(score: number): string {
   105	  if (score < 25) return 'En difficulté'
   106	  if (score < 50) return 'En progression'
   107	  if (score < 75) return 'Sur la bonne voie'
   108	  if (score < 90) return 'Haute performance'
   109	  return 'Potentiel maximal'
   110	}
   111	
   112	// ─── Weight redistribution ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   113	
   114	function redistributeWeights(
   115	  weights: DimensionWeights,
   116	  insufficient: (keyof DimensionWeights)[]
   117	): DimensionWeights {
   118	  if (insufficient.length === 0) return weights
   119	  const excl = new Set(insufficient)
   120	  const removedWeight = insufficient.reduce((s, k) => s + weights[k], 0)
   121	  const remaining = 1 - removedWeight
   122	  if (remaining <= 0) {
   123	    return { adherence: 0.25, recovery: 0.25, bodyProgress: 0.25, performance: 0.25 }
   124	  }
   125	  const result = { ...weights }
   126	  for (const k of insufficient) result[k] = 0
   127	  for (const k of Object.keys(weights) as (keyof DimensionWeights)[]) {
   128	    if (!excl.has(k)) result[k] = weights[k] / remaining
   129	  }
   130	  return result
   131	}
   132	
   133	// ─── Recovery normalization ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
   134	
   135	function normalizeRecovery(avgs: CheckinSummaryInput['field_averages']): { score: number; dataPoints: number } {
   136	  const scores: number[] = []
   137	
   138	  if (avgs.energy != null) scores.push((avgs.energy - 1) / 4)
   139	  if (avgs.sleep_quality != null) scores.push((avgs.sleep_quality - 1) / 4)
   140	  if (avgs.sleep_duration != null) {
   141	    const h = avgs.sleep_duration
   142	    let s: number
   143	    if (h < 5) s = 0.1
   144	    else if (h < 6) s = 0.2 + (h - 5) * 0.15
   145	    else if (h < 7) s = 0.35 + (h - 6) * 0.3
   146	    else if (h <= 9) s = 1.0
   147	    else s = Math.max(0.6, 1.0 - (h - 9) * 0.2)
   148	    scores.push(s)
   149	  }
   150	  if (avgs.stress != null) scores.push((5 - avgs.stress) / 4)
   151	  if (avgs.muscle_soreness != null) scores.push((5 - avgs.muscle_soreness) / 4)
   152	
   153	  if (scores.length === 0) return { score: 0, dataPoints: 0 }
   154	  const avg = scores.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / scores.length
   155	  return { score: Math.round(avg * 100), dataPoints: scores.length }
   156	}
   157	
   158	// ─── Adherence normalization ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
   159	
   160	function normalizeAdherence(
   161	  checkin: CheckinSummaryInput,
   162	  sessionsCount: number,
   163	  weeklyFrequency: number,
   164	  windowDays: number
   165	): { score: number; dataPoints: number } {
   166	  const scores: number[] = []
   167	
   168	  if (checkin.response_rate != null) {
   169	    scores.push(checkin.response_rate / 100)
   170	  }
   171	
   172	  const targetSessions = weeklyFrequency * (windowDays / 7)
   173	  if (targetSessions > 0) {
   174	    scores.push(Math.min(sessionsCount / targetSessions, 1))
   175	  }
   176	
   177	  if (scores.length === 0) return { score: 0, dataPoints: 0 }
   178	  const avg = scores.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / scores.length
   179	  return { score: Math.round(avg * 100), dataPoints: scores.length }
   180	}
   181	
   182	// ─── Body progress normalization ──────────────────────────────────────────────
   183	
   184	function linRegSlope(series: { date: string; value: number }[]): number {
   185	  if (series.length < 2) return 0
   186	  const n = series.length
   187	  const ys = series.map(p => p.value)
   188	  const xs = series.map((_, i) => i)
   189	  const sumX = xs.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0)
   190	  const sumY = ys.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0)
   191	  const sumXY = xs.reduce((s, x, i) => s + x * ys[i], 0)
   192	  const sumX2 = xs.reduce((s, x) => s + x * x, 0)
   193	  const denom = n * sumX2 - sumX * sumX
   194	  return denom === 0 ? 0 : (n * sumXY - sumX * sumY) / denom
   195	}
   196	
   197	type TrendDirection = 'down' | 'up' | 'stable'
   198	
   199	const GOAL_WEIGHT_DIRECTION: Record<TrainingGoal, TrendDirection> = {
   200	  fat_loss:    'down',
   201	  hypertrophy: 'up',
   202	  strength:    'up',
   203	  recomp:      'stable',
   204	  maintenance: 'stable',
   205	  endurance:   'stable',
   206	  athletic:    'stable',
   207	}
   208	
   209	function slopeToScore(slope: number, direction: TrendDirection): number {
   210	  if (direction === 'down') {
   211	    if (slope <= -0.5) return 1
   212	    if (slope <= -0.2) return 0.8
   213	    if (slope < 0)     return 0.6
   214	    if (slope < 0.2)   return 0.4
   215	    return Math.max(0, 0.4 - (slope - 0.2) * 0.5)
   216	  }
   217	  if (direction === 'up') {
   218	    if (slope >= 0.5)  return 1
   219	    if (slope >= 0.2)  return 0.8
   220	    if (slope > 0)     return 0.6
   221	    if (slope > -0.2)  return 0.4
   222	    return Math.max(0, 0.4 + (slope + 0.2) * 0.5)
   223	  }
   224	  // stable
   225	  return Math.max(0, 1 - Math.abs(slope) * 2)
   226	}
   227	
   228	type RawBodyResult = { score: number; dataPoints: number; confidence: 'high' | 'low' | 'none' }
   229	
   230	function normalizeBodyProgress(data: BodyDataInput): RawBodyResult {
   231	  const { weightSeries, bodyFatSeries, leanMassSeries, trainingGoal } = data
   232	
   233	  if (weightSeries.length < 2) {
   234	    return { score: 50, dataPoints: 0, confidence: 'none' }
   235	  }
   236	
   237	  const scores: number[] = []
   238	  let confidence: 'high' | 'low' | 'none' = 'low'
   239	
   240	  const weightSlope = linRegSlope(weightSeries)
   241	  scores.push(slopeToScore(weightSlope, GOAL_WEIGHT_DIRECTION[trainingGoal]))
   242	
   243	  if (bodyFatSeries.length >= 2) {
   244	    confidence = 'high'
   245	    scores.push(slopeToScore(linRegSlope(bodyFatSeries), 'down'))
   246	  }
   247	  if (leanMassSeries.length >= 2) {
   248	    confidence = 'high'
   249	    scores.push(slopeToScore(linRegSlope(leanMassSeries), 'up'))
   250	  }
   251	
   252	  const avg = scores.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / scores.length
   253	  return { score: Math.round(avg * 100), dataPoints: weightSeries.length, confidence }
   254	}
   255	
   256	// ─── Performance normalization ────────────────────────────────────────────────
   257	
   258	function normalizePerformance(
   259	  input: PerformanceSummaryInput
   260	): { score: number; dataPoints: number } {

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: lib/cycle/cycleEngine.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	import type { CyclePhase } from '@/lib/nutrition/engine/cycleSync'
     2	
     3	export type { CyclePhase }
     4	
     5	export interface CycleLog {
     6	  period_start_date: string
     7	  period_end_date: string | null
     8	  computed_cycle_length_days: number | null
     9	}
    10	
    11	export interface CycleState {
    12	  hasActiveCycle: boolean
    13	  currentPhase: CyclePhase | null
    14	  currentCycleDay: number | null
    15	  avgCycleLengthDays: number
    16	  menstrualPhaseLengthDays: number
    17	  nextPhaseIn: number | null
    18	  lastPeriodDate: string | null
    19	  logsCount: number
    20	  confidence: 'estimated' | 'learning' | 'calibrated'
    21	}
    22	
    23	const NO_CYCLE_BILAN_VALUES = ['Ménopause / Aménorrhée', 'Non applicable']
    24	
    25	export function hasActiveCycleFromBilan(bilanValue: string | null): boolean {
    26	  if (!bilanValue) return true
    27	  return !NO_CYCLE_BILAN_VALUES.includes(bilanValue)
    28	}
    29	
    30	export function computeAvgCycleLength(logs: CycleLog[]): number {
    31	  const valid = logs
    32	    .map(l => l.computed_cycle_length_days)
    33	    .filter((n): n is number => n !== null && n >= 21 && n <= 35)
    34	  if (valid.length === 0) return 28
    35	  return Math.round(valid.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / valid.length)
    36	}
    37	
    38	export function computeAvgMenstrualLength(logs: CycleLog[]): number {
    39	  const durations = logs
    40	    .filter(l => l.period_end_date !== null)
    41	    .map(l => {
    42	      const start = new Date(l.period_start_date)
    43	      const end = new Date(l.period_end_date!)
    44	      return Math.round((end.getTime() - start.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24))
    45	    })
    46	    .filter(d => d >= 1 && d <= 14)
    47	  if (durations.length === 0) return 5
    48	  return Math.round(durations.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / durations.length)
    49	}
    50	
    51	export function computeCurrentCycleDay(
    52	  lastPeriodStartDate: string,
    53	  avgCycleLength: number,
    54	  today: Date = new Date(),
    55	): number {
    56	  const start = new Date(lastPeriodStartDate)
    57	  const t = new Date(today)
    58	  t.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)
    59	  start.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)
    60	  const diffDays = Math.floor((t.getTime() - start.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24))
    61	  return (diffDays % avgCycleLength) + 1
    62	}
    63	
    64	export function detectPhase(
    65	  cycleDay: number,
    66	  avgCycleLength: number,
    67	  menstrualLength: number,
    68	): CyclePhase {
    69	  if (cycleDay <= menstrualLength) return 'menstrual'
    70	  const ovulationDay = Math.floor(avgCycleLength / 2)
    71	  if (cycleDay < ovulationDay) return 'follicular'
    72	  if (cycleDay <= ovulationDay + 1) return 'ovulatory'
    73	  return 'luteal'
    74	}
    75	
    76	export function computeNextPhaseIn(
    77	  cycleDay: number,
    78	  phase: CyclePhase,
    79	  avgCycleLength: number,
    80	  menstrualLength: number,
    81	): number {
    82	  const ovulationDay = Math.floor(avgCycleLength / 2)
    83	  switch (phase) {
    84	    case 'menstrual':  return Math.max(1, menstrualLength - cycleDay + 1)
    85	    case 'follicular': return Math.max(1, ovulationDay - cycleDay)
    86	    case 'ovulatory':  return Math.max(1, ovulationDay + 2 - cycleDay)
    87	    case 'luteal':     return Math.max(1, avgCycleLength - cycleDay + 1)
    88	  }
    89	}
    90	
    91	const BILAN_ESTIMATE_DAY: Record<string, number> = {
    92	  'Phase folliculaire (J1–J13)': 7,
    93	  'Ovulation (J14)': 14,
    94	  'Phase lutéale (J15–J28)': 21,
    95	  'Règles': 1,
    96	}
    97	
    98	export function getCycleStateFromLogs(
    99	  logs: CycleLog[],
   100	  bilanValue: string | null,
   101	  today: Date = new Date(),
   102	): CycleState {
   103	  const hasActiveCycle = hasActiveCycleFromBilan(bilanValue)
   104	
   105	  if (!hasActiveCycle) {
   106	    return {
   107	      hasActiveCycle: false,
   108	      currentPhase: null,
   109	      currentCycleDay: null,
   110	      avgCycleLengthDays: 28,
   111	      menstrualPhaseLengthDays: 5,
   112	      nextPhaseIn: null,
   113	      lastPeriodDate: null,
   114	      logsCount: 0,
   115	      confidence: 'estimated',
   116	    }
   117	  }
   118	
   119	  const avgCycleLength = computeAvgCycleLength(logs)
   120	  const menstrualLength = computeAvgMenstrualLength(logs)
   121	  const logsCount = logs.length
   122	  const confidence: CycleState['confidence'] =
   123	    logsCount >= 4 ? 'calibrated' : logsCount >= 1 ? 'learning' : 'estimated'
   124	
   125	  if (logsCount === 0) {
   126	    const estimatedDay = bilanValue ? (BILAN_ESTIMATE_DAY[bilanValue] ?? null) : null
   127	    if (!estimatedDay) {
   128	      return {
   129	        hasActiveCycle: true,
   130	        currentPhase: null,
   131	        currentCycleDay: null,
   132	        avgCycleLengthDays: 28,
   133	        menstrualPhaseLengthDays: 5,
   134	        nextPhaseIn: null,
   135	        lastPeriodDate: null,
   136	        logsCount: 0,
   137	        confidence: 'estimated',
   138	      }
   139	    }
   140	    const phase = detectPhase(estimatedDay, 28, 5)
   141	    return {
   142	      hasActiveCycle: true,
   143	      currentPhase: phase,
   144	      currentCycleDay: estimatedDay,
   145	      avgCycleLengthDays: 28,
   146	      menstrualPhaseLengthDays: 5,
   147	      nextPhaseIn: computeNextPhaseIn(estimatedDay, phase, 28, 5),
   148	      lastPeriodDate: null,
   149	      logsCount: 0,
   150	      confidence: 'estimated',
   151	    }
   152	  }
   153	
   154	  const lastLog = logs[0]
   155	  const currentCycleDay = computeCurrentCycleDay(lastLog.period_start_date, avgCycleLength, today)
   156	  const currentPhase = detectPhase(currentCycleDay, avgCycleLength, menstrualLength)
   157	
   158	  return {
   159	    hasActiveCycle: true,
   160	    currentPhase,
   161	    currentCycleDay,
   162	    avgCycleLengthDays: avgCycleLength,
   163	    menstrualPhaseLengthDays: menstrualLength,
   164	    nextPhaseIn: computeNextPhaseIn(currentCycleDay, currentPhase, avgCycleLength, menstrualLength),
   165	    lastPeriodDate: lastLog.period_start_date,
   166	    logsCount,
   167	    confidence,
   168	  }
   169	}

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: lib/formulas/brzycki.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	// ============================================================
     2	// lib/formulas/brzycki.ts
     3	// Brzycki 1RM formula for estimating maximum strength
     4	// ============================================================
     5	
     6	import { FormulaResult, FORMULA_VERSIONS, CONFIDENCE_MARGINS } from "./types";
     7	import { validateBrzycki1RM, throwIfInvalid } from "./validators";
     8	
     9	/**
    10	 * Input interface for Brzycki 1RM calculation
    11	 */
    12	export interface Brzycki1RMInput {
    13	  weight: number; // kg
    14	  reps: number; // 1-37 reps (valid range for Brzycki)
    15	  equipment?: "barbell" | "dumbbell" | "machine";
    16	}
    17	
    18	/**
    19	 * Training zone for strength development
    20	 */
    21	export interface TrainingZone {
    22	  zone: string; // e.g., "Strength (90%)"
    23	  percentageOfMax: number; // 50-100
    24	  repsRange: [number, number]; // [minReps, maxReps]
    25	  objective: string; // e.g., "Max Strength"
    26	  intensity: number; // Same as percentageOfMax
    27	}
    28	
    29	/**
    30	 * Output of Brzycki 1RM calculation
    31	 */
    32	export interface Brzycki1RMOutput extends FormulaResult {
    33	  oneRM: number; // kg, rounded to 0.5 kg
    34	  zones: TrainingZone[];
    35	  formula: "Brzycki";
    36	}
    37	
    38	/**
    39	 * Calculate 1RM using Brzycki formula
    40	 * Formula: 1RM = weight / (1.0278 - 0.0278 × reps)
    41	 *
    42	 * Accuracy: ±15% for 1-10 reps, degrades beyond
    43	 * Valid range: 1-37 reps (loses accuracy beyond 37)
    44	 *
    45	 * Example:
    46	 *   calculate1RMBrzycki({ weight: 100, reps: 5 })
    47	 *   → { oneRM: 113.6, zones: [...], formula: 'Brzycki', ... }
    48	 */
    49	export function calculate1RMBrzycki(input: Brzycki1RMInput): Brzycki1RMOutput {
    50	  // Validate input
    51	  const validation = validateBrzycki1RM(input);
    52	  throwIfInvalid(validation, "Brzycki 1RM");
    53	
    54	  const { weight, reps } = input;
    55	
    56	  // Apply Brzycki formula
    57	  const oneRMRaw = weight / (1.0278 - 0.0278 * reps);
    58	
    59	  // Round to 0.5 kg
    60	  const oneRM = Math.round(oneRMRaw * 2) / 2;
    61	
    62	  // Calculate training zones based on 1RM
    63	  const zones = calculateTrainingZones(oneRM);
    64	
    65	  // Get confidence margin based on rep range
    66	  const confidence = CONFIDENCE_MARGINS.BRZYCKI_1RM(reps);
    67	
    68	  return {
    69	    oneRM,
    70	    zones,
    71	    formula: "Brzycki",
    72	    formulaVersion: FORMULA_VERSIONS.BRZYCKI_1RM,
    73	    calculatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    74	    confidence,
    75	  };
    76	}
    77	
    78	/**
    79	 * Calculate training zones based on 1RM
    80	 * Provides intensity recommendations for different training objectives
    81	 */
    82	function calculateTrainingZones(oneRM: number): TrainingZone[] {
    83	  return [
    84	    {
    85	      zone: "Max Strength (1RM)",
    86	      percentageOfMax: 100,
    87	      intensity: 100,
    88	      repsRange: [1, 1] as [number, number],
    89	      objective: "Maximum Strength - Single Attempt",
    90	    },
    91	    {
    92	      zone: "Heavy Strength (95%)",
    93	      percentageOfMax: 95,
    94	      intensity: 95,
    95	      repsRange: [2, 3] as [number, number],
    96	      objective: "Max Strength Development",
    97	    },
    98	    {
    99	      zone: "Strength (90%)",
   100	      percentageOfMax: 90,
   101	      intensity: 90,
   102	      repsRange: [3, 5],
   103	      objective: "Strength with Low Reps",
   104	    },
   105	    {
   106	      zone: "Strength-Hypertrophy (85%)",
   107	      percentageOfMax: 85,
   108	      intensity: 85,
   109	      repsRange: [5, 7],
   110	      objective: "Strength + Size",
   111	    },
   112	    {
   113	      zone: "Hypertrophy (80%)",
   114	      percentageOfMax: 80,
   115	      intensity: 80,
   116	      repsRange: [6, 10],
   117	      objective: "Muscle Growth - Primary",
   118	    },
   119	    {
   120	      zone: "Hypertrophy-Endurance (75%)",
   121	      percentageOfMax: 75,
   122	      intensity: 75,
   123	      repsRange: [8, 12],
   124	      objective: "Hypertrophy with Moderate Volume",
   125	    },
   126	    {
   127	      zone: "Muscular Endurance (70%)",
   128	      percentageOfMax: 70,
   129	      intensity: 70,
   130	      repsRange: [10, 15],
   131	      objective: "Work Capacity + Pump",
   132	    },
   133	    {
   134	      zone: "Endurance (65%)",
   135	      percentageOfMax: 65,
   136	      intensity: 65,
   137	      repsRange: [12, 20],
   138	      objective: "High Reps - Volume Focus",
   139	    },
   140	    {
   141	      zone: "Light Endurance (60%)",
   142	      percentageOfMax: 60,
   143	      intensity: 60,
   144	      repsRange: [15, 25],
   145	      objective: "Recovery + Conditioning",
   146	    },
   147	    {
   148	      zone: "Warm-up (50%)",
   149	      percentageOfMax: 50,
   150	      intensity: 50,
   151	      repsRange: [20, 30],
   152	      objective: "Technique + Warm-up",
   153	    },
   154	  ].map((zone) => ({
   155	    ...zone,
   156	    // Add calculated weight at each intensity
   157	    weight: Math.round(((oneRM * zone.percentageOfMax) / 100) * 2) / 2,
   158	  })) as unknown as TrainingZone[];
   159	}
   160	
   161	/**
   162	 * Verify if Brzycki formula is appropriate for given reps
   163	 * Returns false if reps > 37 (loses accuracy)
   164	 */
   165	export function isBrzyckiApplicable(reps: number): boolean {
   166	  return reps >= 1 && reps <= 37;
   167	}
   168	
   169	/**
   170	 * Get accuracy warning for given rep range
   171	 */
   172	export function getBrzyckiAccuracyWarning(reps: number): string | null {
   173	  if (reps <= 10) {
   174	    return null; // Good accuracy range
   175	  }
   176	
   177	  if (reps <= 37) {
   178	    const degradation = Math.round((reps - 10) * 1.5);
   179	    return `Accuracy degrades for high reps. Margin of error ~±${Math.min(degradation + 15, 40)}%`;
   180	  }
   181	
   182	  return "Brzycki formula not reliable beyond 37 reps. Consider using form-based assessment instead.";
   183	}

FILE: lib/formulas/macros.ts

     1	/**
     2	 * Macro Calculator — Forensic Metabolic Analysis v2
     3	 *
     4	 * Methodology stack (peer-reviewed sources) :
     5	 * ─ BMR       : Katch-McArdle (LBM-based) — Katch & McArdle 1975, MSSE
     6	 *               Mifflin-St Jeor fallback — Mifflin et al. 1990, AJCN
     7	 *               Measured BMR from impedance scale (priority)
     8	 * ─ LBM       : Boer formula — Boer 1984, Clin Physiol
     9	 *               Direct muscle mass from DEXA / InBody (priority)
    10	 * ─ NEAT      : Steps × 0.0005 × BW (Hall et al. 2012, NIDDK)
    11	 *               Occupation multiplier (Ainsworth MET compendium 2011)
    12	 *               Work-hours correction (forced sedentarism)
    13	 * ─ EAT       : MET-weighted by training type (Ainsworth 2011)
    14	 *               Tracker override if delta > 20% vs table
    15	 *               Cardio EAT computed separately (Swain & Franklin 2002)
    16	 * ─ TEF       : 10% of BMR — Westerterp 2004, Physiol Behav
    17	 * ─ Alcohol   : 7 kcal/g ethanol, TDEE addition (Lieber 1991, Hepatology)
    18	 * ─ Caffeine  : Metabolic stimulant +3–5% BMR correction (Dulloo et al. 1989, AJCN)
    19	 * ─ Menstrual : +150–200 kcal luteal phase (Webb 1986, Eur J Appl Physiol)
    20	 * ─ Visceral  : Risk stratification — IDF 2006, Despres 2001 NEJM
    21	 * ─ Deficit   : BF%-stratified (Helms et al. 2014, IJSNEM)
    22	 * ─ Protein   : LBM-based — Helms 2014, Morton 2018 (Br J Sports Med)
    23	 * ─ Fats min  : Gender-based minimum (Volek 2002, JSCR; Hamalainen 1984)
    24	 * ─ Recovery  : Stress × sleep adaptation (Dattilo 2011, Med Hyp)
    25	 */
    26	
    27	import type { NutritionDataQualitySummary } from "@/lib/nutrition/dataQuality";
    28	import {
    29	  buildNutritionDataQualityHeadline,
    30	  getNutritionDataConfidenceLabel,
    31	  getNutritionDataQualityIssues,
    32	} from "@/lib/nutrition/dataQualityPresentation";
    33	import type { NutritionDataMode } from "@/lib/nutrition/dataGovernance";
    34	
    35	export type MacroGoal   = 'deficit' | 'maintenance' | 'surplus';
    36	export type MacroGender = 'male' | 'female';
    37	export type OccupationLevel = 'sedentary' | 'light' | 'moderate' | 'active';
    38	
    39	export const OCCUPATION_MULTIPLIER: Record<OccupationLevel, number> = {
    40	  sedentary: 1.00,
    41	  light:     1.05,
    42	  moderate:  1.10,
    43	  active:    1.18,
    44	};
    45	
    46	// Training type MET coefficients — Ainsworth 2011 Compendium
    47	const TRAINING_TYPE_MET: Record<string, number> = {
    48	  'Musculation / Powerlifting': 5.0,
    49	  'Haltérophilie':              5.5,
    50	  'CrossFit / HIIT':            8.0,
    51	  'Bodybuilding / Physique':    5.0,
    52	  'Calisthenics':               5.0,
    53	  'Yoga / Pilates':             3.0,
    54	  'Sports collectifs':          7.0,
    55	  'Arts martiaux / Boxe':       7.5,
    56	  'Cardio modéré':              5.0,
    57	  'Cardio intense':             8.5,
    58	  'Natation':                   6.0,
    59	  'Cyclisme':                   7.5,
    60	  'Course à pied':              8.0,
    61	  'Autre':                      5.0,
    62	};
    63	
    64	// Cardio type MET — for separate cardio EAT computation
    65	const CARDIO_TYPE_MET: Record<string, number> = {
    66	  'Course à pied':      9.0,
    67	  'Vélo':               7.5,
    68	  'Natation':           7.0,
    69	  'Rameur':             7.0,
    70	  'Elliptique':         5.5,
    71	  'Marche rapide':      4.0,
    72	  'HIIT cardio':       10.0,
    73	  'Zone 2':             5.0,
    74	  'Autre':              6.0,
    75	};
    76	
    77	export interface MacroInput {
    78	  // ── Obligatoires ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    79	  weight:   number;      // kg 40–250
    80	  height:   number;      // cm 140–220
    81	  age:      number;      // ans 15–85
    82	  gender:   MacroGender;
    83	  goal:     MacroGoal;
    84	
    85	  // ── Biométrie enrichie ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
    86	  bodyFat?:          number;   // % BF mesuré
    87	  muscleMassKg?:     number;   // Masse musculaire kg (DEXA/InBody priority)
    88	  bmrKcalMeasured?:  number;   // BMR mesuré balance (1000–4000)
    89	  visceralFatLevel?: number;   // Niveau graisse viscérale (1–20, IDF seuil ≥ 10)
    90	
    91	  // ── Activité & NEAT ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    92	  steps?:                 number;  // Pas quotidiens
    93	  occupationMultiplier?:  number;  // 1.0–1.18 depuis occupation text
    94	  workHoursPerWeek?:      number;  // Heures travail sédentaire/semaine
    95	
    96	  // ── Entraînement & EAT ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
    97	  workouts?:                number;     // Séances muscu/semaine
    98	  sessionDurationMin?:      number;     // Durée session (min)
    99	  trainingCaloriesWeekly?:  number;     // Kcal tracker/semaine
   100	  trainingTypes?:           string[];   // Types d'entraînement
   101	
   102	  // ── Cardio EAT (séparé muscu) ────────────────────────────────────────────
   103	  cardioFrequency?:    number;    // Séances cardio/semaine
   104	  cardioDurationMin?:  number;    // Durée cardio moy (min)
   105	  cardioTypes?:        string[];  // Types de cardio
   106	
   107	  // ── Bien-être & récupération ──────────────────────────────────────────────
   108	  stressLevel?:         number;  // 1–10
   109	  sleepDurationH?:      number;  // Heures
   110	  sleepQuality?:        number;  // 1–5 (1=très mauvais, 5=excellent)
   111	  energyLevel?:         number;  // 1–10
   112	  recoveryScore?:       number;  // 1–10
   113	  postSessionRecovery?: number;  // 1–10
   114	
   115	  // ── Lifestyle & santé ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   116	  caffeineDaily?:     number;  // mg/jour
   117	  alcoholWeekly?:     number;  // verres standard/semaine (1 verre ≈ 14g éthanol)
   118	  menstrualPhase?:    'follicular' | 'luteal' | 'unknown';  // femmes seulement
   119	  dataQuality?:       NutritionDataQualitySummary | null;
   120	  dataMode?:          NutritionDataMode;
   121	}
   122	
   123	export interface MacroResult {
   124	  calories:      number;
   125	  tdee:          number;
   126	  tdeeGross:     number;   // TDEE avant ajustement alcool/caféine
   127	  leanMass:      number;
   128	  estimatedBF:   number;
   129	  macros:        { p: number; f: number; c: number };
   130	  ratios:        { p: number; f: number; c: number };  // g/kg LBM
   131	  ratiosByBW:    { p: number; f: number; c: number };  // g/kg bodyweight
   132	  percents:      { p: number; f: number; c: number };
   133	  breakdown: {
   134	    bmr:      number;
   135	    neat:     number;
   136	    eat:      number;
   137	    eatCardio: number;
   138	    tef:      number;
   139	    alcohol:  number;  // kcal alcool ajoutées au TDEE
   140	  };
   141	  adjustment:    number;
   142	
   143	  // ── Flags contextuels ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   144	  warnings:       string[];
   145	  contextFlags:   ContextFlag[];
   146	
   147	  // ── Provenance data ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   148	  dataProvenance: {
   149	    bmrSource:  'measured' | 'katch-mcardle' | 'mifflin';
   150	    lbmSource:  'measured' | 'boer' | 'body-fat';
   151	    eatSource:  'tracker' | 'duration-met' | 'table';
   152	    neatSource: 'steps' | 'activity-level';
   153	    cardioEatSource: 'duration-met' | 'none';
   154	  };
   155	
   156	  // ── Smart Protocol suggestions ────────────────────────────────────────────
   157	  smartProtocol: SmartProtocolSuggestion[];
   158	
   159	  // ── Recovery adaptation ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
   160	  recoveryAdaptation?: {
   161	    stressLevel:              number;
   162	    sleepDurationH:           number;
   163	    suggestedDeficitReduction: number;
   164	    reason:                   string;
   165	  };
   166	
   167	  // ── Corrections appliquées (transparence UI) ──────────────────────────────
   168	  corrections: CorrectionApplied[];
   169	  dataQuality?: NutritionDataQualitySummary | null;
   170	}
   171	
   172	export interface ContextFlag {
   173	  type:     'warning' | 'info' | 'danger' | 'success';
   174	  key:      string;
   175	  label:    string;
   176	  detail:   string;
   177	  source?:  string;  // référence scientifique
   178	}
   179	
   180	export interface SmartProtocolSuggestion {
   181	  id:          string;
   182	  priority:    'critical' | 'high' | 'medium' | 'low';
   183	  category:    'calories' | 'protein' | 'fats' | 'carbs' | 'timing' | 'recovery' | 'strategy';
   184	  title:       string;
   185	  rationale:   string;  // explication scientifique
   186	  action:      string;  // ce que le coach doit faire concrètement
   187	  source?:     string;
   188	}
   189	
   190	export interface CorrectionApplied {
   191	  field:  string;
   192	  label:  string;
   193	  value:  number;
   194	  unit:   string;
   195	  delta:  number;  // impact sur TDEE en kcal
   196	}
   197	
   198	export interface MacroValidationError {
   199	  field:   string;
   200	  message: string;
   201	}
   202	
   203	export function validateMacroInputs(input: Partial<MacroInput>): MacroValidationError[] {
   204	  const errors: MacroValidationError[] = [];
   205	  if (!input.weight || input.weight < 40 || input.weight > 250)
   206	    errors.push({ field: 'weight', message: 'Poids hors limites (40–250 kg)' });
   207	  if (!input.height || input.height < 140 || input.height > 220)
   208	    errors.push({ field: 'height', message: 'Taille hors limites (140–220 cm)' });
   209	  if (!input.age || input.age < 15 || input.age > 85)
   210	    errors.push({ field: 'age', message: 'Âge hors limites (15–85 ans)' });
   211	  return errors;
   212	}
   213	
   214	// ─── Formules internes ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   215	
   216	/** Boer 1984 — LBM estimation sans BF% */
   217	function boerLBM(weight: number, height: number, gender: MacroGender): number {
   218	  const lbm = gender === 'male'
   219	    ? 0.407 * weight + 0.267 * height - 19.2
   220	    : 0.252 * weight + 0.473 * height - 48.3;
   221	  return Math.max(weight * 0.5, Math.min(weight * 0.95, lbm));
   222	}
   223	
   224	/** Katch-McArdle 1975 + décrement âge */
   225	function katchMcArdleBMR(leanMass: number, age: number): number {
   226	  let bmr = 370 + 21.6 * leanMass;
   227	  if (age > 30) bmr *= (1 - Math.floor((age - 30) / 10) * 0.02);
   228	  return bmr;
   229	}
   230	
   231	/** Mifflin-St Jeor 1990 — fallback sans LBM */
   232	function mifflinBMR(weight: number, height: number, age: number, gender: MacroGender): number {
   233	  const base = 10 * weight + 6.25 * height - 5 * age;
   234	  return gender === 'male' ? base + 5 : base - 161;
   235	}
   236	
   237	/** EAT musculation par MET */
   238	function computeEATMuscu(weight: number, durationMin: number, weeklyWorkouts: number, types?: string[]): number {
   239	  const met = types && types.length > 0
   240	    ? types.reduce((s, t) => s + (TRAINING_TYPE_MET[t] ?? 5.0), 0) / types.length
   241	    : 5.0;
   242	  return (met * weight * durationMin / 60 * weeklyWorkouts) / 7;
   243	}
   244	
   245	/** EAT cardio séparé — Swain & Franklin 2002 */
   246	function computeEATCardio(weight: number, durationMin: number, weeklyCardio: number, types?: string[]): number {
   247	  const met = types && types.length > 0
   248	    ? types.reduce((s, t) => s + (CARDIO_TYPE_MET[t] ?? 6.0), 0) / types.length
   249	    : 6.0;
   250	  return (met * weight * durationMin / 60 * weeklyCardio) / 7;
   251	}
   252	
   253	const TRAINING_TABLE: Record<number, number> = {
   254	  0: 0, 1: 200, 2: 260, 3: 330, 4: 410, 5: 490, 6: 570, 7: 650,
   255	};
   256	
   257	// ─── Générateur Smart Protocol ────────────────────────────────────────────────
   258	
   259	function buildSmartProtocol(input: MacroInput, result: Omit<MacroResult, 'smartProtocol' | 'contextFlags' | 'warnings' | 'corrections'>): SmartProtocolSuggestion[] {
   260	  const suggestions: SmartProtocolSuggestion[] = [];

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: lib/health/bioNorms.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	/**
     2	 * bioNorms.ts — Normes physiologiques scientifiquement sourcées
     3	 *
     4	 * Module pur : zéro dépendances React, zéro Prisma, zéro imports externes.
     5	 * Toutes les normes sont codées en dur dans ce fichier.
     6	 *
     7	 * Sources : OMS, ACE, EFSA, Janssen et al., IOF, IDF, Kyle et al., Tanita
     8	 */
     9	
    10	import type { Sex } from './healthMath'
    11	
    12	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    13	// Types publics
    14	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    15	
    16	export type NormZone = 'optimal' | 'good' | 'average' | 'poor' | 'high_risk'
    17	
    18	export interface NormRange {
    19	  zone: NormZone
    20	  min: number | null   // null = pas de borne inférieure
    21	  max: number | null   // null = pas de borne supérieure
    22	  label_fr: string
    23	}
    24	
    25	export interface NormReference {
    26	  source: string        // ex: "Deurenberg et al., Int J Obes, 1991"
    27	  doi: string           // ex: "10.1038/sj.ijo.0800366" — sans URL, vérifiable sur doi.org
    28	  methodology: string
    29	}
    30	
    31	// Texte contextuel par zone — optionnellement différencié par sexe
    32	export type ZoneInsights = Partial<Record<NormZone, string | { male: string; female: string }>>
    33	
    34	export interface NormEvaluation {
    35	  metric_key: string
    36	  label_fr: string
    37	  unit: string
    38	  value: number
    39	  zone: NormZone
    40	  zone_label_fr: string
    41	  zone_color: string       // hex DS STRYVR
    42	  ranges: NormRange[]      // pour afficher la jauge complète
    43	  reference: NormReference
    44	  zone_insight: string     // texte personnalisé selon zone × sexe
    45	  is_critical: boolean     // true si zone === 'high_risk'
    46	}
    47	
    48	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    49	// Types internes
    50	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    51	
    52	type AgeGroup = '18-29' | '30-39' | '40-49' | '50-59' | '60+'
    53	type RangesBySexAge = Record<Sex, Record<AgeGroup, NormRange[]>>
    54	
    55	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    56	// Helpers internes
    57	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    58	
    59	function getAgeGroup(age: number): AgeGroup {
    60	  if (age < 30) return '18-29'
    61	  if (age < 40) return '30-39'
    62	  if (age < 50) return '40-49'
    63	  if (age < 60) return '50-59'
    64	  return '60+'
    65	}
    66	
    67	function findZone(value: number, ranges: NormRange[]): NormRange | null {
    68	  for (const range of ranges) {
    69	    const aboveMin = range.min === null || value >= range.min
    70	    const belowMax = range.max === null || value < range.max
    71	    if (aboveMin && belowMax) return range
    72	  }
    73	  return null
    74	}
    75	
    76	function zoneColor(zone: NormZone): string {
    77	  switch (zone) {
    78	    case 'optimal':   return '#1f8a65'
    79	    case 'good':      return '#84cc16'
    80	    case 'average':   return '#f59e0b'
    81	    case 'poor':      return '#f97316'
    82	    case 'high_risk': return '#ef4444'
    83	  }
    84	}
    85	
    86	function zoneLabelFr(zone: NormZone): string {
    87	  switch (zone) {
    88	    case 'optimal':   return 'Optimal'
    89	    case 'good':      return 'Bon'
    90	    case 'average':   return 'Moyen'
    91	    case 'poor':      return 'Faible'
    92	    case 'high_risk': return 'Risque élevé'
    93	  }
    94	}
    95

   226	  high_risk: {
   227	    male: "Taux de masse grasse en zone critique — soit un déficit adipeux dangereux (risque hormonal, immunitaire, osseux), soit une obésité sévère avec risque cardiovasculaire et métabolique élevé.",
   228	    female: "Taux de masse grasse en zone critique. Chez la femme, un déficit adipeux (<13%) perturbe les fonctions hormonales et reproductives. Un excès sévère augmente le risque cardiovasculaire et métabolique.",
   229	  },
   230	  optimal: {
   231	    male: "Taux de masse grasse dans la fourchette athlétique à saine. Favorable à la sensibilité à l'insuline, aux performances physiques et à la longévité métabolique.",
   232	    female: "Taux de masse grasse dans la fourchette saine. Les femmes ont physiologiquement besoin d'un taux de graisse essentielle plus élevé que les hommes — cette zone est bien adaptée.",
   233	  },
   234	  good: {
   235	    male: "Bon niveau de masse grasse — légèrement au-dessus de l'optimal athlétique, mais sans risque métabolique significatif.",
   236	    female: "Bon niveau de masse grasse. Légèrement au-dessus de l'optimal mais dans des limites saines.",
   237	  },
   238	  average: {
   239	    male: "Taux moyen pour la population générale masculine. Pas de risque immédiat, mais une réduction modérée favoriserait la santé métabolique et les performances.",
   240	    female: "Taux moyen pour la population générale féminine. Une attention à l'alimentation et à l'activité physique permettrait d'optimiser ce chiffre.",
   241	  },
   242	  poor: {
   243	    male: "Taux de masse grasse élevé. Augmentation du risque d'insulinorésistance, hypertension et inflammation chronique. Priorité : déficit calorique modéré + entraînement en résistance.",
   244	    female: "Taux de masse grasse élevé. Augmente le risque de syndrome métabolique et de déséquilibres hormonaux. Une approche combinant nutrition et activité physique est recommandée.",
   245	  },
   246	}
