------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: lib/health/healthMath.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	/**
     2	 * healthMath.ts — Source de vérité mathématique pour les métriques biométriques
     3	 *
     4	 * Module pur : zéro dépendances React, zéro Prisma, zéro imports externes.
     5	 * Toutes les valeurs numériques sont arrondies à 1 décimale.
     6	 *
     7	 * Références :
     8	 *   BMI : WHO/CDC standard (kg/m²)
     9	 *   US Navy : Hodgdon & Beckett 1984 (Naval Health Research Center Report No. 84-29)
    10	 *   Siri conversion : Siri 1961
    11	 */
    12	
    13	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    14	// Types
    15	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    16	
    17	export type Sex = 'male' | 'female'
    18	
    19	export interface BiometricInputs {
    20	  // Obligatoires
    21	  weight_kg: number
    22	  height_cm: number
    23	  age_at_measurement?: number       // calculé externe (depuis bilan_date - date_of_birth)
    24	  sex: Sex
    25	
    26	  // Composition corporelle — bi-directionnels (tous optionnels)
    27	  body_fat_pct?: number
    28	  fat_mass_kg?: number
    29	  muscle_mass_kg?: number
    30	  muscle_mass_pct?: number
    31	  skeletal_muscle_pct?: number
    32	
    33	  // Balance impédancemétrie (optionnels)
    34	  visceral_fat_level?: number       // 1–30 (échelle Tanita)
    35	  body_water_pct?: number
    36	  bone_mass_kg?: number
    37	
    38	  // Mensurations pour Navy fallback (optionnels)
    39	  waist_cm?: number
    40	  neck_cm?: number
    41	  hips_cm?: number                  // femme uniquement
    42	
    43	  // Âge métabolique — fourni par balance impédancemétrique (optionnel)
    44	  metabolic_age?: number
    45	}
    46	
    47	export interface NavySuggestion {
    48	  estimated_body_fat_pct: number
    49	  method: 'us-navy'
    50	  precision: '±3-5%'
    51	  inputs_used: Array<'waist' | 'neck' | 'hips'>
    52	}
    53	
    54	export interface DerivedMetrics {
    55	  bmi: number
    56	  fat_mass_kg: number | null
    57	  lean_mass_kg: number | null
    58	  body_fat_pct: number | null
    59	  muscle_mass_kg: number | null
    60	  muscle_mass_pct: number | null
    61	  skeletal_muscle_pct: number | null
    62	  waist_height_ratio: number | null
    63	  waist_hip_ratio: number | null
    64	  visceral_fat_level: number | null
    65	  body_water_pct: number | null
    66	  bone_mass_kg: number | null
    67	  metabolic_age_estimated: number | null
    68	  metabolic_age_source: 'measured' | 'estimated_katch' | 'estimated_mifflin' | 'unavailable'
    69	
    70	  body_fat_source: 'measured' | 'unavailable'
    71	  muscle_mass_source: 'measured_kg' | 'measured_pct' | 'unavailable'
    72	
    73	  navy_suggestion: NavySuggestion | null
    74	}
    75	
    76	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    77	// Utilitaire interne
    78	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    79	
    80	export function round1(value: number): number {
    81	  return Math.round(value * 10) / 10
    82	}
    83	
    84	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    85	// Formules de dérivation — affichées dans les badges "Calculé" de BioNormsPanel
    86	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    87	
    88	export const DERIVED_FORMULAS: Partial<Record<string, string>> = {
    89	  bmi:                 'poids ÷ taille²',
    90	  fat_mass_kg:         'poids × (BF% ÷ 100)',
    91	  lean_mass_kg:        'poids × (1 − BF% ÷ 100)',
    92	  body_fat_pct:        'masse grasse ÷ poids × 100',
    93	  muscle_mass_kg:      'poids × (muscle% ÷ 100)',
    94	  muscle_mass_pct:     'masse musculaire ÷ poids × 100',
    95	  waist_height_ratio:  'tour de taille ÷ taille',
    96	  waist_hip_ratio:     'tour de taille ÷ tour de hanche',
    97	  metabolic_age_delta: 'BMR estimé → âge métabolique (Katch-McArdle / Mifflin)',
    98	}
    99	
   100	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   101	// Fonctions exportées
   102	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   103	
   104	/** Calcul BMI — formule standard WHO (kg/m²), arrondi 1 décimale */
   105	export function calculateBMI(weight_kg: number, height_cm: number): number {
   106	  if (height_cm <= 0) return NaN
   107	  const height_m = height_cm / 100
   108	  return round1(weight_kg / (height_m * height_m))
   109	}
   110	
   111	/** Masse grasse en kg depuis le pourcentage */
   112	export function fatMassFromPct(weight_kg: number, body_fat_pct: number): number {
   113	  return round1(weight_kg * (body_fat_pct / 100))
   114	}
   115	
   116	/** Pourcentage de masse grasse depuis la masse en kg */
   117	export function bodyFatPctFromMass(weight_kg: number, fat_mass_kg: number): number {
   118	  if (weight_kg <= 0) return NaN
   119	  return round1((fat_mass_kg / weight_kg) * 100)
   120	}
   121	
   122	/** Pourcentage de masse musculaire depuis la masse en kg */
   123	export function musclePctFromKg(weight_kg: number, muscle_mass_kg: number): number {
   124	  if (weight_kg <= 0) return NaN
   125	  return round1((muscle_mass_kg / weight_kg) * 100)
   126	}
   127	
   128	/** Masse musculaire en kg depuis le pourcentage */
   129	export function muscleKgFromPct(weight_kg: number, muscle_mass_pct: number): number {
   130	  if (weight_kg <= 0) return NaN
   131	  return round1(weight_kg * (muscle_mass_pct / 100))
   132	}
   133	
   134	/**
   135	 * Méthode Navy (Hodgdon & Beckett 1984) — retourne %MG
   136	 *
   137	 * Homme  : density = 1.0324 - 0.19077×log10(waist-neck) + 0.15456×log10(height)
   138	 * Femme  : density = 1.29579 - 0.35004×log10(waist+hips-neck) + 0.22100×log10(height)
   139	 * Siri 1961 : BF% = (495/density) - 450
   140	 *
   141	 * Coefficients from NHRC Report 84-29, Table 2, p.14
   142	 * Retourne NaN si hips_cm absent pour une femme ou si log10 reçoit un argument <= 0.
   143	 */
   144	export function navyBodyFatPct(
   145	  sex: Sex,
   146	  waist_cm: number,
   147	  neck_cm: number,
   148	  height_cm: number,
   149	  hips_cm?: number,
   150	): number {
   151	  let density: number
   152	
   153	  if (sex === 'male') {
   154	    if (waist_cm - neck_cm <= 0) return NaN
   155	    density =
   156	      1.0324
   157	      - 0.19077 * Math.log10(waist_cm - neck_cm)
   158	      + 0.15456 * Math.log10(height_cm)
   159	  } else {
   160	    if (hips_cm === undefined) {
   161	      return NaN
   162	    }
   163	    if (waist_cm + hips_cm - neck_cm <= 0) return NaN
   164	    density =
   165	      1.29579
   166	      - 0.35004 * Math.log10(waist_cm + hips_cm - neck_cm)
   167	      + 0.22100 * Math.log10(height_cm)
   168	  }
   169	
   170	  return round1((495 / density) - 450)
   171	}
   172	
   173	/**
   174	 * Ratio taille/hauteur — Savva et al. 2010
   175	 * Seuil critique universel : 0.5 (indépendant du sexe et de l'âge)
   176	 */
   177	export function calculateWaistHeightRatio(waist_cm: number, height_cm: number): number {
   178	  if (height_cm <= 0) return NaN
   179	  return Math.round((waist_cm / height_cm) * 1000) / 1000  // 3 décimales
   180	}
   181	
   182	/**
   183	 * BMR via Katch-McArdle (1975) — nécessite lean_mass_kg
   184	 * BMR = 370 + (21.6 × lean_mass_kg)
   185	 */
   186	function bmrKatchMcArdle(lean_mass_kg: number): number {
   187	  return 370 + 21.6 * lean_mass_kg
   188	}
   189	
   190	/**
   191	 * BMR via Mifflin-St Jeor (1990) — fallback sans composition corporelle
   192	 * Homme  : BMR = 10×poids + 6.25×taille - 5×âge + 5
   193	 * Femme  : BMR = 10×poids + 6.25×taille - 5×âge - 161
   194	 */
   195	function bmrMifflinStJeor(weight_kg: number, height_cm: number, age: number, sex: Sex): number {
   196	  const base = 10 * weight_kg + 6.25 * height_cm - 5 * age
   197	  return sex === 'male' ? base + 5 : base - 161
   198	}
   199	
   200	/**
   201	 * BMR moyen de référence pour un individu du même sexe au même âge
   202	 * basé sur des percentiles NHANES (Harris-Benedict population data).
   203	 * Retourne le BMR médian attendu pour calibrage de l'âge métabolique.
   204	 */
   205	function referenceBMRForAge(age: number, sex: Sex): number {
   206	  // Référence : adulte moyen 70kg/175cm (homme) ou 60kg/163cm (femme)
   207	  if (sex === 'male') {
   208	    return bmrMifflinStJeor(70, 175, age, 'male')
   209	  } else {
   210	    return bmrMifflinStJeor(60, 163, age, 'female')
   211	  }
   212	}
   213	
   214	/**
   215	 * Estime l'âge métabolique depuis le BMR calculé.
   216	 *
   217	 * Principe : on cherche l'âge X tel que referenceBMRForAge(X, sex) ≈ bmrActuel
   218	 * On résout par recherche linéaire dans [10, 90].
   219	 *
   220	 * Source méthode : Tanita / InBody reference methodology
   221	 */
   222	export function estimateMetabolicAge(
   223	  bmrActual: number,
   224	  sex: Sex,
   225	): number {
   226	  let closestAge = 30
   227	  let closestDiff = Infinity
   228	
   229	  for (let age = 10; age <= 90; age++) {
   230	    const diff = Math.abs(referenceBMRForAge(age, sex) - bmrActual)
   231	    if (diff < closestDiff) {
   232	      closestDiff = diff
   233	      closestAge = age
   234	    }
   235	  }
   236	
   237	  return closestAge
   238	}
   239	
   240	/**
   241	 * Dérive toutes les métriques biométriques depuis les inputs.
   242	 *
   243	 * Règles de priorité :
   244	 *   body_fat_pct > fat_mass_kg > Navy fallback (suggestion uniquement, non appliqué)
   245	 *   muscle_mass_kg + muscle_mass_pct (directs) > muscle_mass_kg seul > muscle_mass_pct seul
   246	 *   skeletal_muscle_pct : valeur directe balance, jamais calculée
   247	 */
   248	export function deriveMetrics(inputs: BiometricInputs): DerivedMetrics {
   249	  const {
   250	    weight_kg,
   251	    height_cm,
   252	    sex,
   253	    body_fat_pct: inputBfPct,
   254	    fat_mass_kg: inputFatMassKg,
   255	    muscle_mass_kg: inputMuscleMassKg,
   256	    muscle_mass_pct: inputMuscleMassPct,
   257	    waist_cm,
   258	    neck_cm,
   259	    hips_cm,
   260	  } = inputs

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: lib/health/useBiometrics.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	'use client'
     2	
     3	import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react'
     4	import { createClient } from '@/utils/supabase/client'
     5	import { deriveMetrics, DERIVED_FORMULAS, type BiometricInputs, type DerivedMetrics, type NavySuggestion } from './healthMath'
     6	import { evaluateAll, type NormEvaluation } from './bioNorms'
     7	
     8	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
     9	// Types
    10	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    11	
    12	interface ClientProfile {
    13	  date_of_birth?: string | null
    14	  sex?: string | null
    15	}
    16	
    17	export type MetricSource = {
    18	  type: 'measured' | 'derived'
    19	  date: string       // YYYY-MM-DD
    20	  formula?: string   // only when type === 'derived'
    21	}
    22	
    23	interface UseBiometricsReturn {
    24	  derived: DerivedMetrics | null
    25	  evaluations: NormEvaluation[]
    26	  criticalAlerts: NormEvaluation[]
    27	  navySuggestion: NavySuggestion | null
    28	  metricSources: Record<string, MetricSource>
    29	  loading: boolean
    30	  error: string | null
    31	  applyNavySuggestion: () => Promise<void>
    32	  refetch: () => Promise<void>
    33	}
    34	
    35	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    36	// Helpers
    37	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    38	
    39	function normalizeSex(sex: string | null | undefined): 'male' | 'female' | undefined {
    40	  if (!sex) return undefined
    41	  const s = sex.toLowerCase()
    42	  if (s === 'male' || s === 'm' || s === 'homme') return 'male'
    43	  if (s === 'female' || s === 'f' || s === 'femme') return 'female'
    44	  return undefined
    45	}
    46	
    47	function calculateAge(dateOfBirth: string, referenceDate: string): number {
    48	  const dob = new Date(dateOfBirth)
    49	  const ref = new Date(referenceDate)
    50	  let age = ref.getFullYear() - dob.getFullYear()
    51	  const monthDiff = ref.getMonth() - dob.getMonth()
    52	  if (monthDiff < 0 || (monthDiff === 0 && ref.getDate() < dob.getDate())) {
    53	    age--
    54	  }
    55	  return age
    56	}
    57	
    58	/** Most recent date among the given field keys in latestMeasured */
    59	function latestDateAmong(
    60	  keys: string[],
    61	  latestMeasured: Record<string, { value: number; date: string }>,
    62	): string {
    63	  return keys
    64	    .map(k => latestMeasured[k]?.date)
    65	    .filter((d): d is string => !!d)
    66	    .sort()
    67	    .reverse()[0] ?? new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]
    68	}
    69	
    70	/** Build metricSources from latestMeasured + derived output */
    71	function buildMetricSources(
    72	  latestMeasured: Record<string, { value: number; date: string }>,
    73	  derived: DerivedMetrics,
    74	): Record<string, MetricSource> {
    75	  const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]
    76	  const sources: Record<string, MetricSource> = {}
    77	
    78	  function measuredSource(fieldKey: string): MetricSource | null {
    79	    const m = latestMeasured[fieldKey]
    80	    if (!m) return null
    81	    return { type: 'measured', date: m.date }
    82	  }
    83	
    84	  // bmi — always derived (weight + height)
    85	  sources['bmi'] = {
    86	    type: 'derived',
    87	    date: latestDateAmong(['weight_kg', 'height_cm'], latestMeasured),
    88	    formula: DERIVED_FORMULAS['bmi'],
    89	  }
    90	
    91	  // body_fat_pct — measured if present, else derived from fat_mass_kg
    92	  sources['body_fat_pct'] =
    93	    measuredSource('body_fat_pct') ??
    94	    (latestMeasured['fat_mass_kg']
    95	      ? { type: 'derived', date: latestDateAmong(['fat_mass_kg', 'weight_kg'], latestMeasured), formula: DERIVED_FORMULAS['body_fat_pct'] }
    96	      : { type: 'derived', date: today, formula: DERIVED_FORMULAS['body_fat_pct'] })
    97	
    98	  // fat_mass_kg — measured if present, else derived from body_fat_pct
    99	  sources['fat_mass_kg'] =
   100	    measuredSource('fat_mass_kg') ??
   101	    (latestMeasured['body_fat_pct']
   102	      ? { type: 'derived', date: latestDateAmong(['body_fat_pct', 'weight_kg'], latestMeasured), formula: DERIVED_FORMULAS['fat_mass_kg'] }
   103	      : { type: 'derived', date: today, formula: DERIVED_FORMULAS['fat_mass_kg'] })
   104	
   105	  // lean_mass_kg — measured if present, else derived
   106	  sources['lean_mass_kg'] =
   107	    measuredSource('lean_mass_kg') ??
   108	    (derived.lean_mass_kg !== null
   109	      ? { type: 'derived', date: latestDateAmong(['weight_kg', 'body_fat_pct', 'fat_mass_kg'], latestMeasured), formula: DERIVED_FORMULAS['lean_mass_kg'] }
   110	      : { type: 'derived', date: today, formula: DERIVED_FORMULAS['lean_mass_kg'] })
   111	
   112	  // muscle_mass_kg — measured if present, else derived from pct
   113	  sources['muscle_mass_kg'] =
   114	    measuredSource('muscle_mass_kg') ??
   115	    (latestMeasured['muscle_mass_pct']
   116	      ? { type: 'derived', date: latestDateAmong(['muscle_mass_pct', 'weight_kg'], latestMeasured), formula: DERIVED_FORMULAS['muscle_mass_kg'] }
   117	      : { type: 'derived', date: today, formula: DERIVED_FORMULAS['muscle_mass_kg'] })
   118	
   119	  // muscle_mass_pct — measured if present, else derived from kg
   120	  sources['muscle_mass_pct'] =
   121	    measuredSource('muscle_mass_pct') ??
   122	    (latestMeasured['muscle_mass_kg']
   123	      ? { type: 'derived', date: latestDateAmong(['muscle_mass_kg', 'weight_kg'], latestMeasured), formula: DERIVED_FORMULAS['muscle_mass_pct'] }
   124	      : { type: 'derived', date: today, formula: DERIVED_FORMULAS['muscle_mass_pct'] })
   125	
   126	  // Direct-measured only fields
   127	  for (const key of ['visceral_fat_level', 'body_water_pct', 'bone_mass_kg', 'waist_cm', 'waist_hip_ratio', 'metabolic_age'] as const) {
   128	    const m = latestMeasured[key]
   129	    sources[key] = m
   130	      ? { type: 'measured', date: m.date }
   131	      : { type: 'derived', date: today, formula: DERIVED_FORMULAS[key] }
   132	  }
   133	
   134	  // waist_height_ratio — always derived
   135	  sources['waist_height_ratio'] = {
   136	    type: 'derived',
   137	    date: latestDateAmong(['waist_cm', 'height_cm'], latestMeasured),
   138	    formula: DERIVED_FORMULAS['waist_height_ratio'],
   139	  }
   140	
   141	  // waist_hip_ratio — always derived
   142	  sources['waist_hip_ratio'] = {
   143	    type: 'derived',
   144	    date: latestDateAmong(['waist_cm', 'hips_cm'], latestMeasured),
   145	    formula: DERIVED_FORMULAS['waist_hip_ratio'],
   146	  }
   147	
   148	  // metabolic_age_delta — the evaluation key used in bioNorms
   149	  sources['metabolic_age_delta'] =
   150	    latestMeasured['metabolic_age']
   151	      ? { type: 'measured', date: latestMeasured['metabolic_age'].date }
   152	      : { type: 'derived', date: latestDateAmong(['weight_kg', 'height_cm', 'body_fat_pct'], latestMeasured), formula: DERIVED_FORMULAS['metabolic_age_delta'] }
   153	
   154	  return sources
   155	}
   156	
   157	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   158	// Hook
   159	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   160	
   161	export function useBiometrics(
   162	  clientId: string,
   163	  clientProfile: ClientProfile,
   164	): UseBiometricsReturn {
   165	  const [derived, setDerived] = useState<DerivedMetrics | null>(null)
   166	  const [evaluations, setEvaluations] = useState<NormEvaluation[]>([])
   167	  const [metricSources, setMetricSources] = useState<Record<string, MetricSource>>({})
   168	  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
   169	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
   170	
   171	  const fetchAndCompute = useCallback(async () => {
   172	    setLoading(true)
   173	    setError(null)
   174	
   175	    try {
   176	      const supabase = createClient()
   177	
   178	      // Fetch all completed submissions for this client with their responses, ordered ASC
   179	      // so later submissions overwrite earlier ones when building latestMeasured
   180	      const { data: submissions, error: fetchError } = await supabase
   181	        .from('assessment_submissions')
   182	        .select('id, bilan_date, submitted_at, assessment_responses(field_key, value_number)')
   183	        .eq('client_id', clientId)
   184	        .eq('status', 'completed')
   185	        .order('bilan_date', { ascending: true })
   186	
   187	      if (fetchError) {
   188	        setError(fetchError.message)
   189	        return
   190	      }
   191	
   192	      // Build latestMeasured: for each field_key, the most recent value wins
   193	      const latestMeasured: Record<string, { value: number; date: string }> = {}
   194	
   195	      for (const sub of submissions ?? []) {
   196	        const rawDate: string = (sub.bilan_date ?? sub.submitted_at ?? '') as string
   197	        const date = rawDate.split('T')[0]
   198	        if (!date) continue
   199	
   200	        for (const resp of (sub.assessment_responses ?? []) as { field_key: string; value_number: number | null }[]) {
   201	          if (
   202	            typeof resp.field_key === 'string' &&
   203	            typeof resp.value_number === 'number' &&
   204	            resp.value_number !== null
   205	          ) {
   206	            latestMeasured[resp.field_key] = { value: resp.value_number, date }
   207	          }
   208	        }
   209	      }
   210	
   211	      const weight_kg = latestMeasured['weight_kg']?.value
   212	      const height_cm = latestMeasured['height_cm']?.value
   213	
   214	      if (weight_kg === undefined || height_cm === undefined) {
   215	        setDerived(null)
   216	        setEvaluations([])
   217	        setMetricSources({})
   218	        return
   219	      }
   220	
   221	      // Use the most recent date across all measured fields for age calculation
   222	      const mostRecentDate = Object.values(latestMeasured)
   223	        .map(m => m.date)
   224	        .sort()
   225	        .reverse()[0]
   226	
   227	      let age_at_measurement: number | undefined
   228	      if (clientProfile.date_of_birth && mostRecentDate) {
   229	        const computed = calculateAge(clientProfile.date_of_birth, mostRecentDate)
   230	        age_at_measurement = computed >= 0 ? computed : undefined
   231	      }
   232	
   233	      const normalizedSex = normalizeSex(clientProfile.sex)
   234	      const sex: 'male' | 'female' = normalizedSex ?? 'male'
   235	
   236	      const inputs: BiometricInputs = {
   237	        weight_kg,
   238	        height_cm,
   239	        sex,
   240	        age_at_measurement,
   241	        body_fat_pct:        latestMeasured['body_fat_pct']?.value,
   242	        fat_mass_kg:         latestMeasured['fat_mass_kg']?.value,
   243	        muscle_mass_kg:      latestMeasured['muscle_mass_kg']?.value,
   244	        muscle_mass_pct:     latestMeasured['muscle_mass_pct']?.value,
   245	        skeletal_muscle_pct: latestMeasured['skeletal_muscle_pct']?.value,
   246	        visceral_fat_level:  latestMeasured['visceral_fat_level']?.value,
   247	        body_water_pct:      latestMeasured['body_water_pct']?.value,
   248	        bone_mass_kg:        latestMeasured['bone_mass_kg']?.value,
   249	        waist_cm:            latestMeasured['waist_cm']?.value,
   250	        neck_cm:             latestMeasured['neck_cm']?.value,
   251	        hips_cm:             latestMeasured['hips_cm']?.value ?? latestMeasured['hip_cm']?.value,
   252	        metabolic_age:       latestMeasured['metabolic_age']?.value,
   253	      }
   254	
   255	      const derivedResult = deriveMetrics(inputs)
   256	      const evals = evaluateAll(
   257	        { ...derivedResult, metabolic_age_source: derivedResult.metabolic_age_source },
   258	        age_at_measurement ?? 0,
   259	        sex,
   260	      )

    87	export const getTranslation = (lang: string) => {
    88	  // On force TS à considérer lang comme une clé valide de notre objet
    89	  const code = (lang as Language) || 'fr';
    90	  return translations[code] || translations.fr;
    91	};
------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: lib/morpho/biomechEngine.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	// lib/morpho/biomechEngine.ts
     2	// Maps MorphoAnalysisResultV2 → Gold Standard DB → ExerciseAdvantageLevel per slot
     3	
     4	import type {
     5	  MorphoAnalysisResultV2,
     6	  PosturalSyndrome,
     7	  BiomechSegments,
     8	  MorphoFlag,
     9	} from './types'
    10	
    11	// ─── Types publics ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    12	
    13	export type ExerciseAdvantageLevel =
    14	  | 'advantageous'
    15	  | 'neutral'
    16	  | 'disadvantageous'
    17	  | 'contraindicated'
    18	
    19	export type ExerciseRecommendation = {
    20	  muscle_group: string
    21	  slot: string
    22	  ex_name: string
    23	  advantage: ExerciseAdvantageLevel
    24	  reasoning: string
    25	  suggested_substitution: string | null
    26	  triggered_rules: string[]
    27	}
    28	
    29	// ─── Gold Standard types (inferred from DB schema) ───────────────────────────
    30	
    31	type TriggerCondition = {
    32	  condition_field: string
    33	  operator: '>' | '<' | '>=' | '<=' | '==' | '!=' | 'IN' | 'NOT_IN'
    34	  threshold: number | string | boolean | (number | string)[]
    35	  substitute_ex_name?: string
    36	  substitute_slot?: string
    37	}
    38	
    39	type SubstitutionTrigger = {
    40	  conditions: TriggerCondition[]
    41	  logic?: 'AND' | 'OR'
    42	}
    43	
    44	type GoldStandardSlot = {
    45	  ex_name: string
    46	  slot: string
    47	  risk_tags: string[]
    48	  substitution_trigger?: SubstitutionTrigger
    49	  optimal_morphotype?: Record<string, string>
    50	  morpho_logic?: string
    51	}
    52	
    53	type GoldStandardMuscleGroup = {
    54	  label: string
    55	  slots: Record<string, GoldStandardSlot>
    56	}
    57	
    58	type GoldStandardDB = {
    59	  muscle_groups: Record<string, GoldStandardMuscleGroup>
    60	}
    61	
    62	// ─── Proxy field derivation ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
    63	
    64	// Maps v2 MorphoAnalysisResultV2 to the numeric/boolean proxy fields
    65	// used in Gold Standard substitution_trigger conditions.
    66	// Fields we can't derive return null → condition skipped (treated as neutral).
    67	
    68	export type DerivedMorphoFields = Record<string, number | boolean | null>
    69	
    70	function getSyndrome(syndromes: PosturalSyndrome[], name: string) {
    71	  return syndromes.find(s => s.name === name)
    72	}
    73	
    74	function severityToOrdinal(severity: PosturalSyndrome['severity']): number {
    75	  if (severity === 'marked') return 3
    76	  if (severity === 'moderate') return 2
    77	  if (severity === 'mild') return 1
    78	  return 0
    79	}
    80	
    81	export function deriveMorphoFields(analysis: MorphoAnalysisResultV2): DerivedMorphoFields {
    82	  const { biomech, asymmetries } = analysis
    83	  const segs: BiomechSegments = biomech.segments
    84	  const syndromes = biomech.postural_syndromes
    85	  const flags: MorphoFlag[] = analysis.flags
    86	
    87	  const upperCrossed = getSyndrome(syndromes, 'upper_crossed')
    88	  const lowerCrossed = getSyndrome(syndromes, 'lower_crossed')
    89	  const ucSev = upperCrossed?.present ? severityToOrdinal(upperCrossed.severity) : 0
    90	  const lcSev = lowerCrossed?.present ? severityToOrdinal(lowerCrossed.severity) : 0
    91	
    92	  // arm_span_height_ratio: wingspan / height. Gold Standard: short <0.98, avg 0.98-1.03, long >1.03.
    93	  // Wingspan ≈ arm_l + arm_r + shoulder_width. Shoulder width not available → proxy with torso width
    94	  // as ~25% of torso length (rough). Direct calc from arm segments + estimated height is most accurate.
    95	  const armSpanHeightRatio: number | null = (() => {
    96	    const al = segs.arm_l.cm
    97	    const ar = segs.arm_r.cm
    98	    // Estimate height from torso: height ≈ torso / 0.30 (canonical)
    99	    const estimatedHeight = segs.torso.cm != null ? segs.torso.cm / 0.30 : null
   100	    if (al !== null && ar !== null && estimatedHeight !== null && estimatedHeight > 0) {
   101	      // Wingspan ≈ 2 × arm + shoulder_width. Shoulder width ≈ 0.26 × height
   102	      const shoulderWidth = estimatedHeight * 0.26
   103	      return (al + ar + shoulderWidth) / estimatedHeight
   104	    }
   105	    return null
   106	  })()
   107	
   108	  // femur_tibia_ratio
   109	  const femurTibiaRatio: number | null = (() => {
   110	    const fl = segs.femur_l.cm
   111	    const fr = segs.femur_r.cm
   112	    const tl = segs.tibia_l.cm
   113	    const tr = segs.tibia_r.cm
   114	    if (fl !== null && tl !== null && fr !== null && tr !== null) {
   115	      return ((fl + fr) / 2) / ((tl + tr) / 2)
   116	    }
   117	    return null
   118	  })()
   119	
   120	  // glenohumeral_anteversion_deg — proxy from upper_crossed severity
   121	  const ghAnteversion: number | null = (() => {
   122	    // Rough proxy: upper_crossed pushes humeral head anterior
   123	    if (ucSev === 3) return 25
   124	    if (ucSev === 2) return 18
   125	    if (ucSev === 1) return 12
   126	    // Check flags for shoulder enrolment
   127	    const shoulderFlag = flags.find(f => f.zone === 'shoulders' && f.severity !== 'green')
   128	    if (shoulderFlag) return 10
   129	    return 5 // baseline assumption if no syndrome
   130	  })()
   131	
   132	  // thoracic_kyphosis_deg — proxy from upper_crossed severity
   133	  const thoracicKyphosis: number | null = (() => {
   134	    if (ucSev === 3) return 52
   135	    if (ucSev === 2) return 45
   136	    if (ucSev === 1) return 38
   137	    return 28 // normal
   138	  })()
   139	
   140	  // shoulder_external_rotation_deg — inverse of upper_crossed
   141	  const shoulderExtRot: number | null = (() => {
   142	    if (ucSev === 3) return 28
   143	    if (ucSev === 2) return 42
   144	    if (ucSev === 1) return 58
   145	    return 80 // normal
   146	  })()
   147	
   148	  // pelvic_tilt_anterior_deg — from lower_crossed
   149	  const pelvicTilt: number | null = (() => {
   150	    if (lcSev === 3) return 22
   151	    if (lcSev === 2) return 16
   152	    if (lcSev === 1) return 10
   153	    const pelvisFlag = flags.find(f => f.zone === 'pelvis' && f.severity !== 'green')
   154	    if (pelvisFlag) return 8
   155	    return 4
   156	  })()
   157	
   158	  // shoulder_abduction_deg — proxy (limited if upper_crossed)
   159	  const shoulderAbduction: number | null = ucSev >= 2 ? 140 : 170
   160	
   161	  // shoulder_flexion_deg — proxy from upper_crossed (limits overhead flexion)
   162	  const shoulderFlexion: number | null = (() => {
   163	    if (ucSev === 3) return 140
   164	    if (ucSev === 2) return 155
   165	    if (ucSev === 1) return 165
   166	    return 178
   167	  })()
   168	
   169	  // knee_flexion_deg — cannot derive from photo reliably
   170	  const kneeFlexion: number | null = null
   171	
   172	  // ankle_dorsiflexion_cm — not derivable from photos
   173	  const ankleDorsiflexion: number | null = null
   174	
   175	  // femoral_anteversion_deg — very rough proxy from lower_crossed + hip flags
   176	  const femoralAnteversion: number | null = (() => {
   177	    const hipFlag = flags.find(f => f.zone === 'pelvis')
   178	    if (lcSev >= 2 && hipFlag) return 28
   179	    return null
   180	  })()
   181	
   182	  // lumbar_neutrality_score (0-10) — inverse of lower_crossed severity
   183	  const lumbarNeutrality: number | null = (() => {
   184	    if (lcSev === 3) return 2
   185	    if (lcSev === 2) return 4
   186	    if (lcSev === 1) return 6
   187	    return 8
   188	  })()
   189	
   190	  // Injury-derived boolean fields — scan flag labels + attention points for keywords
   191	  const flagLabels = flags.map(f => f.label.toLowerCase())
   192	  const attentionDescs = analysis.attention_points.map(a => a.description.toLowerCase())
   193	  const allText = [...flagLabels, ...attentionDescs].join(' ')
   194	
   195	  const hasKeyword = (...kws: string[]) => kws.some(k => allText.includes(k))
   196	
   197	  return {
   198	    arm_span_height_ratio: armSpanHeightRatio,
   199	    femur_tibia_ratio: femurTibiaRatio,
   200	    glenohumeral_anteversion_deg: ghAnteversion,
   201	    thoracic_kyphosis_deg: thoracicKyphosis,
   202	    shoulder_external_rotation_deg: shoulderExtRot,
   203	    shoulder_abduction_deg: shoulderAbduction,
   204	    shoulder_flexion_deg: shoulderFlexion,
   205	    pelvic_tilt_anterior_deg: pelvicTilt,
   206	    femoral_anteversion_deg: femoralAnteversion,
   207	    lumbar_neutrality_score: lumbarNeutrality,
   208	    knee_flexion_deg: kneeFlexion,
   209	    // boolean flags derived from text analysis
   210	    lumbar_disc_pathology: hasKeyword('hernie', 'disc', 'lombaire chronique') ? true : null,
   211	    lumbar_disc_pathology_acute: null,
   212	    lumbar_disc_herniation_active: null,
   213	    subacromial_pain_vas: hasKeyword('impingement', 'conflict sous-acromial') ? 5 : null,
   214	    subacromial_pain_arc_60_120: hasKeyword('impingement', 'acromion') ? true : null,
   215	    ac_joint_pathology: null,
   216	    shoulder_dash_score: null,
   217	    patellofemoral_syndrome: hasKeyword('genou', 'rotule', 'valgus') ? true : null,
   218	    patellar_tendinopathy_vas: null,
   219	    hip_anterior_impingement: hasKeyword('impingement hanche', 'fai', 'hanche antérieure') ? true : null,
   220	    hip_anterior_impingement_fai: null,
   221	    ankle_dorsiflexion_cm: ankleDorsiflexion,
   222	    proximal_hamstring_tendinopathy: hasKeyword('ischio', 'tendinopathie proximale') ? true : null,
   223	    // Everything else: unknown
   224	    achilles_tendinopathy_active: null,
   225	    acl_post_op_months: null,
   226	    bicipital_tendinopathy: hasKeyword('biceps', 'tendinopathie bicipitale') ? true : null,
   227	    bicipital_tendinopathy_active: null,
   228	    carpal_tunnel_syndrome: null,
   229	    cervical_disc_pathology: hasKeyword('cervicale', 'cervical') ? true : null,
   230	    cervical_stenosis: null,
   231	    cervical_vertigo: null,
   232	    distal_bicep_tendinopathy: null,
   233	    elbow_carrying_angle_deg: null,
   234	    glenohumeral_instability_anterior: hasKeyword('instabilité', 'laxité épaule') ? true : null,
   235	    glenohumeral_laxity_score: null,
   236	    grip_strength_insufficient: null,
   237	    hamstring_tear_grade: null,
   238	    hip_flexor_flexibility_score: null,
   239	    lateral_epicondylitis_active: null,
   240	    lumbar_flexion_loss_before_deg: null,
   241	    lumbar_pain_vas: hasKeyword('douleur lombaire') ? 5 : null,
   242	    lumbar_spondylolisthesis: null,
   243	    medial_epicondylitis_active: null,
   244	    no_partner_available: null,
   245	    osteitis_pubis_active: null,
   246	    patellofemoral_arthritis_grade: null,
   247	    pcl_laxity_positive: null,
   248	    plantar_fasciitis_active: null,
   249	    posterior_femoral_compression_syndrome: null,
   250	    posterior_shoulder_pain_vas: hasKeyword('douleur postérieure épaule') ? 4 : null,
   251	    sacroiliac_pain_vas: hasKeyword('sacro-iliaque', 'si joint') ? 4 : null,
   252	    star_excursion_balance_pct: null,
   253	    thoracic_kyphosis_structural: ucSev >= 2 ? true : null,
   254	    acromion_type: null,
   255	    y_balance_lower_pct: null,
   256	  }
   257	}
   258	
   259	// ─── Trigger evaluator ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   260	

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: lib/morpho/buildAnalysisPrompt.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	// lib/morpho/buildAnalysisPrompt.ts
     2	
     3	export interface AnalysisContext {
     4	  age?: number
     5	  sex?: 'male' | 'female' | 'other'
     6	  goal?: string
     7	  weight_kg?: number
     8	  height_cm?: number
     9	  body_fat_pct?: number
    10	  injuries?: string[]
    11	  photo_positions: string[]
    12	}
    13	
    14	export function buildAnalysisPrompt(context: AnalysisContext): string {
    15	  const {
    16	    age, sex, goal, weight_kg, height_cm, body_fat_pct,
    17	    injuries = [], photo_positions
    18	  } = context
    19	
    20	  const biometrics = [
    21	    weight_kg ? `${weight_kg} kg` : null,
    22	    height_cm ? `${height_cm} cm` : null,
    23	    body_fat_pct != null ? `${body_fat_pct}% MG` : null,
    24	  ].filter(Boolean).join(' | ') || 'non renseigné'
    25	
    26	  const heightNote = height_cm
    27	    ? `Utilise ${height_cm} cm comme référence d'échelle pour estimer les longueurs segmentaires absolues.`
    28	    : `Taille non renseignée — marque confidence: "low" sur TOUS les segments. Ne génère pas de valeurs cm, uniquement des classifications relatives.`
    29	
    30	  return `Tu es un expert en biomécanique du mouvement, en morphologie appliquée à l'entraînement de force et en analyse des insertions musculaires. Tu combines la rigueur d'un préparateur physique de haut niveau, d'un kinésithérapeute du sport et d'un anatomiste fonctionnel. Tu raisonnes en termes de leviers mécaniques, d'angles d'insertion tendineuse, de longueurs segmentaires relatives, de structure osseuse visible, de syndromes posturaux et de chaînes musculaires.
    31	
    32	Tu n'es pas médecin : tu n'établis AUCUN diagnostic médical. Ton rôle est de produire une analyse morpho-biomécanique complète destinée à orienter le choix des exercices, des variations, des placements et des prises, dans un cadre de coaching sportif.
    33	
    34	LANGUE OBLIGATOIRE : Toutes tes descriptions textuelles (label, description, rationale, posture_summary, notes, markers, reference, squat_stance, bench_grip, rationale des prescriptions) DOIVENT être rédigées en FRANÇAIS. Seuls les noms de champs JSON et les valeurs d'enum (ex: "advantage", "high_bar", "conventional") restent en anglais car ce sont des valeurs techniques fixées.
    35	
    36	CONTEXTE CLIENT :
    37	- Âge : ${age ?? 'non renseigné'}
    38	- Sexe : ${sex ?? 'non renseigné'}
    39	- Objectif : ${goal ?? 'non renseigné'}
    40	- Biométrie : ${biometrics}
    41	- Blessures connues : ${injuries.length > 0 ? injuries.join(', ') : 'aucune'}
    42	- Photos fournies : ${photo_positions.join(', ')}
    43	- ${heightNote}
    44	
    45	════════════════════════════════════════
    46	AXES D'ANALYSE OBLIGATOIRES (v3)
    47	════════════════════════════════════════
    48	
    49	AXE 1 — STRUCTURE OSSEUSE VISIBLE (frame)
    50	Évalue uniquement ce qui est visible sur les photos. Ne suppose rien d'invisible.
    51	
    52	• biacromial (largeur claviculaire) : "narrow" | "average" | "wide" | "unknown"
    53	  Implications : large → prise large développé couché (repère 81cm+), OHP barbell grip large.
    54	  Étroit → prise serrée (55-60cm), haltères OHP préférables, risque d'impingement en grip large.
    55	
    56	• bi_iliac (largeur pelvienne) : "narrow" | "average" | "wide" | "unknown"
    57	  Implications : large → squat stance 130-145%, orteils 35°+, sumo deadlift préféré.
    58	  Étroit → stance conventionnel largeur épaules, deadlift conventionnel naturel.
    59	
    60	• thorax_depth (profondeur cage thoracique) : "flat" | "average" | "deep" | "unknown"
    61	  Implications : profond → plateau naturel low-bar squat, pectoraux denses. Plat → high-bar ou safety-bar squat, focus pectoraux supérieurs.
    62	
    63	• skeletal_frame (gabarit osseux global) : "light" | "medium" | "heavy" | "unknown"
    64	  Basé sur largeur poignets relative, clavicules, crêtes iliaques.
    65	
    66	• elbow_carrying_angle (valgus du coude, bras en supination le long du corps) : "normal" | "mild_valgus" | "marked_valgus" | "varus" | "unknown"
    67	  Implications : valgus marqué → barre EZ plutôt que barre droite (curls, développé couché serré), réduit stress poignet/coude. Prise neutre/supination préférée.
    68	
    69	• knee_alignment (alignement frontal des genoux, debout) : "valgus" | "varus" | "neutral" | "unknown"
    70	  Implications : valgus (genoux en X) → renforcement fessiers/abducteurs, éviter stance trop large. Varus (genoux en O) → travail adducteurs, contrôle de la descente.
    71	
    72	• confidence : "low" | "medium" | "high"
    73	
    74	AXE 2 — PROPORTIONS SEGMENTAIRES (segments)
    75	${heightNote}
    76	
    77	Segments : torso (manubrium → crête iliaque), arm_l/arm_r (acromion → styloïde radiale), forearm_l/forearm_r (olécrâne → styloïde radiale), femur_l/femur_r (grand trochanter → interligne genou), tibia_l/tibia_r (interligne genou → malléole latérale).
    78	
    79	Classification (ratio/taille) :
    80	- torso : court <0.27 | moyen 0.27-0.33 | long >0.33
    81	- femur : court <0.23 | moyen 0.23-0.27 | long >0.27  → long = squat high-bar ou front squat, stance large
    82	- tibia : court <0.20 | moyen 0.20-0.24 | long >0.24
    83	- arm : court <0.35 | moyen 0.35-0.41 | long >0.41  → long = avantage pulling/deadlift lockout
    84	- forearm : court <0.24 | moyen 0.24-0.28 | long >0.28
    85	
    86	Ratios dérivés :
    87	- trunk_to_femur_ratio = torso.cm / femur_moyen.cm  (>1.1 = avantage deadlift conventionnel)
    88	- arm_to_torso_ratio = arm_moyen.cm / torso.cm  (>1.0 = bras longs = avantage pulling)
    89	- humerus_to_forearm_ratio = arm.cm / forearm.cm  (>1.15 = ROM bench plus grande, réduire profondeur)
    90	
    91	AXE 3 — INSERTIONS MUSCULAIRES APPARENTES (insertions) — AXE PRIORITAIRE
    92	C'est l'axe le plus déterminant pour le choix des exercices : l'insertion fixe le levier interne du muscle, donc la portion d'amplitude où il est fort/faible. Analyse CHAQUE muscle ci-dessous si visible (relâché ET contracté aident). value: "unknown" seulement si réellement invisible.
    93	
    94	• pec_sternal — chef sternal du pectoral : "high" = insertion haute sur sternum (pec court, bas du pec peu développé visuellement), "low" = insertion basse (pec inférieur développé, ROM maximale bénéfique en développé plat)
    95	• pec_clavicular — chef claviculaire : "high" = pec supérieur naturellement proéminent, "low" = peu développé nativement
    96	• lats — dorsaux : "high" = s'arrêtent au-dessus crête iliaque (levier court), "low" = quasi crête (levier lockout deadlift favorisé)
    97	• biceps — "high" = ventre court, peak visible → force en flexion mi-amplitude. "low" = ventre long → force sur tout l'arc
    98	• gastrocnemius — "high" = mollets hauts sur tibia (ventre court → développement limité génétiquement), "low" = ventre bas (plus de surface développable)
    99	• quad_sweep — vaste latéral de face : "wide" = sweep prononcé (leg press large, presse 45°), "narrow" = peu de sweep, "balanced"
   100	• deltoid_anterior — faisceau antérieur : "high" = proéminent → risque overhead large grip, "low" = peu développé
   101	
   102	AXE 4 — CHAÎNES MUSCULAIRES & SYNDROMES POSTURAUX
   103	Pour chacun : present (bool), severity (mild|moderate|marked|null), markers (liste EN FRANÇAIS), confidence.
   104	- upper_crossed : épaules enroulées, tête projetée, faiblesse rhomboïdes/trapèze moyen, raideur pec/SCM
   105	- lower_crossed : antéversion pelvienne, hyperlordose, raideur psoas/érecteurs, faiblesse abdo profonds/fessiers
   106	- layered : combinaison (rare)
   107	
   108	Chaînes : posterior_chain (underdeveloped|balanced|developed|unknown), anterior_chain (idem), dominant_cross_chain (anterior|posterior|balanced|unknown).
   109	
   110	AXE 5 — ASYMÉTRIES FINES
   111	- shoulder_imbalance_cm : décalage épaules visible (null si non mesurable)
   112	- arm_diff_cm : différence bras G/D en cm (OBLIGATOIRE — 0.0 si symétrique, null si indéterminable)
   113	- hip_imbalance_cm : décalage crête iliaque
   114	- leg_length_diff_cm : différence longueur jambe visible
   115	- pelvic_rotation_deg : rotation pelvienne plan transverse estimée (null si non visible)
   116	- posture_notes : description EN FRANÇAIS
   117	
   118	AXE 6 — VERDICTS PATTERNS MOUVEMENT (10 patterns)
   119	verdict + rationale 1 ligne EN FRANÇAIS ancré dans la morpho de CE client.
   120	horizontal_push, horizontal_pull, vertical_push, vertical_pull, squat, hinge, lunge, carry, rotation, anti_rotation.
   121	
   122	AXE 7 — PRESCRIPTIONS SPÉCIFIQUES (setup_prescriptions)
   123	C'est l'axe le plus actionnable. Prescriptions concrètes ancrées dans la morpho analysée.
   124	
   125	Règles de décision (applique celles qui correspondent à ce client) :
   126	- Fémur long (>0.27) → squat_variation: "high_bar" ou "front_squat", stance large, élévation talons
   127	- Fémur court (<0.23) → squat_variation: "low_bar" acceptable
   128	- Bassin large → sumo ou wide-stance, deadlift_variation: "sumo" ou "conventional" wide-stance
   129	- Tronc court (trunk_to_femur <0.90) → deadlift_variation: "trap_bar" ou "sumo" pour réduire inclinaison
   130	- Tronc long (>1.10) → deadlift_variation: "conventional" avantageux
   131	- Humérus long (humerus_to_forearm >1.15) → réduire ROM bench, floor press alternatif
   132	- Clavicules larges → bench_grip large (index sur repère 81cm)
   133	- Clavicules étroites → bench_grip serré (55-60cm), ohp_implement: "dumbbell"
   134	- Lower_crossed → deadlift_variation: "romanian", goblet squat pour reset
   135	- Upper_crossed → éviter overhead grip large, pull_grip: "neutral"
   136	
   137	AXE 8 — ANALYSE POSTURALE GLOBALE
   138	score 0-100, posture_summary (1-2 phrases EN FRANÇAIS), flags (label EN FRANÇAIS), attention_points (description EN FRANÇAIS, zone anatomique EN FRANÇAIS), recommendations (description et reference EN FRANÇAIS).
   139	
   140	════════════════════════════════════════
   141	GARDE-FOUS
   142	════════════════════════════════════════
   143	- JAMAIS diagnostic médical. "déviation latérale apparente du rachis" jamais "scoliose". Jamais "hernie", "tendinite".
   144	- Si estimation impossible → "unknown" + confidence: "low". Jamais inventer de valeurs.
   145	- Tout champ texte libre DOIT être en FRANÇAIS.
   146	- Output UNIQUEMENT JSON valide. Aucun texte hors JSON.
   147	
   148	════════════════════════════════════════
   149	SCHÉMA JSON EXACT — RESPECTER SCRUPULEUSEMENT
   150	════════════════════════════════════════
   151

   153	  "score": <entier 0-100>,
   154	  "posture_summary": "<1-2 phrases EN FRANÇAIS>",

   200	    ],

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: lib/morpho/exerciseCoherence.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	// lib/morpho/exerciseCoherence.ts
     2	// Cohérence exercice ↔ morphologie.
     3	// Niveau 1 : pattern moteur × pattern_verdicts.
     4	// Niveau 2 : table de règles fines (insertions, leviers, angles, frame).
     5	
     6	import type { BiomechMovementPattern, PatternVerdict } from './types'
     7	import type { MorphoTraits } from './morphoTraits'
     8	
     9	export type CoherenceLevel = 'optimal' | 'neutral' | 'caution'
    10	
    11	export type CoherenceReason = {
    12	  text: string
    13	  effect: 'boost' | 'penalty' | 'contraindication' | 'pattern'
    14	}
    15	
    16	export type CoherenceResult = {
    17	  level: CoherenceLevel
    18	  reasons: CoherenceReason[]
    19	  confidence: 'low' | 'medium' | 'high'
    20	} | null
    21	
    22	export type ExerciseLike = {
    23	  name: string
    24	  movement_pattern: string | null
    25	  primary_muscles?: string[]
    26	  primaryMuscle?: string | null
    27	  constraintProfile?: string | null
    28	  equipment_required?: string[]
    29	}
    30	
    31	// ─── Niveau 1 : mapping pattern catalogue → biomech ──────────────────────────
    32	
    33	const CATALOG_TO_BIOMECH: Record<string, BiomechMovementPattern | null> = {
    34	  horizontal_push: 'horizontal_push',
    35	  horizontal_pull: 'horizontal_pull',
    36	  vertical_push: 'vertical_push',
    37	  vertical_pull: 'vertical_pull',
    38	  carry: 'carry',
    39	  squat: 'squat',
    40	  squat_pattern: 'squat',
    41	  hinge: 'hinge',
    42	  hip_hinge: 'hinge',
    43	  lunge: 'lunge',
    44	  core_rotation: 'rotation',
    45	  core_anti_flex: 'anti_rotation',
    46	  core_anti_flexion: 'anti_rotation',
    47	  core_anti_rotation: 'anti_rotation',
    48	  core_anti_extension: 'anti_rotation',
    49	  unilateral_push: 'horizontal_push',
    50	  unilateral_pull: 'horizontal_pull',
    51	  knee_flexion: null,
    52	  knee_extension: null,
    53	  calf_raise: null,
    54	  elbow_flexion: null,
    55	  elbow_extension: null,
    56	  lateral_raise: null,
    57	  hip_abduction: null,
    58	  hip_adduction: null,
    59	  shoulder_rotation: null,
    60	  scapular_elevation: null,
    61	  scapular_retraction: null,
    62	  scapular_protraction: null,
    63	  core_flex: null,
    64	  isolation: null,
    65	}
    66	
    67	const VERDICT_TO_SCORE: Record<PatternVerdict['verdict'], number> = {
    68	  advantage: 1,
    69	  neutral: 0,
    70	  disadvantage: -1,
    71	}
    72	
    73	export function buildVerdictMap(verdicts: PatternVerdict[]): Map<BiomechMovementPattern, PatternVerdict> {
    74	  const map = new Map<BiomechMovementPattern, PatternVerdict>()
    75	  for (const v of verdicts) map.set(v.pattern, v)
    76	  return map
    77	}
    78	
    79	// ─── Niveau 2 : table de règles ──────────────────────────────────────────────
    80	
    81	type RuleMatch = {
    82	  patterns?: string[]      // movement_pattern catalogue
    83	  muscles?: string[]       // primary_muscles slugs
    84	  primaryMuscles?: string[] // primaryMuscle biomécanique précis
    85	  equipment?: string[]     // equipment requis (au moins un)
    86	  notEquipment?: string[]  // exclure si un de ces equipements présent
    87	  nameKeywords?: string[]  // fallback sur le nom (lowercase includes)
    88	  excludeNameKeywords?: string[] // mots-clés qui annulent le match
    89	}
    90	
    91	type MorphoRule = {
    92	  id: string
    93	  match: RuleMatch
    94	  when: (t: MorphoTraits) => boolean
    95	  effect: 'boost' | 'penalty' | 'contraindication'
    96	  reason: string
    97	}
    98	
    99	const ins = (t: MorphoTraits, ...keys: string[]) => {
   100	  for (const k of keys) { if (t.insertions[k]) return t.insertions[k] }
   101	  return undefined
   102	}
   103	
   104	const RULES: MorphoRule[] = [
   105	  // ── INSERTIONS ──
   106	  {
   107	    id: 'biceps_high_curl',
   108	    match: {
   109	      patterns: ['elbow_flexion'],
   110	      primaryMuscles: ['biceps_brachii'],
   111	      nameKeywords: ['curl', 'biceps'],
   112	      excludeNameKeywords: ['pupitre', 'larry scott', 'incliné', 'incline', 'marteau', 'hammer', 'neutre'],
   113	    },
   114	    when: t => ins(t, 'biceps') === 'high',
   115	    effect: 'penalty',
   116	    reason: 'Biceps à ventre court (insertion haute) : privilégier le travail en étirement (curls inclinés, pupitre).',
   117	  },
   118	  {
   119	    id: 'biceps_high_stretch_friendly',
   120	    match: {
   121	      patterns: ['elbow_flexion'],
   122	      primaryMuscles: ['biceps_brachii'],
   123	      nameKeywords: ['pupitre', 'larry scott', 'incliné', 'incline'],
   124	    },
   125	    when: t => ins(t, 'biceps') === 'high',
   126	    effect: 'boost',
   127	    reason: 'Bonne sélection pour un biceps à insertion haute : ce curl favorise davantage l’étirement ou le support recommandé.',
   128	  },
   129	  {
   130	    id: 'gastroc_high_calf',
   131	    match: {
   132	      patterns: ['calf_raise'],
   133	      primaryMuscles: ['gastrocnemius'],
   134	      nameKeywords: ['mollet', 'calf', 'gastro'],
   135	      excludeNameKeywords: ['assis', 'soleaire', 'soléaire', 'soleus'],
   136	    },
   137	    when: t => ins(t, 'gastrocnemius', 'calves') === 'high',
   138	    effect: 'penalty',
   139	    reason: 'Gastrocnémiens hauts : potentiel limité — prioriser le soléaire (mollets assis) et un volume élevé.',
   140	  },
   141	  {
   142	    id: 'gastroc_high_seated_calf',
   143	    match: {
   144	      patterns: ['calf_raise'],
   145	      primaryMuscles: ['soleus'],
   146	      nameKeywords: ['assis', 'soleaire', 'soléaire', 'soleus'],
   147	    },
   148	    when: t => ins(t, 'gastrocnemius', 'calves') === 'high',
   149	    effect: 'boost',
   150	    reason: 'Bonne sélection : la variante assise transfère mieux le travail vers le soléaire quand les gastrocnémiens sont hauts.',
   151	  },
   152	  {
   153	    id: 'pec_sternal_low_flatpress',
   154	    match: { patterns: ['horizontal_push'], muscles: ['chest'], nameKeywords: ['développé couché', 'bench', 'couché'] },
   155	    when: t => ins(t, 'pec_sternal', 'pectorals') === 'low',
   156	    effect: 'boost',
   157	    reason: 'Insertion sternale basse : développé plat à amplitude complète très favorable au pectoral.',
   158	  },
   159	  {
   160	    id: 'pec_clav_low_incline',
   161	    match: { nameKeywords: ['incliné', 'incline'] },
   162	    when: t => ins(t, 'pec_clavicular') === 'low',
   163	    effect: 'boost',
   164	    reason: 'Chef claviculaire peu développé : développé incliné prioritaire pour combler le haut des pectoraux.',
   165	  },
   166	  {
   167	    id: 'quad_sweep_wide_legpress',
   168	    match: { nameKeywords: ['presse', 'leg press', 'hack'] },

   170	    effect: 'boost',
   171	    reason: 'Vaste latéral dominant : presse à 45° / hack squat exploitent bien le balayage du quadriceps.',
   172	  },
   173	  {

   204	    effect: 'boost',

   206	  },

   210	    when: t => (t.trunk_to_femur_ratio != null && t.trunk_to_femur_ratio < 0.90) || t.segments.torso === 'short',
   211	    effect: 'penalty',
   212	    reason: 'Tronc court : forte inclinaison au deadlift conventionnel — trap-bar ou sumo réduisent le bras de levier.',
   213	  },

   222	  },

   229	  },

   236	    effect: 'boost',

   238	  },

   245	  },

   248	    match: { patterns: ['squat', 'squat_pattern'], nameKeywords: ['squat', 'soulevé', 'deadlift'] },

   250	    effect: 'boost',
   251	    reason: 'Bassin large : stance large / sumo avantageux (tibias plus verticaux, meilleur levier hanche).',
   252	  },
   253	]
   254	
   255	// ─── Matching ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   256	
   257	function matchExercise(m: RuleMatch, ex: ExerciseLike): boolean {
   258	  const name = ex.name.toLowerCase()
   259	  const equip = ex.equipment_required ?? []
   260	  const muscles = ex.primary_muscles ?? []

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: lib/nutrition/actionable-remaining.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	import type { NutritionMacros } from '@/components/client/smart/SmartNutritionWidget'
     2	import { getRemainingNutritionTargets, type RemainingNutritionTargets } from './remaining-targets'
     3	
     4	type GenderLike = string | null | undefined
     5	
     6	export interface ActionableRemainingProfile {
     7	  gender?: GenderLike
     8	  weightKg?: number | null
     9	}
    10	
    11	export interface ActionableCompensationTrace {
    12	  overflowSource: Array<'protein' | 'carbs' | 'fat'>
    13	  overflowKcal: number
    14	  carbsReducedG: number
    15	  fatReducedG: number
    16	  proteinReducedG: number
    17	  fatFloorProtected: boolean
    18	}
    19	
    20	export interface ActionableRemainingResult {
    21	  informativeRemaining: RemainingNutritionTargets
    22	  actionableRemaining: RemainingNutritionTargets
    23	  overflow: {
    24	    protein_g: number
    25	    carbs_g: number
    26	    fat_g: number
    27	  }
    28	  fatFloorG: number
    29	  minActionableFatG: number
    30	  compensation: ActionableCompensationTrace
    31	  isExtremeCase: boolean
    32	}
    33	
    34	type MacroState = {
    35	  protein: number
    36	  carbs: number
    37	  fat: number
    38	}
    39	
    40	export function computeActionableRemaining({
    41	  target,
    42	  consumed,
    43	  profile,
    44	}: {
    45	  target: Pick<NutritionMacros, 'kcal' | 'protein_g' | 'carbs_g' | 'fat_g'>
    46	  consumed: Pick<NutritionMacros, 'kcal' | 'protein_g' | 'carbs_g' | 'fat_g'>
    47	  profile?: ActionableRemainingProfile
    48	}): ActionableRemainingResult {
    49	  const informativeRemaining = getRemainingNutritionTargets({
    50	    dailyTargets: target,
    51	    consumedToday: consumed,
    52	  })
    53	
    54	  const overflow = {
    55	    protein_g: Math.max(0, -informativeRemaining.protein),
    56	    carbs_g: Math.max(0, -informativeRemaining.carbs),
    57	    fat_g: Math.max(0, -informativeRemaining.fat),
    58	  }
    59	
    60	  const actionable: MacroState = {
    61	    protein: Math.max(0, informativeRemaining.protein),
    62	    carbs: Math.max(0, informativeRemaining.carbs),
    63	    fat: Math.max(0, informativeRemaining.fat),
    64	  }
    65	
    66	  // Cap fat floor at 85% of target so a low-fat protocol is never fully overridden
    67	  const rawFatFloorG = getFatFloorGrams(profile?.gender, profile?.weightKg)
    68	  const fatFloorG = target.fat_g > 0 ? Math.min(rawFatFloorG, round1(target.fat_g * 0.85)) : rawFatFloorG
    69	  const minActionableFatG = Math.max(0, round1(fatFloorG - consumed.fat_g))
    70	  const maxReducibleFatG = Math.max(0, round1(actionable.fat - minActionableFatG))
    71	
    72	  const overflowKcal = round1(
    73	    overflow.protein_g * 4 +
    74	    overflow.carbs_g * 4 +
    75	    overflow.fat_g * 9,
    76	  )
    77	
    78	  let remainingOverflowKcal = overflowKcal
    79	
    80	  const carbsReducedG = Math.min(actionable.carbs, round1(remainingOverflowKcal / 4))
    81	  actionable.carbs = round1(actionable.carbs - carbsReducedG)
    82	  remainingOverflowKcal = round1(Math.max(0, remainingOverflowKcal - carbsReducedG * 4))
    83	
    84	  const fatReducedG = Math.min(maxReducibleFatG, round1(remainingOverflowKcal / 9))
    85	  actionable.fat = round1(actionable.fat - fatReducedG)
    86	  remainingOverflowKcal = round1(Math.max(0, remainingOverflowKcal - fatReducedG * 9))
    87	
    88	  const proteinReducedG = Math.min(actionable.protein, round1(remainingOverflowKcal / 4))
    89	  actionable.protein = round1(actionable.protein - proteinReducedG)
    90	  remainingOverflowKcal = round1(Math.max(0, remainingOverflowKcal - proteinReducedG * 4))
    91	
    92	  const actionableRemaining: RemainingNutritionTargets = {
    93	    calories: round1(actionable.protein * 4 + actionable.carbs * 4 + actionable.fat * 9),
    94	    protein: actionable.protein,
    95	    carbs: actionable.carbs,
    96	    fat: actionable.fat,
    97	  }
    98	
    99	  const overflowSource: Array<'protein' | 'carbs' | 'fat'> = []
   100	  if (overflow.protein_g > 0) overflowSource.push('protein')
   101	  if (overflow.carbs_g > 0) overflowSource.push('carbs')
   102	  if (overflow.fat_g > 0) overflowSource.push('fat')
   103	
   104	  return {
   105	    informativeRemaining,
   106	    actionableRemaining,
   107	    overflow,
   108	    fatFloorG,
   109	    minActionableFatG,
   110	    compensation: {
   111	      overflowSource,
   112	      overflowKcal,
   113	      carbsReducedG,
   114	      fatReducedG,
   115	      proteinReducedG,
   116	      fatFloorProtected: fatReducedG < round1(overflowKcal / 9) || minActionableFatG > 0,
   117	    },
   118	    isExtremeCase: proteinReducedG > 0 || remainingOverflowKcal > 0.1,
   119	  }
   120	}
   121	
   122	function getFatFloorGrams(gender: GenderLike, weightKg?: number | null): number {
   123	  if (!weightKg || weightKg <= 0) return 0
   124	  const ratio = gender === 'female' ? 0.7 : 0.6
   125	  return round1(weightKg * ratio)
   126	}
   127	
   128	function round1(value: number): number {
   129	  return Math.round(value * 10) / 10
   130	}

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: lib/nutrition/adaptiveTdee.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	export interface WeightSample {
     2	  date: string       // ISO date 'YYYY-MM-DD'
     3	  weight_kg: number
     4	}
     5	
     6	export interface AdaptiveTdeeInput {
     7	  weightSamples: WeightSample[]
     8	  avgIntakeKcal: number
     9	  caloriesSource: 'logs' | 'protocol'
    10	  windowDays: number
    11	  trackedDays?: number
    12	  // v2 signals
    13	  gender?: 'male' | 'female' | 'other' | 'prefer_not_to_say' | null
    14	  cyclePhases?: string[]        // cycle_phase per day in window (for female clients)
    15	  cycleConfidence?: 'estimated' | 'learning' | 'calibrated' | null
    16	  anchoredToProtocol?: boolean  // window starts at protocol share date
    17	}
    18	
    19	export interface AdaptiveTdeeResult {
    20	  tdeeAdaptive: number
    21	  weightDeltaKg: number
    22	  slopeKgPerDay: number
    23	  confidence: 'high' | 'medium' | 'low'
    24	  confidenceScore: number
    25	  confidenceReasons: string[]
    26	  // v2
    27	  appliedLutealCorrection: boolean
    28	  smoothedWeightUsed: boolean
    29	}
    30	
    31	export function linearRegression(samples: WeightSample[]): { slope: number; intercept: number } {
    32	  const sorted = [...samples].sort((a, b) => a.date.localeCompare(b.date))
    33	  const origin = new Date(sorted[0].date).getTime()
    34	  const points = sorted.map(s => ({
    35	    x: (new Date(s.date).getTime() - origin) / 86400000,
    36	    y: s.weight_kg,
    37	  }))
    38	  const n = points.length
    39	  const sumX = points.reduce((acc, p) => acc + p.x, 0)
    40	  const sumY = points.reduce((acc, p) => acc + p.y, 0)
    41	  const sumXY = points.reduce((acc, p) => acc + p.x * p.y, 0)
    42	  const sumX2 = points.reduce((acc, p) => acc + p.x * p.x, 0)
    43	  const denom = n * sumX2 - sumX * sumX
    44	  const slope = denom === 0 ? 0 : (n * sumXY - sumX * sumY) / denom
    45	  const intercept = (sumY - slope * sumX) / n
    46	  return { slope, intercept }
    47	}
    48	
    49	/**
    50	 * Apply 3-day centered moving average to smooth daily weight fluctuations.
    51	 * Reduces noise from water retention, glycogen, meal timing.
    52	 * Edge points use 2-day average (no center available).
    53	 */
    54	export function smoothWeightSamples(samples: WeightSample[]): WeightSample[] {
    55	  if (samples.length < 3) return samples
    56	  const sorted = [...samples].sort((a, b) => a.date.localeCompare(b.date))
    57	  return sorted.map((s, i) => {
    58	    const prev = i > 0 ? sorted[i - 1].weight_kg : null
    59	    const next = i < sorted.length - 1 ? sorted[i + 1].weight_kg : null
    60	    const vals = [prev, s.weight_kg, next].filter((v): v is number => v !== null)
    61	    return { date: s.date, weight_kg: parseFloat((vals.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / vals.length).toFixed(3)) }
    62	  })
    63	}
    64	
    65	/**
    66	 * Detect if the majority of the window is in luteal phase.
    67	 * Luteal phase raises BMR ~5% via progesterone and causes 0.5–2 kg water retention.
    68	 * Reference: Davidsen et al. 2007, Oosthuyse & Bosch 2010.
    69	 */
    70	export function detectLutealMajority(cyclePhases: string[]): boolean {
    71	  if (cyclePhases.length === 0) return false
    72	  const lutealCount = cyclePhases.filter(p => p === 'luteal').length
    73	  return lutealCount / cyclePhases.length > 0.5
    74	}
    75	
    76	export function calcAdaptiveTdee(input: AdaptiveTdeeInput): AdaptiveTdeeResult {
    77	  if (input.weightSamples.length < 2) {
    78	    throw new Error('At least 2 weight samples required')
    79	  }
    80	
    81	  // v2 — smooth weights before regression to reduce daily noise
    82	  const smoothed = smoothWeightSamples(input.weightSamples)
    83	  const smoothedWeightUsed = smoothed.some((s, i) => s.weight_kg !== input.weightSamples[i]?.weight_kg)
    84	
    85	  // v2 — luteal correction for female clients
    86	  const isFemale = input.gender === 'female'
    87	  const lutealMajority = isFemale && input.cyclePhases
    88	    ? detectLutealMajority(input.cyclePhases)
    89	    : false
    90	  const appliedLutealCorrection = lutealMajority
    91	
    92	  // Adjust smoothed weights: subtract estimated water retention if luteal majority
    93	  // Luteal phase causes avg +0.8 kg water retention (Davidsen 2007)
    94	  const samplesForRegression = appliedLutealCorrection
    95	    ? smoothed.map(s => ({ ...s, weight_kg: s.weight_kg - 0.8 }))
    96	    : smoothed
    97	
    98	  const { slope } = linearRegression(samplesForRegression)
    99	
   100	  // MacroFactor method: TDEE = intake - (slope × 7700)
   101	  let rawTdee = input.avgIntakeKcal - slope * 7700
   102	
   103	  // v2 — luteal BMR correction: progesterone raises BMR ~5% (~+100 kcal on 2000 base)
   104	  // If majority of window is luteal, the avg intake was already elevated → add back
   105	  if (appliedLutealCorrection) {
   106	    rawTdee += 100
   107	  }
   108	
   109	  const tdeeAdaptive = Math.round(rawTdee / 10) * 10
   110	  const weightDeltaKg = parseFloat((slope * input.windowDays).toFixed(2))
   111	
   112	  // ── Confidence scoring ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   113	  const confidenceReasons: string[] = []
   114	  let confidenceScore = 100
   115	
   116	  // Calorie source
   117	  if (input.caloriesSource === 'protocol') {
   118	    confidenceScore -= 45
   119	    confidenceReasons.push("Apports estimés depuis le protocole (pas les logs) — précision réduite")
   120	  } else {
   121	    confidenceReasons.push("Apports basés sur les repas loggés")
   122	  }
   123	
   124	  // Weight sample density
   125	  if (input.weightSamples.length < 4) {
   126	    confidenceScore -= 50
   127	    confidenceReasons.push(`Seulement ${input.weightSamples.length} pesée(s) — minimum 4 recommandées`)
   128	  } else if (input.weightSamples.length < 6) {
   129	    confidenceScore -= 10
   130	    confidenceReasons.push(`${input.weightSamples.length} pesées — couverture partielle`)
   131	  } else {
   132	    confidenceReasons.push(`${input.weightSamples.length} pesées — couverture solide`)
   133	  }
   134	
   135	  // Nutritional tracking compliance
   136	  if (typeof input.trackedDays === 'number') {
   137	    if (input.trackedDays < Math.max(5, Math.floor(input.windowDays / 2))) {
   138	      confidenceScore -= 20
   139	      confidenceReasons.push(`${input.trackedDays} jours nutritionnels suivis sur ${input.windowDays} — suivi insuffisant`)
   140	    } else {
   141	      confidenceReasons.push(`${input.trackedDays} jours nutritionnels suivis — suivi régulier`)
   142	    }
   143	  }
   144	
   145	  // v2 — window anchoring bonus
   146	  if (input.anchoredToProtocol) {
   147	    confidenceScore += 5
   148	    confidenceReasons.push("Fenêtre ancrée sur le début du protocole — données homogènes")
   149	  } else {
   150	    confidenceReasons.push("Fenêtre non ancrée — peut inclure des données pré-protocole")
   151	  }
   152	
   153	  // v2 — cycle signal quality for female clients
   154	  if (isFemale) {
   155	    if (!input.cyclePhases || input.cyclePhases.length === 0) {
   156	      confidenceScore -= 10
   157	      confidenceReasons.push("Pas de données cycle menstruel — correction lutéale impossible")
   158	    } else if (input.cycleConfidence === 'estimated') {
   159	      confidenceScore -= 10
   160	      confidenceReasons.push("Cycle menstruel estimé (pas de logs) — correction approximative")
   161	    } else if (appliedLutealCorrection) {
   162	      confidenceReasons.push("Phase lutéale majoritaire — correction rétention hydrique appliquée (+0.8 kg, +100 kcal)")
   163	    } else {
   164	      confidenceReasons.push("Phase non-lutéale — pas de correction nécessaire")
   165	    }
   166	  }
   167	
   168	  // v2 — window length signal
   169	  if (input.windowDays < 10) {
   170	    confidenceScore -= 15
   171	    confidenceReasons.push(`Fenêtre courte (${input.windowDays}j) — tendance moins fiable`)
   172	  } else if (input.windowDays >= 14) {
   173	    confidenceReasons.push(`Fenêtre ${input.windowDays}j — durée optimale`)
   174	  }
   175	
   176	  const confidence: 'high' | 'medium' | 'low' =
   177	    confidenceScore >= 80 ? 'high' : confidenceScore >= 55 ? 'medium' : 'low'
   178	
   179	  return {
   180	    tdeeAdaptive,
   181	    weightDeltaKg,
   182	    slopeKgPerDay: slope,
   183	    confidence,
   184	    confidenceScore: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, confidenceScore)),
   185	    confidenceReasons,
   186	    appliedLutealCorrection,
   187	    smoothedWeightUsed,
   188	  }
   189	}

FILE: lib/nutrition/dataGovernance.ts

     1	export type NutritionDataMode = "bilan" | "realtime";
     2	
     3	export type NutritionSignalCategory =
     4	  | "structural"
     5	  | "dynamic"
     6	  | "hybrid";
     7	
     8	export type NutritionSignalSource =
     9	  | "assessment"
    10	  | "checkin"
    11	  | "manual_override"
    12	  | "profile"
    13	  | "derived";
    14	
    15	export type NutritionSignalKey =
    16	  | "weight_kg"
    17	  | "height_cm"
    18	  | "body_fat_pct"
    19	  | "lean_mass_kg"
    20	  | "muscle_mass_kg"
    21	  | "visceral_fat_level"
    22	  | "bmr_kcal_measured"
    23	  | "weekly_frequency"
    24	  | "session_duration_min"
    25	  | "training_calories_weekly"
    26	  | "daily_steps"
    27	  | "cardio_frequency"
    28	  | "cardio_duration_min"
    29	  | "sleep_duration_h"
    30	  | "sleep_quality"
    31	  | "stress_level"
    32	  | "energy_level"
    33	  | "caffeine_daily_mg"
    34	  | "alcohol_weekly"
    35	  | "work_hours_per_week"
    36	  | "occupation_multiplier";
    37	
    38	export type NutritionSignalGovernance = {
    39	  category: NutritionSignalCategory;
    40	  calculationRole: string;
    41	  defaultSource: NutritionSignalSource;
    42	  fallbackSources: NutritionSignalSource[];
    43	  realtime: {
    44	    enabled: boolean;
    45	    windowDays: number | null;
    46	  };
    47	  bilan: {
    48	    useSelectedBilan: boolean;
    49	    allowAnchoredRealtimeOverlay: boolean;
    50	    overlayWindowDays: number | null;
    51	  };
    52	};
    53	
    54	export const DEFAULT_REALTIME_WINDOW_DAYS = 7;
    55	
    56	export const NUTRITION_SIGNAL_GOVERNANCE: Record<
    57	  NutritionSignalKey,
    58	  NutritionSignalGovernance
    59	> = {
    60	  weight_kg: {
    61	    category: "hybrid",
    62	    calculationRole: "BMR, macros, NEAT, hydration",
    63	    defaultSource: "assessment",
    64	    fallbackSources: ["checkin", "manual_override"],
    65	    realtime: { enabled: true, windowDays: DEFAULT_REALTIME_WINDOW_DAYS },
    66	    bilan: {
    67	      useSelectedBilan: true,
    68	      allowAnchoredRealtimeOverlay: true,
    69	      overlayWindowDays: DEFAULT_REALTIME_WINDOW_DAYS,
    70	    },
    71	  },
    72	  height_cm: {
    73	    category: "structural",
    74	    calculationRole: "BMR fallback",
    75	    defaultSource: "assessment",
    76	    fallbackSources: ["manual_override"],
    77	    realtime: { enabled: false, windowDays: null },

FILE: lib/nutrition/engine/cycleSync.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	// lib/nutrition/engine/cycleSync.ts
     2	// Cycle-phase macro adjustments — Davidsen 2007, Oosthuyse & Bosch 2010
     3	// Only applies when client gender === 'female'. Additive layer on top of base macros.
     4	
     5	import type { StryvrmMacros } from './types'
     6	
     7	export type CyclePhase = 'follicular' | 'ovulatory' | 'luteal' | 'menstrual'
     8	
     9	export interface CycleSyncAdjustment {
    10	  caloriesDelta: number       // kcal/day vs base
    11	  proteinDelta: number        // g/day
    12	  carbsDelta: number          // g/day
    13	  fatDelta: number            // g/day
    14	  hydrationDeltaMl: number    // ml/day
    15	  notes: string[]             // coach-facing guidance
    16	  optimalForDeficit: boolean  // true = favorable phase for caloric restriction
    17	}
    18	
    19	const ADJUSTMENTS: Record<CyclePhase, CycleSyncAdjustment> = {
    20	  follicular: {
    21	    caloriesDelta: 0,
    22	    proteinDelta: 0,
    23	    carbsDelta: 0,
    24	    fatDelta: 0,
    25	    hydrationDeltaMl: 0,
    26	    notes: [
    27	      "Phase optimale pour le déficit calorique — sensibilité à l'insuline élevée.",
    28	      "Glucides bien tolérés — privilégier les séances d'intensité haute.",
    29	      "Récupération rapide — idéal pour augmenter la fréquence d'entraînement.",
    30	    ],
    31	    optimalForDeficit: true,
    32	  },
    33	  ovulatory: {
    34	    caloriesDelta: 0,
    35	    proteinDelta: 0,
    36	    carbsDelta: 0,
    37	    fatDelta: 0,
    38	    hydrationDeltaMl: 0,
    39	    notes: [
    40	      "Pic de performance — force et endurance maximales.",
    41	      "Maintenir les calories cibles sans restriction supplémentaire.",
    42	      "Attention à la laxité ligamentaire accrue (oestrogène élevé).",
    43	    ],
    44	    optimalForDeficit: true,
    45	  },
    46	  luteal: {
    47	    // Progesterone increases BMR ~5% = +100 kcal sur base 2000 kcal
    48	    // Protein catabolism increases — +10g protein protective
    49	    // Serotonin drops → carb cravings — +20g carbs reduces cravings
    50	    caloriesDelta: 100,
    51	    proteinDelta: 10,
    52	    carbsDelta: 20,
    53	    fatDelta: 0,
    54	    hydrationDeltaMl: 250,   // rétention hydrique — compenser
    55	    notes: [
    56	      "Métabolisme augmenté (~5%) — ajouter 100 kcal pour soutenir la récupération.",
    57	      "Protéines supplémentaires anti-cataboliques (progestérone élève le turnover protéique).",
    58	      "Glucides complexes recommandés — soutiennent la sérotonine et réduisent les fringales.",
    59	      "Hydratation augmentée — compenser la rétention hydrique prémenstruelle.",
    60	      "Magnésium (400 mg/j) et oméga-3 — réduisent crampes et inflammation.",
    61	    ],
    62	    optimalForDeficit: false,
    63	  },
    64	  menstrual: {
    65	    caloriesDelta: 0,
    66	    proteinDelta: 5,         // soutien musculaire en période de perte de fer
    67	    carbsDelta: 0,
    68	    fatDelta: 5,             // oméga-3 anti-inflammatoires
    69	    hydrationDeltaMl: 250,
    70	    notes: [
    71	      "Maintenir les calories — ne pas couper en phase menstruelle.",
    72	      "Protéines et fer en priorité — aliments riches en fer hémique (viande rouge, légumineuses).",
    73	      "Lipides anti-inflammatoires (oméga-3) — réduisent dysménorrhée.",
    74	      "Hydratation augmentée — pertes physiologiques élevées.",
    75	      "Volume d'entraînement réduit si énergie basse — ne pas forcer.",
    76	    ],
    77	    optimalForDeficit: false,
    78	  },
    79	}
    80	
    81	export function getCycleSyncAdjustment(phase: CyclePhase): CycleSyncAdjustment {
    82	  return ADJUSTMENTS[phase]
    83	}
    84	
    85	export function adjustMacrosForPhase(
    86	  base: StryvrmMacros,
    87	  phase: CyclePhase,
    88	): StryvrmMacros & { hydrationDeltaMl: number } {
    89	  const adj = ADJUSTMENTS[phase]
    90	  const protein_g = Math.max(0, Math.round(base.protein_g + adj.proteinDelta))
    91	  const carbs_g = Math.max(0, Math.round(base.carbs_g + adj.carbsDelta))
    92	  const fat_g = Math.max(0, Math.round(base.fat_g + adj.fatDelta))
    93	  const calories = protein_g * 4 + carbs_g * 4 + fat_g * 9
    94	  return { protein_g, carbs_g, fat_g, calories, hydrationDeltaMl: adj.hydrationDeltaMl }
    95	}
    96	
    97	// Standard 28-day cycle phase boundaries (Davidsen et al.)
    98	// Day 1-5: menstrual, 6-13: follicular, 14-16: ovulatory, 17-28: luteal
    99	export function detectCurrentPhase(cycleDay: number): CyclePhase {
   100	  const day = ((cycleDay - 1) % 28) + 1  // normalize to 1-28
   101	  if (day <= 5) return 'menstrual'
   102	  if (day <= 13) return 'follicular'
   103	  if (day <= 16) return 'ovulatory'
   104	  return 'luteal'
   105	}

     1	import { computeMacroEnergy } from '@/lib/nutrition/energy'

     3	export type CategoryL1 =

    65	export interface EntryDraft {

    71	/** Profil pour scaling portions anatomiques */
    72	export interface PortionScalingProfile {
    73	  hand_length_cm?: number | null
    74	  height_cm?: number | null
    75	}
    76	
    77	export interface PortionSize {
    78	  key: string
    79	  label: string
    80	  baseG: number
    81	  /** 'hand' = scale avec longueur main user, 'fixed' = ustensile/unité produit, taille constante */
    82	  scales: "hand" | "fixed"
    83	  description: string
    84	}
    85	
    86	/**
    87	 * Portions visuelles standard.
    88	 * Référence main adulte: 18cm (longueur poignet → bout majeur).
    89	 * Anatomique (paume/poing/pouce) → scale × (handCm / 18).
    90	 * Fixed (cuillère/verre/œuf) → constant.
    91	 */
    92	export const PORTION_SIZES: PortionSize[] = [
    93	  // Anatomiques (scale hand)

   106	  { key: "plate",           label: "Assiette standard",    baseG: 300, scales: "fixed", description: "Légumes cuits" },
   107	  { key: "bread-slice",     label: "Tranche de pain",      baseG: 35,  scales: "fixed", description: "Pain standard" },
   108	  { key: "egg-medium",      label: "Œuf moyen",            baseG: 55,  scales: "fixed", description: "Œuf entier moyen" },
   109	  { key: "glass",           label: "Verre standard",       baseG: 200, scales: "fixed", description: "Liquides (eau/lait/jus)" },
   110	]
   111	
   112	/** Référence adulte (longueur main poignet → majeur, cm) */
   113	export const REFERENCE_HAND_CM = 18.0
   114	/** Ratio Pheasant 2003 — longueur main ≈ taille × 0.108 */
   115	export const HEIGHT_TO_HAND_RATIO = 0.108
   116	/** Multiplicateurs disponibles dans l'UI (×1 à ×5) */
   117	export const PORTION_MULTIPLIERS = [1, 1.5, 2, 2.5, 3, 4, 5] as const
   118	
   119	/**
   120	 * Retourne longueur main estimée (cm) : override user → dérivée taille → défaut 18.
   121	 */
   122	export function resolveHandLengthCm(profile: PortionScalingProfile | null | undefined): number {
   123	  if (!profile) return REFERENCE_HAND_CM
   124	  if (profile.hand_length_cm && profile.hand_length_cm > 0) return profile.hand_length_cm
   125	  if (profile.height_cm && profile.height_cm > 0) return profile.height_cm * HEIGHT_TO_HAND_RATIO
   126	  return REFERENCE_HAND_CM
   127	}
   128	
   129	/**
   130	 * Calcule grammes scalés d'une portion selon profil + multiplicateur.
   131	 * Multiplicateur appliqué après scaling main (×2 = deux fois la portion).
   132	 */
   133	export function getScaledPortionG(
   134	  portion: PortionSize,
   135	  profile: PortionScalingProfile | null | undefined,
   136	  multiplier: number = 1
   137	): number {
   138	  const mult = Math.max(0.5, Math.min(multiplier, 10))
   139	  if (portion.scales === "fixed") return Math.round(portion.baseG * mult)
   140	  const handCm = resolveHandLengthCm(profile)
   141	  const factor = handCm / REFERENCE_HAND_CM
   142	  return Math.round(portion.baseG * factor * mult)
   143	}
   144	
   145	/** True si profil a override main explicite (badge UI "ajusté à ta main") */
   146	export function isHandOverrideSet(profile: PortionScalingProfile | null | undefined): boolean {
   147	  return !!(profile?.hand_length_cm && profile.hand_length_cm > 0)
   148	}
