   186	  eau: "Eau & Hydratation",
   187	  chauds: "Boissons chaudes",
   188	  "jus-smoothies": "Jus & Smoothies",
   189	  "laits-vegetaux": "Laits végétaux",
   190	  "sports-drinks": "Boissons sportives",
   191	  alcools: "Alcools",
   192	}
   193	
   194	/** Calcule les macros d'une entrée depuis food_item + quantité */
   195	export function calcEntryMacros(
   196	  item: FoodItem,
   197	  quantity_g: number
   198	): Pick<NutritionEntry, "calories_kcal" | "protein_g" | "carbs_g" | "fat_g" | "fiber_g"> {
   199	  const factor = quantity_g / 100
   200	  const protein_g = Math.round(item.protein_per_100g * factor * 10) / 10
   201	  const carbs_g = Math.round(item.carbs_per_100g * factor * 10) / 10
   202	  const fat_g = Math.round(item.fat_per_100g * factor * 10) / 10
   203	  const fiber_g = Math.round(item.fiber_per_100g * factor * 10) / 10
   204	  return {
   205	    calories_kcal: computeMacroEnergy({ protein_g, carbs_g, fat_g, fiber_g }),
   206	    protein_g,
   207	    carbs_g,
   208	    fat_g,
   209	    fiber_g,
   210	  }
   211	}
   212	
   213	/** Somme les macros d'une liste d'entrées draft */
   214	export function sumDraftMacros(entries: EntryDraft[]): {
   215	  calories: number
   216	  protein: number
   217	  carbs: number
   218	  fat: number
   219	  fiber: number
   220	} {
   221	  return entries.reduce(
   222	    (acc, e) => {
   223	      const m = calcEntryMacros(e.food_item, e.quantity_g)
   224	      return {
   225	        calories: Math.round((acc.calories + m.calories_kcal) * 10) / 10,
   226	        protein: Math.round((acc.protein + m.protein_g) * 10) / 10,
   227	        carbs: Math.round((acc.carbs + m.carbs_g) * 10) / 10,
   228	        fat: Math.round((acc.fat + m.fat_g) * 10) / 10,
   229	        fiber: Math.round((acc.fiber + m.fiber_g) * 10) / 10,
   230	      }
   231	    },
   232	    { calories: 0, protein: 0, carbs: 0, fat: 0, fiber: 0 }
   233	  )
   234	}

   114	function normalizeText(value: string): string {
   115	  return value
   116	    .toLowerCase()
   117	    .normalize("NFD")
   118	    .replace(/[̀-ͯ]/g, "")
   119	    .replace(/œ/g, "oe")
   120	    .replace(/æ/g, "ae")
   121	}
   122	
   123	function nameHasAny(item: Pick<FoodItem, "name_fr">, keywords: string[]): boolean {
   124	  const name = normalizeText(item.name_fr)
   125	  return keywords.some((keyword) => name.includes(normalizeText(keyword)))
   126	}
   127	
   128	function hasAnyText(value: string, keywords: string[]): boolean {
   129	  const text = normalizeText(value)
   130	  return keywords.some((keyword) => text.includes(normalizeText(keyword)))
   131	}
   132	
   133	function hasWordText(value: string, keywords: string[]): boolean {
   134	  const text = ` ${normalizeText(value)} `
   135	  return keywords.some((keyword) => {
   136	    const normalized = normalizeText(keyword)
   137	    return normalized ? text.includes(` ${normalized} `) : false
   138	  })
   139	}
   140	
   141	function hasWordPrefixText(value: string, keywords: string[]): boolean {
   142	  const text = normalizeText(value)
   143	  return keywords.some((keyword) => {
   144	    const normalized = normalizeText(keyword)
   145	    return normalized ? text === normalized || text.startsWith(`${normalized} `) || text.includes(` ${normalized} `) : false
   146	  })
   147	}
   148

FILE: lib/nutrition/public-tdee.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	import { calculateMacros, type MacroGoal, type MacroGender } from "@/lib/formulas/macros";
     2	
     3	export type PublicTdeeMenstrualPhase = "follicular" | "luteal" | "unknown";
     4	
     5	export interface PublicTdeeInput {
     6	  gender: MacroGender;
     7	  age: number;
     8	  heightCm: number;
     9	  weightKg: number;
    10	  goal: MacroGoal;
    11	  dailySteps?: number;
    12	  occupationMultiplier?: number;
    13	  workoutsPerWeek?: number;
    14	  sessionDurationMin?: number;
    15	  cardioSessionsPerWeek?: number;
    16	  cardioDurationMin?: number;
    17	  bodyFatPct?: number;
    18	  bmrMeasuredKcal?: number;
    19	  sleepHours?: number;
    20	  stressLevel?: number;
    21	  caffeineDailyMg?: number;
    22	  alcoholWeekly?: number;
    23	  menstrualPhase?: PublicTdeeMenstrualPhase;
    24	}
    25	
    26	export interface PublicTdeeMacros {
    27	  calories: number;
    28	  protein_g: number;
    29	  carbs_g: number;
    30	  fat_g: number;
    31	}
    32	
    33	export interface PublicTdeeDaySplit {
    34	  trainingDays: number;
    35	  restDays: number;
    36	  spreadKcal: number;
    37	  trainingDayCalories: number;
    38	  restDayCalories: number;
    39	  averageCalories: number;
    40	  weeklyCalories: number;
    41	  trainingMacros: PublicTdeeMacros;
    42	  restMacros: PublicTdeeMacros;
    43	}
    44	
    45	export interface PublicTdeePlan {
    46	  input: PublicTdeeInput;
    47	  result: ReturnType<typeof calculateMacros>;
    48	  split: PublicTdeeDaySplit;
    49	  confidence: {
    50	    score: number;
    51	    label: "high" | "medium" | "low";
    52	  };
    53	  assumptions: string[];
    54	  guardrails: string[];
    55	  premiumSummary: string[];
    56	  exportText: string;
    57	  shareQuery: string;
    58	}
    59	
    60	export interface PublicTdeeValidationIssue {
    61	  field: keyof PublicTdeeInput | "unknown";
    62	  message: string;
    63	}
    64	
    65	function clamp(value: number, min: number, max: number) {
    66	  return Math.min(max, Math.max(min, value));
    67	}
    68	
    69	function round(value: number) {
    70	  return Math.round(value);
    71	}
    72	
    73	function buildMacros(calories: number, protein: number, fat: number): PublicTdeeMacros {
    74	  const proteinCalories = round(protein * 4);
    75	  const maxFatCalories = Math.max(0, calories - proteinCalories);
    76	  const cappedFatCalories = Math.min(round(fat * 9), maxFatCalories);
    77	  const carbs = Math.max(0, round((calories - proteinCalories - cappedFatCalories) / 4));
    78	  return {
    79	    calories: round(proteinCalories + cappedFatCalories + carbs * 4),
    80	    protein_g: round(protein),
    81	    carbs_g: carbs,
    82	    fat_g: round(cappedFatCalories / 9),
    83	  };
    84	}
    85	
    86	export function validatePublicTdeeInput(input: Partial<PublicTdeeInput>): PublicTdeeValidationIssue[] {
    87	  const issues: PublicTdeeValidationIssue[] = [];
    88	
    89	  if (input.gender !== "male" && input.gender !== "female") {
    90	    issues.push({ field: "gender", message: "Le sexe est requis." });
    91	  }
    92	
    93	  if (input.age == null || Number.isNaN(input.age) || input.age < 15 || input.age > 85) {
    94	    issues.push({ field: "age", message: "L'âge doit être compris entre 15 et 85 ans." });
    95	  }
    96	
    97	  if (input.heightCm == null || Number.isNaN(input.heightCm) || input.heightCm < 140 || input.heightCm > 220) {
    98	    issues.push({ field: "heightCm", message: "La taille doit être comprise entre 140 et 220 cm." });
    99	  }
   100	
   101	  if (input.weightKg == null || Number.isNaN(input.weightKg) || input.weightKg < 40 || input.weightKg > 250) {
   102	    issues.push({ field: "weightKg", message: "Le poids doit être compris entre 40 et 250 kg." });
   103	  }
   104	
   105	  if (input.goal !== "deficit" && input.goal !== "maintenance" && input.goal !== "surplus") {
   106	    issues.push({ field: "goal", message: "L'objectif est requis." });
   107	  }
   108	
   109	  return issues;
   110	}
   111	
   112	function buildConfidenceScore(input: PublicTdeeInput, result: ReturnType<typeof calculateMacros>) {
   113	  let score = 45;
   114	
   115	  if (input.bodyFatPct != null) score += 10;
   116	  if (input.bmrMeasuredKcal != null) score += 15;
   117	  if ((input.dailySteps ?? 0) > 0) score += 8;
   118	  if ((input.workoutsPerWeek ?? 0) > 0) score += 8;
   119	  if ((input.sessionDurationMin ?? 0) > 0) score += 4;
   120	  if ((input.cardioSessionsPerWeek ?? 0) > 0 && (input.cardioDurationMin ?? 0) > 0) score += 4;
   121	  if (input.sleepHours != null) score += 3;
   122	  if (input.stressLevel != null) score += 3;
   123	  if (input.caffeineDailyMg != null || input.alcoholWeekly != null) score += 2;
   124	  if (input.gender === "female" && input.menstrualPhase && input.menstrualPhase !== "unknown") score += 3;
   125	  if ((input.occupationMultiplier ?? 1) !== 1) score += 2;
   126	  if (result.dataProvenance.bmrSource === "measured") score += 3;
   127	
   128	  const capped = clamp(score, 0, 100);
   129	  return {
   130	    score: capped,
   131	    label: capped >= 80 ? "high" : capped >= 60 ? "medium" : "low",
   132	  } as const;
   133	}
   134	
   135	function buildAssumptions(input: PublicTdeeInput, result: ReturnType<typeof calculateMacros>) {
   136	  const assumptions: string[] = [];
   137	
   138	  if (result.dataProvenance.bmrSource !== "measured") {
   139	    assumptions.push("BMR estimé par formule plutôt que mesuré.");
   140	  }
   141	  if (result.dataProvenance.lbmSource === "boer") {
   142	    assumptions.push("Masse maigre estimée via Boer faute de body fat ou de masse maigre mesurée.");
   143	  }
   144	  if ((input.cardioSessionsPerWeek ?? 0) === 0 || (input.cardioDurationMin ?? 0) === 0) {
   145	    assumptions.push("Le cardio n'est pas détaillé séparément.");
   146	  }
   147	  if ((input.workoutsPerWeek ?? 0) === 0) {
   148	    assumptions.push("Pas de différenciation training/rest si aucune séance n'est renseignée.");
   149	  }
   150	  if (input.gender === "female" && (!input.menstrualPhase || input.menstrualPhase === "unknown")) {
   151	    assumptions.push("Aucun ajustement cycle menstruel appliqué.");
   152	  }
   153	  if (input.sleepHours == null && input.stressLevel == null) {
   154	    assumptions.push("Aucun module récupération n'a été appliqué.");
   155	  }
   156	
   157	  return assumptions;
   158	}
   159	
   160	function buildGuardrails(input: PublicTdeeInput, result: ReturnType<typeof calculateMacros>) {
   161	  const guardrails: string[] = [];
   162	
   163	  guardrails.push(...result.warnings.map((warning) => warning.replace(/^⚠️\s*/, "")));
   164	
   165	  if (result.breakdown.bmr < 1300) {
   166	    guardrails.push("BMR très bas, prudence sur les déficits agressifs.");
   167	  }
   168	  if (input.goal === "surplus" && result.estimatedBF > (input.gender === "male" ? 18 : 28)) {
   169	    guardrails.push("Surplus peu pertinent si le taux de masse grasse reste élevé.");
   170	  }
   171	  if (input.goal === "deficit" && result.recoveryAdaptation) {
   172	    guardrails.push("Le déficit est modulé à la hausse si récupération trop faible.");
   173	  }
   174	
   175	  if (guardrails.length === 0) {
   176	    guardrails.push("Plan conservateur construit à partir des données disponibles.");
   177	  }
   178	
   179	  return Array.from(new Set(guardrails)).slice(0, 6);
   180	}
   181	
   182	function buildSplit(input: PublicTdeeInput, result: ReturnType<typeof calculateMacros>): PublicTdeeDaySplit {
   183	  const trainingDays = clamp(Math.round(input.workoutsPerWeek ?? 0), 0, 7);
   184	  const restDays = 7 - trainingDays;
   185	  const baseCalories = round(result.calories);
   186	  const exerciseLoad = round(result.breakdown.eat + result.breakdown.eatCardio);
   187	
   188	  const spreadKcal =
   189	    trainingDays > 0 && restDays > 0
   190	      ? clamp(round(Math.max(80, exerciseLoad * 0.8 + (result.breakdown.neat * 0.05))), 80, 320)
   191	      : 0;
   192	
   193	  const trainingOffset = restDays > 0 ? round((spreadKcal * restDays) / 7) : 0;
   194	  const restOffset = trainingDays > 0 ? round((spreadKcal * trainingDays) / 7) : 0;
   195	
   196	  const trainingDayCalories = baseCalories + trainingOffset;
   197	  const restDayCalories = baseCalories - restOffset;
   198	  const averageCalories = baseCalories;
   199	  const weeklyCalories = baseCalories * 7;
   200	
   201	  const trainingMacros = buildMacros(trainingDayCalories, result.macros.p, result.macros.f);
   202	  const restMacros = buildMacros(restDayCalories, result.macros.p, result.macros.f);
   203	
   204	  return {
   205	    trainingDays,
   206	    restDays,
   207	    spreadKcal,
   208	    trainingDayCalories,
   209	    restDayCalories,
   210	    averageCalories,
   211	    weeklyCalories,
   212	    trainingMacros,
   213	    restMacros,
   214	  };
   215	}
   216	
   217	function buildPremiumSummary(input: PublicTdeeInput, result: ReturnType<typeof calculateMacros>, confidence: PublicTdeePlan["confidence"]) {
   218	  return [
   219	    `BMR ${result.dataProvenance.bmrSource === "measured" ? "mesuré" : "estimé"} · confiance ${confidence.score}/100`,
   220	    `NEAT piloté par ${((input.dailySteps ?? 0) > 0 ? "les pas" : "un niveau neutre")} et le contexte pro.`,
   221	    `EAT basé sur ${input.workoutsPerWeek ?? 0} séance${(input.workoutsPerWeek ?? 0) > 1 ? "s" : ""} / semaine.`,
   222	    `TEF conservé comme couche stable à partir du BMR.`,
   223	  ];
   224	}
   225	
   226	function buildShareQuery(input: PublicTdeeInput) {
   227	  const params = new URLSearchParams();
   228	  params.set("gender", input.gender);
   229	  params.set("age", String(input.age));
   230	  params.set("height", String(input.heightCm));
   231	  params.set("weight", String(input.weightKg));
   232	  params.set("goal", input.goal);
   233	
   234	  if (input.dailySteps != null) params.set("steps", String(input.dailySteps));
   235	  if (input.occupationMultiplier != null) params.set("occupation", String(input.occupationMultiplier));
   236	  if (input.workoutsPerWeek != null) params.set("workouts", String(input.workoutsPerWeek));
   237	  if (input.sessionDurationMin != null) params.set("duration", String(input.sessionDurationMin));
   238	  if (input.cardioSessionsPerWeek != null) params.set("cardio", String(input.cardioSessionsPerWeek));
   239	  if (input.cardioDurationMin != null) params.set("cardioDuration", String(input.cardioDurationMin));
   240	  if (input.bodyFatPct != null) params.set("bodyFat", String(input.bodyFatPct));
   241	  if (input.bmrMeasuredKcal != null) params.set("bmr", String(input.bmrMeasuredKcal));
   242	  if (input.sleepHours != null) params.set("sleep", String(input.sleepHours));
   243	  if (input.stressLevel != null) params.set("stress", String(input.stressLevel));
   244	  if (input.caffeineDailyMg != null) params.set("caffeine", String(input.caffeineDailyMg));
   245	  if (input.alcoholWeekly != null) params.set("alcohol", String(input.alcoholWeekly));
   246	  if (input.menstrualPhase && input.menstrualPhase !== "unknown") params.set("cycle", input.menstrualPhase);
   247	
   248	  return params.toString();
   249	}
   250	
   251	export function computePublicTdeePlan(input: PublicTdeeInput): PublicTdeePlan {
   252	  const issues = validatePublicTdeeInput(input);
   253	  if (issues.length > 0) {
   254	    const error = issues.map((issue) => issue.message).join(" ");
   255	    throw new Error(error);
   256	  }
   257	
   258	  const result = calculateMacros({
   259	    gender: input.gender,
   260	    age: input.age,

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: lib/nutrition/types.ts

     1	// lib/nutrition/types.ts

     3	export interface NutritionProtocol {
     4	  id: string
     5	  client_id: string
     6	  coach_id: string
     7	  name: string
     8	  status: 'draft' | 'shared'
     9	  notes: string | null
    10	  schedule_start_date?: string | null
    11	  cycle_sync_enabled: boolean
    12	  tdee_auto_enabled: boolean
    13	  tdee_adaptive_active: boolean
    14	  tdee_adaptive?: number | null
    15	  tdee_adaptive_at?: string | null
    16	  tdee_data_source?: 'weight_delta' | 'formula_proxy' | null
    17	  created_at: string
    18	  updated_at: string
    19	  days?: NutritionProtocolDay[]
    20	  schedule_slots?: NutritionProtocolScheduleSlot[]
    21	}
    22	
    23	export interface NutritionProtocolDay {
    24	  id: string
    25	  protocol_id: string
    26	  name: string
    27	  position: number
    28	  calories: number | null
    29	  protein_g: number | null
    30	  carbs_g: number | null
    31	  fat_g: number | null
    32	  hydration_ml: number | null
    33	  carb_cycle_type: 'high' | 'medium' | 'low' | null
    34	  cycle_sync_phase: 'follicular' | 'ovulatory' | 'luteal' | 'menstrual' | null
    35	  recommendations: string | null
    36	  created_at: string
    37	}
    38	
    39	export interface NutritionProtocolScheduleSlot {
    40	  id: string
    41	  protocol_id: string
    42	  week_index: number
    43	  dow: number
    44	  protocol_day_position: number
    45	  created_at: string
    46	}
    47	
    48	// Local state for a day being edited in the tool (includes unsaved changes)
    49	export interface DayDraft {
    50	  localId: string        // temp id for new days not yet saved
    51	  dbId?: string          // undefined until saved
    52	  name: string
    53	  calories: string       // string for input binding
    54	  protein_g: string
    55	  carbs_g: string
    56	  fat_g: string
    57	  hydration_ml: string
    58	  carb_cycle_type: 'high' | 'medium' | 'low' | ''
    59	  cycle_sync_phase: 'follicular' | 'ovulatory' | 'luteal' | 'menstrual' | ''
    60	  recommendations: string
    61	}
    62	
    63	export function emptyDayDraft(name = 'Nouveau jour'): DayDraft {
    64	  return {
    65	    localId: crypto.randomUUID(),
    66	    name,
    67	    calories: '',
    68	    protein_g: '',
    69	    carbs_g: '',
    70	    fat_g: '',
    71	    hydration_ml: '',
    72	    carb_cycle_type: '',
    73	    cycle_sync_phase: '',
    74	    recommendations: '',
    75	  }
    76	}
    77	
    78	export function dayDraftFromDb(day: NutritionProtocolDay): DayDraft {
    79	  return {
    80	    localId: day.id,
    81	    dbId: day.id,
    82	    name: day.name,
    83	    calories: day.calories != null ? String(day.calories) : '',
    84	    protein_g: day.protein_g != null ? String(day.protein_g) : '',
    85	    carbs_g: day.carbs_g != null ? String(day.carbs_g) : '',
    86	    fat_g: day.fat_g != null ? String(day.fat_g) : '',
    87	    hydration_ml: day.hydration_ml != null ? String(day.hydration_ml) : '',
    88	    carb_cycle_type: day.carb_cycle_type ?? '',
    89	    cycle_sync_phase: day.cycle_sync_phase ?? '',
    90	    recommendations: day.recommendations ?? '',
    91	  }
    92	}
    93	
    94	// Enriched client data for pre-filling the tool
    95	export interface NutritionClientData {
    96	  id: string
    97	  name: string
    98	  gender: string | null
    99	  age: number | null
   100	  height_cm: number | null
   101	  weight_kg: number | null
   102	  body_fat_pct: number | null
   103	  muscle_mass_kg: number | null
   104	  lean_mass_kg: number | null
   105	  bmr_kcal_measured: number | null
   106	  visceral_fat_level: number | null
   107	  weekly_frequency: number | null
   108	  transformation_phase?: string | null
   109	  training_goal: string | null
   110	  sport_practice: string | null
   111	  session_duration_min: number | null
   112	  training_calories_weekly: number | null
   113	  cardio_frequency: number | null
   114	  cardio_duration_min: number | null
   115	  daily_steps: number | null
   116	  stress_level: number | null
   117	  sleep_duration_h: number | null
   118	  sleep_quality: number | null
   119	  energy_level: number | null
   120	  caffeine_daily_mg: number | null
   121	  alcohol_weekly: number | null
   122	  work_hours_per_week: number | null
   123	  menstrual_cycle: string | null
   124	  occupation: string | null
   125	  occupation_multiplier: number | null
   126	}

FILE: lib/nutrition/voice.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	import type { CategoryL1, MealType } from './food-items'
     2	
     3	export type VoiceConfidence = 'high' | 'medium' | 'low'
     4	
     5	export interface VoiceItem {
     6	  name: string
     7	  quantity_g: number
     8	  kcal: number
     9	  protein_g: number
    10	  carbs_g: number
    11	  fat_g: number
    12	  fiber_g: number
    13	  confidence: VoiceConfidence
    14	  food_item_id?: string
    15	  is_new: boolean
    16	  category_l1?: CategoryL1
    17	  category_l2?: string
    18	}
    19	
    20	export interface VoiceParseResult {
    21	  items: VoiceItem[]
    22	  meal_type: MealType
    23	  raw_transcript: string
    24	  clean_transcript: string
    25	}
    26	
    27	// ── Filler word maps ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    28	const FILLERS: Record<string, RegExp> = {
    29	  // Use (?:^|\s) / (?=\s|$) for accented words that break \b word boundaries
    30	  fr: /(?:^|\s)(?:euh|donc|voil[aà]|en fait|genre|alors|bon|ben)(?=\s|$)/gi,
    31	  en: /\b(um|uh|so|like|well|you know)\b/gi,
    32	  es: /(?:^|\s)(?:eh|bueno|pues|o sea)(?=\s|$)/gi,
    33	}
    34	
    35	// ── Written numbers → digits (French) ───────────────────────────────────────
    36	const FR_NUMBERS: Array<[RegExp, string]> = [
    37	  [/\bmille\b/gi, '1000'],
    38	  [/\bcinq cents\b/gi, '500'],
    39	  [/\bquatre cents\b/gi, '400'],
    40	  [/\btrois cents\b/gi, '300'],
    41	  [/\bdeux cents\b/gi, '200'],
    42	  [/\bcent cinquante\b/gi, '150'],
    43	  [/\bcent\b/gi, '100'],
    44	  [/\bquatre-vingt-dix\b/gi, '90'],
    45	  [/\bquatre-vingts?\b/gi, '80'],
    46	  [/\bsoixante-dix\b/gi, '70'],
    47	  [/\bsoixante\b/gi, '60'],
    48	  [/\bciquante\b/gi, '50'],
    49	  [/\bquarante\b/gi, '40'],
    50	  [/\btrente\b/gi, '30'],
    51	  [/\bvingt\b/gi, '20'],
    52	  [/\bdix\b/gi, '10'],
    53	  [/\bneuf\b/gi, '9'],
    54	  [/\bhuit\b/gi, '8'],
    55	  [/\bsept\b/gi, '7'],
    56	  [/\bsix\b/gi, '6'],
    57	  [/\bcinq\b/gi, '5'],
    58	  [/\bquatre\b/gi, '4'],
    59	  [/\btrois\b/gi, '3'],
    60	  [/\bdeux\b/gi, '2'],
    61	  [/\bun\b/gi, '1'],
    62	  [/\bune demi\b/gi, '0.5'],
    63	  [/\bun quart\b/gi, '0.25'],
    64	]
    65	
    66	// ── Unit normalizations ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    67	const UNITS: Array<[RegExp, string]> = [
    68	  [/\bkilogrammes?\b/gi, 'kg'],
    69	  [/\bgrammes?\b/gi, 'g'],
    70	  [/\bmillilitres?\b/gi, 'ml'],
    71	  [/\bcentilitres?\b/gi, 'cl'],
    72	  [/\blitres?\b/gi, 'L'],
    73	]
    74	
    75	export function cleanTranscript(raw: string, lang: string): string {
    76	  let text = raw.toLowerCase()
    77	
    78	  const fillerRe = FILLERS[lang] ?? FILLERS['fr']
    79	  text = text.replace(fillerRe, '')
    80	
    81	  if (lang === 'fr') {
    82	    for (const [re, digit] of FR_NUMBERS) {
    83	      text = text.replace(re, digit)
    84	    }
    85	  }
    86	
    87	  for (const [re, abbr] of UNITS) {
    88	    text = text.replace(re, abbr)
    89	  }
    90	
    91	  return text.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim()
    92	}
    93	
    94	type VoiceCategorySuggestion = {
    95	  category_l1: CategoryL1
    96	  category_l2: string
    97	}
    98	
    99	const VOICE_CATEGORY_PATTERNS: Array<{
   100	  category_l1: CategoryL1
   101	  category_l2: string
   102	  patterns: RegExp[]
   103	}> = [
   104	  {
   105	    category_l1: "drinks",
   106	    category_l2: "eau",
   107	    patterns: [/\beau\b/i, /\bwater\b/i, /\bperrier\b/i, /\bsan pellegrino\b/i],
   108	  },
   109	  {
   110	    category_l1: "drinks",
   111	    category_l2: "chauds",
   112	    patterns: [/\bcafe\b/i, /\bcafé\b/i, /\bth[eé]\b/i, /\binfusion\b/i],
   113	  },
   114	  {
   115	    category_l1: "drinks",
   116	    category_l2: "jus-smoothies",
   117	    patterns: [/\bjus\b/i, /\bsmoothie\b/i, /\bshake\b/i],
   118	  },
   119	  {
   120	    category_l1: "drinks",
   121	    category_l2: "laits-vegetaux",
   122	    patterns: [/\blait\b/i, /\bsoy\b/i, /\bavoine\b/i, /\bamande\b/i],
   123	  },
   124	  {
   125	    category_l1: "fruits",
   126	    category_l2: "frais",
   127	    patterns: [/\bpomme\b/i, /\bbanane\b/i, /\bkiwi\b/i, /\bfraise\b/i, /\bframboise\b/i, /\borange\b/i],
   128	  },
   129	  {
   130	    category_l1: "vegetables",
   131	    category_l2: "feuilles",
   132	    patterns: [/\bsalade\b/i, /\bepinard\b/i, /\bépinard\b/i, /\broquette\b/i, /\blaitue\b/i],
   133	  },
   134	  {
   135	    category_l1: "vegetables",
   136	    category_l2: "cruciferes",
   137	    patterns: [/\bbrocoli\b/i, /\bchou\b/i, /\bchoux\b/i, /\bchou-fleur\b/i],
   138	  },
   139	  {
   140	    category_l1: "vegetables",
   141	    category_l2: "autres-legumes",
   142	    patterns: [/\bcarotte\b/i, /\bcourgette\b/i, /\btomate\b/i, /\bpoivron\b/i, /\bconcombre\b/i],
   143	  },
   144	  {
   145	    category_l1: "proteins",
   146	    category_l2: "oeufs",
   147	    patterns: [/\boeuf\b/i, /\bœuf\b/i, /\bomelette\b/i],
   148	  },
   149	  {
   150	    category_l1: "proteins",
   151	    category_l2: "viandes",
   152	    patterns: [/\bpoulet\b/i, /\bdinde\b/i, /\bsteak\b/i, /\bboeuf\b/i, /\bbœuf\b/i, /\bjambon\b/i],
   153	  },
   154	  {
   155	    category_l1: "proteins",
   156	    category_l2: "poissons",
   157	    patterns: [/\bsaumon\b/i, /\bthon\b/i, /\btruite\b/i, /\bcrevette\b/i, /\bpoisson\b/i],
   158	  },
   159	  {
   160	    category_l1: "proteins",
   161	    category_l2: "laitiers",
   162	    patterns: [/\byaourt\b/i, /\bskyr\b/i, /\bfromage blanc\b/i, /\bfromage\b/i],
   163	  },
   164	  {
   165	    category_l1: "carbs",
   166	    category_l2: "cereales",
   167	    patterns: [/\briz\b/i, /\bavoine\b/i, /\bquinoa\b/i, /\bsemoule\b/i, /\bcereale\b/i],
   168	  },
   169	  {
   170	    category_l1: "carbs",
   171	    category_l2: "fecules",
   172	    patterns: [/\bpomme de terre\b/i, /\bpates?\b/i, /\bpâtes?\b/i, /\bgnocchi\b/i],
   173	  },
   174	  {
   175	    category_l1: "carbs",
   176	    category_l2: "pain",
   177	    patterns: [/\bpain\b/i, /\btortilla\b/i, /\bwrap\b/i, /\bbaguette\b/i],
   178	  },
   179	  {
   180	    category_l1: "carbs",
   181	    category_l2: "legumineuses",
   182	    patterns: [/\blentille\b/i, /\bpois chiche\b/i, /\bharicot\b/i, /\bpois\b/i],
   183	  },
   184	  {
   185	    category_l1: "fats",
   186	    category_l2: "huiles",
   187	    patterns: [/\bhuile\b/i, /\bhuile d'?olive\b/i],
   188	  },
   189	  {
   190	    category_l1: "fats",
   191	    category_l2: "noix-graines",
   192	    patterns: [/\bamande\b/i, /\bnoix\b/i, /\bgraines?\b/i, /\bcajou\b/i, /\bnoisette\b/i],
   193	  },
   194	  {
   195	    category_l1: "fats",
   196	    category_l2: "autres-lipides",
   197	    patterns: [/\bavocat\b/i, /\bbeurre\b/i, /\bpur[eé]e d'amande\b/i, /\bpeanut butter\b/i],
   198	  },
   199	]
   200	
   201	export function guessVoiceFoodCategory(name: string): VoiceCategorySuggestion | null {
   202	  const label = name.trim().toLowerCase()
   203	  if (!label) return null
   204	
   205	  for (const group of VOICE_CATEGORY_PATTERNS) {
   206	    if (group.patterns.some((pattern) => pattern.test(label))) {
   207	      return {
   208	        category_l1: group.category_l1,
   209	        category_l2: group.category_l2,
   210	      }
   211	    }
   212	  }
   213	
   214	  return null
   215	}

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: lib/nutrition/weightSamples.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	import type { SupabaseClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js'
     2	import type { WeightSample } from './adaptiveTdee'
     3	
     4	const MIN_WINDOW_DAYS = 7  // below this, regression is unreliable
     5	
     6	/**
     7	 * Find the date when the current protocol was shared with the client.
     8	 * Uses metric_annotations (label LIKE 'Protocole nutritionnel%') as the
     9	 * most reliable signal — this is written automatically when coach shares.
    10	 * Falls back to null if not found.
    11	 */
    12	export async function resolveProtocolStartDate(
    13	  db: SupabaseClient,
    14	  clientId: string,
    15	  protocolName: string,
    16	): Promise<string | null> {
    17	  const { data } = await db
    18	    .from('metric_annotations')
    19	    .select('event_date')
    20	    .eq('client_id', clientId)
    21	    .eq('event_type', 'nutrition')
    22	    .ilike('label', `Protocole nutritionnel%${protocolName}%`)
    23	    .order('event_date', { ascending: false })
    24	    .limit(1)
    25	    .maybeSingle()
    26	
    27	  return (data as any)?.event_date ?? null
    28	}
    29	
    30	/**
    31	 * Collect weight samples from all available sources, deduplicated by date.
    32	 *
    33	 * Window anchoring (priority order):
    34	 *   1. Since protocol share date (metric_annotations) — avoids mixing pre/post diet data
    35	 *   2. Adaptive fallback: tries targetWindowDays → 21d → 30d if not enough samples
    36	 *
    37	 * If the anchored window is < MIN_WINDOW_DAYS, returns empty samples with
    38	 * a tooShort flag so the caller can surface a meaningful error instead of
    39	 * computing a nonsense TDEE.
    40	 *
    41	 * Weight source priority (highest → lowest):
    42	 *   1. client_daily_checkins.weight_kg  (daily, real-time)
    43	 *   2. assessment_responses field_key='weight_kg'  (bilans)
    44	 *   3. coach_client_nutrition_manual_data.weight_kg  (coach override)
    45	 */
    46	export async function collectWeightSamples(
    47	  db: SupabaseClient,
    48	  clientId: string,
    49	  targetWindowDays = 14,
    50	  minSamples = 4,
    51	  protocolName?: string,
    52	): Promise<{ samples: WeightSample[]; windowDays: number; anchoredToProtocol: boolean; tooShort: boolean }> {
    53	
    54	  // Try to anchor to protocol start date first
    55	  let anchorDate: string | null = null
    56	  if (protocolName) {
    57	    anchorDate = await resolveProtocolStartDate(db, clientId, protocolName)
    58	  }
    59	
    60	  const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10)
    61	
    62	  if (anchorDate) {
    63	    const daysSinceAnchor = Math.floor(
    64	      (new Date(today).getTime() - new Date(anchorDate).getTime()) / 86400000
    65	    )
    66	
    67	    if (daysSinceAnchor < MIN_WINDOW_DAYS) {
    68	      // Too soon since protocol start — don't compute, signal tooShort
    69	      return { samples: [], windowDays: daysSinceAnchor, anchoredToProtocol: true, tooShort: true }
    70	    }
    71	
    72	    // Collect samples since anchor date
    73	    const samples = await fetchWeightSamples(db, clientId, anchorDate)
    74	    if (samples.length >= 2) {
    75	      return { samples, windowDays: daysSinceAnchor, anchoredToProtocol: true, tooShort: false }
    76	    }
    77	    // Not enough samples since anchor — fall through to adaptive window
    78	  }
    79	
    80	  // Adaptive window fallback (no anchor or insufficient anchored samples)
    81	  const windows = [targetWindowDays, 21, 30].filter((w, i, arr) => w > arr[i - 1] || i === 0)
    82	
    83	  for (const windowDays of windows) {
    84	    const cutoff = new Date()
    85	    cutoff.setDate(cutoff.getDate() - windowDays)
    86	    const cutoffDate = cutoff.toISOString().slice(0, 10)
    87	
    88	    const samples = await fetchWeightSamples(db, clientId, cutoffDate)
    89	
    90	    if (samples.length >= minSamples || windowDays === windows[windows.length - 1]) {
    91	      return { samples, windowDays, anchoredToProtocol: false, tooShort: false }
    92	    }
    93	  }
    94	
    95	  return { samples: [], windowDays: targetWindowDays, anchoredToProtocol: false, tooShort: false }
    96	}
    97	
    98	async function fetchWeightSamples(
    99	  db: SupabaseClient,
   100	  clientId: string,
   101	  cutoffDate: string,
   102	): Promise<WeightSample[]> {
   103	  const map = new Map<string, number>()
   104	
   105	  // Source 3 (lowest priority) — coach manual data
   106	  const { data: manual } = await db
   107	    .from('coach_client_nutrition_manual_data')
   108	    .select('weight_kg, updated_at')
   109	    .eq('client_id', clientId)
   110	    .not('weight_kg', 'is', null)
   111	    .order('updated_at', { ascending: false })
   112	    .limit(1)
   113	    .maybeSingle()
   114	
   115	  if (manual?.weight_kg != null) {
   116	    const d = String(manual.updated_at ?? '').slice(0, 10)
   117	    if (d >= cutoffDate) map.set(d, Number(manual.weight_kg))
   118	  }
   119	
   120	  // Source 2 — assessment bilans
   121	  const { data: assessmentRows } = await db
   122	    .from('assessment_responses')
   123	    .select('value_number, assessment_submissions!inner(submitted_at, client_id, bilan_date)')
   124	    .eq('field_key', 'weight_kg')
   125	    .eq('assessment_submissions.client_id', clientId)
   126	    .gte('assessment_submissions.submitted_at', cutoffDate)
   127	    .not('value_number', 'is', null)
   128	
   129	  for (const row of assessmentRows ?? []) {
   130	    const sub = (row as any).assessment_submissions
   131	    const d: string = (sub?.bilan_date ?? String(sub?.submitted_at ?? '').slice(0, 10)) as string
   132	    if (d >= cutoffDate && row.value_number != null) {
   133	      map.set(d, Number(row.value_number))
   134	    }
   135	  }
   136	
   137	  // Source 1 (highest priority) — daily check-ins
   138	  const { data: checkins } = await db
   139	    .from('client_daily_checkins')
   140	    .select('date, weight_kg')
   141	    .eq('client_id', clientId)
   142	    .gte('date', cutoffDate)
   143	    .not('weight_kg', 'is', null)
   144	    .order('date', { ascending: true })
   145	
   146	  for (const c of checkins ?? []) {
   147	    if (c.weight_kg != null) {
   148	      map.set(String(c.date), Number(c.weight_kg))
   149	    }
   150	  }
   151	
   152	  return Array.from(map.entries())
   153	    .map(([date, weight_kg]) => ({ date, weight_kg }))
   154	    .sort((a, b) => a.date.localeCompare(b.date))
   155	}
   156	
   157	/**
   158	 * Compute average daily kcal intake from nutrition_meals over the window.
   159	 * Falls back to protocol day 1 calories if insufficient logs.
   160	 */
   161	export async function collectAvgIntake(
   162	  db: SupabaseClient,
   163	  clientId: string,
   164	  windowDays: number,
   165	  protocolFallbackKcal: number,
   166	  anchorDate?: string,
   167	): Promise<{ avgIntakeKcal: number; caloriesSource: 'logs' | 'protocol'; trackedDays: number }> {
   168	  const cutoffDate = anchorDate ?? (() => {
   169	    const d = new Date()
   170	    d.setDate(d.getDate() - windowDays)
   171	    return d.toISOString().slice(0, 10)
   172	  })()
   173	
   174	  const { data: meals } = await db
   175	    .from('nutrition_meals')
   176	    .select('physiological_date, total_protein_g, total_carbs_g, total_fat_g, total_fiber_g')
   177	    .eq('client_id', clientId)
   178	    .gte('physiological_date', cutoffDate)
   179	
   180	  if (!meals || meals.length === 0) {
   181	    return { avgIntakeKcal: protocolFallbackKcal, caloriesSource: 'protocol', trackedDays: 0 }
   182	  }
   183	
   184	  const byDate = new Map<string, number>()
   185	  for (const m of meals) {
   186	    const kcal =
   187	      Number(m.total_protein_g ?? 0) * 4 +
   188	      Number(m.total_carbs_g ?? 0) * 4 +
   189	      Number(m.total_fat_g ?? 0) * 9 +
   190	      Number(m.total_fiber_g ?? 0) * 2
   191	    byDate.set(m.physiological_date, (byDate.get(m.physiological_date) ?? 0) + kcal)
   192	  }
   193	
   194	  const trackedEntries = Array.from(byDate.values()).filter(v => v >= 800)
   195	  const trackedDays = trackedEntries.length
   196	
   197	  if (trackedDays === 0) {
   198	    return { avgIntakeKcal: protocolFallbackKcal, caloriesSource: 'protocol', trackedDays: 0 }
   199	  }
   200	
   201	  const avgIntakeKcal = Math.round(trackedEntries.reduce((s, v) => s + v, 0) / trackedDays)
   202	  return { avgIntakeKcal, caloriesSource: 'logs', trackedDays }
   203	}
   204	
   205	/**
   206	 * Collect client signals needed for v2 adaptive TDEE:
   207	 * - gender (for luteal correction gate)
   208	 * - cycle_phase per day in the window (for female clients)
   209	 * - cycle confidence level
   210	 */
   211	export async function collectClientSignals(
   212	  db: SupabaseClient,
   213	  clientId: string,
   214	  cutoffDate: string,
   215	): Promise<{
   216	  gender: string | null
   217	  cyclePhases: string[]
   218	  cycleConfidence: 'estimated' | 'learning' | 'calibrated' | null
   219	}> {
   220	  // Gender from coach_clients
   221	  const { data: cc } = await db
   222	    .from('coach_clients')
   223	    .select('gender')
   224	    .eq('id', clientId)
   225	    .single()
   226	
   227	  const gender = (cc as any)?.gender ?? null
   228	
   229	  if (gender !== 'female') {
   230	    return { gender, cyclePhases: [], cycleConfidence: null }
   231	  }
   232	
   233	  // Cycle phases from daily checkins over the window
   234	  const { data: checkins } = await db
   235	    .from('client_daily_checkins')
   236	    .select('date, cycle_phase')
   237	    .eq('client_id', clientId)
   238	    .gte('date', cutoffDate)
   239	    .not('cycle_phase', 'is', null)
   240	    .order('date', { ascending: true })
   241	
   242	  const cyclePhases = (checkins ?? [])
   243	    .map((c: any) => c.cycle_phase as string)
   244	    .filter(Boolean)
   245	
   246	  // Cycle confidence from menstrual_cycle_logs count
   247	  const { count } = await db
   248	    .from('menstrual_cycle_logs')
   249	    .select('id', { count: 'exact', head: true })
   250	    .eq('client_id', clientId)
   251	
   252	  const logsCount = count ?? 0
   253	  const cycleConfidence: 'estimated' | 'learning' | 'calibrated' =
   254	    logsCount >= 4 ? 'calibrated' : logsCount >= 1 ? 'learning' : 'estimated'
   255	
   256	  return { gender, cyclePhases, cycleConfidence }
   257	}

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: lib/programs/intelligence/performance.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	export interface SetObservation {
     2	  actual_reps: number | null
     3	  actual_weight_kg: number | null
     4	  completed: boolean
     5	  rir_actual: number | null
     6	}
     7	
     8	export interface SessionObservation {
     9	  completedAt: string
    10	  sets: SetObservation[]
    11	}
    12	
    13	export interface PerformanceTrendResult {
    14	  trend: 'progression' | 'stagnation' | 'overtraining' | null
    15	  suggestion: string | null
    16	  sessionCount: number
    17	}
    18	
    19	function sessionVolumeKg(session: SessionObservation): number {
    20	  return session.sets
    21	    .filter(s => s.completed)
    22	    .reduce((sum, s) => sum + (s.actual_reps ?? 0) * (s.actual_weight_kg ?? 0), 0)
    23	}
    24	
    25	function avgRir(sets: SetObservation[]): number | null {
    26	  const withRir = sets.filter(s => s.rir_actual != null)
    27	  if (withRir.length === 0) return null
    28	  return withRir.reduce((sum, s) => sum + (s.rir_actual ?? 0), 0) / withRir.length
    29	}
    30	
    31	function completionRate(sets: SetObservation[]): number {
    32	  if (sets.length === 0) return 1
    33	  return sets.filter(s => s.completed).length / sets.length
    34	}
    35	
    36	export function detectPerformanceTrend(
    37	  sessions: SessionObservation[],
    38	): PerformanceTrendResult {
    39	  if (sessions.length < 2) {
    40	    return { trend: null, suggestion: null, sessionCount: sessions.length }
    41	  }
    42	
    43	  // Sort oldest → newest
    44	  const sorted = [...sessions].sort(
    45	    (a, b) => new Date(a.completedAt).getTime() - new Date(b.completedAt).getTime()
    46	  )
    47	
    48	  const recent2 = sorted.slice(-2)
    49	  const allSetsRecent2 = recent2.flatMap(s => s.sets)
    50	
    51	  // Rule 1: Overtraining — avg RIR ≤ 1 in last 2 sessions AND completion < 80%
    52	  const rir2 = avgRir(allSetsRecent2)
    53	  const completion2 = completionRate(allSetsRecent2)
    54	  if (rir2 !== null && rir2 <= 1 && completion2 < 0.8) {
    55	    return {
    56	      trend: 'overtraining',
    57	      suggestion: 'Réduire le volume ou ajouter une séance de récupération active.',
    58	      sessionCount: sessions.length,
    59	    }
    60	  }
    61	
    62	  // Volume per session (oldest to newest)
    63	  const volumes = sorted.map(sessionVolumeKg)
    64	
    65	  const allSets = sorted.flatMap(s => s.sets)
    66	  const avgRirAll = avgRir(allSets)
    67	
    68	  // Rule 2: Progression — volume strictly increasing, avg RIR ≤ 4
    69	  const isIncreasing = volumes.every((v, i) => i === 0 || v > volumes[i - 1])
    70	  if (isIncreasing && (avgRirAll === null || avgRirAll <= 4)) {
    71	    return {
    72	      trend: 'progression',
    73	      suggestion: 'Bonne progression — envisager une surcharge progressive (+2.5kg ou +1 rep).',
    74	      sessionCount: sessions.length,
    75	    }
    76	  }
    77	
    78	  // Rule 3: Stagnation — all volume deltas < 3%, avg RIR ≥ 3
    79	  const maxDelta = volumes.reduce((max, v, i) => {
    80	    if (i === 0) return max
    81	    const ref = volumes[i - 1]
    82	    if (ref === 0) return max
    83	    return Math.max(max, Math.abs(v - ref) / ref)
    84	  }, 0)
    85	  const isFlat = maxDelta < 0.03
    86	  if (isFlat && avgRirAll !== null && avgRirAll >= 3) {
    87	    return {
    88	      trend: 'stagnation',
    89	      suggestion: 'Plateau détecté — augmenter la charge ou modifier le schéma de sets/reps.',
    90	      sessionCount: sessions.length,
    91	    }
    92	  }
    93	
    94	  return { trend: null, suggestion: null, sessionCount: sessions.length }
    95	}

FILE: lib/stores/safety-rules.ts

     1	// ============================================================
     2	// lib/stores/safety-rules.ts
     3	// 10 Metabolic & Performance Safety Rules for Phase 2
     4	// Hard-coded business logic to catch dangerous patterns
     5	// ============================================================
     6	
     7	import type { ClientProfile, CalculationResults } from "./useClientStore";
     8	
     9	export type SafetyLevel = "CRITICAL" | "WARNING" | "ADVICE";
    10	
    11	export interface SafetyRuleAlert {
    12	  id: string;
    13	  level: SafetyLevel;
    14	  message: string;
    15	  actionLabel: string;
    16	  logicFix: string; // Pseudo-code or actual fix to apply
    17	  active: boolean;
    18	  emittedAt?: string;
    19	}
    20	
    21	export type SafetyEvaluator = {
    22	  id: string;
    23	  level: SafetyLevel;
    24	  message: string;
    25	  actionLabel: string;
    26	  logicFix: string;
    27	  evaluate: (profile: ClientProfile, results: CalculationResults) => boolean;
    28	};
    29	
    30	/**
    31	 * All 10 metabolic + performance safety rules
    32	 * These rules are evaluated every time profile or calculations change
    33	 */
    34	export const SAFETY_RULES: SafetyEvaluator[] = [
    35	  {
    36	    id: "METABOLIC_SAFETY_01",
    37	    level: "CRITICAL",
    38	    message:
    39	      "Déficit sous le BMR détecté. Risque d'adaptation métabolique sévère et fatigue chronique.",
    40	    actionLabel: "Remonter au BMR + 10%",
    41	    logicFix: "profile.caloriesOffset = (bmr * 1.1) - macros.calories",
    42	    evaluate: (profile, results) => {
    43	      const macros = results.macros;
    44	      if (!macros || !macros.breakdown?.bmr) return false;
    45	      return (macros.calories ?? 0) < macros.breakdown.bmr;
    46	    },
    47	  },
    48	
    49	  {
    50	    id: "PROTEIN_LEAN_MASS_01",
    51	    level: "WARNING",
    52	    message:
    53	      "Apport protéique insuffisant pour la protection de la masse maigre actuelle.",
    54	    actionLabel: "Ajuster à 2.2g/kg LBM",
    55	    logicFix: "profile.macroGoal adjusted → +protein to maintain 2.2g/kg LBM",
    56	    evaluate: (profile, results) => {
    57	      if (!results.macros || !profile.weight || !profile.bodyFat) return false;
    58	      const leanMass = profile.weight * (1 - profile.bodyFat / 100);
    59	      const proteinNeeded = leanMass * 2.2;
    60	      return results.macros.macros.p < proteinNeeded;
    61	    },
    62	  },
    63	
    64	  {
    65	    id: "CYCLE_LUTEAL_CARBS_01",
    66	    level: "ADVICE",
    67	    message:
    68	      "Phase lutéale : Augmentation de la dépense. Ajouter des glucides pour stabiliser la satiété.",
    69	    actionLabel: "Ajouter +30g Glucides",
    70	    logicFix: "profile.caloriesOffset += 30 * 4 (120 kcal from carbs)",
    71	    evaluate: (profile, results) => {
    72	      if (profile.gender !== "female" || profile.cyclePhase !== "luteal") {
    73	        return false;
    74	      }
    75	      // Check if carbs are below optimal for luteal phase
    76	      if (!results.macros) return false;
    77	      const carbsPerKg = (results.macros.macros.c ?? 0) / (profile.weight ?? 1);
    78	      return carbsPerKg < 4; // Example: < 4g/kg in luteal phase
    79	    },
    80	  },
    81	
    82	  {
    83	    id: "PERF_INJURY_OVULATION",
    84	    level: "WARNING",
    85	    message:
    86	      "Laxité ligamentaire accrue (pic œstrogènes). Prudence sur les charges max (>90%).",
    87	    actionLabel: "Brider à 85% RPE 8",
    88	    logicFix: "programTemplate.intensityCap = 0.85 during ovulatory phase",
    89	    evaluate: (profile, results) => {
    90	      return (
    91	        profile.gender === "female" &&
    92	        profile.cyclePhase === "ovulatory" &&
    93	        (profile.workouts ?? 0) >= 4
    94	      );
    95	    },
    96	  },
    97	
    98	  {
    99	    id: "PERF_VOLUME_OVERLOAD",
   100	    level: "CRITICAL",
   101	    message:
   102	      "Volume élevé + Baisse de HRV. Risque de surentraînement systémique imminent.",
   103	    actionLabel: "Appliquer Deload (-30% volume)",
   104	    logicFix: "program.weeklyVolume *= 0.7",
   105	    evaluate: (profile, results) => {
   106	      // Note: HRV data not in current schema, using workouts as proxy
   107	      const isHighVolume = (profile.workouts ?? 0) > 5;
   108	      const isPoorRecovery = (profile.steps ?? 0) < 3000; // Very low activity
   109	      return isHighVolume && isPoorRecovery;
   110	    },
   111	  },
   112	
   113	  {
   114	    id: "HYDRATION_PROTEIN_LINK",
   115	    level: "ADVICE",
   116	    message:
   117	      "Apport protéique élevé. Augmenter l'hydratation pour optimiser la filtration rénale.",
   118	    actionLabel: "Passer à 4L/jour",
   119	    logicFix: "profile.hydration.dailyTarget = 4.0",
   120	    evaluate: (profile, results) => {
   121	      if (!results.macros || !results.hydration) return false;
   122	      return (
   123	        results.macros.macros.p > 200 &&
   124	        results.hydration.liters < 3.5
   125	      );
   126	    },
   127	  },
   128	
   129	  {
   130	    id: "BF_INCOHERENCE",
   131	    level: "WARNING",
   132	    message:
   133	      "Perte de poids > 1.5kg/sem. Risque de fonte musculaire si le BF n'est pas monitoré par plis.",
   134	    actionLabel: "Saisir Plis Cutanés",
   135	    logicFix: 'ui.focus = "skinfold_input"',
   136	    evaluate: (profile, results) => {
   137	      if (!profile.bodyFat || profile.macroGoal !== "deficit") return false;
   138	      // Weekly loss rate approximation: deficit / 7 / 1000
   139	      if (!results.macros) return false;
   140	      const weeklyLossEst =
   141	        Math.max(0, (results.macros.tdee ?? 2000) - results.macros.calories) /
   142	        7000;
   143	      return (
   144	        weeklyLossEst > 1.5 && profile.bodyFat < 15 // Only warn if already lean
   145	      );
   146	    },
   147	  },
   148	
   149	  {
   150	    id: "SUPP_CREATINE_MISSING",
   151	    level: "ADVICE",
   152	    message:
   153	      "Objectif hypertrophie : La créatine monohydrate n'est pas listée dans le protocole.",
   154	    actionLabel: "Ajouter 5g Créatine/jour",
   155	    logicFix: 'coach.supplements.add("creatine_monohydrate")',
   156	    evaluate: (profile, results) => {
   157	      return (
   158	        profile.macroGoal === "surplus" &&
   159	        profile.workouts !== null &&
   160	        profile.workouts >= 3
   161	      );
   162	    },
   163	  },
   164	
   165	  {
   166	    id: "HR_KARVONEN_PRECISION",
   167	    level: "ADVICE",
   168	    message:
   169	      "FC Repos connue. Utiliser la méthode de Karvonen pour des zones de travail plus précises.",
   170	    actionLabel: "Appliquer Karvonen",
   171	    logicFix: 'hrZonesMethod = "karvonen"',
   172	    evaluate: (profile, results) => {
   173	      if (!results.hrZones) return false;
   174	      // Check if resting HR is measured (would be in profile in future)
   175	      // For now, assume this is true if hrZones exist
   176	      return true;
   177	    },
   178	  },
   179	
   180	  {
   181	    id: "RECOVERY_SLEEP_DEBT",
   182	    level: "WARNING",
   183	    message:
   184	      "Dette de sommeil : Sensibilité à l'insuline réduite. Prioriser les glucides complexes.",
   185	    actionLabel: "Modifier sources glucides",
   186	    logicFix: 'macros.carb_quality = "complex"',
   187	    evaluate: (profile, results) => {
   188	      // Note: sleep data not in current schema
   189	      // Using workouts as proxy (high volume = need better sleep quality)
   190	      if (!results.macros) return false;
   191	      return (
   192	        (profile.workouts ?? 0) >= 5 &&
   193	        (results.macros.macros.c ?? 0) > 300 &&
   194	        profile.macroGoal !== "deficit" // During surplus, carbs more important
   195	      );
   196	    },
   197	  },
   198	];
   199	
   200	/**
   201	 * Evaluate all safety rules for current state
   202	 */
   203	export function evaluateSafetyRules(
   204	  profile: ClientProfile,
   205	  results: CalculationResults,
   206	): SafetyRuleAlert[] {
   207	  return SAFETY_RULES.map((rule) => ({
   208	    id: rule.id,
   209	    level: rule.level,
   210	    message: rule.message,
   211	    actionLabel: rule.actionLabel,
   212	    logicFix: rule.logicFix,
   213	    active: rule.evaluate(profile, results),
   214	    emittedAt: undefined,
   215	  }));
   216	}
   217	
   218	/**
   219	 * Get newly activated alerts (changed from inactive to active)
   220	 */
   221	export function getNewlyActivatedAlerts(
   222	  currentAlerts: SafetyRuleAlert[],
   223	  previousAlerts: SafetyRuleAlert[],
   224	): SafetyRuleAlert[] {
   225	  return currentAlerts.filter((current) => {
   226	    const previous = previousAlerts.find((p) => p.id === current.id);
   227	    return current.active && (!previous || !previous.active);
   228	  });
   229	}

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: lib/stores/useClientStore.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	'use client';
     2	
     3	/**
     4	 * useClientStore — Zustand store, source de vérité unique pour le Performance Lab
     5	 *
     6	 * Principe: toutes les données biométriques du client sont centralisées ici.
     7	 * setProfile() → recalculateAll() automatiquement (chain reaction).
     8	 * cyclePhase → macros +200 kcal si luteal.
     9	 * caloriesOffset → override coach sans corrompre la donnée source.
    10	 */
    11	
    12	import { create } from 'zustand';
    13	import { persist } from 'zustand/middleware';
    14	import {
    15	  calculateHRZones, HRZonesResult,
    16	  calculateHydration, HydrationResult, HydrationActivity, HydrationClimate,
    17	  calculateMacros, MacroResult, MacroGoal, MacroGender,
    18	  OneRMResult, OneRMFormula,
    19	} from '@/lib/formulas';
    20	
    21	// ─── Types publics ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    22	
    23	export type CyclePhase = 'menstrual' | 'follicular' | 'ovulatory' | 'luteal' | null;
    24	
    25	export interface ClientProfile {
    26	  weight: number | null;       // kg
    27	  height: number | null;       // cm
    28	  age: number | null;
    29	  gender: MacroGender;
    30	  bodyFat: number | null;      // % — optional
    31	  steps: number | null;        // daily steps
    32	  workouts: number | null;     // weekly workouts
    33	  activityLevel: HydrationActivity;
    34	  climate: HydrationClimate;
    35	  macroGoal: MacroGoal;
    36	  cyclePhase: CyclePhase;      // CycleSync integration
    37	  // Manual overrides (DisplayValue = BaseFormula + offset)
    38	  caloriesOffset: number;      // kcal delta (coach override)
    39	}
    40	
    41	export interface CalculationResults {
    42	  macros: MacroResult | null;
    43	  hrZones: HRZonesResult | null;
    44	  hydration: HydrationResult | null;
    45	  oneRM: OneRMResult | null;
    46	  bodyFatPercent: number | null;
    47	}
    48	
    49	export type SmartAlertLevel = 'info' | 'warning' | 'danger';
    50	
    51	export interface SmartAlert {
    52	  id: string;
    53	  level: SmartAlertLevel;
    54	  message: string;
    55	}
    56	
    57	interface ClientStore {
    58	  profile: ClientProfile;
    59	  results: CalculationResults;
    60	  alerts: SmartAlert[];
    61	
    62	  // Setters
    63	  setProfile: (update: Partial<ClientProfile>) => void;
    64	  resetProfile: () => void;
    65	
    66	  // Compute all results from current profile
    67	  recalculateAll: () => void;
    68	
    69	  // Per-calculator helpers
    70	  setOneRMResult: (result: OneRMResult, formula: OneRMFormula) => void;
    71	
    72	  // Overrides
    73	  setCaloriesOffset: (offset: number) => void;
    74	}
    75	
    76	// ─── Defaults ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    77	
    78	const DEFAULT_PROFILE: ClientProfile = {
    79	  weight: null,
    80	  height: null,
    81	  age: null,
    82	  gender: 'male',
    83	  bodyFat: null,
    84	  steps: null,
    85	  workouts: null,
    86	  activityLevel: 'moderate',
    87	  climate: 'temperate',
    88	  macroGoal: 'maintenance',
    89	  cyclePhase: null,
    90	  caloriesOffset: 0,
    91	};
    92	
    93	const DEFAULT_RESULTS: CalculationResults = {
    94	  macros: null,
    95	  hrZones: null,
    96	  hydration: null,
    97	  oneRM: null,
    98	  bodyFatPercent: null,
    99	};
   100	
   101	// ─── Smart alerts computation (pure) ─────────────────────────────────────────
   102	
   103	function computeAlerts(profile: ClientProfile, results: CalculationResults): SmartAlert[] {
   104	  const alerts: SmartAlert[] = [];
   105	
   106	  // High injury risk: female, ovulatory phase, high intensity training
   107	  if (
   108	    profile.gender === 'female' &&
   109	    profile.cyclePhase === 'ovulatory' &&
   110	    profile.workouts !== null &&
   111	    profile.workouts >= 5
   112	  ) {
   113	    alerts.push({
   114	      id: 'high_injury_risk',
   115	      level: 'warning',
   116	      message: 'Phase ovulatoire + entraînement intense: Laxité ligamentaire accrue. Échauffement 15-20min obligatoire.',
   117	    });
   118	  }
   119	
   120	  // Luteal phase: caloric needs increase
   121	  if (profile.gender === 'female' && profile.cyclePhase === 'luteal' && results.macros) {
   122	    alerts.push({
   123	      id: 'luteal_metabolism',
   124	      level: 'info',
   125	      message: 'Phase lutéale: Métabolisme +8% (progestérone). +200 kcal appliqués automatiquement.',
   126	    });
   127	  }
   128	
   129	  // Low calories warning
   130	  if (results.macros && results.macros.calories < 1400) {
   131	    alerts.push({
   132	      id: 'low_calories',
   133	      level: 'danger',
   134	      message: `Calories critiques (${results.macros.calories} kcal). Risque de catabolisme et dysfonction hormonale.`,
   135	    });
   136	  }
   137	
   138	  // BF% + surplus warning
   139	  const bf = profile.bodyFat ?? results.bodyFatPercent;
   140	  const maxBFForSurplus = profile.gender === 'male' ? 18 : 28;
   141	  if (profile.macroGoal === 'surplus' && bf !== null && bf > maxBFForSurplus) {
   142	    alerts.push({
   143	      id: 'surplus_high_bf',
   144	      level: 'warning',
   145	      message: `BF% élevé (${bf.toFixed(1)}%) avec objectif surplus. Un léger cut est conseillé d'abord.`,
   146	    });
   147	  }
   148	
   149	  // High deficit warning
   150	  if (results.macros && results.macros.adjustment < -600) {
   151	    alerts.push({
   152	      id: 'aggressive_deficit',
   153	      level: 'warning',
   154	      message: `Déficit agressif (${results.macros.adjustment} kcal). Surveiller la force et la récupération.`,
   155	    });
   156	  }
   157	
   158	  return alerts;
   159	}
   160	
   161	// ─── Store ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   162	
   163	export const useClientStore = create<ClientStore>()(
   164	  persist(
   165	    (set, get) => ({
   166	      profile: DEFAULT_PROFILE,
   167	      results: DEFAULT_RESULTS,
   168	      alerts: [],
   169	
   170	      setProfile: (update) => {
   171	        set((state) => ({
   172	          profile: { ...state.profile, ...update },
   173	        }));
   174	        get().recalculateAll();
   175	      },
   176	
   177	      resetProfile: () => set({ profile: DEFAULT_PROFILE, results: DEFAULT_RESULTS, alerts: [] }),
   178	
   179	      recalculateAll: () => {
   180	        const { profile } = get();
   181	        const {
   182	          weight, height, age, gender, bodyFat, steps, workouts,
   183	          activityLevel, climate, macroGoal, cyclePhase, caloriesOffset,
   184	        } = profile;
   185	
   186	        const nextResults: CalculationResults = { ...get().results };
   187	
   188	        // HR Zones — needs age
   189	        if (age) {
   190	          nextResults.hrZones = calculateHRZones({ age, gender });
   191	        }
   192	
   193	        // Hydration — needs weight
   194	        if (weight) {
   195	          nextResults.hydration = calculateHydration({
   196	            weight,
   197	            gender,
   198	            activity: activityLevel,
   199	            climate,
   200	          });
   201	        }
   202	
   203	        // Macros — needs weight + height + age
   204	        if (weight && height && age) {
   205	          const baseResult = calculateMacros({
   206	            weight,
   207	            height,
   208	            age,
   209	            gender,
   210	            goal: macroGoal,
   211	            bodyFat: bodyFat ?? undefined,
   212	            steps: steps ?? undefined,
   213	            workouts: workouts ?? undefined,
   214	          });
   215	
   216	          // Chain reaction: luteal phase → +200 kcal (Oosthuyse 2010)
   217	          const lutalBonus = (gender === 'female' && cyclePhase === 'luteal') ? 200 : 0;
   218	          const totalOffset = caloriesOffset + lutalBonus;
   219	
   220	          if (totalOffset !== 0) {
   221	            // Distribute extra calories as carbs (luteal: satisfy carb cravings)
   222	            const extraCarbs = Math.round(totalOffset / 4);
   223	            nextResults.macros = {
   224	              ...baseResult,
   225	              calories: baseResult.calories + totalOffset,
   226	              macros: {
   227	                ...baseResult.macros,
   228	                c: Math.max(0, baseResult.macros.c + extraCarbs),
   229	              },
   230	            };
   231	          } else {
   232	            nextResults.macros = baseResult;
   233	          }
   234	
   235	          // Body fat — from direct input or estimated
   236	          nextResults.bodyFatPercent = bodyFat ?? nextResults.macros.estimatedBF;
   237	        }
   238	
   239	        const alerts = computeAlerts(profile, nextResults);
   240	        set({ results: nextResults, alerts });
   241	      },
   242	
   243	      setOneRMResult: (result) =>
   244	        set((state) => ({ results: { ...state.results, oneRM: result } })),
   245	
   246	      setCaloriesOffset: (offset) => {
   247	        set((state) => ({
   248	          profile: { ...state.profile, caloriesOffset: offset },
   249	        }));
   250	        get().recalculateAll();
   251	      },
   252	    }),
   253	    {
   254	      name: 'stryvr-client-store',
   255	      partialize: (state) => ({ profile: state.profile }),
   256	    },
   257	  ),
   258	);

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: lib/stores/useClientStoreMiddleware.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	// ============================================================
     2	// lib/stores/useClientStoreMiddleware.ts
     3	// Middleware integration for Phase 2: Safety Rules + Feedback
     4	// Extends useClientStore with automatic rule evaluation
     5	// ============================================================
     6	
     7	import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef } from "react";
     8	import { useClientStore, type ClientProfile } from "./useClientStore";
     9	import {
    10	  evaluateSafetyRules,
    11	  getNewlyActivatedAlerts,
    12	  type SafetyRuleAlert,
    13	} from "./safety-rules";
    14	import { feedbackEmitter } from "./feedback-emitter";
    15	
    16	/**
    17	 * useClientStoreMiddleware — Hook to integrate safety rules
    18	 * Call this once in a top-level layout or context provider
    19	 *
    20	 * Usage:
    21	 *   export function RootLayout({ children }) {
    22	 *     useClientStoreMiddleware()
    23	 *     return <>{children}</>
    24	 *   }
    25	 */
    26	export function useClientStoreMiddleware() {
    27	  const previousAlertsRef = useRef<SafetyRuleAlert[]>([]);
    28	
    29	  // Subscribe to profile and results changes
    30	  const profile = useClientStore((state) => state.profile);
    31	  const results = useClientStore((state) => state.results);
    32	
    33	  // Main effect: evaluate rules on profile/results change
    34	  useEffect(() => {
    35	    if (!profile) return;
    36	
    37	    // Evaluate all safety rules
    38	    const currentAlerts = evaluateSafetyRules(profile, results);
    39	
    40	    // Find newly activated alerts
    41	    const newlyActivated = getNewlyActivatedAlerts(
    42	      currentAlerts,
    43	      previousAlertsRef.current,
    44	    );
    45	
    46	    // Emit feedback for each newly activated alert
    47	    newlyActivated.forEach((alert) => {
    48	      feedbackEmitter.emit(alert.id, alert.level, alert.message);
    49	    });
    50	
    51	    // Update previous state for next evaluation
    52	    previousAlertsRef.current = currentAlerts;
    53	  }, [profile, results]);
    54	}
    55	
    56	/**
    57	 * useClientStoreAlerts — Hook to subscribe to safety rule changes
    58	 *
    59	 * Usage:
    60	 *   const alerts = useClientStoreAlerts()
    61	 *   return (
    62	 *     <div>
    63	 *       {alerts.map(alert => (
    64	 *         <AlertCard key={alert.id} alert={alert} />
    65	 *       ))}
    66	 *     </div>
    67	 *   )
    68	 */
    69	export function useClientStoreAlerts() {
    70	  const profile = useClientStore((state) => state.profile);
    71	  const results = useClientStore((state) => state.results);
    72	
    73	  if (!profile) return [];
    74	
    75	  return evaluateSafetyRules(profile, results).filter((alert) => alert.active);
    76	}
    77	
    78	/**
    79	 * useClientProfileUpdate — Convenience hook for updating profile
    80	 * Automatically triggers recalculateAll
    81	 *
    82	 * Usage:
    83	 *   const updateProfile = useClientProfileUpdate()
    84	 *   updateProfile({ weight: 85 })
    85	 */
    86	export function useClientProfileUpdate() {
    87	  const setProfile = useClientStore((state) => state.setProfile);
    88	  const recalculateAll = useClientStore((state) => state.recalculateAll);
    89	
    90	  return useCallback(
    91	    (partial: Partial<ClientProfile>) => {
    92	      setProfile(partial);
    93	      // recalculateAll is called automatically by the store's internal logic
    94	      // (via the computeAlerts function which runs on profile change)
    95	    },
    96	    [setProfile],
    97	  );
    98	}
    99	
   100	/**
   101	 * useFeedbackListener — Subscribe to UI feedback events
   102	 *
   103	 * Usage:
   104	 *   useFeedbackListener((event) => {
   105	 *     console.log(`Alert ${event.intensity}: ${event.message}`)
   106	 *   })
   107	 */
   108	export function useFeedbackListener(
   109	  callback: Parameters<typeof feedbackEmitter.on>[0],
   110	) {
   111	  useEffect(() => {
   112	    return feedbackEmitter.on(callback);
   113	  }, [callback]);
   114	}
   115	
   116	/**
   117	 * useCardFlash — Hook to flash a card on safety alert
   118	 * Attach to alert card component
   119	 *
   120	 * Usage:
   121	 *   const cardRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
   122	 *   useCardFlash(cardRef, alertId)
   123	 *   return <div ref={cardRef} className={flashClass}>...</div>
   124	 */
   125	export function useCardFlash(
   126	  cardRef: React.RefObject<HTMLElement>,
   127	  ruleId: string,
   128	) {
   129	  useEffect(() => {
   130	    const handleFlash = (event: CustomEvent) => {
   131	      if (event.detail.ruleId === ruleId && cardRef.current) {
   132	        const flashClass = event.detail.flashClass;
   133	
   134	        // Remove any existing flash class
   135	        cardRef.current.classList.remove(
   136	          "animate-flash-critical",
   137	          "animate-flash-warning",
   138	          "animate-flash-advice",
   139	        );
   140	
   141	        // Trigger reflow to restart animation
   142	        // eslint-disable-next-line no-unused-expressions
   143	        cardRef.current.offsetHeight;
   144	
   145	        // Add new flash class
   146	        cardRef.current.classList.add(flashClass);
   147	
   148	        // Remove after animation completes
   149	        setTimeout(() => {
   150	          if (cardRef.current) {
   151	            cardRef.current.classList.remove(flashClass);
   152	          }
   153	        }, 600); // Match CSS animation duration
   154	      }
   155	    };
   156	
   157	    window.addEventListener("safety-alert-flash", handleFlash as EventListener);
   158	
   159	    return () => {
   160	      window.removeEventListener(
   161	        "safety-alert-flash",
   162	        handleFlash as EventListener,
   163	      );
   164	    };
   165	  }, [cardRef, ruleId]);
   166	}

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: lib/training/deloadDetection.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	/**
     2	 * Deload Detection Library
     3	 *
     4	 * Analyzes 4 weeks of training data to detect signs of fatigue, overtraining,
     5	 * or stagnation that warrant a deload week (reduced volume, same intensity).
     6	 */
     7	
     8	export type DeloadSignalType =
     9	  | 'performance_decline'
    10	  | 'rir_inflation'
    11	  | 'completion_drop'
    12	  | 'volume_stagnation'
    13	
    14	export type SignalSeverity = 'warning' | 'critical'
    15	
    16	export interface DeloadSignal {
    17	  type: DeloadSignalType
    18	  severity: SignalSeverity
    19	  title: string
    20	  body: string
    21	  recommendation: string
    22	}
    23	
    24	export interface WeeklyData {
    25	  week: number // 1 = most recent, 4 = oldest
    26	  avgRir: number | null
    27	  completionRate: number // 0-1
    28	  totalVolume: number // kg × reps
    29	  oneRMEstimate: number | null
    30	}
    31	
    32	/**
    33	 * Detect signals that suggest a deload is needed.
    34	 *
    35	 * Signals:
    36	 * 1. RIR inflation: RIR increasing over 3 weeks (getting easier = plateau)
    37	 * 2. Completion drop: Sets completed dropped <75% this week
    38	 * 3. 1RM decline: 1RM dropped >5% over 3 weeks
    39	 * 4. Volume stagnation: Volume unchanged >3 weeks despite good completion
    40	 *
    41	 * @param weeklyData - 4 weeks of aggregated data (week 1 = most recent)
    42	 * @returns Array of deload signals detected
    43	 */
    44	export function detectDeloadSignals(weeklyData: WeeklyData[]): DeloadSignal[] {
    45	  if (weeklyData.length < 3) return []
    46	
    47	  const signals: DeloadSignal[] = []
    48	  const [w1, w2, w3] = weeklyData // most recent first
    49	
    50	  // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    51	  // Signal 1: RIR inflation (getting easier = no progression)
    52	  // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    53	  if (w1.avgRir !== null && w2.avgRir !== null && w3.avgRir !== null) {
    54	    if (
    55	      w1.avgRir > w2.avgRir &&
    56	      w2.avgRir > w3.avgRir &&
    57	      w1.avgRir > 4
    58	    ) {
    59	      signals.push({
    60	        type: 'rir_inflation',
    61	        severity: 'warning',
    62	        title: 'Poids trop léger',
    63	        body: `RIR moyen en hausse depuis 3 semaines (${w3.avgRir.toFixed(1)} → ${w2.avgRir.toFixed(1)} → ${w1.avgRir.toFixed(1)}). Les exercices deviennent trop faciles.`,
    64	        recommendation:
    65	          'Augmente les charges de 2.5-5kg sur tes exercices principaux.',
    66	      })
    67	    }
    68	  }
    69	
    70	  // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    71	  // Signal 2: Completion rate drop
    72	  // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    73	  if (w1.completionRate < 0.75 && w2.completionRate >= 0.85) {
    74	    const severity = w1.completionRate < 0.6 ? 'critical' : 'warning'
    75	    signals.push({
    76	      type: 'completion_drop',
    77	      severity,
    78	      title: 'Taux de complétion en chute',
    79	      body: `Seulement ${Math.round(w1.completionRate * 100)}% des séries complétées cette semaine (${Math.round(w2.completionRate * 100)}% la semaine passée).`,
    80	      recommendation:
    81	        'Signe possible de surentraînement. Envisage une semaine de déload : -40% volume, même intensité.',
    82	    })
    83	  }
    84	
    85	  // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    86	  // Signal 3: 1RM decline (performance loss)
    87	  // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    88	  if (
    89	    w1.oneRMEstimate !== null &&
    90	    w3.oneRMEstimate !== null &&
    91	    w3.oneRMEstimate > 0
    92	  ) {
    93	    const declinePercent = (1 - w1.oneRMEstimate / w3.oneRMEstimate) * 100
    94	    if (w1.oneRMEstimate < w3.oneRMEstimate * 0.95) {
    95	      signals.push({
    96	        type: 'performance_decline',
    97	        severity: 'critical',
    98	        title: 'Baisse de performance détectée',
    99	        body: `Force estimée (1RM) en baisse de ${Math.round(declinePercent)}% sur 3 semaines (${w3.oneRMEstimate.toFixed(1)}kg → ${w1.oneRMEstimate.toFixed(1)}kg).`,
   100	        recommendation:
   101	          'Déload recommandé immédiatement : réduis le volume de 40%, maintiens l\'intensité.',
   102	      })
   103	    }
   104	  }
   105	
   106	  // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   107	  // Signal 4: Volume stagnation (no progress despite good completion)
   108	  // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   109	  if (weeklyData.length >= 3 && w1.totalVolume > 0 && w3.totalVolume > 0) {
   110	    const volChange = w1.totalVolume / w3.totalVolume
   111	    // < 1.02 = less than 2% increase over 3 weeks; not progressing
   112	    if (volChange < 1.02 && w1.completionRate > 0.85) {
   113	      signals.push({
   114	        type: 'volume_stagnation',
   115	        severity: 'warning',
   116	        title: 'Volume stagnant',
   117	        body: `Volume total inchangé depuis 3 semaines (${Math.round(w3.totalVolume)}kg → ${Math.round(w1.totalVolume)}kg) malgré une bonne complétion (${Math.round(w1.completionRate * 100)}%).`,
   118	        recommendation:
   119	          'Ajoute 1 série par exercice composé, ou augmente les charges de 2.5kg.',
   120	      })
   121	    }
   122	  }
   123	
   124	  return signals
   125	}
   126	
   127	/**
   128	 * Compute weekly aggregates from raw session logs.
   129	 * Used to feed into detectDeloadSignals.
   130	 *
   131	 * @param weeklyDataRaw - Raw data with sessions, sets, 1RM estimates per week
   132	 * @returns Aggregated WeeklyData for use in deload detection
   133	 */
   134	export function aggregateWeeklyData(
   135	  weeklyDataRaw: Array<{
   136	    week: number
   137	    sessions: Array<{
   138	      totalSetsCompleted: number
   139	      totalSetsPrescribed: number
   140	      setLogs: Array<{
   141	        actual_reps: number | null
   142	        rir_actual: number | null
   143	      }>
   144	    }>
   145	    oneRMEstimate: number | null
   146	  }>
   147	): WeeklyData[] {
   148	  return weeklyDataRaw.map(week => {
   149	    let totalRirs: number[] = []
   150	    let totalSetsCompleted = 0
   151	    let totalSetsPrescribed = 0
   152	    let totalVolume = 0
   153	
   154	    for (const session of week.sessions) {
   155	      totalSetsCompleted += session.totalSetsCompleted
   156	      totalSetsPrescribed += session.totalSetsPrescribed
   157	
   158	      for (const set of session.setLogs) {
   159	        if (set.rir_actual != null) {
   160	          totalRirs.push(set.rir_actual)
   161	        }
   162	        // Volume is accumulated from set logs (reps × weight) — simplified here
   163	        // In practice, you'd sum actual_reps * actual_weight_kg from each set
   164	        totalVolume += set.actual_reps ?? 0 // placeholder; actual implementation needs weights
   165	      }
   166	    }
   167	
   168	    const avgRir =
   169	      totalRirs.length > 0
   170	        ? Math.round(totalRirs.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / totalRirs.length * 10) / 10
   171	        : null
   172	
   173	    const completionRate =
   174	      totalSetsPrescribed > 0
   175	        ? Math.round((totalSetsCompleted / totalSetsPrescribed) * 100) / 100
   176	        : 0
   177	
   178	    return {
   179	      week: week.week,
   180	      avgRir,
   181	      completionRate,
   182	      totalVolume,
   183	      oneRMEstimate: week.oneRMEstimate,
   184	    }
   185	  })
   186	}

FILE: scripts/audit-visible-food-leaves.ts

     1	import fs from "node:fs"
     2	import path from "node:path"
     3	import { createClient } from "@supabase/supabase-js"
     4	import { matchesVisibleLeaf, sortVisibleLeafItems, type VisibleLeafKey } from "../lib/nutrition/food-taxonomy"
     5	import type { FoodItem } from "../lib/nutrition/food-items"
     6	
     7	for (const envFile of [".env.local", ".env"]) {
     8	  if (!fs.existsSync(envFile)) continue
     9	
    10	  const content = fs.readFileSync(envFile, "utf8")
    11	  for (const rawLine of content.split(/\r?\n/)) {
    12	    const line = rawLine.trim()
    13	    if (!line || line.startsWith("#")) continue
    14	
    15	    const match = line.match(/^(?:export\s+)?([A-Z0-9_]+)\s*=\s*(.*)$/)
    16	    if (!match) continue
    17	
    18	    const [, key, rawValue] = match
    19	    if (!process.env[key]) {
    20	      process.env[key] = rawValue.replace(/^["']|["']$/g, "")
    21	    }
    22	  }
    23	}
    24	
    25	const url = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL
    26	const serviceKey = process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
    27	
    28	if (!url || !serviceKey) {
    29	  console.error("❌ Variables Supabase manquantes")
    30	  console.error("NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL:", Boolean(url))
    31	  console.error("SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY:", Boolean(serviceKey))
    32	  process.exit(1)
    33	}
    34	
    35	const supabase = createClient(url, serviceKey)
    36	
    37	const TOP = Number(process.argv.find((arg) => arg.startsWith("--top="))?.split("=")[1] ?? 120)
    38	const ONLY = process.argv.find((arg) => arg.startsWith("--only="))?.split("=")[1]
